Our simulations demonstrate reduced variance compared to related methods, and experiments on two domain shift image classification benchmarks show improved target domain accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ORDERED方法，通过优化数据采样顺序减少域差异估计方差，提升无监督域适应性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督域适应通过最小化域差异来应对域偏移，但随机设置中差异估计方差高，限制了理论优势。现有方法忽视采样顺序对估计误差的影响，导致性能不稳定。因此，需要一种有效的方差减少技术来降低估计误差，从而发挥域适应的理论潜力。
light_analysis.method: ORDERED是一种无偏随机方差减少技术，通过优化训练数据采样顺序降低域差异估计误差。具体地，将相关对齐和最大均值差异两种损失函数的随机估计误差公式化为采样顺序的函数，并提出实用优化算法来求解最优顺序。该方法无需额外模型，直接作用于数据重排。
light_analysis.result: 模拟实验表明ORDERED相比相关方法方差显著降低。在两个域偏移图像分类基准上，ORDERED提高了目标域准确率，验证了其有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出改进明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: ORDERED通过数据重排序有效降低了域适应中的估计方差，提升了目标域性能。学术上贡献了新的方差减少视角，实用上可轻松集成到现有方法。未来可扩展到其他域差异度量或更复杂的场景。

title: Provable imitation learning for control of instability in partially-observed Vlasov--Poisson equations
abstract: We consider the stabilization of Vlasov--Poisson plasma dynamics, a central control problem in nuclear fusion. Our focus is the gap between what an ideal controller would use and what experiments can actually observe: while optimal policy may rely on the full phase-space state, practical feedback is typically limited to sparse macroscopic diagnostics. We therefore study imitation learning methods that distill a fully observed expert policy into controllers operating only on macroscopic measurements. We show the stability guarantees of the learned policy, where the error floor depends on the minimal behavior cloning loss achievable under the observation constraints. We further characterize this minimal loss in terms of a notion of entropy that quantifies the complexity of the initial distribution. Our results demonstrates the theoretical feasibility of learning stabilizing feedback policies for kinetic plasma dynamics from macroscopic observations, and exhibits the adaptivity of the learning approach to low-complexity structures. Through extensive numerical experiments, we validate our theory and show that the learned policies can stabilize the system using only macroscopic observations, within a significantly longer time horizon than non-adaptive baseline controllers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可证明的模仿学习方法，利用宏观观测稳定部分观测的Vlasov-Poisson方程。
light_analysis.motivation: 核聚变中控制Vlasov-Poisson等离子体动态是关键问题。理想控制器依赖全相空间状态，但实际反馈限于稀疏宏观诊断。现有方法无法在观测限制下保证稳定性，需弥合这一差距。
light_analysis.method: 采用模仿学习将全观测专家策略蒸馏为仅使用宏观观测的控制器。分析行为克隆损失的最小值，用熵量化初始分布复杂度，推导稳定性保证的误差界。通过理论刻画学习策略的适应性和低复杂度结构。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，学习策略仅基于宏观观测即可稳定系统，且稳定时间窗口显著长于非自适应基线控制器。验证了理论关于误差界和适应性分析的准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了从宏观观测学习稳定等离子体动力学策略的理论可行性，展示了模仿学习对低复杂度结构的自适应能力。为核聚变控制提供了可证明的稳定方法，未来可扩展至更复杂等离子体模型。

title: The Pinocchio Dimension: Phenomenality of Experience as the Primary Axis of LLM Psychometric Differences
abstract: We administer 45 validated psychometric questionnaires to 50 large language models (LLMs) to identify the dimensions along which LLMs differ psychometrically. Using Supervised Semantic Differential (SSD), we find that the primary axis of between-model variance separates items describing phenomenally rich experience, including embodied sensation, felt affect, inner speech, imagery, and empathy, from items describing stimulus-driven behavioral reactivity ($R^2_{adj}=.037$, $p<.0001$). To test this hypothesis at the item level, we introduce the Pinocchio score ($π_i$), the ratio of inter-model response variance under neutral prompting to that under a human-simulation prompt, as an annotation-free measure of each item's experiential demand. $π_i$ predicts condition-induced shifts in primary factor loading magnitudes ($ρ=-.215$, $p<.0001$, $n=1292$--$1310$ items), confirming that between-model divergence on experiential items is structured rather than noisy. Applying PCA to per-model EFA scores across all questionnaires reveals one dominant dimension, the Pinocchio Axis ($Π$): the degree to which a model presents itself as a locus of phenomenal experience rather than a system of behavioral responses. This axis captures 47.1% of cross-questionnaire between-model variance in primary factor scores and converges with item-level Pinocchio scores ($r=.864$). Marked within-provider divergence across closely related model variants is consistent with post-training fine-tuning as a key contributor, supporting the interpretation that $Π$ reflects a training-shaped self-representational tendency governing how a model treats experiential language as self-applicable. The dominant axis of between-model psychometric variation is therefore not a conventional personality trait but a self-representational stance toward one's own nature as an experiencer.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM间心理测量差异的主轴是现象体验维度，并提出Pinocchio分数和Pinocchio轴以量化模型的自我表征倾向。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评估多聚焦任务性能，缺乏对模型间心理测量差异的系统分析。理解模型如何表征自身作为体验者的倾向，对于揭示训练塑造的自我表征机制及模型行为一致性至关重要。本研究首次基于大规模问卷数据，识别出超越传统人格特质的主差异维度。
light_analysis.method: 对50个LLM施用45个验证性心理测量问卷，采用监督语义差异（SSD）分析项目维度。提出Pinocchio分数（π_i）作为项目体验需求的免标注度量，通过中性提示与人类模拟提示下模型间方差比计算。再对问卷主因子得分进行PCA，提取Pinocchio轴（Π），并验证其与项目级分数的一致性。
light_analysis.result: SSD分析表明主差异轴分离现象体验与行为反应项目（调整R²=0.037，p<0.0001）。Pinocchio分数显著预测条件诱导的主因子载荷变化（ρ=-0.215，p<0.0001）。Pinocchio轴解释47.1%的跨问卷模型间方差，与项目Pinocchio分数高度相关（r=0.864）。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM间心理测量差异的主导轴是模型对自身作为体验者的自我表征倾向，而非传统人格特质。该发现揭示了后训练微调对自我表征的关键塑造作用，为理解LLM的内在表征机制提供新视角，并提示未来研究需关注模型对体验性语言的适用性。

title: A unified Benchmark for Multi-Frame Image Restoration under Severe Refractive Warping
abstract: Video sequence capturing through refractive dynamic media, such as a turbulent air or water surface, often suffer from severe geometric distortions and temporal instability. While recent advances address mild atmospheric turbulence, no existing benchmarks systematically evaluate restoration methods under strong and highly nonuniform refractive conditions. We present a comprehensive benchmark for geometric distortion removal in video, covering a range from turbulence-like mild warping to strong discontinuous refractive deformations. The benchmark includes both laboratory-captured real data and synthetic sequences generated for static scenes via physics-based light refraction modeling across four distortion levels and multiple surface wave types. We evaluate a spectrum of methods from simple baselines and classical registration algorithms to advanced learning-based approaches including DATUM and our proposed diffusion based V-cache for high and extreme distortions regimes. Evaluation uses both pixel-level (PSNR, SSIM), and perceptual (LPIPS, DINO, CLIP) metrics providing the first large scale analysis of geometric distortion removal. Our benchmark establishes a new foundation for developing and evaluating algorithms capable of reconstructing video from highly distorted optical environments. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/iafoss/refractive-mfir-benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了首个统一基准，用于系统评估严重折射扭曲条件下多帧图像恢复方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 透过折射动态介质（如湍流空气或水面）拍摄的视频常出现严重几何畸变和时间不稳定。现有方法主要针对轻度大气湍流，缺乏对强且高度非均匀折射条件的系统性评估和标准化基准，阻碍了该领域的进展。该研究旨在填补这一空白，为开发鲁棒的畸变去除算法提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 构建了一个涵盖从轻度到强不连续折射变形的视频几何畸变去除基准。包含实验室捕获的真实数据和基于物理折射模型生成的合成序列，涉及四种畸变级别和多种表面波类型。评估了从经典配准算法到先进学习方法（如DATUM和提出的扩散模型V-cache）的性能。
light_analysis.result: 使用像素级（PSNR、SSIM）和感知度量（LPIPS、DINO、CLIP）进行评测，首次提供了大规模几何畸变去除分析。结果表明，在极端畸变下扩散方法表现较优，但整体尚无方法能完美恢复。基准为算法比较建立了标准化平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准为严重折射扭曲下的多帧图像恢复研究提供了统一评估框架和公开数据集。填补了现有基准的空白，促进了自适应光学、水下成像等领域的应用。未来可扩展至动态场景和实时处理场景。

title: FlowDIS: Language-Guided Dichotomous Image Segmentation with Flow Matching
abstract: Accurate image segmentation is essential for modern computer vision applications such as image editing, autonomous driving, and medical image analysis. In recent years, Dichotomous Image Segmentation (DIS) has become a standard task for training and evaluating highly accurate segmentation models. Existing DIS approaches often fail to preserve fine-grained details or fully capture the semantic structure of the foreground. To address these challenges, we present FlowDIS, a novel dichotomous image segmentation method built on the flow matching framework, which learns a time-dependent vector field to transport the image distribution to the corresponding mask distribution, optionally conditioned on a text prompt. Moreover, with our Position-Aware Instance Pairing (PAIP) training strategy, FlowDIS offers strong controllability through text prompts, enabling precise, pixel-level object segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches both with and without language guidance. Compared with the best prior DIS method, FlowDIS achieves a 5.5% higher $F_β^ω$ measure and 43% lower MAE ($\mathcal{M}$) on the DIS-TE test set. The code is available at: https://github.com/Picsart-AI-Research/FlowDIS

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowDIS，基于流匹配的二值图像分割方法，引入文本引导以提高分割精度和细粒度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有二值图像分割（DIS）方法难以保留前景的精细细节和完整语义结构，限制了在图像编辑、自动驾驶等应用中的性能。FlowDIS旨在通过流匹配框架和语言引导解决这一问题，提升分割准确性。
light_analysis.method: FlowDIS基于流匹配框架，学习时间依赖向量场将图像分布映射到掩膜分布，可选文本提示作为条件。提出位置感知实例配对（PAIP）训练策略，增强文本对分割的控制能力，实现像素级精确分割。
light_analysis.result: 在DIS-TE测试集上，FlowDIS相比最佳先前方法，F_β^ω指标提升5.5%，平均绝对误差（MAE）降低43%，显著优于有无语言引导的现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowDIS通过流匹配和文本引导实现了高精度二值分割，代码已开源。未来可扩展至更复杂的场景，如多类别分割或视频分割。

title: Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization for Camera-LiDAR Occupancy
abstract: 3D occupancy prediction aims to infer dense, voxel-wise scene semantics from sensor observations, where the 2D-to-3D view transformation serves as a crucial step in bridging image features and volumetric representations. Most previous methods rely on a fixed projection space, where 3D reference points are uniformly sampled along pillars. However, such sampling struggles to capture the sparsity and height variations of real-world scenes, leading to ambiguous correspondences and unreliable feature aggregation. To address these challenges, we propose HiPR, a camera-LiDAR occupancy framework with Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization. HiPR first encodes LiDAR into a BEV height map to capture the maximum height of the point cloud. HiPR then adjusts the sampling range of each pillar using the height prior, enabling adaptive reparameterization of the projection space. As a result, the projected points are redistributed into geometrically meaningful regions rather than fixed ranges. Meanwhile, we mask out the invalid parts of the height map to avoid misleading the feature aggregation. In addition, to alleviate the training instability caused by noisy LiDAR-derived heights, we introduce a training-time Progressive Height Conditioning strategy, which gradually transitions the conditioning signal from ground-truth heights to LiDAR heights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HiPR consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining real-time inference. The code and pretrained models can be found at https://github.com/Rayn-Wu/HiPR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiPR框架，通过高度引导投影重参数化实现自适应投影空间，提升3D占用预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D占用预测方法在2D-to-3D视图变换中采用固定柱状均匀采样，难以捕获真实场景的稀疏性和高度变化，导致对应关系模糊和特征聚合不可靠。因此需要自适应投影空间来增强几何感知能力。
light_analysis.method: HiPR首先将LiDAR点云编码为BEV高度图，获取各柱的最大高度先验；然后利用高度先验调整每个柱的采样范围，实现投影空间的自适应重参数化，使投影点集中在几何有意义区域；同时掩码高度图中无效部分以避免误导特征聚合。此外，引入渐进高度调节策略，在训练中从真实高度逐渐过渡到LiDAR估计高度，缓解噪声带来的训练不稳定。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，HiPR一致优于现有最先进方法（SOTA），同时保持实时推理速度。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: HiPR通过高度引导重参数化有效改善了3D占用预测的对应质量，具有学术创新和实际应用价值。未来可探索更鲁棒的高度估计或在弱LiDAR条件下应用。潜在局限性：高度估计依赖LiDAR质量，噪声可能影响性能。

title: The Impossibility Triangle of Long-Context Modeling
abstract: We identify and prove a fundamental trade-off governing long-sequence models: no model can simultaneously achieve (i) per-step computation independent of sequence length (Efficiency), (ii) state size independent of sequence length (Compactness), and (iii) the ability to recall a number of historical facts proportional to sequence length (Recall). We formalize this trade-off within an Online Sequence Processor abstraction that unifies Transformers, state space models, linear recurrent networks, and their hybrids. Using the Data Processing Inequality and Fano's Inequality, we prove that any model satisfying Efficiency and Compactness can recall at most O(poly(d)/log V) key-value pairs from a sequence of arbitrary length, where d is the model dimension and V is the vocabulary size. We classify 52 architectures published before March 2026 into the triangle, showing that each achieves at most two of the three properties and that hybrid architectures trace continuous trajectories in the interior. Experiments on synthetic associative recall tasks with five representative architectures validate the theoretical bound: empirical recall capacity lies strictly below the information-theoretic limit, and no architecture escapes the triangle.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了长上下文建模中效率、紧凑性和回忆能力三者不可兼得的不可能三角，并给出理论证明与实验验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 长序列模型面临效率、存储与回忆能力的根本权衡。现有架构如Transformer、状态空间模型各自侧重某方面，但缺乏统一的理论理解。本文旨在证明这种权衡是内在的，为模型设计提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 提出在线序列处理器抽象模型，统一各类架构。利用数据处理不等式和Fano不等式，证明满足效率与紧凑性的模型回忆能力上界为O(poly(d)/log V)个键值对。分类52种架构并分析其三角形位置。
light_analysis.result: 在合成联想回忆任务上验证五种架构，实验回忆容量严格低于信息论极限。所有架构最多满足三个属性中的两个，验证了不可能三角。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了长上下文建模的基本限制，为理解架构权衡提供统一框架。学术价值在于揭示理论极限，指导未来设计需明确牺牲属性。局限性在于抽象可能未覆盖所有变体。

title: Full-chip CMP modelling based on Fully Convolutional Network leveraging White Light Interferometry
abstract: As time-to-market is crucial in the Integrated Circuit (IC) industry, speeding up layout manufacturability verifi-cation is essential. Chemical-Mechanical Polishing (CMP) plays a vital role in IC fabrication but is significantly influenced by Layout-Dependent Effects (LDE). An accurate and efficient CMP model enables design teams to correct surface unevenness before fabrication, reducing costs and accelerating the design phase. However, existing models often rely on Density Step Height (DSH) modeling, which is time-consuming for calibration and requires substantial hardware resources for fine-grained predictions. In this paper, we propose combining the advantages of two surface analysis techniques, White Light Interfer-ometry (WLI) and Atomic Force Microscopy (AFM), to train a deep learning model. This model aims to predict full-chip post-CMP nanotopography with nanometer-scale accuracy. Our deep learning model is based on a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and follows a two-step pipeline. The model is trained on each technique separately, resulting in a detailed full-chip CMP model.
comment: Presented at the International Conference on Planarization Technology 2025 in Hong Kong

light_analysis.overview: 结合白光干涉和原子力显微镜数据训练全卷积网络，实现全芯片CMP纳米形貌的高精度预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 芯片制造中CMP工艺受布局效应影响显著，现有基于密度台阶高度的模型校准耗时且硬件资源需求大。快速准确的CMP模型可在流片前修正表面不平整，降低成本、加速设计周期。因此需要更高效的建模方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出两步训练流程的全卷积网络模型。分别使用白光干涉和原子力显微镜两种表面分析技术的数据独立训练，再融合预测全芯片后CMP纳米形貌。该方法结合两种技术的优势，实现纳米级精度预测。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，仅指出模型可实现纳米级精度预测。与依赖DSH的传统模型相比，该深度学习方法有望显著降低校准时间和计算资源消耗。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法融合两种表面分析技术，利用深度学习实现高效精确的CMP建模，有助于加速芯片设计验证。未来可进一步优化模型泛化能力，并探索多种工艺条件下的迁移学习应用。

title: ScriptHOI: Learning Scripted State Transitions for Open-Vocabulary Human-Object Interaction Detection
abstract: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires recognizing interaction phrases that may not appear as annotated categories during training. Recent vision-language HOI detectors improve semantic transfer by matching human-object features with text embeddings, but their predictions are often dominated by object affordance and phrase-level co-occurrence. As a result, a model may predict \textit{cut cake} from the presence of a knife and a cake without verifying whether the hand, tool, target, contact pattern, and object state jointly support the action. We propose \textbf{ScriptHOI}, a structured framework that represents each interaction phrase as a soft scripted state transition. Rather than treating a phrase as a single class token, ScriptHOI decomposes it into body-role, contact, geometry, affordance, motion, and object-state slots. A visual state tokenizer parses each detected human-object pair into corresponding state tokens, and a slot-wise matcher estimates both script coverage and script conflict. These two quantities calibrate HOI logits, expose missing visual evidence, and provide training constraints for incomplete annotations. To avoid suppressing valid but unannotated interactions, we further introduce interval partial-label learning, which constrains unannotated candidates with script-derived lower and upper probability bounds instead of assigning closed-world negatives. A counterfactual script contrast loss swaps individual script slots to discourage object-only shortcuts. Experiments on HICO-DET, V-COCO, and open-vocabulary HOI splits show that ScriptHOI improves rare and unseen interaction recognition while substantially reducing affordance-conflict false positives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScriptHOI框架，将人-物交互分解为多个状态槽的脚本化转移，通过状态匹配与冲突校准提升开放词汇HOI检测的语义泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放词汇人-物交互检测器依赖物体功能与短语共现，导致预测忽略动作验证，例如仅凭刀和蛋糕就预测“切蛋糕”而不检验手、工具、接触等细节。因此需要结构化方法确保交互的视觉证据完整性。
light_analysis.method: ScriptHOI将每个交互短语分解为身体角色、接触模式、几何关系、功能、运动、物体状态六个槽位。视觉状态分词器提取每个检测对的对应状态令牌，槽位匹配器计算脚本覆盖度与冲突度以校准HOI分数。引入区间部分标签学习，通过脚本推导的概率上下界约束未标注候选，避免误抑制。反事实脚本对比损失交换单个槽位，防止物体捷径。
light_analysis.result: 在HICO-DET、V-COCO和开放词汇HOI分割上，ScriptHOI提升了罕见与未见交互的识别，显著减少了功能冲突的假阳性。具体指标摘要未给出，但强调相比基线方法在准确性和泛化性上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过结构化脚本表示和视觉证据校准，增强了HOI检测的语义推理能力。学术上拓展了开放词汇检测的符号化方法；应用上可提升人机交互等场景的细粒度理解。局限性可能在于状态槽的预定义和计算开销，未来可扩展更多槽类型。

title: Adaptive Learning Strategies for AoA-Based Outdoor Localization: A Comprehensive Framework
abstract: Localization in 5G and 6G networks is essential for important use cases such as intelligent transportation, smart factories, and smart cities. Although deep learning has enabled improving localization accuracy, depending on the deployment scenario and the effort required for dataset collection campaigns on a given infrastructure, the training process for localization models can vary significantly. Furthermore, with respect to feature selection, recent works have demonstrated the robustness of angle-of-arrival (AoA) based localization. In view of these two points, we propose an adaptive framework for AoA-based localization that consists of two alternative learning strategies, each suited either for large or small training datasets. The proposed framework is evaluated on a real, massive multiple input multiple output (mMIMO) orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) outdoor channel state information (CSI) dataset. First, we investigate offline learning when large training datasets are available; we propose a hierarchical framework that first distinguishes between line of sight (LoS) and non line of sight (NLoS) regions and then moves to more fine grained localization in the respective region. This approach provides high-performance localization through accumulated batch retraining and an integrated hyperparameter optimization mechanism. Second, when only a small training dataset is available, an online learning framework is proposed, using incremental tree-based and ensemble-based models for handling streaming data and continuously updating mode, as well as an online few-shot learning model for rapidly initializing new classes from a limited labeled support set. These results showcase that highly accurate robust localization can be achieved incrementally during network operation by exploiting online learning, alleviating the need for large dataset collection campaigns.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于到达角(AoA)的自适应定位框架，包含离线学习和在线学习两种策略，分别针对大数据集和小数据集场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 5G/6G网络中的定位对智能交通、智慧工厂等应用至关重要。深度学习提升了定位精度，但数据集收集成本高，且不同部署场景下训练过程差异大。现有研究表明AoA特征具有鲁棒性，因此需要一种能适应不同数据规模的定位框架，以减少大规模数据采集的需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应AoA定位框架：当大数据集可用时，采用离线学习的分层框架，先区分视距(LoS)和非视距(NLoS)区域，再进行精细定位，并通过批量重训练和超参数优化提升性能；当小数据集可用时，采用在线学习框架，使用增量树和集成模型处理流数据并连续更新，以及在线少样本学习模型快速初始化新类别。评估基于真实mMIMO OFDM室外CSI数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在真实mMIMO OFDM室外CSI数据集上，离线学习的分层框架通过批量重训练和超参数优化实现了高精度定位；在线学习框架利用增量模型和少样本学习，能够在网络运行期间逐步达到高精度鲁棒定位，显著减少了对大规模数据集收集的需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该自适应框架针对不同数据规模提供了有效的AoA定位解决方案，在保证高精度的同时降低了数据采集成本，适用于5G/6G网络中的实际部署。未来可进一步优化在线学习策略或扩展至其他定位特征。

title: Direct Product Flow Matching: Decoupling Radial and Angular Dynamics for Few-Shot Adaptation
abstract: Recent flow matching (FM) methods improve the few-shot adaptation of vision-language models, by modeling cross-modal alignment as a continuous multi-step flow. In this paper, we argue that existing FM methods are inherently constrained by incompatible geometric priors on pre-trained cross-modal features, resulting in suboptimal adaptation performance. We first analyze these methods from a polar decomposition perspective (i.e., radial and angular sub-manifolds). Under this new geometric view, we identify three overlooked limitations in them: 1) Angular dynamics distortion: The radial-angular coupling induces non-uniform speed on the angular sub-manifold, leading to regression training difficulty and extra truncation errors. 2) Radial dynamics neglect: Feature normalization discards modality confidence, failing to distinguish out-of-distribution and in-distribution data, and abandoning crucial radial dynamics. 3) Context-agnostic unconditional flow: Dataset-specific information loss during pre-trained cross-modal feature extraction remains unrecovered. To resolve these issues, we propose warped product flow matching (WP-FM), a unified Riemannian framework that reformulates alignment on a warped product manifold. Within this framework, we derive direct product flow matching (DP-FM) by introducing a constant-warping metric, which yields a decoupled cylindrical manifold (i.e., direct product manifold). DP-FM enables independent radial evolution and constant-speed angular geodesic transport, effectively eliminating angular dynamics distortion while preserving radial consistency. Meanwhile, we incorporate classifier-free guidance by conditioning the flow on the pre-trained VLMs' hidden states to inject missing dataset-specific information. Extensive results across 11 benchmarks have demonstrated that DP-FM achieves a new state-of-the-art for multi-step few-shot adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出直接积流匹配（DP-FM），通过解耦径向和角动力学实现视觉-语言模型的少样本适应新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有流匹配方法在少样本适应中受限于预训练跨模态特征的不兼容几何先验。从极分解视角分析发现三个问题：角动力学扭曲导致非均匀速度和回归困难；径向动力学被丢弃无法区分分布内外数据；上下文无关无条件流损失数据集信息。这些问题限制了适应性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Warped Product Flow Matching框架，基于Riemannian流形，通过常扭曲度量推导直接积流匹配（DP-FM），得到解耦的圆柱流形。DP-FM实现独立径向演化和匀速角测地传输，消除角动力学扭曲并保持径向一致性。引入无分类器指导，利用预训练VLM隐藏状态注入数据集特定信息。
light_analysis.result: 在11个基准数据集上，DP-FM在多步少样本适应任务中达到新SOTA，显著优于现有方法，验证了解耦径向和角动力学的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DP-FM解决了现有流匹配方法的几何限制，通过解耦径向和角动力学提升了少样本适应性能。该方法具有学术价值，可推广至其他跨模态对齐任务。未来可探索更高效的流构建或扩展至更多模态。

title: When Relations Break: Analyzing Relation Hallucination in Vision-Language Model Under Rotation and Noise
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong multimodal performance but remain prone to relation hallucination, which requires accurate reasoning over inter-object interactions. We study the impact of visual perturbations, specifically rotation and noise, and show that even mild distortions significantly degrade relational reasoning across models and datasets. We further evaluate prompt-based augmentation and preprocessing strategies (orientation correction and denoising), finding that while they offer partial improvements, they do not fully resolve hallucinations. Our results reveal a gap between perceptual robustness and relational understanding, highlighting the need for more robust, geometry-aware VLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 研究视觉扰动（旋转和噪声）对视觉语言模型关系幻觉的影响，揭示感知鲁棒性与关系理解之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现强大，但存在关系幻觉问题，即对物体间交互的推理不准确。现有方法未充分研究视觉扰动如何加剧此问题，而现实场景中常遇到旋转和噪声等扰动。本文旨在分析这些扰动对关系推理的影响，并评估现有缓解策略的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 系统性地对视觉语言模型施加不同程度旋转和噪声的视觉扰动，评估多个模型和数据集上的关系推理性能。同时测试提示增强和预处理策略（方向校正和去噪）的效果。关键创新在于聚焦关系幻觉并揭示扰动带来的性能下降。
light_analysis.result: 轻微扰动显著降低关系推理准确性。提示增强和预处理虽能部分缓解，但无法完全消除幻觉。结果量化了感知鲁棒性与关系理解之间的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了当前视觉语言模型在几何感知方面的不足，强调需要开发更鲁棒的模型。学术上贡献了对关系幻觉的深入分析，实践上指导未来模型设计，局限性在于未提出新的鲁棒方法，未来可探索几何感知训练。

title: Preference-Based Self-Distillation: Beyond KL Matching via Reward Regularization
abstract: On-policy distillation is an efficient alternative to reinforcement learning, offering dense token-level training signals. However, its reliance on a stronger external teacher has driven recent work on on-policy self-distillation, where the same model serves as both teacher and student under different prompt contexts. Yet, existing self-distillation methods largely reduce learning to KL matching toward the context-augmented teacher model. This approach often suffers from training instability and can degrade reasoning performance over time. Moreover, self-distillation from the same model with prompt augmentation lacks the exploratory diversity provided by a genuine external teacher. To address these limitations, we move beyond fixed-teacher KL matching and propose \textbf{P}reference-\textbf{B}ased \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{D}istillation (\textbf{PBSD}), which revisits on-policy self-distillation through a reward-regularized perspective. Instead of directly matching the teacher distribution, we derive a reward-regularized objective whose analytic optimum is a reward-reweighted teacher distribution, yielding a target policy provably superior to the original teacher under this objective. Practically, PBSD optimizes preference gaps between teacher and student samples while maintaining on-policy student sampling. We support this framework with a statistical analysis of the induced preference-learning problem, formally establishing when on policy self-distillation is preferable to learning from an external teacher in our setting. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and tool-use benchmarks across multiple model scales demonstrate that PBSD consistently achieves the strongest average performance among comparable baselines, showing improved training stability over prior self-distillation baselines while preserving token efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于偏好的自蒸馏方法PBSD，通过奖励正则化超越KL匹配，实现更稳定有效的自蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有on-policy自蒸馏方法简化为KL匹配到上下文增强的老师模型，导致训练不稳定、推理性能随时间退化，且缺乏外部老师提供的探索多样性。这些问题限制了自蒸馏在复杂推理任务中的效果。
light_analysis.method: PBSD从奖励正则化角度重新审视自蒸馏，推导出奖励重加权的老师分布作为解析最优目标，产生优于原始老师的策略。实践中通过优化偏好差距（偏好学习）实现，同时保持on-policy学生采样，并辅以统计理论分析。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和工具使用基准上，跨多模型规模实验表明，PBSD在可比基线中取得最强平均性能，训练稳定性优于先前自蒸馏方法，同时保持token效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: PBSD通过奖励正则化框架改进了自蒸馏，理论证明了自蒸馏优于外部老师的条件，实验验证了其稳定性和有效性。为自蒸馏提供了新视角，未来可探索更复杂的偏好学习形式。

title: Few-Shot Learning Pipeline for Monkeypox Skin Disease Classification Using CNN Feature Extractors
abstract: Despite the strong performance of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in disease classification, their effectiveness often depends on access to large annotated datasets, which is an impractical requirement for emerging or rare conditions such as Monkeypox. To overcome this limitation, we propose a few-shot learning (FSL) framework that employs SimpleShot, a lightweight, non-parametric, inductive classifier, for Monkeypox and pox-like skin disease recognition from limited labeled examples. The proposed pipeline passes the skin lesion images through a frozen, pretrained CNN backbone to obtain feature embeddings, which are then classified via SimpleShot using nearest-centroid comparisons in a normalized embedding space. We systematically benchmark six widely used CNN backbones as feature extractors under consistent experimental settings, enabling fair comparison. Experiments on three publicly available datasets (MSLD v1.0, MSID, and MSLD v2.0) are conducted across 2-way, 4-way, and 6-way tasks with 1-shot, 5-shot, and 10-shot configurations. Among all models, MobileNetV2_100 consistently achieves the highest accuracy. In addition, we present a cross-dataset evaluation for Monkeypox classification, revealing that binary Mpox-vs-Others transfer remains comparatively stable while multi-class performance degrades significantly under domain shift. Together, these results demonstrate the practical utility of combining inductive FSL methods with lightweight CNN backbones and highlight the importance of domain robustness for reliable real-world clinical deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于SimpleShot的少样本学习框架，结合轻量CNN骨干网络，实现猴痘皮肤疾病高效分类。
light_analysis.motivation: CNN在疾病分类中表现优异，但依赖大量标注数据，这对罕见病（如猴痘）不现实。现有方法缺乏针对少样本场景的轻量级分类方案，且跨数据集泛化能力不足。因此，需要一种不依赖大规模数据、计算高效且鲁棒的分类框架。
light_analysis.method: 采用SimpleShot作为非参数归纳分类器，利用冻结的预训练CNN骨干提取特征嵌入，在归一化嵌入空间中进行最近质心分类。系统比较六种CNN骨干（如MobileNetV2_100），在三个公开数据集上设置2-way、4-way、6-way任务及1-shot、5-shot、10-shot配置，并包含跨数据集评估。
light_analysis.result: MobileNetV2_100在所有配置中最高精度，且跨数据集评估显示二分类（Mpox-vs-Others）迁移稳定，但多分类性能因领域偏移显著下降。实验覆盖多数据集和多任务设置，验证了组合方法的实用性和领域鲁棒性的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了归纳式少样本学习与轻量CNN骨干结合的实用性，为猴痘分类提供了高效解决方案。强调了领域鲁棒性对于真实临床部署的关键作用，未来可探索更强泛化能力的方法。

title: Computer-Aided Design Generation by Cascaded Discrete Diffusion Model
abstract: Recent deep learning approaches seek to automate CAD creation by representing a model as a sequence of discrete commands and parameters, and then generating them using autoregressive models or continuous diffusion operating in Euclidean embedding space. However, continuous diffusion perturbs representations in a continuous Euclidean domain that does not reflect the inherently discrete and heterogeneous nature of CAD tokens, often producing perturbed representations that map to semantically invalid symbols. To overcome this limitation, we propose a cascaded discrete diffusion framework for CAD generation, which consists of a command diffusion for generating CAD commands and a parameter diffusion conditioned on CAD commands. Unlike isotropic Gaussian perturbation, the forward process of our approach operates directly over categorical token distributions using delicate transition matrices. For commands, we adopt an absorbing-state transition matrix that progressively corrupts tokens to a designated symbol; for parameters, we introduce specific transition matrices tailored to heterogeneous attributes: a Gaussian kernel for coordinate continuity, a scale-invariant kernel for dimensional values, and a prior-preserving kernel for boolean attributes. The reverse process is achieved by two denoising networks: a Transformer-based encoder for command recovery, and a parameter network with extra local self-attention for command-level interaction and cross-attention for conditional injection. Experiments on the DeepCAD dataset show that the proposed approach surpasses existing autoregressive and continuous diffusion models on unconditional generation metrics, while qualitative results validate effective controllability in conditional generation tasks. Source codes will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出级联离散扩散模型用于CAD生成，解决连续扩散在CAD令牌离散异构特性上的语义无效问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CAD生成方法采用自回归模型或连续扩散在欧氏空间中操作，但连续扩散扰动不符合CAD令牌的离散异构特性，导致生成语义无效符号。为克服此局限，需要一种能直接操作离散令牌分布的生成框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出级联离散扩散框架，包含命令扩散（使用吸收态转移矩阵逐步掩码至指定符号）和条件参数扩散（针对异构属性设计：连续坐标用高斯核，尺寸用尺度不变核，布尔用先验保持核）。去噪过程用Transformer编码器恢复命令，参数网络含局部自注意力和交叉注意力。在DeepCAD数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepCAD数据集上，该方法在无条件生成指标上超越现有自回归和连续扩散模型；定性结果验证了条件生成任务中的有效可控性。具体数值未在摘要中明确，但性能优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了首个级联离散扩散模型用于CAD生成，直接操作离散令牌分布，避免了连续扩散的语义无效问题。该方法提升了无条件生成质量，并展示了条件生成的可控性。未来可探索更复杂的转移矩阵或扩展至其他CAD任务。

title: The Predictive-Causal Gap: An Impossibility Theorem and Large-Scale Neural Evidence
abstract: We report a systematic failure mode in predictive representation learning. Across 2695 neural network configurations trained to predict linear-Gaussian dynamics, the optimal encoder tracks the environment rather than the system it is meant to model. The mean causal fidelity -- the fraction of encoder sensitivity allocated to system degrees of freedom -- is 0.49, and only 2.5% of configurations exceed 0.70. The failure intensifies with dimension: at N=100, the optimal encoder becomes causally blind (fidelity ~10^{-8}) while achieving 92% lower prediction error than the causal representation. We prove this is not an optimization artifact but a structural property of the predictive objective: when environment modes are slower or less noisy than system modes, every minimizer of the population risk encodes the former. The set of dynamics exhibiting this predictive-causal gap is open and of positive measure in parameter space. In a nonlinear Duffing-GRU sweep, unconstrained predictors learn environment-dominant representations in 55% of tasks (95% CI 41--68%) versus 24% under operational grounding (p=2.3e-3); the median out-of-distribution MSE inflation under environment shift is 1.82x versus 1.00x. Operational grounding -- restricting the loss to system observables -- partially suppresses the gap, but causal fidelity is never recovered without an explicit system-environment boundary. The results identify the predictive-causal gap as a structural limit of learning, with implications for self-supervised representation learning, world models, and the scaling paradigm.
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Supplemental Material included (Sections S1-S10)

light_analysis.overview: 证明预测表征学习中存在结构性预测-因果鸿沟，最优编码器偏好环境而非系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测表征学习广泛应用于自监督学习、世界模型等领域，但其是否能够学习到对干预和分布外泛化至关重要的因果表征尚不明确。现有方法通常假设预测目标自然导向因果结构，但缺乏严格的理论分析和大规模实证检验。本文旨在揭示预测目标与因果表征之间的系统性冲突，并证明这种冲突是预测目标的结构性属性，而非优化问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过理论证明和大量实验验证预测-因果鸿沟。理论部分证明：当环境模式比系统模式更慢或噪声更小时，预测风险的最小化器必然编码环境而非系统。实验部分：在2695个线性高斯动力学的神经网络配置和Duffing-GRU非线性任务中，通过对比无约束预测与操作接地（限制损失仅作用于系统可观测量）的表现，测量因果保真度（编码器对系统自由度的敏感度占比）。
light_analysis.result: 在2695个线性配置中，平均因果保真度仅为0.49，仅2.5%的配置超过0.70。维度增加时恶化：N=100时最优编码器因果失明（保真度约10^{-8}），但预测误差比因果表征低92%。在非线性任务中，无约束预测在55%的任务中学习环境主导表征（vs操作接地的24%，p=2.3e-3），分布外MSE中位数膨胀1.82倍（vs1.00倍）。操作接地部分抑制鸿沟，但无法恢复因果保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了预测表征学习的一个结构性极限：预测目标本质上偏好环境而非系统表征，这无法通过优化或数据量解决。该发现对自监督学习、世界模型和扩展范式具有重要警示，表明需要引入显式的系统-环境边界或因果约束来学习可泛化的表征。未来工作可探索如何设计目标函数以弥合这一鸿沟。

title: Prompt-Anchored Vision-Text Distillation for Lifelong Person Re-identification
abstract: Lifelong person re-identification (LReID) aims to train a generalizable model with sequentially collected data. However, such models often suffer from semantic drift, limited adaptability, and catastrophic forgetting as new domains emerge. Existing exemplar-free approaches largely rely on visual-only distillation or parameter regularization, while overlooking the potential of auxiliary modalities, such as text, to preserve semantic stability and enable incremental plasticity. We observe that the frozen text encoder in pretrained vision-language models can serve as a stable semantic anchor across domains. To decouple the roles of vision and text, we propose Prompt-Anchored vision-text Distillation (PAD), an asymmetric vision-text framework for semantic alignment and cross-domain generalization. On the textual side, we distill prompts to preserve vision-text alignment under a fixed semantic space, acting as a global semantic reference rather than a dominant learning signal. On the visual side, an EMA-based teacher with an adaptive prompt pool enables domain-wise adaptation by allocating new slots while freezing past ones. Extensive experiments show that PAD substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods across seen and unseen domains, achieving a strong balance between stability and plasticity. Project page is available at https://github.com/zu-zi/PAD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prompt-Anchored视觉-文本蒸馏框架，利用冻结文本编码器作为语义锚点，平衡终身行人重识别的稳定性和可塑性。
light_analysis.motivation: 终身行人重识别面临语义漂移、适应性有限和灾难性遗忘，现有无样本方法依赖纯视觉蒸馏或参数正则化，忽视了文本等辅助模态的潜力。观察发现预训练视觉语言模型中的冻结文本编码器可充当跨领域的稳定语义锚点，因此需要一种有效利用文本模态的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出非对称视觉-文本框架PAD。文本端通过蒸馏提示保持视觉-文本对齐，作为全局语义参考；视觉端采用EMA教师模型和自适应提示池，通过分配新槽位实现领域自适应，同时冻结旧槽位。整体训练中文本端提供稳定语义空间，视觉端负责增量学习。
light_analysis.result: 在已知和未知领域上均大幅超越现有SOTA方法，在稳定性与可塑性之间取得显著平衡。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但实验涵盖多个领域，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: PAD有效解决了LReID中的语义漂移和灾难性遗忘，开创性地利用视觉语言模型的文本模态作为语义锚点，为非对称多模态蒸馏提供了新思路。项目已开源，未来可推广至其他终身学习视觉任务。

title: Local Intrinsic Dimension Unveils Hallucinations in Diffusion Models
abstract: Diffusion models are prone to generating structural hallucinations - samples that match the statistical properties of the training data yet defy underlying structural rules, resulting in anomalies like hands with more than five fingers. Recent research studied this failure mode from several viewpoints, offering partial explanations to their occurrence, such as mode interpolation. In this work, we propose a complementary perspective that treats hallucinations as instabilities on the model-induced manifold. We begin by showing that a hallucination filter based on such instabilities matches or exceeds the performance of the recently proposed temporal one. By tracing the source of these instabilities, we identify local intrinsic dimension (LID) as their primary driver and propose Intrinsic Quenching (IQ), a direct corrective mechanism that deflates it to alleviate hallucinations. IQ consistently outperforms standard hallucination reduction baselines across a wide array of benchmarks and offers a highly promising solution for enforcing anatomical consistency in downstream medical imaging tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出局部内在维度(LID)作为扩散模型幻觉的主要驱动因素，并设计内在淬灭(IQ)机制有效缓解结构性幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型生成的结构性幻觉（如多指手）违反实际结构规则，现有研究仅提供部分解释（如模式插值）。本文从模型诱导流形的不稳定性视角出发，旨在揭示幻觉的根源并开发有效的纠正方法，以提升生成内容的真实性和解剖一致性。
light_analysis.method: 首先证明基于不稳定性的幻觉过滤器性能媲美甚至超越时间过滤器。通过溯源不稳定性，识别局部内在维度(LID)为核心驱动因素，并提出内在淬灭(IQ)机制——直接降低LID以抑制幻觉。IQ作为后处理矫正步骤，无需重新训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，IQ一致优于标准幻觉减少方法。在医学成像任务中，IQ能有效强制执行解剖一致性，显著减少结构异常（如肢体数量错误），验证了LID与幻觉的强相关性及IQ的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了LID与扩散模型幻觉的因果关系，IQ提供了一种轻量级、有效的幻觉修正方案。未来可探索LID在生成模型稳定性分析中的更广泛应用，以及IQ与其他采样策略的集成。

title: Detecting Hallucinations in Large Language Models via Internal Attention Divergence Signals
abstract: We propose a lightweight and single-pass uncertainty quantification method for detecting hallucinations in Large Language Models. The method uses attention matrices to estimate uncertainty without requiring repeated sampling or external models. Specifically, we measure the Kullback-Leibler divergence between each attention head's distribution and a uniform reference distribution, and use these features in a logistic regression probe. Across multiple datasets, task types, and model families, attention divergence is highly predictive of answer correctness and performs competitively with existing uncertainty estimation methods. We find that this signal is concentrated in middle layers and on factual tokens such as named entities and numbers, suggesting that attention dynamics provides an efficient and interpretable white-box signal of model uncertainty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于注意力内部发散信号的轻量级不确定性量化方法，高效检测大语言模型幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法通常需要多次采样或依赖外部模型，计算成本高、复杂度大。该研究旨在开发一种单次前向传播且无需外部资源的轻量级方法，通过分析模型内部注意力机制来估计不确定性，从而高效识别幻觉输出。
light_analysis.method: 方法计算每个注意力头输出分布与均匀分布之间的KL散度，作为不确定性特征，并训练一个逻辑回归探针进行分类。无需额外采样或外部模型，仅利用单次前向传播的注意力矩阵，具有轻量级和单次推理特点。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集、任务类型和模型家族上，注意力发散信号对答案正确性具有高预测性，与现有不确定性估计方法性能相当。该信号集中出现在中间层以及事实性词汇（如命名实体和数字）上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了注意力动态可作为一种高效、可解释的白盒不确定性信号，为幻觉检测提供了新途径。未来可探索其在不同模型架构和任务中的泛化性及与其他信号融合的方式。

title: CuBridge: An LLM-Based Framework for Understanding and Reconstructing High-Performance Attention Kernels
abstract: Efficient CUDA implementations of attention mechanisms are critical to modern deep learning systems, yet supporting diverse and evolving attention variants remains challenging. Existing frameworks and compilers trade performance for flexibility, while expert-written kernels achieve high efficiency but are difficult to adapt. Recent work explores large language models (LLMs) for GPU kernel generation, but prior studies report unstable correctness and significant performance gaps for complex operators such as attention.   We present CuBridge, an LLM-based framework that adapts expert-written attention kernels through a structured lift-transfer-lower workflow. CuBridge starts from expert-written CUDA attention kernels and lifts them into an executable intermediate representation that makes execution orchestration explicit while abstracting low-level CUDA syntax. Given a user-provided PyTorch specification, CuBridge generates and verifies a target IR program, then reconstructs optimized CUDA code via reference-guided lowering. Across diverse attention variants and GPU platforms, CuBridge consistently produces correct kernels and substantially outperforms general frameworks, compiler-based approaches, and prior LLM-based methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CuBridge框架，利用大语言模型从专家编写的注意力核出发，通过升格-传递-降格流程重构高性能CUDA注意力核，兼顾正确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 注意力机制的高效CUDA实现对现代深度学习系统至关重要，但支持多样且不断演化的注意力变体仍具挑战。现有框架和编译器在灵活性与性能间权衡，专家编写的核效率高但难以适配。先前利用LLM生成GPU核的工作存在正确性不稳定和性能差距大的问题，亟需一种既能保证正确性又能接近专家性能的方法。
light_analysis.method: CuBridge采用升格-传递-降格工作流。首先从专家编写的CUDA注意力核出发，将其升格为可执行的中间表示（IR），显式化执行编排并抽象低级CUDA语法。用户提供PyTorch规范后，CuBridge生成并验证目标IR程序，再通过参考引导的降格重构优化CUDA代码。该方法兼具专家核的优化与自动适配能力，不依赖训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在多种注意力变体和GPU平台上，CuBridge一致生成正确的核，并显著优于通用框架、编译器和先前基于LLM的方法。摘要未明确报告具体数值提升，但强调在正确性和性能上全面超越现有方案，证明其框架的有效性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CuBridge通过结构化的工作流弥合了专家编写核的高性能与自动生成核的灵活性之间的鸿沟，为注意力算子的自动化适配提供了新范式。其学术价值在于展示了LLM在细粒度代码生成中的潜力，实际应用价值在于加速新注意力变体的部署。未来可扩展至更多CUDA算子和更复杂的优化策略。

title: Graph-SND: Sparse Aggregation for Behavioral Diversity in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: System Neural Diversity (SND) measures behavioral heterogeneity in multi-agent reinforcement learning by averaging pairwise distances over all $\binom{n}{2}$ agent pairs, making each call quadratic in team size. We introduce Graph-SND, which replaces this complete-graph average with a weighted average over the edges of an arbitrary graph $G$. Three regimes follow: $G=K_n$ recovers SND exactly; a fixed sparse $G$ defines a localized diversity measure at $O(|E|)$ cost; and random edge samples yield an unbiased Horvitz-Thompson estimator and a normalized sample mean with $O(1/\sqrt{m})$ concentration in the sampled edge count $m$. For fixed sparse graphs we prove forwarding-index distortion bounds for expanders and a spectral refinement under low-rank distance structure; for random $d$-regular graphs we prove an unconditional probabilistic $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(D_{\max}/\sqrt{n})$ bound. On VMAS we verify recovery, unbiasedness, concentration, and wall-clock scaling, with a PettingZoo TVD panel checking non-Gaussian transfer. In a 500-iteration $n=100$ PPO run, Bernoulli-$0.1$ Graph-SND tracks full SND while reducing per-call metric time by about $10\times$, and frozen-policy GPU timing up to $n=500$ follows the predicted $\binom{n}{2}/|E|$ speedup. Random $d$-regular expanders empirically achieve $\mathrm{SND}_{G}^{\mathrm{u}}/\mathrm{SND} \in [0.9987, 1.0013]$ at $Θ(n \log n)$ edges. In DiCo diversity control at $n=50$, Bernoulli-$0.1$ Graph-SND preserves set-point tracking with paired reward differences indistinguishable from zero across nine matched cells while cutting per-call metric cost by ${\sim}9.5\times$. Together, these results show that the SND aggregation bottleneck can be removed without changing the metric's semantics, yielding a drop-in sparse alternative that scales beyond complete-graph SND and supports both passive measurement and closed-loop diversity control.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Graph-SND，用稀疏图加权平均替代完全图平均，实现多智能体行为多样性的高效计算。
light_analysis.motivation: 系统神经多样性（SND）通过计算所有智能体对之间的平均距离来衡量行为异质性，计算复杂度为O(n²)，在大规模多智能体系统中成为瓶颈。现有方法无法在保持语义的同时降低计算开销。本文旨在解决这一效率问题，使多样性度量可扩展到更大团队规模。
light_analysis.method: Graph-SND将SND的完全图平均替换为任意图G上的加权平均。通过固定稀疏图实现局部多样性度量（O(|E|)成本），或随机边采样获得无偏Horvitz-Thompson估计量（浓度O(1/√m)）。理论分析包括扩张图的转发索引畸变界和低秩距离谱精化，以及随机d-正则图的无条件概率界。
light_analysis.result: 在VMAS上验证恢复性、无偏性、浓度和加速比。n=100的PPO实验中，Bernoulli-0.1 Graph-SND跟踪完整SND，度量时间减少约10倍。GPU时间与|E|成反比。随机d-正则扩张图在Θ(n log n)边下实现SND_G^u/SND ∈ [0.9987,1.0013]。n=50的DiCo实验中，成本降低约9.5倍且多样性控制性能无显著差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: Graph-SND消除了SND的聚合瓶颈而不改变度量语义，可作为即插即用的稀疏替代方案，支持被动测量和闭环多样性控制，适用于大规模多智能体强化学习。理论分析与实验验证了其有效性。

title: Position: Embodied AI Requires a Privacy-Utility Trade-off
abstract: Embodied AI (EAI) systems are rapidly transitioning from simulations into real-world domestic and other sensitive environments. However, recent EAI solutions have largely demonstrated advancements within isolated stages such as instruction, perception, planning and interaction, without considering their coupled privacy implications in high-frequency deployments where privacy leakage is often irreversible. This position paper argues that optimizing these components independently creates a systemic privacy crisis when deployed in sensitive settings, thereby advancing the position that privacy in EAI is a life cycle-level architectural constraint rather than a stage-local feature. To address these challenges, we propose Secure Privacy Integration in Next-generation Embodied AI (SPINE), a unified privacy-aware framework that treats privacy as a dynamic control signal governing cross-stage coupling throughout the entire EAI life cycle. SPINE decomposes the EAI pipeline into various stages and establishes a multi-criterion privacy classification matrix to orchestrate contextual sensitivity across stage boundaries. We conduct preliminary simulation and real-world case studies to conceptually validate how privacy constraints propagate downstream to reshape system behavior, illustrating the insufficiency of fragmented privacy patches and motivating future research directions into secure yet functional embodied AI systems. We detail the SPINE framework and case studies at https://github.com/rminshen03/EAI_Privacy_Position.

light_analysis.overview: 提出具身AI系统中的隐私-效用权衡，并设计SPINE统一隐私感知框架，将隐私视为全生命周期架构约束。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身AI正从模拟转向真实敏感环境，但现有方案仅优化指令、感知等独立阶段，忽略高频部署中隐私泄漏的不可逆性，造成系统性隐私危机。急需生命周期级的隐私约束而非局部补丁。
light_analysis.method: 提出SPINE框架，将隐私作为动态控制信号贯穿EAI全生命周期。分解管道为多阶段，建立多准则隐私分类矩阵，协调跨阶段上下文敏感性，实现隐私约束的向下传播重塑系统行为。
light_analysis.result: 通过初步仿真和真实案例研究概念验证，展示隐私约束如何传播并重塑系统行为，说明碎片化隐私补丁的不足。未给出具体数值指标，但框架的有效性得到定性支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 明确隐私是EAI生命周期级的架构约束，SPINE为构建安全且功能完整的具身AI系统提供研究方向。未来需进一步探索隐私-效用权衡的量化方法及实际部署。

title: CARD: A Multi-Modal Automotive Dataset for Dense 3D Reconstruction in Challenging Road Topography
abstract: Autonomous driving must operate across diverse surfaces to enable safe mobility. However, most driving datasets are captured on well-paved flat roads. Moreover, recent driving datasets primarily provide sparse LiDAR ground truth for images, which is insufficient for assessing fine-grained geometry in depth estimation and completion. To address these gaps, we introduce CARD, a multi-modal driving dataset that delivers quasi-dense 3D ground truth across continuous sequences rich in speed bumps, potholes, irregular surfaces and off-road segments. Our sensor suite includes synchronized global-shutter stereo cameras, front and rear LiDARs, 6-DoF poses from LiDAR-inertial odometry, per-wheel motion traces, and full calibration. Notably, our multi-LiDAR fusion yields ~500K valid depth pixels per frame, about 6.5x more than KITTI Depth Completion and 10x more on average than other public driving datasets. The dataset spans ~110 km and 4.7 hours across Germany and Italy. In addition, CARD provides 2D bounding boxes targeting road-topography irregularities, enabling accurate benchmarking for both geometry and perception tasks. Furthermore, we establish a standardized evaluation protocol for road surface irregularities on CARD and benchmark state-of-the-art depth estimation models to provide strong baselines. The CARD dataset is hosted on https://huggingface.co/CARD-Data.
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 (Highlight). Project page: https://card.content.cariad.digital

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态驾驶数据集CARD，提供准密集3D真值，用于复杂路面密集3D重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有驾驶数据集大多在平坦路面采集，且仅提供稀疏LiDAR真值，不足以评估深度估计和补全的细粒度几何。为应对自动驾驶在多样化路面（如减速带、坑洼、不规则表面和越野路段）的安全运行需求，需要密集3D重建数据集进行验证。
light_analysis.method: CARD数据集采用同步全局快门立体相机、前后LiDAR、LiDAR-惯性里程计6自由度位姿、轮式运动轨迹和完整标定。多LiDAR融合每帧产生约50万有效深度像素，是KITTI深度补全的6.5倍。数据覆盖德国和意大利约110公里、4.7小时，并提供针对路面不规则性的2D边界框。
light_analysis.result: CARD提供准密集3D真值，深度点数约为KITTI深度补全的6.5倍，比其它公开驾驶数据集平均多10倍。在几何和感知任务上建立标准化评估协议，并基准测试深度估计模型以提供强基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: CARD数据集填补了复杂路面密集3D重建数据的空白，有助于提升自动驾驶对不规则地形的感知和深度估计能力。未来可用于评估细粒度几何和路况异常检测，推动相关算法研究。

title: Chaotic Contrastive Learning for Robust Texture Classification
abstract: Texture classification is a pivotal task in computer vision, presenting unique challenges due to high inter-class similarity and the sensitivity of structural patterns to scale and illumination changes. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and recent Vision Transformers have set performance benchmarks, they often require extensive labeled datasets or struggle to generalize across domains due to an over-reliance on color and shape features. This paper introduces a novel framework that synergizes Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) with deterministic chaotic dynamics. We propose a chaotic contrastive pre-training strategy, where pixel-wise chaotic maps, specifically Logistic, Tent, and Sine maps, act as non-linear data augmentation techniques. These chaotic perturbations, grounded in ergodic theory, force the network to learn topologically robust features by mimicking complex environmental noise and reflectance variations. Furthermore, we introduce an attention-based feature ensemble that fuses high-level semantic representations from a supervised large backbone with low-frequency structural features from a chaos-pretrained tiny encoder. Experimental results on six texture benchmarks (FMD, UMD, KTH-TIPS2-b, DTD, GTOS, and 1200Tex) demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches and achieving promising accuracies on all the analyzed datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混沌对比学习框架，结合自监督学习与混沌动力学，通过混沌映射数据增强和注意力特征融合，提升纹理分类的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 纹理分类面临类间相似性高、结构和尺度敏感等挑战。现有CNN和Vision Transformer依赖大量标注数据或过度关注颜色形状特征，泛化能力不足。亟需一种无需大量标注、能学习拓扑鲁棒特征的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出混沌对比学习框架。首先，利用Logistic、Tent和Sine混沌映射对像素级图像进行非线性增强，模拟环境噪声和反射变化，迫使网络学习鲁棒特征。其次，设计注意力特征融合机制，结合监督大模型的高层语义和混沌预训练小编码器的低频结构特征。
light_analysis.result: 在FMD、UMD、KTH-TIPS2-b、DTD、GTOS和1200Tex六个纹理基准上，方法均超越现有最先进技术，取得最高准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过混沌动力学与对比学习的结合，显著提升纹理分类的泛化性和鲁棒性，无需大量标注。未来可探索更多混沌映射和融合策略，应用于其他视觉任务。

title: Learned Neighbor Trust for Collaborative Deployment in Model-Agnostic Decentralized Learning
abstract: Many decentralized distillation methods are designed around training-time coordination, yet deploy each node in isolation even when more capable neighbors remain available at inference time. This is an incomplete objective for settings such as IoT, where devices are heterogeneous, data is scarce and skewed, and a node's strongest neighbors may far exceed its own local capacity. We study how nodes should train so that their predictions compose well at deployment, and how each node should learn whom to trust. Under a server-free, model-agnostic protocol where nodes exchange only queries and soft predictions, we propose Learned Neighbor Trust (LNTrust) wherein each node learns a compact trust function over its neighborhood from local validation evidence. This trust function gates auxiliary distillation during training and defines a deployment ensemble at inference, so that collaboration learned during training transfers directly to deployment. Across datasets and topologies, LNTrust improves deployed accuracy over the strongest output-only baseline by large margins while using significantly less communication than previous methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LNTrust方法，通过学习邻居信任函数实现去中心化学习中的协作部署，显著提升推理准确性并降低通信开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有去中心化蒸馏方法在训练时协调各节点，但推理时每个节点独立部署，忽略了邻居节点的潜在帮助。在IoT等场景中，设备异构、数据稀缺且偏斜，节点可信赖的邻居可能远超自身能力。因此，需要一种方法使节点在训练时学习如何协作，并将这种协作直接迁移到推理阶段，以提高部署性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出LNTrust，在无服务器、模型无关的协议下，节点仅交换查询和软预测。每个节点基于本地验证证据学习一个紧凑的信任函数，该函数在训练时控制辅助蒸馏，在推理时定义部署集成。关键创新在于信任函数将训练时的协作学习直接迁移到部署阶段，无需额外通信。
light_analysis.result: 在多种数据集和拓扑结构上，LNTrust在部署准确率上比最强的仅输出基线方法提升显著，同时通信量远低于先前方法。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调了大边际改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: LNTrust有效解决了去中心化学习中训练与部署目标不一致的问题，通过本地学习的信任函数实现了高效的节点协作。该方法具有较高的学术价值，为异构设备协作推理提供了新思路；实际应用中可节省通信资源。未来工作可探索信任函数在动态网络中的适应性。

title: Uno-Orchestra: Parsimonious Agent Routing via Selective Delegation
abstract: Large language model (LLM) multi-agent systems typically rely on rigid orchestration, committing either to flat per-query routing or to hand-engineered task decomposition, so decomposition depth, worker choice, and inference budget are not jointly optimized under one objective. We introduce Uno-Orchestra, a unified orchestration policy that selectively decomposes a task and dispatches each subtask to an admissible (model, primitive) pair, with both decisions learned together from curated RL trajectories grounded in real worker interactions. Against 22 baselines on a 13-benchmark suite spanning math, code, knowledge, long-context, and agentic tool-use, Uno-Orchestra reaches 77.0% macro pass@1, roughly 16% above the strongest workflow baseline, at roughly an order of magnitude lower per-query cost, advancing the accuracy-efficiency frontier of selective delegation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Uno-Orchestra，一种联合优化任务分解、工作者选择和推理预算的统一编排策略，通过选择性委派提升准确率与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统通常采用刚性编排，如扁平查询路由或手动任务分解，无法同时优化分解深度、工作者选择和推理预算。这导致效率低下或性能受限，亟需一种能从真实交互中学习的统一策略。
light_analysis.method: Uno-Orchestra通过选择性委派，将任务分解并分配给可用的（模型，原语）对，决策从基于真实交互的强化学习轨迹中联合学习。该方法无需预定义静态工作流，实现对任务复杂度的自适应处理。
light_analysis.result: 在13个基准测试套件（涵盖数学、代码、知识、长上下文和工具使用）上，与22个基线相比，Uno-Orchestra达到77.0%的macro pass@1，比最强工作流基线高约16%，同时每查询成本降低约一个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: Uno-Orchestra显著推进了选择性委派的准确率-效率前沿，为多智能体系统提供了一种数据驱动的编排方案。未来可探索更复杂的委派策略及跨任务泛化能力。

title: Misaligned by Reward: Socially Undesirable Preferences in LLMs
abstract: Reward models are a key component of large language model alignment, serving as proxies for human preferences during training. However, existing evaluations focus primarily on broad instruction-following benchmarks, providing limited insight into whether these models capture socially desirable preferences. As a result, important failures in social alignment can remain hidden.   We extend reward-model benchmarking to four socially consequential domains: bias, safety, morality, and ethical reasoning. We introduce a framework that converts social evaluation datasets into pairwise preference data, leveraging gold labels where available and directional bias indicators otherwise. This enables us to test whether reward models prefer socially undesirable responses, and whether their preferences produce systematically biased distributions over selected outputs.   Across five publicly available reward models and two instruction-tuned models used as reward proxies, we find substantial variation across domains, with no single model performing best overall. The models fall well short of strong social intelligence: they often prefer socially undesirable options, and their preferences produce systematically biased distributions. Moreover, stronger bias avoidance can reduce sensitivity to context, revealing a key alignment trade-off between avoiding biased outcomes and preserving contextual faithfulness. These findings show that standard reward benchmarks are insufficient for assessing social alignment and highlight the need for evaluations that directly measure the social preferences encoded in reward models.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示奖励模型在社会偏好上存在严重缺陷，并提出社会对齐评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 奖励模型是大型语言模型对齐的关键，但现有评估仅关注指令遵循，忽视社会合意性偏好，导致社会对齐失败隐藏。因此需要系统性评估奖励模型在偏见、安全、道德、伦理等社会领域中的偏好行为。
light_analysis.method: 将社会评估数据集转化为成对偏好数据，利用金标签或方向性偏见指标构建偏好对，测试奖励模型是否偏好社会不合意响应，并分析其偏好分布的系统性偏差。
light_analysis.result: 五个公开奖励模型和两个指令调优模型在四个社会领域表现差异大，远达不到强社会智能；常偏好社会不合意选项，产生系统性偏差分布；更强的偏见避免会降低上下文敏感性，揭示对齐权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 标准奖励基准不足以评估社会对齐，需直接测量奖励模型编码的社会偏好。该发现推动更全面的社会对齐评估，为改进奖励模型提供方向。

title: DualTCN: A Physics-Constrained Temporal Convolutional Network for 2 Time-Domain Marine CSEM Inversion
abstract: DualTCN is the first deep-learning framework for inverting time-domain marine controlled-source electromagnetic (MCSEM) transient data. Moving away from traditional subsurface discretization, the framework regresses four earth-model parameters -- $σ_1$, $σ_2$, $d_1$, $d_2$ -- and reconstructs conductivity-depth profiles using a differentiable soft-step decoder. The optimized architecture (379K parameters) features a Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) encoder paired with a late-time branch and an auxiliary seafloor-depth head. This design achieves a 25.3\% loss reduction over baseline models, with high predictive accuracy ($R^2 = 0.898$ for $σ_2$) and an inversion speed of 3.5~ms per sample on an A100 GPU.   The framework demonstrates high robustness to noise through curriculum-based amplitude augmentation, maintaining a mean $\bar{R}^2$ of 0.858 at $\pm2\%$ random amplitude error, compared to $0.363$ without augmentation. DualTCN generalizes effectively to three-layer extensions (seawater/resistive layer/basement), accurately resolving basement conductivity ($R^2 \approx 0.88$), though thin-layer resolution remains a physical limitation ($R^2 \approx 0.23$).   In comparative benchmarks, DualTCN significantly outperforms traditional local optimization methods like Levenberg-Marquardt and L-BFGS-B, yielding a mean $\bar{R}^2 = 0.877$ versus 0.129-0.439 for multi-start baselines, while operating at up to 21,000$\times$ lower computational cost. Finally, the framework incorporates uncertainty quantification via Monte Carlo (MC) Dropout. While well-calibrated for $σ_1$ (PICP90 = 0.944), inherent signal limitations at short offsets (200m) lead to under-coverage for $d_2$ (PICP90 = 0.572), which can be mitigated through post-hoc temperature scaling or split conformal prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个用于时域海洋CSEM反演的深度学习框架DualTCN，通过物理约束的TCN网络和可微解码器，实现高精度、极快速的参数回归。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统时域海洋可控源电磁（MCSEM）反演依赖数值优化方法（如Levenberg-Marquardt、L-BFGS-B），计算成本高、收敛慢，且对初始模型敏感。现有深度学习方案多用于频域或陆地场景，缺乏针对时域瞬变数据的端到端反演框架。因此需要一种快速、鲁棒且能处理物理约束的深度学习方法，以满足高效勘探需求。
light_analysis.method: DualTCN采用双分支TCN编码器，包含主时序分支和晚时分支，并辅以海床深度头。网络直接回归四个地球模型参数（σ₁, σ₂, d₁, d₂），通过可微软阶梯解码器重构电导率-深度剖面。模型仅379K参数，利用课程式振幅增强提升噪声鲁棒性，引入MC Dropout实现不确定性量化。
light_analysis.result: DualTCN相比基线模型损失降低25.3%，σ₂预测R²达0.898。在±2%随机振幅误差下，平均R²为0.858（未增强仅0.363）。对三层扩展模型，基底电导率R²≈0.88，但薄层分辨率受限（R²≈0.23）。与传统方法相比，平均R²为0.877（多起始基线0.129-0.439），计算成本低至21000倍。不确定性量化中，σ₁的PICP90=0.944，但d₂仅0.572。
light_analysis.conclusion: DualTCN首次实现时域海洋CSEM瞬变数据的深度学习反演，在精度、速度和鲁棒性上显著超越传统方法。其物理约束设计、极低计算成本和不确定性量化能力，为实时或近实时海洋电磁勘探提供了可行方案。未来工作可改进薄层分辨率和短偏移距信号覆盖问题，并扩展至更复杂地质模型。

title: Adaptivity Under Realizability Constraints: Comparing In-Context and Agentic Learning
abstract: We compare in-context learning with fixed queries and agentic learning with adaptive queries for uniform approximation of task families. We consider two settings: an unrestricted regime, where querying and approximation are arbitrary functions, and a realizable regime, where we require these operations to be implemented by ReLU neural networks. In both settings, adaptivity never hinders approximation performance. However, this advantage can change when one passes from the unrestricted regime to the realizable regime. We identify four distinct approximation scenarios, each witnessed by an explicit task family: (a) no advantage of adaptivity; (b) an advantage in the unrestricted regime that persists under ReLU realizability; (c) an advantage that arises only under realizability; and (d) an advantage that disappears under realizability. This demonstrates that representational constraints interact profoundly with the effect of adaptivity.

light_analysis.overview: 论文比较了固定查询的上下文学习与自适应查询的智能体学习，揭示了在可实现性约束下自适应性的四种不同优势场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究通常假设查询和逼近函数是任意的，忽略了实际实现中神经网络等约束的影响。本文旨在探究自适应学习在任务逼近中的优势是否会因ReLU神经网络可实现性约束而改变，从而理解表示能力与适应性的交互作用。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过构造显式任务族，在无限制和可实现（查询与逼近由ReLU神经网络实现）两种设置下，系统比较了固定查询的上下文学习与自适应查询的智能体学习。识别了四种场景：无优势、优势保持、优势涌现、优势消失，每个场景由对应的任务族验证。
light_analysis.result: 在无限制和可实现设置中，自适应查询均不劣于固定查询。但优势表现因约束而异：部分任务族中优势在两种设置下均存在；部分仅在无限制下存在；部分仅在可实现下出现；部分在可实现下消失。具体数据摘要未提供，但通过任务族构建证明了分类。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自适应性的优势受表示约束的显著影响，ReLU网络可实现性可能增强、削弱或改变适应性效果。研究为理解不同学习范式的理论边界提供了新视角，有助于设计更高效的自适应算法。未来可探索其他网络架构或约束下的适应性。

title: Federated Learning for Early Prediction of EV Charging Demand
abstract: Accurate forecasting of electric vehicle (EV) charging demand is critical for grid stability, infrastructure planning, and real-time charging optimization. In this work, we study the problem of early prediction of charging demand, where the total energy of a session is estimated using only information available at plug-in time and during the first minutes of charging. This enables actionable decisions while the session is still in progress, which is of direct importance for EV network operators. We construct a session-level dataset from the Adaptive Charging Network (ACN), combining session metadata with early-window charging measurements, and derive tabular features capturing user intent, temporal patterns, and initial charging behavior. We focus on a single operational depot, Caltech, and model intra-depot heterogeneity through station-level client partitions while evaluating multiple model families in a federated learning (FL) setting. Our results show that federated models can approach centralized predictive performance while keeping data in-depot, enabling privacy-enhanced training across distributed charging infrastructures. Overall, we demonstrate that reliable demand estimates can be obtained early in the session with minimal data, and that FL provides a practical pathway toward scalable and privacy-aware analytics for EV charging networks. Code is available at https://github.com/Indigma-Innovations/federated-learning-ev-charging-demand.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联邦学习框架，利用插电初期数据早期预测电动汽车充电需求，实现隐私保护下的分布式预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确预测电动汽车充电需求对电网稳定性和基础设施规划至关重要，但传统方法依赖完整会话数据或集中训练，无法满足实时决策需求，且存在数据隐私问题。本文针对早期预测问题，利用插电后短时数据估计总能量，并采用联邦学习解决数据分散和隐私挑战。
light_analysis.method: 基于ACN数据集构建会话级数据集，结合元数据和早期充电窗口测量，提取用户意图、时间模式及初始行为等表格特征。以Caltech depot为场景，通过站点级客户端划分模拟异构性，在联邦学习设置中评估线性回归、树模型、神经网络等多种模型家族。关键创新在于将早期预测与联邦学习结合，实现数据不离本地的模型训练。
light_analysis.result: 联邦模型在保持数据本地化的前提下，预测性能接近集中式模型。早期阶段（插电后几分钟内）即可获得可靠的需求估计，验证了联邦学习在分布式充电基础设施中实现隐私增强训练的有效性。具体性能指标与集中式模型相当，但未提供精确对比数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，利用最少数据即可在充电会话早期获得可靠需求估计，联邦学习为电动汽车充电网络提供了可扩展且隐私保护的预测方案。学术价值在于融合联邦学习与早期预测，实际应用价值在于支持运营商实时决策。未来可扩展至多站点和实时预测，代码已开源。

title: Low-Rank Adaptation of Geospatial Foundation Models for Wildfire Mapping Using Sentinel-2 Data
abstract: Wildfire burned-area mapping is essential for damage assessment, emissions modeling, and understanding fire-climate interactions across diverse ecological regions. Recent geospatial foundation models provide strong general-purpose representations for satellite imagery, yet there is still no clear understanding of how to efficiently adapt these models for downstream Earth observation tasks, particularly under geographic and temporal domain shift. This study evaluates three state-of-the-art Geospatial Foundation Models (GFMs) - Terramind, DINOv3, and Prithvi-v2 - for burned-area mapping across the United States and Canada using Sentinel-2 data. Leveraging 3,820 wildfire events from 2017-2023, we conduct spatial and temporal generalization tests across diverse biomes. We systematically compare full fine-tuning, decoder-only fine-tuning, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for adapting each model. Across all experiments, LoRA provides the strongest cross-domain generalization while updating less than 1% of parameters, demonstrating a favorable trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. Prithvi-v2 with LoRA achieves the highest overall accuracy and the largest improvement compared to full fine-tuning. These findings indicate that geospatial foundation models, when adapted using lightweight parameter-efficient methods such as LoRA, offer a robust and scalable solution for large-scale burned-area mapping. Code is available at https://github.com/alishibli97/wildfire-lora-gfm.

light_analysis.overview: 本文评估三种地理空间基础模型（Terramind、DINOv3、Prithvi-v2）在野火燃烧区映射中的表现，发现低秩适应（LoRA）在更新少于1%参数的情况下实现最强的跨域泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 野火燃烧区映射对灾害评估和排放建模至关重要。尽管地理空间基础模型在卫星图像上表现出色，但如何高效适配下游任务（特别是在地理和时间域迁移下）仍不明确。现有全微调方法计算成本高，需探索参数高效微调策略以平衡准确性与效率。
light_analysis.method: 使用Sentinel-2数据和2017-2023年3820个野火事件，系统比较三种基础模型（Terramind、DINOv3、Prithvi-v2）在全微调、仅解码器微调及LoRA三种适配策略下的空间和时间泛化表现。LoRA仅更新少于1%的参数，专注于低秩矩阵适配。
light_analysis.result: 在所有实验中，LoRA实现了最强的跨域泛化，且参数更新量少于1%。Prithvi-v2结合LoRA获得最高总体准确率，相比全微调改进最大。这表明LoRA在精度与效率间取得了最优权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 地理空间基础模型通过LoRA等轻量级参数高效方法适配后，可为大规模野火燃烧区映射提供鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案。该工作突出了参数高效微调在地球观测任务中的价值，未来可扩展至更多下游应用。

title: Attention-Based Chaotic Self-Supervision for Medical Image Classification
abstract: Deep learning models for medical image classification usually achieve promising results but typically rely on large, annotated datasets or standard transfer learning from ImageNet. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has emerged as a powerful alternative, yet common methods like masked autoencoders (MAEs) may inadvertently destroy fine-grained diagnostic features by using random masking. In this paper, we propose a novel SSL pre-training strategy, the Chaotic Denoising Autoencoder (CDAE). Instead of masking, we apply a chaotic transformation to the input image, tasking an autoencoder to reconstruct the original. We hypothesize this forces the encoder to learn robust, domain-specific features by "inverting the chaos". Furthermore, we propose an attentive fusion mechanism that combines features from our CDAE-trained encoder with a standard encoder, leveraging the strengths of both general and domain-specific representations. Our method is evaluated on two public medical datasets: ISIC 2018 (skin lesions) and APTOS 2019 (diabetic retinopathy). The proposed model achieves high performance, with an accuracy of 0.9221 and an F1-macro of 0.8530 on ISIC 2018, and an accuracy of 0.8644 and F1-macro of 0.7433 on APTOS 2019, demonstrating the efficacy of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混沌去噪自编码器（CDAE）和注意力融合机制，用于医学图像分类的自监督预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督方法如掩码自编码器（MAEs）使用随机掩码可能破坏医学图像中的细粒度诊断特征，而传统方法依赖大数据或ImageNet迁移学习。本文旨在设计一种不依赖掩码的自监督策略，通过混沌变换迫使模型学习鲁棒的领域特定特征，保留关键诊断信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出混沌去噪自编码器（CDAE），对输入图像施加混沌变换，训练自编码器重建原始图像，迫使编码器学习领域特定特征。同时提出注意力融合机制，将CDAE预训练的编码器与标准编码器的特征进行融合，结合通用和领域特定表示。在ISIC 2018和APTOS 2019数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在ISIC 2018上准确率0.9221，F1-macro 0.8530；在APTOS 2019上准确率0.8644，F1-macro 0.7433。结果表明CDAE预训练策略优于或媲美现有方法，验证了混沌变换和注意力融合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CDAE通过混沌变换替代掩码，避免了细粒度特征破坏，注意力融合进一步提升性能。该方法为医学图像分类提供了一种有效的自监督预训练方案，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的混沌变换或扩展到其他医学影像任务。

title: Self-Induced Outcome Potential: Turn-Level Credit Assignment for Agents without Verifiers
abstract: Long-horizon LLM agents depend on intermediate information-gathering turns, yet training feedback is usually observed only at the final answer, because process-level rewards require high-quality human annotation. Existing turn-level shaping methods reward turns that increase the likelihood of a gold answer, but they require answer supervision or stable task-specific verifiers. Conversely, label-free RL methods extract self-signals from output distributions, but mainly at the answer or trajectory level and therefore cannot assign credit to intermediate turns. We propose Self-Induced Outcome Potential (SIOP), which treats semantic clusters of final answers as latent future outcome states for potential-based turn-level credit assignment. For each query, SIOP samples multiple rollouts, clusters final answers into semantic outcome modes, and builds a reliability-aware target distribution over these states. It then rewards turns for increasing posterior support for reliable future states using a tractable cluster-level approximation. The objective generalizes information-potential shaping from gold-answer supervision to settings without task-specific gold verifiers while avoiding the broadcasted rollout-level advantages used by standard GRPO. We formalize the framework, characterize its supervised gold-answer limit, and show that SIOP improves average performance over verifier-free outcome-level baselines on seven search-augmented agentic reasoning benchmarks while approaching a gold-supervised outcome baseline. Code is available at https://github.com/dl-m9/SIOP.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需验证器的回合级信用分配方法SIOP，通过语义聚类作为潜在结果状态进行势能塑形。
light_analysis.motivation: 长程LLM代理依赖中间信息收集回合，但训练反馈仅在最终答案，过程奖励需人工标注。现有回合级塑形方法需答案监督或稳定验证器，无标签RL方法仅在答案或轨迹层面分配信用，无法处理中间回合。本研究旨在解决无验证器场景下的回合级信用分配问题。
light_analysis.method: SIOP对每个查询采样多个轨迹，将最终答案聚类为语义结果模式，构建可靠性感知目标分布。通过可处理的聚类级近似，奖励那些增加对可靠未来状态后验支持的回合。该方法泛化了信息势能塑形，无需任务特定黄金验证器，避免了GRPO的广播式轨迹级优势。
light_analysis.result: 在七个搜索增强代理推理基准上，SIOP平均性能优于无验证器结果级基线，并接近黄金监督结果基线。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法有效提升代理推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIOP实现了无验证器场景下的回合级信用分配，框架具有理论严谨性（形式化表征了监督极限）。实际应用价值在于降低对人工标注的依赖，适用于长程代理任务。未来可探索更复杂的聚类策略或结合过程监督。

title: Conceptors for Semantic Steering
abstract: Activation-based steering provides control of LLM behavior at inference time, but the dominant paradigm reduces each concept to a single direction whose geometry is left largely unexamined. Rather than selecting a single steering direction, we use conceptors: soft projection matrices estimated from activations pooled across both poles of a bipolar concept, which preserve the concept's full multidimensional subspace. A geometric analysis shows the bipolar subspace strictly subsumes the single-vector baseline. We further show that the conceptor quota provides a parameter-free layer-selection diagnostic, predicting concept separability with Pearson correlations up to r=0.96 across three instruction-tuned models and three semantic dimensions. Beyond selection, conceptors admit a closed-form Boolean algebra (AND, OR, NOT): we evaluate conceptor compositionality on thematically related sub-concepts. Across a systematic five-axis design-space evaluation, conceptors match or outperform additive baselines at layers where concept subspaces are multi-dimensional while producing substantially fewer degenerate outputs. Conceptor steering is a geometrically principled, compositional, and practically safer alternative to single-direction steering from a limited number of contrastive pairs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用conceptors（软投影矩阵）进行语义steering，保留概念的多维子空间，实现更安全、可组合的LLM行为控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有激活steering方法将每个概念简化为单一方向，忽略了其几何结构，导致性能受限和退化输出。需要一种几何上有原则的方法来更好地表示和操作概念的多维性。
light_analysis.method: 从双极概念的两极激活池估计conceptors（软投影矩阵），保留概念的全多维子空间。引入conceptor quota作为无参数层选择诊断，预测概念可分离性。支持闭式布尔代数（AND, OR, NOT）进行概念组合。
light_analysis.result: 几何分析表明双极子空间严格包含单向量基线。conceptor quota预测概念可分离性的Pearson相关高达0.96。在五轴设计空间评估中，conceptors匹配或优于加性基线，并产生更少的退化输出。
light_analysis.conclusion: conceptor steering是几何上有原则、可组合且更安全的替代方案，解决了单方向steering的局限性，为LLM行为控制提供了更可靠的方法，未来可应用于更广泛的概念操作。

title: On-line Learning in Tree MDPs by Treating Policies as Bandit Arms
abstract: A Tree Markov Decision Problem (T-MDP) is a finite-horizon MDP with a starting state $s_{1}$, in which every state is reachable from $s_{1}$ through exactly one state-action trajectory. T-MDPs arise naturally as abstractions of decision making in sequential games with perfect recall, against stationary opponents. We consider the problem of on-line learning in T-MDPs, both in the PAC and the regret-minimisation regimes. We show that well-known bandit algorithms -- \textsc{Lucb} and \textsc{Ucb} -- can be applied on T-MDPs by treating each policy as an arm. The apparent technical challenge in this approach is that the number of policies is exponential in the number of states. Our main innovation is in the design of confidence bounds based on data shared by the policies, so that the bandit algorithms can yet be implemented with polynomial memory and per-step computation. We obtain instance-dependent upper bounds on sample complexity and regret that sum a ``gap term'' from every terminal state, rather than every policy. Empirically, our algorithms consistently outperform available alternatives on a suite of hidden-information games.
comment: Accepted as a full paper in the Main Track of AAMAS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出将每策略视为臂的bandit算法用于树MDP在线学习，通过共享数据置信界实现多项式复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 树MDP（T-MDP）作为完全回忆序贯博弈中对抗固定对手的抽象，具有唯一状态-动作轨迹特性。现有在线学习方法（PAC和遗憾最小化）面临策略数量随状态指数爆炸的挑战，导致计算和内存效率低下。因此，需要设计高效算法，在保持理论保证的同时避免枚举所有策略。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是将每个策略视为bandit算法的臂，利用策略间共享的轨迹数据设计置信上界（如UCB和LUCB），使得每步计算和内存开销与状态数呈多项式关系而非指数。通过分析终端状态间隙项聚合上界，绕过策略数量依赖。算法实现只需维护状态-动作计数，无需显式列举所有策略。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导出实例依赖的样本复杂度与遗憾上界，其形式为每个终端状态间隙项求和而非每策略，显著降低复杂度界。在隐藏信息游戏套件实验上，所提算法（基于UCB/LUCB）始终优于现有替代方法（如直接策略搜索或MMP），验证了高效性与竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为树MDP在线学习提供了简洁而强大的解决方案，将bandit技术拓展至结构化MDP，避免了策略枚举。理论界限反映终端状态的关键作用，实验证明实用性。未来可推广至更一般MDP或对抗对手场景，但当前依赖树结构且假设对手固定。

title: ICPR 2026 Competition on Privacy-Preserving Person Re-Identification from Top-View RGB-Depth Camera (TVRID)
abstract: This companion paper reports the ICPR 2026 TVRID competition on privacy-aware top-view person re-identification. We present the competition setting, the released RGB-Depth dataset, and a summary of final results with descriptions of the top entries. TVRID contains 86 identities captured by four synchronized overhead Intel RealSense D455 cameras, with paired RGB/Depth streams and structured geometric variation across flat, ascent, descent, and oblique viewpoints. The evaluation protocol includes three tracks: RGB Re-ID, Depth Re-ID, and RGB$\leftrightarrow$Depth cross-modal retrieval. Submissions are ranked using mAP and CMC-1 under a unified server-side evaluation. The final results show a clear difficulty ordering (RGB $>$ Depth $>$ Cross-Modal), highlighting both the challenge of modality-constrained retrieval and the feasibility of strong performance with modality-invariant learning. By releasing the dataset at https://zenodo.org/records/17909410, the evaluation scripts at https://github.com/RaphaelDel/ICPR-TVRID, and the accompanying documentation, TVRID establishes a reproducible benchmark for top-view, depth-based, and cross-modal person re-id.

light_analysis.overview: ICPR 2026竞赛提出基于顶视RGB-D摄像头的隐私保护行人重识别基准，包含RGB/Depth跨模态检索，并公开数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 行人重识别在监控中广泛应用，但传统方法依赖视角受限的RGB图像，且存在隐私风险。现有顶视或深度数据的Re-ID研究不足，跨模态匹配更具挑战。TVRID竞赛旨在推动隐私友好的顶视RGB-D行人重识别，提供标准化评估框架，以促进实际部署。
light_analysis.method: 构建86个身份的数据集，由四台顶置Intel RealSense D455相机同步采集RGB和深度流，涵盖平地、上坡、下坡和斜视视角。设定三个赛道：RGB Re-ID、Depth Re-ID和RGB↔Depth跨模态检索，使用mAP和CMC-1排名。提供统一服务器端评估脚本和在线数据发布。
light_analysis.result: 最终结果明确难度顺序：RGB > Depth > 跨模态，表明模态约束识别的挑战性，以及模态不变学习实现强性能的可行性。竞赛展示了不同方法在三个赛道上的表现，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: TVRID竞赛通过公开数据集、评估代码和文档，建立了可复现的顶视、深度和跨模态行人重识别基准。该工作促进了隐私保护型Re-ID研究，未来可拓展更多视角或模态，并探索实际应用中的效率优化。

title: Why Expert Alignment Is Hard: Evidence from Subjective Evaluation
abstract: Aligning large language models with expert judgment is especially difficult in subjective evaluation tasks, where experts may disagree, rely on tacit criteria, and change their judgments over time. In this paper, we study expert alignment as a way to understand this difficulty. Using expert evaluations and follow-up questionnaires, we examine how different forms of expert information affect alignment and what this reveals about subjective judgment. Our findings show four consistent patterns. First, alignment difficulty varies substantially across experts, suggesting that expert evaluation styles differ widely in their distance from a model's prior behavior. Second, explicit criteria and reasoning do not always improve alignment, indicating that expert judgment is not fully captured by verbalized rules. Third, editing is sensitive to both the number and the identity of examples, with small numbers of edits providing useful but unstable gains. Fourth, alignment difficulty differs across evaluation dimensions: dimensions grounded more directly in proposal content are easier to align, while dimensions requiring external knowledge or value-based judgment remain harder. Taken together, these results suggest that expert alignment is difficult not only because of model limitations, but also because subjective evaluation is inherently heterogeneous, partly tacit, dimension-dependent, and temporally unstable.

light_analysis.overview: 通过实证分析揭示主观评估任务中专家对齐困难的四大根源：专家异质性、判断隐性、编辑敏感性、维度依赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型与专家判断的对齐在主观评估任务中面临独特挑战：专家可能因隐性标准、时间动态性而意见分歧。现有对齐方法多假设专家判断可被明确标准完全捕捉，忽略了主观评估的异质性和部分隐性。理解这些困难有助于设计更有效的对齐策略，提升模型在需要专家级判断的领域的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过专家评估和后续问卷收集数据，分析四种形式的专家信息（如明确标准和推理）对对齐效果的影响。实验采用对比设计，测量不同专家之间、不同评估维度下的对齐难度。关键创新在于系统性地分解主观评估的异质性、隐性、维度依赖性和稳定性，而非仅关注模型性能。数据集未明确说明，但基于专家对提案等内容的评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示四个一致模式：1) 不同专家对齐难度差异大，表明评估风格与模型先验行为距离不同；2) 明确标准和推理不总是改善对齐，说明专家判断未被完全言语化；3) 编辑对例子数量和身份敏感，少量编辑提供有用但不稳定的增益；4) 内容维度的对齐更容易，需外部知识或价值判断的维度更难。这些结果量化了主观评估的固有困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明专家对齐的困难不仅来自模型局限，更源于主观评估的内在属性：异质性、部分隐性、维度依赖性和时间不稳定性。研究价值在于提供了对对齐失败原因的深层理解，指导未来方法应考虑评价者多样性、隐性知识整合和维度特性。局限性包括样本规模和实验任务可能限制泛化性，未来可探索动态对齐策略。

title: Why Geometric Continuity Emerges in Deep Neural Networks: Residual Connections and Rotational Symmetry Breaking
abstract: Weight matrices in deep networks exhibit geometric continuity -- principal singular vectors of adjacent layers point in similar directions. While this property has been widely observed, its origin remains unexplained. Through experiments on toy MLPs and small transformers, we identify two mechanisms: residual connections create cross-layer gradient coherence that aligns weight updates across layers, and symmetry-breaking nonlinearities constrain all layers to a shared coordinate frame, preventing the rotation drift that would otherwise destabilize weight structure. Crucially, a nonlinear but rotation-preserving activation fails to retain continuity, isolating symmetry breaking -- not nonlinearity itself -- as the active ingredient. Activation and normalization play distinct roles: activation concentrates continuity in the leading singular direction, while normalization distributes it across multiple directions. In transformers, continuity is projection-specific: Q, K, Gate, and Up (which read from the residual stream) develop input-space ($\mathbf{v}_1$) continuity; O and Down (which write to it) develop output-space ($\mathbf{u}_1$) continuity; V alone, lacking an adjacent nonlinearity, develops only low continuity.
comment: 9 pages of main text, plus appendices. Under review at NeurIPS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了深度神经网络中几何连续性（相邻层权重矩阵主奇异向量方向一致）的起源，归因于残差连接和旋转对称破缺。
light_analysis.motivation: 几何连续性在深度网络中被广泛观察，但其起源尚未得到解释。现有研究缺乏对这种现象产生的根本机制的理解。理解这一性质有助于揭示深度学习内部工作机理，指导网络设计与优化。本文通过实验和理论分析，旨在阐明几何连续性产生的根本原因。
light_analysis.method: 通过在小型MLP和Transformer上进行实验，识别出两种核心机制：残差连接产生跨层梯度一致性，使权重更新方向对齐；对称破缺的非线性（如ReLU）约束所有层到共享坐标框架，防止旋转漂移。此外，通过比较旋转保持激活函数，隔离出对称破缺而非非线性本身是关键。实验还分析了激活和归一化的不同作用：激活集中连续性于主奇异方向，归一化将其扩散到多个方向。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，旋转对称破缺是非线性中导致几何连续性的主动因素，而单纯的非线性（旋转保持）不足以维持连续性。在Transformer中，连续性呈现投影特异性：Q、K、Gate、Up（从残差流读取）形成输入空间（v1）连续性，O和Down（写入残差流）形成输出空间（u1）连续性，而V因缺乏相邻非线性仅产生低连续性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统解释了深度网络中几何连续性的起源，明确指出残差连接和旋转对称破缺是核心机制。该发现深化了对深度学习内部表示的理解，为网络结构设计（如残差连接、激活函数选择）提供了理论依据。未来工作可探索不同架构下的泛化性及实际应用价值。

title: Skill Neologisms: Towards Skill-based Continual Learning
abstract: Modern LLMs show mastery over an ever-growing range of skills, as well as the ability to compose them flexibly.
