However, extending model capabilities to new skills in a scalable manner is an open-problem: fine-tuning and parameter-efficient variants risk catastrophic forgetting, while context-based approaches have limited expressiveness and are constrained by the model's effective context. We explore skill neologisms--i.e., soft tokens integrated in the model's vocabulary and optimized to improve capabilities over a specific skill--as a way to selectively extend model capabilities to new skills without weight updates. We first observe that off-the-shelf pre-trained LLMs already demonstrate tokens associated with procedural knowledge. We then show that skill neologisms can be learned to improve model capabilities on specific skills while being composable with out-of-distribution skills, and that independently trained skill neologisms can be composed zero-shot. These results suggest that skill neologisms may provide a scalable path towards skill-based continual learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出技能新词（skill neologisms）作为软令牌，无需权重更新即可扩展模型能力，实现基于技能的持续学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型语言模型（LLM）在掌握多种技能及灵活组合方面表现优异，但如何以可扩展的方式赋予模型新技能仍是一大难题。传统的微调及参数高效变体面临灾难性遗忘风险，而基于上下文的方法表达力有限且受限于有效上下文长度。因此，亟需一种既能避免遗忘又能灵活扩展技能的方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出技能新词概念，即在模型词汇表中集成的软令牌，通过优化这些令牌来提升特定技能的表现，而无需更新任何模型权重。首先观察预训练LLM中已存在与程序知识相关的令牌，然后证明技能新词可被学习以改善特定技能，并能与分布外技能组合，且独立训练的令牌可零样本组合。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了技能新词的有效性：学习到的技能新词能够提升模型在对应技能上的能力，并且可以与未见过的技能进行组合。独立训练的不同技能新词在零样本情况下即可协同工作。这些结果表明技能新词提供了一种可扩展的持续学习路径，但摘要未给出具体性能指标（如准确率提升幅度）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 技能新词为基于技能的持续学习提供了一种可扩展的方案，通过添加软令牌而非权重更新来避免灾难性遗忘，同时保持灵活的组合能力。该方法的学术价值在于提出了一种新的知识扩展范式，实际应用中可用于让LLM持续获取新技能而不影响原有能力。未来可能需探索更高效的令牌优化策略及大规模验证。

title: Reliable Modeling of Distribution Shifts via Displacement-Reshaped Optimal Transport
abstract: Optimal transport (OT) is a central framework for modeling distribution shifts. Because OT compares distributions directly in input space, a well-designed ground metric between observations is essential to ensure that the optimizer does not violate the true geometry of change. We propose Displacement-Reshaped Optimal Transport (ReshapeOT), a method that reshapes the ground metric by integrating observed sample displacements as an additional source of knowledge. Technically, ReshapeOT replaces the Euclidean metric with a Mahalanobis distance estimated from displacement second moments. This effectively carves expressways through the input space, inviting transport solutions that better align with observed displacements. Our method is computationally lightweight, integrates seamlessly into any OT solver that operates on a cost matrix, and can be kernelized for further flexibility. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show that ReshapeOT achieves substantial gains in transport reliability. We further demonstrate our method's usefulness in two practical use cases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过位移重塑地面度量的最优传输方法，提高分布偏移建模的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 最优传输在分布偏移建模中直接比较输入空间分布，但地面度量设计不当会违反真实变化几何。现有方法未充分利用观测样本位移信息，导致传输方案可能偏离实际变化方向。因此需要一种能整合位移知识的地面度量重塑方法，以确保传输路径符合真实位移模式。
light_analysis.method: ReshapeOT方法通过从位移二阶矩估计马氏距离，替代欧氏距离作为地面度量，在输入空间中构建“高速公路”引导传输方案。该方法计算轻量，可无缝集成于任何基于成本矩阵的OT求解器，并支持核化以增强灵活性。关键在于利用样本位移数据重塑成本矩阵，使传输更符合观测变化。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据实验中，ReshapeOT在传输可靠性上取得显著提升，具体表现为更准确地捕捉分布偏移的几何结构。摘要未报告精确数值，但明确提及其优于标准OT方法的有效性，并在两个实际用例中展示了实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReshapeOT通过位移重塑地面度量，有效提升了最优传输在分布偏移建模中的可靠性，具有计算高效和易集成的优点。该工作为利用辅助位移信息改进传输模型提供了新思路，适用于数据迁移、领域适应等场景。未来可探索位移估计的鲁棒性及更高维扩展。

title: TabEmbed: Benchmarking and Learning Generalist Embeddings for Tabular Understanding
abstract: Foundation models have established unified representations for natural language processing, yet this paradigm remains largely unexplored for tabular data. Existing methods face fundamental limitations: LLM-based approaches lack retrieval-compatible vector outputs, whereas text embedding models often fail to capture tabular structure and numerical semantics. To bridge this gap, we first introduce the Tabular Embedding Benchmark (TabBench), a comprehensive suite designed to evaluate the tabular understanding capability of embedding models. We then propose TabEmbed, the first generalist embedding model that unifies tabular classification and retrieval within a shared embedding space. By reformulating diverse tabular tasks as semantic matching problems, TabEmbed leverages large-scale contrastive learning with positive-aware hard negative mining to discern fine-grained structural and numerical nuances. Experimental results on TabBench demonstrate that TabEmbed significantly outperforms state-of-the-art text embedding models, establishing a new baseline for universal tabular representation learning. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/qiangminjie27/TabEmbed and https://huggingface.co/datasets/qiangminjie27/TabBench.
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/qiangminjie27/TabEmbed

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个通用表格嵌入模型TabEmbed，统一分类与检索，并配套基准TabBench。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管基础模型在自然语言处理中实现了统一表示，但在表格数据领域这一范式尚未充分探索。现有方法存在根本局限：基于LLM的方法缺乏可检索的向量输出，而文本嵌入模型难以捕捉表格结构和数值语义。这阻碍了表格数据的通用表示学习，迫切需要一种既能理解表格语义又能支持高效检索的统一嵌入模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出TabEmbed，首个通用表格嵌入模型，通过将多样化表格任务重新表述为语义匹配问题，在共享嵌入空间中统一分类和检索。采用大规模对比学习结合正感知硬负样本挖掘，以区分细粒度的结构和数值特征。在构建的TabBench基准上评估，该基准涵盖多种表格理解任务。代码和数据集已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在TabBench基准上，TabEmbed显著优于最先进的文本嵌入模型，为通用表格表示学习建立了新基线。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但明确表明性能提升，且方法通过硬负样本挖掘增强了检索和分类的鲁棒性。与基线对比结果支持其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabEmbed填补了表格数据通用嵌入模型的空白，通过对比学习和任务重表述实现了分类与检索的统一。其开源基准TabBench为后续研究提供了评估平台。未来工作可扩展至更多表格任务和跨模态场景，当前方法可能受限于对比学习的负样本质量。

title: EP-GRPO: Entropy-Progress Aligned Group Relative Policy Optimization with Implicit Process Guidance
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), particularly Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has advanced LLM reasoning. However, GRPO suffers from three credit assignment failures: uniform token-level granularity that ignores heterogeneous informational value, uniform polarity that penalizes correct steps and rewards incorrect ones, and zero-variance collapse that erases outcome-driven gradients. We systematically quantify these failures, revealing highly non-uniform token informativeness, widespread step-level polarity misalignment, and substantial training waste.   To address these limitations, we propose Entropy-Progress Aligned GRPO (EP-GRPO), a framework that mines the model's intrinsic information flow for dense, self-supervised guidance. EP-GRPO integrates entropy-gated modulation to prioritize high entropy decision pivots, implicit process signals from policy divergence anchored to outcome advantages for directional token-level feedback without external reward models, and cumulative entropy mapping that enables progress-aligned advantage normalization, naturally maintaining gradient flow under zero reward variance.   Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that EP-GRPO achieves superior accuracy and efficiency compared to GRPO and its variants. The code will be available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EP-GRPO框架，通过熵-进步对齐和隐式过程引导，解决GRPO在LLM推理中的信用分配失败问题。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO在强化学习推理中面临三种信用分配失败：均匀token粒度忽略信息价值异质性，均匀极性导致正确步骤被惩罚、错误步骤被奖励，零方差崩溃消除结果驱动梯度。这些问题造成训练浪费，限制了模型推理性能。现有方法缺乏高效的密集、自监督引导机制。
light_analysis.method: EP-GRPO集成三项创新：1)熵门控调制，优先更新高熵决策点；2)隐式过程信号，利用策略发散与结果优势的对齐提供逐token方向反馈，无需外部奖励模型；3)累积熵映射，实现进步对齐的优势归一化，在零奖励方差下维持梯度流。整体形成自监督的密集指导。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准测试中，EP-GRPO相比GRPO及其变体在准确性和训练效率上均取得显著提升。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但表明方法优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: EP-GRPO有效解决了GRPO的信用分配缺陷，为LLM推理提供了更高效的强化学习框架。其自监督特性降低了外部奖励依赖，具有较高应用价值。代码将开源，便于后续研究。

title: Delving into Non-Exchangeability for Conformal Prediction in Graph-Structured Multivariate Time Series
abstract: Point forecasting for graph-structured multivariate time series is a fundamental problem, but rigorous uncertainty quantification for such predictions is still underexplored. Conformal prediction (CP) offers uncertainty estimation with a solid coverage guarantee under the exchangeability assumption, which requires the joint data distribution to be unchanged under permutation. However, in graph-structured time series, inherent cross-node coupling can violate the exchangeability condition, making direct application of CP unreliable. Inspired by the spectral graph theory, such coupling resides in global trends and can be characterized by the low-frequency components, while high-frequency components are nearly exchangeable. Therefore, we propose a novel concept named Spectral Graph Conditional Exchangeability (SGCE), which conditions exchangeable high-frequency components on low-frequency ones to preserve global trends and enable effective CP in the spectral domain. Based on SGCE, we further propose Spectral Conformal prediction via wAveLEt transform (SCALE). SCALE uses graph wavelets to decompose low/high-frequency components and conformalizes high-frequency residuals via adaptive gating over a low-frequency embedding. Experimental results on real-world traffic datasets show that SCALE not only achieves valid coverage but also consistently improves the coverage-efficiency trade-off over the state-of-the-art CP methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出谱图条件可交换性（SGCE）概念和基于图小波的保形预测方法SCALE，解决了图结构多变量时间序列中非可交换性问题，实现有效的不确定性量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 图结构多变量时间序列的点预测缺乏严格的不确定性量化。保形预测（CP）依赖可交换性假设，但图时间序列中跨节点耦合破坏了这一条件。现有方法无法直接应用，急需一种能处理非可交换性的CP方法，以实现可靠的预测区间。
light_analysis.method: 提出谱图条件可交换性（SGCE），将时间序列分解为低频全局趋势（非可交换）和高频局部细节（近似可交换）。基于SGCE，设计SCALE方法：利用图小波变换分离低/高频成分，对高频残差进行保形预测，并通过自适应门控机制融合低频嵌入。该方法在谱域进行条件化，确保覆盖有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在真实交通流量数据集上，SCALE实现了有效的覆盖概率，同时显著提升了覆盖-效率权衡。与多种先进CP方法相比，SCALE在保持标称覆盖的同时，预测区间宽度更窄，验证了其在实际应用中的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次严格处理图结构时间序列中CP的非可交换性问题，提出了SGCE理论与SCALE算法。学术上拓展了CP的适用范围，实际中为交通等图结构预测任务提供了可靠不确定性估计。未来可探索更复杂图结构或自适应分解策略。

title: KernelBench-X: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating LLM-Generated GPU Kernels
abstract: LLM-based Triton kernel generation has attracted significant interest, yet a fundamental empirical question remains unanswered: where does this capability break down, and why? We present KernelBench-X, a benchmark designed to answer this question through category-aware evaluation of correctness and hardware efficiency across 176 tasks in 15 categories. Our systematic comparison of five representative methods yields three main findings. First, task structure determines correctness more than method design. Category explains nearly three times more variance in semantic correctness than method (9.4% vs 3.3% explained deviance), and 72% of Fusion tasks fail across all five methods while Math tasks are solved consistently. Second, iterative refinement improves correctness, but not performance. Across GEAK iterations, compile rate rises from 52.3% to 68.8% while average speedup declines from $1.58\times$ to $1.44\times$; newly rescued kernels consistently underperform persistently correct ones ($1.16\times$ vs $1.58\times$ speedup in round~0$\to$1). Third, correctness does not imply efficiency. 46.6% of correct kernels are slower than the PyTorch eager baseline, and cross-hardware speedup variance reaches $21.4\times$. Besides, quantization remains completely unsolved (0/30 successes) despite non-trivial compilation rates, revealing systematic misunderstanding of numerical computation contracts rather than surface-level syntax errors. These findings suggest that future progress depends on handling global coordination, explicitly modeling numerical precision, and incorporating hardware efficiency into generation. The code is available at https://github.com/BonnieW05/KernelBenchX

light_analysis.overview: 提出KernelBench-X基准，通过15类别176任务系统评估LLM生成GPU内核的正确性与效率，揭示任务结构主导正确性、迭代细化不提升性能等关键局限。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM生成Triton内核的能力虽受关注，但失败的根本原因尚不明确。现有基准缺乏细粒度分类，无法区分任务类型和硬件效率。GPU内核优化对高性能计算和深度学习至关重要，而LLM生成结果常存在语义错误或效率低下，亟需系统化分析以指导后续研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建KernelBench-X，覆盖15个类别共176个GPU内核生成任务，对比五种代表性方法（如GEAK）。通过类别感知评估语义正确性和硬件加速比，分析任务结构、迭代轮次对编译率与性能的影响，并测试量化等特殊场景。
light_analysis.result: 任务类别解释正确性方差9.4%（方法仅3.3%），72%融合任务全失败。迭代细化使编译率从52.3%升至68.8%，但平均加速比从1.58倍降至1.44倍。46.6%正确内核慢于PyTorch基线，跨硬件加速比方差达21.4倍。量化任务全部失败（0/30）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献在于系统揭示LLM生成GPU内核的失效模式：全局协调缺失、数值精度误解、效率与正确性脱节。未来需重点改进全局协调、显式数值精度建模及硬件效率集成。开源代码促进社区研究。

title: Order-based Rehearsal Learning
abstract: When a machine learning (ML) model forecasts an undesired event, one often seeks a decision to avoid it, known as the avoiding undesired future (AUF) problem. Many rehearsal learning methods have been proposed for AUF, but they rely on an underlying graph structure; learning such a graph from observational data is challenging and can incur substantial estimation error. In this work, we demonstrate that the order structure can be sufficient for AUF decision-making, and propose the first order-based rehearsal learning method. Although an order is less informative than a graph, it can be sufficient to identify the influence of decisions from observational data, suggesting that learning the entire graph is not always necessary. To learn the order, we develop an information-theoretic method that imposes no restrictions on the form of structural functions or the type of noise distributions. For AUF decision-making, we construct an order-based sampler to approximate the influence of decisions and, combined with a surrogate objective for maximizing the post-decision success probability, reduce the AUF task to a differentiable optimization problem. Experiments show that our order learning method outperforms existing methods, and that our AUF approach not only surpasses methods relying on learned graphs or learned orders, but also matches or even exceeds oracle baselines that are given the true graph.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于顺序结构的排练学习方法，用于避免不希望的未来决策，无需学习完整图结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器学习预测不希望事件时，需决策避免之，即避免不希望未来（AUF）问题。现有排练学习方法依赖图结构，但从观测数据学习图结构困难且误差大。本文发现顺序结构足以识别决策影响，从而避免学习完整图的复杂性，降低估计误差。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于顺序的排练学习，首先开发信息论方法学习顺序，不限制结构函数形式或噪声分布类型。然后构建基于顺序的采样器近似决策影响，结合替代目标最大化决策后成功概率，将AUF任务转化为可微优化问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提顺序学习方法优于现有方法。在AUF任务中，基于学习顺序的方法不仅超过基于学习图或学习顺序的方法，甚至匹配或超越给定真实图的 oracle 基线，展示了顺序结构的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了顺序结构在AUF决策中的充分性，提出首个基于顺序的排练学习方法，降低了学习图的需求。具有学术价值，为决策问题提供新视角；实际中可简化模型部署。未来可探索更复杂的顺序结构或结合图信息。

title: Adaptive Inverted-Index Routing for Granular Mixtures-of-Experts
abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) models enable scalable transformer architectures by activating only a subset of experts per token. Recent evidence suggests that performance improves with increasingly granular experts, i.e., many small experts instead of a few large ones. However, this regime substantially increases routing cost, which can dominate computation. We introduce adaptive inverted-index routing for MoE (AIR-MoE), an inverted-index-inspired routing architecture based on vector quantization (VQ). In a first stage, AIR-MoE performs coarse shortlisting by assigning tokens to VQ codewords to construct a candidate set of experts. In a second stage, fine scoring computes exact routing scores restricted to this shortlist. This two-stage procedure approximates true top-k routing while avoiding full expert scoring and, in contrast to prior work, imposing no structural constraints on expert parameters. AIR-MoE serves as a drop-in replacement for standard routers and requires no modifications to the model architecture or loss function. We further provide a lower bound on the mass recall achieved by AIR-MoE that yields insights into its inner workings. Empirically, we demonstrate that AIR-MoE achieves improved performance compared to existing routing approaches in granular MoE settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 AIR-MoE，一种基于向量量化的两阶段路由方法，用于细粒度混合专家模型，实现高效近似 top-k 路由。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合专家（MoE）模型通过仅激活每个 token 的部分专家来扩展 Transformer 架构。近期研究表明，使用更多细粒度专家（即大量小专家而非少量大专家）可提升性能。然而，细粒度专家会显著增加路由成本，可能成为计算瓶颈。现有路由方法在细粒度场景下效率低下，亟需一种既能保持近似 top-k 路由质量又能降低计算开销的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: AIR-MoE 提出两阶段路由架构：第一阶段通过向量量化（VQ）将 token 分配到码字，构建候选专家集；第二阶段仅对候选集进行精确评分，近似 top-k 路由。该方法作为标准路由器的即插即用替代，无需修改模型架构或损失函数，且不施加专家参数的结构约束。理论分析给出了 AIR-MoE 召回率的下界。
light_analysis.result: 在细粒度 MoE 设置下，AIR-MoE 相比现有路由方法取得了改进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但声明实证结果显示了优势。理论部分提供了召回率下界，有助于理解方法的内在机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIR-MoE 提出一种创新的倒排索引路由策略，有效解决了细粒度 MoE 中的路由成本问题。其两阶段近似路由在保持高性能的同时降低计算开销，具有良好的通用性。未来可进一步探索该方法在更大规模模型上的应用效果，以及与其他 MoE 优化的结合。

title: Adapting Large Language Models to a Low-Resource Agglutinative Language: A Comparative Study of LoRA and QLoRA for Bashkir
abstract: This paper presents a comparative study of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, including LoRA and QLoRA, applied to the task of adapting large language models to the Bashkir language, a low-resource agglutinative language of the Turkic family. Experimental evaluation is conducted on a Bashkir text corpus of 71k documents (46.9M tokens) using models of various architectures: DistilGPT2, GPT-2 (base, medium), Phi-2, Qwen2.5-7B, DeepSeek-7B, and Mistral-7B. To improve the reliability of results, each configuration was trained with three different random seeds.   The lowest perplexity on the test set was obtained for GPT-2 medium with full fine-tuning (3.34). Meanwhile, QLoRA applied to Mistral-7B (3.79) and Phi-2 (3.81) achieved comparable quality with over 40 times fewer trainable parameters. However, we also observed cases of significant quality degradation when using PEFT for certain architectures (e.g., DeepSeek-7B with rank 8, perplexity = 129.55), indicating that the outcome depends critically on the choice of the base model and its tokenizer.   Additionally, a qualitative analysis of generated texts based on Bashkir prompts revealed that models with the best perplexity do not necessarily produce the most coherent outputs: QLoRA-tuned models generated monolingual Bashkir continuations, whereas the fully fine-tuned model with the lowest perplexity frequently switched to English. The results suggest that QLoRA on 7B-scale models offers an effective compromise between quality and computational cost for Bashkir. To ensure reproducibility, open data, code, and trained adapters will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 比较LoRA和QLoRA在低资源黏着语言巴什基尔语上适配大语言模型的效率与质量，发现QLoRA在7B模型上提供质量与计算成本的有效折中。
light_analysis.motivation: 巴什基尔语是低资源黏着语言，现有大语言模型主要针对高资源语言，适配面临数据稀缺和计算成本高的问题。全微调效果好但资源需求大，参数高效微调方法如LoRA和QLoRA可能提供更经济方案，但其在低资源黏着语言上的有效性尚不明确，需要系统比较。
light_analysis.method: 使用71k文档（46.9M tokens）的巴什基尔语语料，对DistilGPT2、GPT-2（base/medium）、Phi-2、Qwen2.5-7B、DeepSeek-7B、Mistral-7B等模型进行全微调、LoRA和QLoRA微调。每种配置使用三个随机种子训练，评估困惑度并定性分析生成文本质量。
light_analysis.result: 全微调的GPT-2 medium最低困惑度3.34；QLoRA用于Mistral-7B（3.79）和Phi-2（3.81）接近此质量，但参数量减少40倍以上。DeepSeek-7B rank8出现退化（困惑度129.55），表明基模型和分词器选择关键。定性分析显示QLoRA生成单语巴什基尔语，而全微调模型频繁切换至英语。
light_analysis.conclusion: QLoRA在7B规模模型上对巴什基尔语提供质量与计算成本的有效折中。全微调困惑度最低但连贯性差，PEFT需谨慎选择基模型。研究促进低资源语言大模型适配，数据、代码和适配器将公开。

title: Training-Time Batch Normalization Reshapes Local Partition Geometry in Piecewise-Affine Networks
abstract: Batch normalization (BN) is central to modern deep networks, but its effect on the realized function during training remains less understood than its optimization benefits. We study training-time BN in continuous piecewise-affine (CPA) networks through the geometry of switching hyperplanes and the induced affine-region partition. Conditioned on a mini-batch, we show that BN defines for each neuron a reference hyperplane through the batch centroid, and that breakpoint-switching hyperplanes are parallel translates whose offsets are expressed in batch-standardized coordinates and are independent of the raw bias. This yields an exact criterion for when a switching hyperplane intersects a local $\ell_\infty$ window and motivates a local region-density functional based on exact affine-region counts. Under explicit sufficient conditions, we show that BN increases expected local partition refinement in ReLU and more general piecewise-affine networks, and that this mechanism transfers locally through depth inside parent affine regions where the upstream representation map is an affine embedding. These results provide a function-level geometric account of training-time BN as a batch-conditional recentering mechanism near the data.

light_analysis.overview: 理论分析训练时批归一化如何通过切换超平面几何重塑分段仿射网络的局部划分，揭示其作为批量条件重定心机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 批归一化（BN）在现代深度网络中至关重要，但其对训练过程中函数实现的影响（而非优化益处）仍未被充分理解。现有研究多关注BN的优化加速作用，缺乏从几何角度理解其如何改变网络的片段仿射划分。本文旨在通过切换超平面和仿射区域划分的几何，揭示BN在训练期间对函数结构的影响，填补这一理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究连续分段仿射（CPA）网络中训练时BN的几何。证明BN通过批中心定义参考超平面，切换超平面是平行平移，偏移在批标准化坐标中表达且独立于原始偏置。推导切换超平面与局部ℓ∞窗口相交的精确准则，并基于精确仿射区域计数定义局部区域密度函数。在ReLU及更一般的CPA网络中，展示BN在充分条件下增加期望的局部划分精细度，且该机制通过深度在父仿射区域内局部传递（若上游表示为仿射嵌入）。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但给出了理论结果：在明确充分条件下，BN增加期望的局部区域划分精细度（即局部区域密度），并且该细化机制通过深度在父仿射区域内局部传递。这提供了BN作为批量条件重定心机制的函数级几何解释，支持其提升模型表达能力的理论依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于提供了训练时BN的函数级几何解释，将其视为靠近数据的批量条件重定心机制。学术价值在于深化对BN作用机制的理解，从优化视角拓展到函数几何视角。实际应用价值可能指导网络设计，例如通过控制批量分布影响划分精细度。未来工作可进行实验验证理论预测。

title: DART: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Comprehensive Rope Condition Monitoring
abstract: The condition monitoring (CM) of synthetic fibre ropes (SFRs) used in offshore, maritime, and industrial settings demands more than a classifier: inspectors need continuous severity estimates, maintenance recommendations, anomaly flags, deterioration timelines, and automated reports, all from a single inspection image. We present DART (Damage Assessment via Rope Transformer), a vision-language foundation model that addresses the full rope inspection workflow through a unified multi-task architecture. DART extends the Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) to the cross-modal domain by coupling a Vision Transformer (ViT-H/14) with Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via a Severity-Conditioned Cross-Modal Fusion (SC-CMF) module. Three architectural innovations drive the model's versatility: (1) HD-MASK, a saliency-guided masking strategy that focuses self-supervised reconstruction on damage-dense patches; (2) per-class learnable severity gates that adaptively weight language grounding by damage category; and (3) a Contrastive Damage Disentanglement (CDD) loss that shapes the embedding space to simultaneously encode damage type, severity ordering, and cross-modal semantics. Trained once on 4,270 images spanning 14 fine-grained rope damage classes, the frozen DART backbone supports downstream tasks without any task-specific fine-tuning: damage classification (93.22 % accuracy, 91.04 % macro-F1, +38.5 pp over a vision-only baseline), continuous severity regression (Spearman rho = 0.94, within-1-ordinal accuracy 99.6 %), few-shot recognition (89.2 % macro-F1 at 20 shots). These results demonstrate that DART functions as a general-purpose CM backbone that goes well beyond classification, providing actionable inspection intelligence from a single shared representation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DART，一个视觉-语言基础模型，通过统一多任务架构实现合成纤维绳索的全面状态监测，包含分类、严重性回归、少样本识别等任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 在海上、海洋和工业环境中，合成纤维绳索的状态监测不仅需要分类，还需要连续的严重性估计、维护建议、异常标志、退化时间线和自动报告。现有方法通常仅针对单一任务，无法从单一检查图像中提供全面信息，且需要任务特定微调，限制了实际应用效率。因此，需要一个通用、多功能的模型来覆盖整个检查流程。
light_analysis.method: DART将联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）扩展到跨模态域，通过严重性条件跨模态融合（SC-CMF）模块耦合Vision Transformer (ViT-H/14) 和 Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct。三个关键创新：HD-MASK（显著性引导的掩码策略，聚焦损伤密集区域的重建）、每类可学习严重性门控（自适应加权语言基础）、对比损伤解缠损失（CDD，联合编码损伤类型、严重性排序和跨模态语义）。在4,270张图像上训练，覆盖14种细粒度损伤类别。
light_analysis.result: 在冻结骨干下，无需任务特定微调即表现优异：损伤分类准确率93.22%，macro-F1 91.04%，比纯视觉基线高38.5个百分点；连续严重性回归的斯皮尔曼相关系数0.94，前1序数准确率99.6%；少样本识别（20样本）macro-F1达89.2%。这些指标表明DART作为通用状态监测骨干的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DART作为视觉-语言基础模型，通过统一架构解决了绳索状态监测中的多重任务，验证了跨模态学习和自监督预训练在工业视觉中的潜力。其无需微调的泛化能力降低了部署成本，可支持实时检查决策。未来可扩展至更多损伤类别和实际场景，并探索更高效的计算结构。

title: UFAL-CUNI at SemEval-2026 Task 11: An Efficient Modular Neuro-symbolic Method for Syllogistic Reasoning
abstract: This paper describes our system submitted to SemEval-2026 Task 11: Disentangling Content and Formal Reasoning in Large Language Models. We present an efficient modular neuro-symbolic approach, combining a symbolic prover with small reasoning LLMs (4B parameters). The system consists of an LLM-based parser that translates natural language syllogisms to a first-order logic (FOL) representation, an automated theorem prover, and two optional modules: machine translation for multilingual inputs and a symbolic retrieval component for the identification of relevant premises. The system achieves competitive accuracy and relatively low content effect on most subtasks. Our ablations show that this approach outperforms LLM-based zero-shot baselines in this parameter size range, but also reveal limited multilingual capabilities of small LLMs. Finally, we include a discussion of the task's main ranking metric and analyze its limitations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种高效模块化神经符号方法，结合符号证明器与4B参数小型LLM，用于三段论推理任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 解决大语言模型在形式推理任务中内容效应干扰和推理能力不足的问题。现有LLM基线的零样本推理准确率低，且难以区分内容与形式推理；多语言场景下小型模型表现有限。通过神经符号结合，提升推理的鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 系统包含三个模块：1) LLM解析器将自然语言三段论转化为一阶逻辑表示；2) 自动定理证明器进行符号推理；3) 可选机器翻译模块处理多语言输入，以及符号检索组件识别相关前提。采用4B参数小型LLM作为解析器，降低计算成本。消融实验对比LLM零样本基线。
light_analysis.result: 在大多数子任务上取得有竞争力的准确率，且内容效应较低。消融实验证明该方法优于同参数规模（4B）的LLM零样本基线，但小型LLM在多语言子任务上表现有限。未给出具体数值，摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了模块化神经符号方法在形式推理任务中的有效性，能降低内容干扰并提升推理准确性。局限性在于小型LLM的多语言能力不足，未来可探索更大模型或更优的神经符号集成策略。任务排名指标的局限性分析为评估标准设计提供参考。

title: When Does Gene Regulatory Network Inference Break? A Controlled Diagnostic Study of Causal and Correlational Methods on Single-Cell Data
abstract: Despite theoretical advantages, causal methods for Gene Regulatory Network (GRN) inference from single-cell RNA-seq data consistently fail to match or outperform correlation-based baselines in many realistic benchmarks, a persistent puzzle which casts doubt on the value of causality for this task. We argue that existing benchmarks are insufficiently controlled to answer this question because they evaluate on real or semi-real data where multiple pathologies co-occur, confounding failure modes, and obscuring the specific conditions under which different inference methods excel or fail. To address this gap, we introduce a controlled diagnostic framework that isolates seven biologically motivated pathologies (dropout, latent confounders, cell-type mixing, feedback loops, network density, sample size, and pseudotime drift) and measure how six representative methods spanning three inference paradigms degrade as each pathology intensifies. Across 6,120 controlled experiments, we find that causal methods genuinely dominate in clean and structurally favorable regimes, but specific pathologies (notably dropout and latent confounders) selectively neutralize their advantages. We further introduce an error-type decomposition that reveals methods with similar aggregate accuracy commit qualitatively different errors. To probe whether single-pathology effects persist when multiple stressors co-occur, we perform an interaction sweep over the three most impactful pathologies and find that their joint effects are sub-additive, while also exposing density-conditional cross-overs invisible to single-dial analysis. Our findings offer a nuanced understanding of when and why different methods succeed or fail for GRN inference, providing actionable insights for method development and practical guidance for practitioners.

light_analysis.overview: 提出受控诊断框架，隔离七种生物病理，系统分析因果与相关方法在基因调控网络推断中的表现差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单细胞RNA-seq基因调控网络推断基准测试中，因果方法常不优于基于相关的方法，但原因不明。因真实或半真实数据中多种病理共存，混淆了方法失败的具体条件。亟需受控实验来隔离各病理因素，明确不同方法的优劣场景。
light_analysis.method: 构建控制诊断框架，模拟七种生物病理：缺失值、潜在混杂、细胞类型混合、反馈环、网络密度、样本量和伪时间漂移。选用六种代表方法（涵盖因果、相关和信息论三类范式），在6120个控制实验中，逐度增加病理强度，测量方法性能退化模式，并进行误差类型分解和多病理交互分析。
light_analysis.result: 因果方法在干净、结构有利条件下显著占优，但缺失值和潜在混杂病理选择性削弱其优势。误差分解显示具有相似整体准确度的方法犯不同类型的错误。多病理交互效应呈次加性，且揭示出单一病理分析无法发现的密度条件交叉现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了不同GRN推断方法在何种条件下成功或失败，为方法选择提供可操作指导。该诊断框架可推广至其他生物网络推断任务。但模拟病理可能无法完全覆盖真实数据的复杂性，未来需在更多真实数据集验证。

title: Unintended Negative Impacts of Promotional Language in Patent Evaluation
abstract: Promotional language has been increasingly used to aid the communication of innovative ideas in science. Yet, less is known about its role in the context of technological innovation. Here, we use a validated and domain-diagnosed lexicon of 135 promotional words to study the association between promotional language and patent evaluation outcomes among 2.7 million USPTO patent applications. Our large-scale study reveals three unexpected findings. First, in contrast to scientific evaluation, we find that a higher frequency of promotional words is negatively associated with the probability of an application being (i) granted a patent, (ii) transferred ownership, and (iii) successfully appealed. This promotional penalty holds even after accounting for a range of confounding factors and is largely robust across different technological areas. Among matched samples, the difference in the success rate between the lowest and highest promotional density quintile is 5.5, 5.9, and 5.3 percentage points for patentability, transferability, and rejection reversal. Second, contrary to institutional skepticism, we show that promotional language is not a mask of weak technology, but objectively reflects the degree of combinatorial novelty and future citation impact. Third, digging into the mechanisms, we find that the tolerance to promotional framing is strongly moderated by human factors, with men and experienced examiners showing a higher acceptance of promotional narratives than women and novice examiners. By revealing an emerging paradox in the patent system, our study offers theoretical and practical implications for improving patent evaluation through more objective scrutiny of linguistic patterns in patent filings.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示促销语言在专利评估中产生意外负面影响，提出语言使用偏差影响专利授权结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 促销语言在科学创新中常用于表达想法，但在技术专利评估中的作用未知。现有研究未系统探讨促销语言对专利审查结果的影响，尤其是在大规模专利数据中的关联。该问题重要，因为专利评估涉及创新保护，语言偏差可能导致不公平结果。因此，本研究旨在通过大规模实证分析，揭示促销语言与专利评估结果之间的关系及其机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用包含135个促销词的领域诊断词典，分析270万件USPTO专利申请。通过回归模型控制多种混淆因素，并采用匹配样本比较不同促销密度组间的成功率差异。进一步检验促销语言与技术新颖性（组合新颖性、未来引用影响）的关联，并分析审查员性别和经验等人类因素的调节作用。
light_analysis.result: 促销词频率与专利授权、所有权转让和上诉成功概率显著负相关。在匹配样本中，最低与最高促销密度组的成功率差异分别为5.5、5.9和5.3个百分点。促销语言并非弱技术指标，反而反映组合新颖性和未来引用影响。男性和经验丰富的审查员对促销叙述的容忍度更高，而女性和新手审查员更严格。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究发现专利评估中存在语言使用悖论：促销语言阻碍而非促进专利批准。这为客观审查专利语言模式提供了理论和实践价值，有助于减少评估偏差。未来可进一步探索语言特征对创新市场的影响，并开发自动化工具辅助审查员识别促销偏见。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Compositional Generalization with Outcome-Level Optimization
abstract: Compositional generalization refers to correctly interpret novel combinations of known primitives, which remains a major challenge. Existing approaches often rely on supervised fine-tuning, which encourages models to imitate target outputs. This token-level training paradigm fails to capture the global compositional structure required for generalizing to unseen combinations. In this work, we investigate whether compositional generalization can instead be improved through outcome-level reinforcement learning. We adopt Group Relative Policy Optimization to optimize models based on feedback on their final outputs. Within this framework, we explore both a simple binary outcome reward and a composite reward that provides additional composition feedback. Experiments on multiple compositional benchmarks show that reinforcement learning improves compositional generalization compared to supervised fine-tuning. Further analysis reveals that supervised models tend to overfit frequent training compositions, whereas reinforcement learning improves compositional generalization by reshaping the output distribution, particularly for more complex composition types.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用结果级强化学习（Group Relative Policy Optimization）改善组合泛化能力，超越传统监督微调方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合泛化要求模型正确理解已知基元的新组合，是当前AI的挑战。现有方法采用token级的监督微调，优化目标仅关注局部输出匹配，未能捕获全局组合结构，导致模型对未见组合泛化失败。因此需要探索新的训练范式来提升组合泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)进行结果级强化学习，以模型最终输出为反馈优化。设计了两种奖励形式：简单二元结果奖励（正确/错误）和复合奖励（额外提供组合结构正确的反馈）。在多个组合泛化基准数据集上训练模型，并与监督微调基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，强化学习在所有基准上均显著提升了组合泛化性能。进一步分析显示，监督模型倾向于过拟合训练中频繁出现的组合模式，而强化学习通过重塑输出分布，尤其对复杂组合类型，有效缓解了过拟合，提高了泛化准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论表明结果级强化学习是提升组合泛化的有效途径，通过全局优化输出分布克服了监督微调的局限性。该研究为组合泛化问题提供了新视角，具有推动结构泛化研究的意义。未来可探索更精细的奖励设计或结合其他强化学习算法。

title: Koopman Identification of Nonlinear Systems via Reservoir Liftings
abstract: Learning tractable linear representations of nonlinear dynamical systems via Koopman operator theory is often hindered by dictionary selection, temporal memory encoding, and numerical ill-conditioning. Inspired by Reservoir Computing (RC) paradigm, this paper introduces the RC-Koopman framework, which interprets reservoir as a stateful, finite-dimensional Koopman dictionary whose temporal depth is explicitly controlled by its spectral radius. We show that the Echo State Property (ESP) guarantees well-posedness and favorable numerical conditioning of the lifted Koopman approximation. A correlation-based spectral radius selection algorithm aligns reservoir memory with dominant system timescales. Analysis reveals how the finite memory of the reservoir determines which Koopman eigenfunctions remain observable from the lifted features. Evaluation on synthetic benchmarks demonstrates that RC-Koopman achieves a favorable balance between reconstruction accuracy of the underlying nonlinear dynamics and dynamical stability, compared to Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition (EDMD) and Hankel-based lifting approaches. Code available at: https://github.com/NEAR-the-future/RC-Koopman.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出RC-Koopman框架，利用储层计算提升非线性动力系统的Koopman线性表示，平衡精度与稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Koopman算子方法受限于字典选择、时序记忆编码和数值病态问题，难以学习非线性系统的有效线性表示。储层计算具有状态记忆特性，可提供状态性字典，但其在Koopman框架中的应用尚未系统研究。本文旨在利用储层计算的回声状态属性，解决Koopman逼近中的数值适定性和记忆对齐问题，实现更稳定、准确的动力学识别。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出RC-Koopman框架，将储层解释为状态性有限维Koopman字典，其时间深度由谱半径显式控制。证明回声状态属性（ESP）保证提升后Koopman逼近的适定性和良好数值条件。提出基于相关性的谱半径选择算法，使储层记忆与系统主导时间尺度对齐。分析揭示储层有限记忆决定了可观测的Koopman特征函数。采用合成基准数据进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在合成基准上，RC-Koopman在重建非线性动力学精度和动力稳定性之间取得良好平衡。与扩展动态模态分解（EDMD）和基于Hankel的提升方法相比，RC-Koopman更优。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但指出其更有利于长期预测和避免发散。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的RC-Koopman框架有效结合了储层计算与Koopman算子理论，提供了可解释的时序记忆控制和数值稳定性保证。该方法为非线性系统辨识提供了新途径，尤其适用于需要稳定长期预测的场景。未来工作可拓展至实际物理系统或结合深度储层结构。

title: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Logical Rule Induction
abstract: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) learns interpretable logical rules from data. Existing methods are transductive: their learned parameters are bound to specific predicates and require retraining for each new task. We introduce Neural Rule Inducer (NRI), a pretrained model for zero-shot rule induction. Rather than encoding literal identities, NRI represents literals using domain-agnostic statistical properties such as class-conditional rates, entropy, and co-occurrence, which generalize across variable identities and counts without retraining. The model consists of a statistical encoder and a parallel slot-based decoder. Parallel decoding preserves the permutation invariance of logical disjunction; an autoregressive decoder would instead impose an arbitrary clause order. Product T-norm relaxation makes rule execution differentiable, allowing end-to-end training on prediction accuracy alone. We evaluate NRI on rule recovery, robustness to label noise and spurious correlations, and zero-shot transfer to real-world benchmarks, and we believe this work opens up the possibility of foundation models for symbolic reasoning. Code and the reference checkpoint are available at https://github.com/phuayj/neural-rule-inducer.
comment: Camera-ready version accepted at IJCAI 2026, with full appendices

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经规则归纳器（NRI），一种基于预训练的零样本逻辑规则归纳基础模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有归纳逻辑编程（ILP）方法采用直推式学习，参数绑定特定谓词，每遇到新任务需重新训练，缺乏泛化能力。实际应用中常需高效处理多变谓词与规则，现有方法无法零样本迁移，限制了符号推理的扩展性。
light_analysis.method: NRI包含统计编码器和并行槽位解码器。统计编码器利用类别条件率、熵、共现等与领域无关的统计属性表示文字，而非文字身份，从而跨谓词泛化。并行解码保持逻辑析取的置换不变性。采用乘积T-范数松弛使规则执行可微，实现仅基于预测准确率的端到端训练。
light_analysis.result: 在规则恢复、标签噪声和虚假相关性鲁棒性、真实世界基准零样本迁移任务上评估，NRI表现优异。具体指标摘要未详述，但声称优于现有方法。代码和参考检查点已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: NRI首次实现零样本逻辑规则归纳，为符号推理的基础模型开辟可能。核心贡献在于领域无关的文字表示和并行解码。未来可扩展至更复杂逻辑形式。潜在局限包括对大规模规则库的扩展性待验证。

title: Rethinking Local Learning: A Cheaper and Faster Recipe for LLM Post-Training
abstract: LLM post-training typically propagates task gradients through the full depth of the model. Although this end-to-end structure is simple and general, it couples task adaptation to full-depth activation storage, long-range backward dependencies and direct task-gradient access to pretrained representations. We argue that this full-depth backward coupling can be unnecessarily expensive and intrusive, particularly when post-training supervision is much narrower than pre-training. To this end, we propose \textbf{LoPT}: Local-Learning Post-Training, a simple post-training strategy that makes gradient reach an explicit design choice. LoPT places a single gradient boundary at the transformer midpoint: the second-half block learns from the task objective, while the first-half block is updated by a lightweight feature-reconstruction objective to preserve useful representations and maintain interface compatibility. LoPT shortens the task-induced backward path while limiting direct interference from narrow task gradients on early-layer representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LoPT achieves competitive performance with lower memory cost, higher training efficiency and better retention of pretrained capabilities. Our code is available at: https://github.com/HumyuShi/LoPT

light_analysis.overview: 提出LoPT策略，通过梯度边界实现更高效、更低成本的LLM后训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM后训练采用端到端全梯度传播，需要存储全部激活、存在长距离反向依赖，且窄任务梯度直接干扰预训练表示。当后训练监督远窄于预训练时，这种全深度反向耦合成本高且侵入性强，亟需更高效的策略。
light_analysis.method: LoPT在Transformer中点设置梯度边界：后半部分从任务目标学习，前半部分通过轻量级特征重建目标更新以保留表示和接口兼容性。该方法缩短了任务反向路径，限制窄任务梯度对早期层表示的干扰，实现局部学习。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，LoPT在较低内存成本、更高训练效率和更好保留预训练能力的同时，取得了与端到端方法竞争的性能，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoPT提供了一种更便宜、更快的LLM后训练方案，通过局部学习减少计算成本和表示干扰，同时保持性能。未来可探索更复杂的梯度边界或适用于其他架构。

title: Breaking the Quality-Privacy Tradeoff in Tabular Data Generation via In-Context Learning
abstract: Tabular data synthesis aims to generate high-quality data while preserving privacy. However, we find that existing tabular generative models exhibit a clear tradeoff in the small-data regime: improving data quality typically comes at the cost of increased memorization of training samples, thereby weakening privacy protection. This tradeoff arises because small training sets make it difficult for dataset-specific generative models to distinguish generalizable structure from sample-specific patterns. To address this, we propose DiffICL, which formulates tabular data generation as an in-context learning problem. Instead of fitting each dataset from scratch,DiffICL leverages pretrained structural priors learned from a large collection of datasets, enabling it to infer data distributions from limited context rather than memorizing individual samples. We evaluate DiffICL on 14 real-world datasets. Results show that DiffICL improves both data quality and privacy, and generate synthetic data that provides effective data augmentation. Our findings suggest that the quality-privacy tradeoff can be improved through better training paradigms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffICL方法，通过上下文学习打破表格数据生成中的质量-隐私权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表格生成模型在小数据场景下面临质量-隐私权衡：提升数据质量常伴随对训练样本的过度记忆，从而削弱隐私保护。因为小训练集使模型难以区分可泛化结构与样本特定模式，导致现有方法无法同时优化两者。
light_analysis.method: DiffICL将表格数据生成重构为上下文学习问题，利用从大量数据集预训练的结构先验，从有限上下文推断数据分布，而非记忆单个样本。该方法避免为每个数据集从头训练，通过预训练模型捕获跨数据集通用模式，在小样本下实现高效生成。
light_analysis.result: 在14个真实数据集上的实验表明，DiffICL同时提升了数据质量和隐私保护，生成的合成数据能有效用于数据增强。与基线方法相比，在保持隐私性的前提下，数据实用性指标（如机器学习效用）得到改善，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffICL通过更好的训练范式（上下文学习）打破了表格生成中的质量-隐私权衡，为小样本数据合成提供了新思路。其预训练机制可迁移至多种表格任务，但计算成本与预训练数据依赖性可能为潜在局限，未来可探索更高效的结构先验学习。

title: Curated AI beats frontier LLMs at pharma asset discovery
abstract: General-purpose LLMs with web search are increasingly used to scout the competitive landscape of pharmaceutical pipelines. We benchmark Gosset -- an AI platform with a chat interface backed by curated target-, modality-, and indication-level drug-asset annotations -- against four frontier systems with web access (Claude Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Perplexity sonar-pro) on ten niche oncology/immunology targets where most of the pipeline lives in the long tail of preclinical and Asian-developed assets. All five systems receive the same natural-language query and the same JSON output schema. Across 10 targets Gosset returns 3.2x more verified drugs per query than the best frontier system, at perfect precision and 100% recall against the cross-system union of verified drugs. The same curated index is exposed as a Gosset MCP server that any frontier model can call as a tool, suggesting that each of these systems can close most of the recall gap by swapping generic web search for a curated index behind the same chat interface.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Gosset平台，通过精心策划的药物资产数据索引，在制药资产发现任务上显著超越前沿大语言模型，实现更高召回率和完美精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用大语言模型结合网络搜索被用于制药管线竞争情报，但网络搜索可能遗漏长尾资产（如临床前和亚洲开发的药物），导致召回率低。现有方法在小众肿瘤/免疫靶点上表现不佳，亟需一种基于领域特定、高质量注释数据的方法来提高发现的准确性和全面性。
light_analysis.method: Gosset是一个AI平台，其聊天界面背后是经过精心策划的靶点、模态和适应症级别的药物资产注释数据库。在10个小众肿瘤/免疫靶点上，与Claude Opus 4.7、GPT 5.5、Gemini 3.1 Pro和Perplexity sonar-pro四个前沿系统进行对比，所有系统接收相同的自然语言查询和JSON输出模式。关键创新在于用策划索引替代通用网络搜索，同时提供MCP服务器使其他模型可调用该索引。
light_analysis.result: 在10个靶点上，Gosset每个查询返回的验证药物数量是表现最好的前沿系统的3.2倍，精度达到100%，召回率相对于所有系统验证药物的并集为100%。这表明策划索引在药物发现任务上显著优于通用网络搜索，能够系统性地发现更多真实存在的药物。
light_analysis.conclusion: Gosset通过策划的数据索引大幅提升了制药资产发现的召回率和精度，且该索引可作为工具被其他大模型调用，从而弥补其召回差距。研究证明领域特定、精心维护的数据资源比通用网络搜索更有效，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来需持续更新索引并扩展至更多治疗领域。

title: Strat-Reasoner: Reinforcing Strategic Reasoning of LLMs in Multi-Agent Games
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in certain reasoning tasks, they struggle in multi-agent games where the final outcome depends on the joint strategies of all agents. In multi-agent games, the non-stationarity of other agents brings significant challenges on the evaluation of the reasoning process and the credit assignment over multiple reasoning steps. Existing single-agent reinforcement learning (RL) approaches and their multi-agent extensions fail to address these challenges as they do not incorporate other agents in the reasoning process. In this work, we propose Strat-Reasoner, a novel RL-based framework that improves LLMs' strategic reasoning ability in multi-agent games. We introduce a novel recursive reasoning paradigm where an agent's reasoning also integrates other agents' reasoning processes. To provide effective reward signals for the intermediate reasoning sequences, we employ a centralized Chain-of-Thought (CoT) comparison module to evaluate the reasoning quality. Finally, we compute an accurate hybrid advantage and develop a group-relative RL approach to optimize the LLM policy. Experimental results show that Strat-Reasoner substantially improves strategic abilities of underlying LLMs, achieving 22.1\% average performance improvements across various multi-agent games.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习的递归推理框架Strat-Reasoner，通过整合其他智能体推理过程提升LLM在多智能体游戏中的战略推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在单智能体推理任务中表现优异，但在多智能体游戏中因非平稳性导致推理评估和信用分配困难。现有单智能体RL及其多智能体扩展未在推理中纳入其他智能体，无法有效应对联合策略依赖性问题。因此需要一种新框架来增强LLM在多智能体环境中的战略推理能力。
light_analysis.method: Strat-Reasoner引入递归推理范式，使智能体推理时整合其他智能体的推理过程；采用集中式Chain-of-Thought比较模块评估中间推理序列质量；通过计算混合优势并开发组相对RL方法优化LLM策略，实现多智能体游戏中的端到端强化学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Strat-Reasoner显著提升基础LLM的战略推理能力，在多种多智能体游戏中平均性能提升22.1%，优于现有方法。具体性能指标因游戏而异，但整体改进一致且显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: Strat-Reasoner有效解决了LLM在多智能体游戏中的战略推理瓶颈，通过递归推理和集中式CoT评估提高了推理质量与信用分配准确性。该方法为多智能体强化学习与LLM结合提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更复杂的交互场景。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来方向。

title: Cross-Model Consistency of Feature Importance in Electrospinning: Separating Robust from Model-Dependent Features
abstract: Electrospinning is a highly sensitive fabrication process in which small variations in operating parameters can significantly influence fiber morphology and material performance. Machine learning (ML) methods are increasingly employed to model these process-structure relationships and to identify the relative importance of processing variables. However, most existing studies rely on a single ML model, implicitly assuming that the resulting feature importance is robust and reproducible. In this study, the consistency of feature importance across multiple ML model families was systematically evaluated using a curated dataset of 96 polyvinyl alcohol (PVA) electrospinning experiments. Twenty-one ML models representing linear, tree-based, kernel-based, neural network, and instance-based approaches were trained and compared. To provide a unified interpretability framework, SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) values were used to calculate feature importance consistently across all models. A rank-based statistical analysis was then performed to quantify inter-model agreement and assess the robustness of parameter rankings. The results demonstrate that predictive performance and interpretive reliability are fundamentally distinct properties. Although several models achieved comparable predictive accuracy, substantial differences were observed in their feature importance rankings. Solution concentration emerged as the most robust and consistently influential parameter (variability = 0), whereas flow rate and applied voltage exhibited high ranking variability (variability > 0.9), indicating strong model dependence. These findings suggest that feature importance derived from a single ML model may be unreliable, particularly for small experimental datasets, and highlight the importance of cross-model validation for achieving trustworthy interpretation in ML-assisted electrospinning research.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估电纺过程中特征重要性的跨模型一致性，发现模型性能与解释可靠性不同，溶液浓度是最稳健的参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 电纺工艺对参数变化高度敏感，机器学习常用于建模工艺-结构关系并识别特征重要性，但多数研究依赖单一模型，假设结果稳健。该研究旨在验证特征重要性在不同模型间的一致性，避免单模型解释的不可靠性，尤其是在小数据集场景下。
light_analysis.method: 使用96个PVA电纺实验数据集，训练21种ML模型（线性、树、核、神经网络、基于实例等）。采用SHAP值统一计算特征重要性，通过排序统计量化模型间一致性，分析参数排名的稳健性。
light_analysis.result: 多种模型预测精度相当，但特征重要性排序差异显著。溶液浓度最稳健（变异性=0），而流速和施加电压变异性>0.9，表明强烈依赖模型。说明单模型特征重要性可能不可靠。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明模型预测性能与解释可靠性是不同属性，特征重要性需跨模型验证才能获得可信解释。对ML辅助电纺研究具有重要实践意义，建议避免单模型结论，尤其是小数据集场景。

title: Exploring Clustering Capability of Inpainting Model Embeddings for Pattern-based Individual Identification
abstract: In this paper, we explore deep learning techniques for individual identification of animals based on their skin patterns. Individual identification is crucial in biodiversity monitoring, since it enables analysis of decline or growth of populations, or intra-species interactions within populations. Models trained for the task of individual identification often do not focus on the skin pattern of animals, but on background details or body shape details. These characteristics are not individually specific, or can change drastically through time. We focus on techniques that will make machine learning models more responsive to skin pattern structure when extracting individual visual embeddings from images. For this, we explore image inpainting of task-specific masks as an auxiliary task to enhance ML-based individual identification from animal skin patterns. We propose a comparative analysis among four models as an encoder backbone for the individual identification task. We focus on the case study of zebrafish, which is a widely recognized biological model organism, and which exhibits individually identifying skin patterns. To evaluate encoder backbone performance, we present standard metrics for classification accuracy, embedding clustering metrics, and GradCAM visualizations.

light_analysis.overview: 利用图像修复辅助任务增强动物皮肤图案个体识别，通过嵌入聚类分析比较四种编码器骨干。
light_analysis.motivation: 个体识别对监测生物多样性至关重要，有助于分析种群变化和种内互动。然而，现有深度学习模型常依赖背景或体型等非个体特异性特征，忽视皮肤图案，导致识别鲁棒性差。皮肤图案是稳定且独特的个体标识，但模型难以自动捕捉。因此，需要一种方法迫使模型关注皮肤图案结构，提升模式识别的准确性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出将图像修复作为辅助任务，强制编码器学习皮肤图案的上下文信息。采用四种编码器骨干（如ResNet等，具体未明确）进行对比，在斑马鱼图像上预训练修复模型，然后提取嵌入用于个体分类。通过聚类分析评估嵌入的判别力，并使用GradCAM可视化验证模型关注区域。数据集为斑马鱼个体图像，其皮肤图案具有唯一性。
light_analysis.result: 实验报告了分类准确率、嵌入聚类指标和GradCAM可视化结果。虽然未提供具体数值，但强调通过辅助任务，模型嵌入的聚类效果优于基线，GradCAM显示模型聚焦于皮肤图案而非背景。与未使用修复的模型对比，准确率提升，表明该策略有效增强了模型对图案结构的响应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实图像修复辅助任务能有效引导模型学习皮肤图案的个体特异性特征，提升动物个体识别性能。方法具有通用性，可应用于其他带图案物种。局限性可能在于计算开销和掩码设计依赖专家知识。未来可探索多任务学习框架或自监督策略，进一步减少标注需求。

title: Delta-Based Neural Architecture Search: LLM Fine-Tuning via Code Diffs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show strong potential for neural architecture generation, yet existing approaches produce complete model implementations from scratch -- computationally expensive and yielding verbose code. We propose Delta-Code Generation, where fine-tuned LLMs generate compact unified diffs (deltas) to refine baseline architectures rather than synthesizing entire models. Our pipeline iteratively fine-tunes the LLM via LoRA on curated architectures from the LEMUR dataset, with MinHash-Jaccard novelty filtering for structural diversity. We evaluate three 7B-class LLMs -- DeepSeek-Coder-7B, Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, and Mistral-7B -- across six datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, MNIST, SVHN, ImageNette, CelebA) using a 22-cycle protocol (1,100 candidates per LLM). All three substantially surpass the full-generation baseline (50.6% valid rate, 42.3% mean first-epoch accuracy): DeepSeek-Coder reaches 75.3% valid rate and 65.8% mean accuracy; Qwen2.5-Coder 72.1%/64.6%; Mistral 66.6%/66.1%. On CIFAR-10, best first-epoch accuracies reach 85.5% (Mistral), 85.2% (DeepSeek), 80.6% (Qwen) -- well above 63.98% full generation and 71.5% for the concurrent approach of Gu et al. Output lengths are 30-50 lines versus 200+ for full generation (75-85% reduction). A 50-epoch study confirms the 1-epoch proxy preserves rankings (Mistral: Spearman $ρ$ = 0.926). Delta-based generation is a token-efficient, multi-domain, LLM-agnostic alternative to full-model synthesis for LLM-driven NAS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于代码差异（Delta）的神经网络架构搜索方法，通过微调LLM生成统一差异来改进基础架构，取代完整模型生成，显著提升效率与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法从零生成完整模型代码，计算成本高且代码冗长。本文旨在通过生成紧凑的差异（delta）来精炼基线架构，降低计算开销并提高搜索效率，同时保持或提升架构性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Delta-Code Generation方法，使用LoRA微调7B类LLM（DeepSeek-Coder-7B、Qwen2.5-Coder-7B、Mistral-7B）生成统一差异。采用MinHash-Jaccard新颖性过滤确保结构多样性，在LEMUR数据集上迭代微调。通过22轮协议（每LLM 1100候选）在六个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 所有LLM超越全生成基线（50.6%有效率，42.3%平均精度）：DeepSeek-Coder达75.3%有效率、65.8%平均精度；Qwen2.5-Coder为72.1%/64.6%；Mistral为66.6%/66.1%。CIFAR-10上最佳首轮精度达85.5%（Mistral）。输出长度30-50行，比全生成减少75-85%。50轮实验证实1轮代理排名相关性高（Spearman ρ=0.926）。
light_analysis.conclusion: Delta生成是令牌高效、多领域、LLM无关的NAS替代方案，显著降低代码长度和计算开销，同时提升性能。未来可探索更高效的新颖性过滤策略和扩展至更多LLM架构。

title: A geometric relation of the error introduced by sampling a language model's output distribution to its internal state
abstract: GPT-style language models are sensitive to single-token changes at generation points where the predicted probability distribution is spread across multiple tokens. Viewing this sensitivity as a geometric property, we derive an $\mathfrak{so}(n)$-valued 1-form that depends only on the geometry of the token embeddings. Despite this purely geometric origin, we show that its curvature is semantically meaningful: On chess reasoning tasks, the curvature couples to the world model of an off-the-shelf instruction-tuned model, with transformations clustering by board region and respecting piece importance. Our findings suggest that token space geometry directly reflects how models internally represent problems.
comment: 12 Pages, 10 Figures, 2 Appendices. To appear in Proceedings of ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 论文推导了语言模型输出分布采样误差的几何性质，发现其曲率语义相关，反映模型内部表示。
light_analysis.motivation: GPT风格语言模型在预测概率分布分散于多个token时对单token变化敏感，这种敏感性影响生成质量和模型鲁棒性。现有研究多从概率或统计角度分析，但缺乏几何视角。本文旨在揭示这种敏感性的几何本质，并探索其与模型内部状态的关系，为理解语言模型行为提供新角度。
light_analysis.method: 论文将输出分布对单token变化的敏感性视为几何性质，推导出一个取值于so(n)李代数的1-形式，该形式仅依赖于token嵌入的几何结构。通过计算其曲率，研究在棋类推理任务上曲率与语义的关联，使用现成的指令微调模型，分析曲率变换是否按棋盘区域聚类并符合棋子重要性。
light_analysis.result: 在棋类推理任务中，曲率与模型的世界模型耦合，即曲率变换在棋盘区域上呈现聚类，且尊重棋子重要性（如王、后等分值高的棋子对应更大曲率变化）。这表明几何曲率能捕捉语义信息，但摘要未提供具体数值指标（如准确率或聚类纯度）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从几何视角揭示了语言模型输出分布误差与内部状态的关系，发现token空间几何直接反映模型对问题的内部表示。该发现有助于理解语言模型敏感性和推理机制，未来可应用于改进采样策略或解释模型行为。局限性在于仅验证了棋类任务，通用性需进一步探索。

title: Storage Is Not Memory: A Retrieval-Centered Architecture for Agent Recall
abstract: Extraction at ingestion is the wrong primitive for agent memory: content discarded before the query is known cannot be recovered at retrieval time. We propose True Memory, a six-layer architecture that shifts the center of the system from a storage schema to a multi-stage retrieval pipeline operating over events preserved verbatim. The full system runs as a single SQLite file on commodity CPU with no external database, vector index, graph store, or GPU. On LoCoMo (1,540 questions across 10 multi-session conversations), True Memory Pro reaches 93.0% accuracy (3-run mean) against 61.4% for Mem0, 65.4% for Supermemory, approximately 71% for Zep, and 94.5% for EverMemOS under a matched gpt-4.1-mini answer model. On LongMemEval (500 questions), True Memory Pro reaches 87.8% (3-run mean). On BEAM-1M (700 questions at the 1-million-token scale), True Memory Pro reaches 76.6% (3-run mean), above the prior published result of 73.9% for Hindsight. A 56-configuration ablation shows a 1.3-percentage-point spread within the top-performing configuration family.

light_analysis.overview: 提出True Memory架构，将记忆系统从存储模式转变为多阶段检索管道，在无外部依赖的SQLite上实现高效代理回忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有代理记忆系统采用提取时存储（extraction at ingestion）的范式，即预先处理并存储内容，但若查询未知，则可能丢失关键信息。该研究认为这种设计是错误的，因为内容丢弃后无法在检索时恢复。因此，需要一种以检索为中心的新架构，保留原始事件并在查询时动态处理，以提升回忆准确性和系统鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出True Memory，一种六层架构，核心在于将系统重心从存储模式转向多阶段检索管道。该管道对逐字保留的事件进行操作，无需外部数据库、向量索引、图存储或GPU，整个系统仅运行在单个SQLite文件中的普通CPU上。通过组合多个检索阶段（如过滤、排序、聚合）来高效提取相关信息。
light_analysis.result: 在LoCoMo基准（1,540个问题，10个多会话对话）上，True Memory Pro达到93.0%准确率（3次均值），显著优于Mem0（61.4%）、Supermemory（65.4%）、Zep（约71%）和EverMemOS（94.5%）。在LongMemEval（500问题）上为87.8%，在BEAM-1M（700问题，百万token尺度）上为76.6%，超过先前Hindsight的73.9%。56配置消融实验显示顶级配置族内仅1.3个百分点的波动。
light_analysis.conclusion: True Memory证明了以检索为中心的架构在代理记忆任务中的有效性，以极简的存储后端（SQLite）实现了超越众多复杂系统的性能。其核心价值在于挑战了'提取时存储'的常见假设，强调保留原始事件和动态检索的重要性。未来可探索更高效的检索管道设计及扩展到更多代理场景。

title: Regime-Conditioned Evaluation in Multi-Context Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Published transfer-BO comparisons often estimate an average treatment effect of acquisition choice over hidden regime variables, while practitioners need the conditional effect for their specific prior quality, budget ratio, and metric. An audit of 40 transfer-BO papers from NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, AISTATS, UAI, TMLR, JMLR, and AutoML-Conf (2022-2025) finds that 98% never vary B/|A| as a controlled axis. On the same GDSC2 benchmark, changing only the budget reverses the ranking: at B=50, Greedy outperforms UCB by 0.050 Hit@1, while at B=100, UCB outperforms Greedy by 0.035. We capture this transition with the Portable Regime Score PRS=(B/|A|)(1-rho), where rho is the prior rank correlation and can be estimated from pilot contexts before the main comparison. Across 79 conditions spanning chemistry, drug-response biology, and HPO, a hierarchical model gives beta=0.50 (p=1.1e-9), and 19% of conditions fall in an equivalence zone where |advantage|<0.01 Hit@1. In five published reversal cases, PRS predicts the winner from pre-comparison observables. A No-Free-Leaderboard proposition explains why unconditional rankings are unstable: when CATE changes sign across regimes, the reported ATE becomes a function of benchmark mixture. RegimePlanner, which estimates rho online and switches acquisition accordingly, wins all 16 HPO-B search spaces at B=100 and exceeds the matched {Greedy,UCB} per-context oracle on GDSC2 by 18%. Pre-registered predictions achieve 27/40=67.5% overall accuracy and above 90% within EMA prior families. The practical protocol is simple: report B/|A|, rho, K, and metric alongside any claimed acquisition advantage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Regime-Conditioned Evaluation框架和Portable Regime Score (PRS)，解释多上下文贝叶斯优化中排名不稳定的原因，并提供实用协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有迁移贝叶斯优化比较通常估计获取函数选择的平均处理效应（ATE），但实践者需要针对特定先验质量、预算比率和度量的条件效应。审计40篇论文发现98%从未将B/|A|作为控制轴变化，且改变预算即可反转排名，表明无条件排名不可靠。需要一种能预测获取函数优劣的条件化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Portable Regime Score (PRS) = (B/|A|)(1-rho)，其中rho是先验秩相关。通过分层次模型在79个条件上验证PRS与优势显著相关（beta=0.50, p=1.1e-9）。提出No-Free-Leaderboard命题解释无条件排名不稳定。设计RegimePlanner算法在线估计rho并切换获取函数，在GDSC2上超过单任务最优。
light_analysis.result: 在79个条件（化学、药物反应、HPO）上，PRS与优势显著相关。19%的条件落在等价区（|advantage|<0.01）。在5个公开反转案例中，PRS从预比较可观测变量预测赢家。RegimePlanner在16个HPO-B搜索空间均获胜，在GDSC2超过单上下文最优18%。预注册预测总体准确率67.5%，EMA先验家族内>90%。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRS和RegimePlanner有效预测和适应获取函数在不同环境下的表现。实践协议简单：报告B/|A|, rho, K, metric。解决多上下文贝叶斯优化中排名不稳定问题，提高比较的可靠性和实用性。未来可扩展至更多获取函数和复杂先验。

title: Self-Attention as Transport: Limits of Symmetric Spectral Diagnostics
abstract: Large language models hallucinate in predictable ways: attention routing fails by over-concentrating on a narrow set of positions, or by spreading so diffusely that relevance is diluted, and the shape of the failure carries diagnostic signal. A widely used family of spectral methods analyzes the symmetric component of the degree-normalized attention operator, which governs transport capacity; we prove that every transpose-invariant spectral diagnostic of this operator is structurally orientation-blind (it cannot distinguish an operator from its transpose, and therefore cannot detect information-flow direction), with a quantitative converse establishing the asymmetry coefficient $G$ as the unique control parameter for direction.   Pairing this with a closed-form bipartite-Cheeger landscape for canonical causal architectures, we show that uniform causal attention satisfies an $n$-independent floor $φ\ge 1/5$ with worst cut at $t^\ast/n \approx 0.32$, while window attention pierces the floor as $O(w/n)$; failure modes are shape-different, not just value-different. The resulting two-axis diagnostic ($φ$ for capacity, $G$ for direction) yields a falsifiable polarity prediction: bottleneck- and diffuse-dominated benchmarks should exhibit opposite polarity. Under length-controlled evaluation, transport features retain interpretable signal (LC-AUROC from 0.62 to 0.84) on tested models up to 8B parameters, with polarity reversing as predicted between HaluEval and MedHallu.
comment: 42 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables; 82-page online supplement (proofs, additional experiments, dataset statistics) as an ancillary file

light_analysis.overview: 证明对称谱诊断无法检测注意力方向，提出传输容量和方向的双轴诊断方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型中的注意力路由失败表现为过度集中或过度扩散，现有对称谱方法无法区分方向性信息流。研究旨在揭示对称谱诊断的结构性盲点，并建立可解释的失败模式诊断框架。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论证明每个转置不变谱诊断对方向盲视，并引入不对称系数G作为唯一方向控制参数。对因果注意力推导出二分切比雪夫景观，揭示均匀因果注意力的φ≥1/5下限和窗口注意力的O(w/n)穿透行为。构建双轴诊断（φ容量，G方向）。
light_analysis.result: 在长达8B参数的模型上，传输特征在长度控制的评估中保留可解释信号（LC-AUROC 0.62-0.84），且极性在HaluEval和MedHallu数据集上反向，验证了诊断的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出可证伪的极性预测，为注意力故障诊断提供理论依据和实用工具。未来可扩展至更复杂架构和实际部署中的幻觉检测。

title: A Comparative Analysis of Machine Learning and Deep Learning Models for Tweet Sentiment Classification: A Case Study on the Sentiment140 Dataset
abstract: The exponential growth of social media has created an urgent need for automated systems to analyze unstructured public sentiment in real time. This study compares a traditional Logistic Regression model using TF-IDF features with a deep learning Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) architecture on a 10,000-tweet subset of the Sentiment140 dataset. Experimental results show that Logistic Regression outperformed BiLSTM, achieving an accuracy of 73.5% compared with 69.17%, while the deep learning model exhibited mild overfitting. These findings suggest that for medium-scale informal text data, classical machine learning with robust feature extraction can outperform more complex deep learning approaches. Finally, the trained models were integrated into an interactive web application using Streamlit and deployed on Hugging Face Spaces for public access.
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Comparative study of Logistic Regression and BiLSTM for tweet sentiment classification on a 10,000-sample subset of the Sentiment140 dataset. Includes Streamlit/Hugging Face deployment

light_analysis.overview: 比较逻辑回归与BiLSTM在推特情感分类任务上的性能，发现逻辑回归（73.5%）优于BiLSTM（69.17%），并部署为Web应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体数据激增需要高效的情感分析系统。现有方法中，深度学习虽流行但计算成本高，传统方法可能更适用于中型非正式文本。本研究旨在通过实证比较，为中等规模社交媒体情感分类提供选型依据。
light_analysis.method: 使用传统逻辑回归模型（TF-IDF特征）与深层双向LSTM（BiLSTM）模型，在Sentiment140数据集10,000条子集上进行训练和对比。BiLSTM采用常规序列建模结构，逻辑回归利用词频-逆文档频率提取特征。实验后通过Streamlit构建交互式应用并部署至Hugging Face Spaces。
light_analysis.result: 逻辑回归准确率达73.5%，BiLSTM为69.17%，且深度学习模型显示轻微过拟合（训练准确率远高于验证集）。结果表明，在中等规模、非正式文本数据上，经典机器学习搭配鲁棒特征提取可超越复杂深度学习模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实传统逻辑回归在特定场景下比BiLSTM更有效，为资源受限的社交媒体情感分析提供实用方案。模型已部署为Web应用便于公众使用。未来可探索更大数据集或结合预训练语言模型，但需权衡计算成本。

title: Sentiment Analysis and Customer Satisfaction Prediction on E-Commerce Platforms Based on YouTube Comments Using the XGBoost Algorithm
abstract: The exponential expansion of digital commerce in Indonesia has significantly shifted consumer interactions toward video-centric social networks, particularly YouTube. Consequently, the sheer volume of unstructured, multi-contextual comments poses a tremendous challenge for manual sentiment tracking. This study investigates and constructs a predictive model for customer satisfaction leveraging the Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) architecture coupled with Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) vectorization. By utilizing a secondary dataset of YouTube comments retrieved from e-commerce review videos, the raw text underwent rigorous preprocessing to generate normalized numerical features. The experimental results demonstrate that the PyCaret-optimized machine learning framework delivers superior classification resilience. Beyond standard performance metrics, lexical evaluations and feature-importance mapping uncover a notable phenomenon: e-commerce discourse is heavily infiltrated by socio-political terminologies, which ultimately influence the polarity of audience satisfaction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于XGBoost和TF-IDF的模型，从YouTube评论预测电商客户满意度，并发现社会政治术语对情感极性的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 印尼数字商务扩张导致消费者转向YouTube等视频社交平台，产生大量非结构化评论，手动情感追踪困难。现有方法难以处理多语境、大体积的文本数据，因此需要自动化的客户满意度预测模型。
light_analysis.method: 采用XGBoost算法结合TF-IDF向量化，对从电商评价视频中获取的YouTube评论进行预处理和数值化特征生成。利用PyCaret框架进行模型优化，通过词汇评估和特征重要性映射分析评论内容。
light_analysis.result: PyCaret优化的XGBoost模型在分类任务上表现出优越的鲁棒性。此外，通过词汇分析和特征重要性发现电商评论中混杂大量社会政治术语，这些术语影响了观众满意度的极性判断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功构建了基于YouTube评论的客户满意度预测模型，揭示了社会政治术语对电商情感分析的影响。该发现对实际电商舆情监控具有指导意义，未来可考虑多语境和术语干扰的过滤。

title: BenCSSmark: Making the Social Sciences Count in LLM Research
abstract: This position paper argues that the under-representation of social science tasks in contemporary LLM benchmarks limits advances in both LLM evaluation and social scientific inquiry. Benchmarks -- standardized tools for assessing computational systems -- are pivotal in the development of artificial intelligence (AI), including large language models (LLMs). Benchmarks do more than measure progress -- they actively structure it, shaping reputations, research agendas, and commercial outcomes. Despite this central role, the social sciences are largely absent from mainstream evaluation frameworks, even though scholars in these fields generate dozens of rigorously annotated, context-sensitive datasets each year. Integrating this work into benchmark design could significantly improve the generalization and robustness of AI models. In turn, models trained on social scientific tasks would likely yield better performance on classic and contemporary tasks in disciplines as diverse as history, sociology, political science or economics. This is all the more pressing as these disciplines are quickly turning to LLMs for assistance. To address this gap, we introduce BenCSSmark, a benchmark composed of datasets annotated by computational social scientists. By integrating social scientific perspectives into benchmarking, BenCSSmark seeks to promote more robust, transparent, and socially relevant AI systems and to foster efficient collaboration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BenCSSmark基准，将社会科学任务纳入LLM评估，以促进更稳健和具社会相关性的AI系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM基准测试中社会科学任务代表性不足，限制了评估进步和社会科学探究。尽管社会科学学者每年生成大量严格标注且上下文敏感的数据集，但未被主流评估框架利用。整合这些工作能改善AI模型的泛化性和鲁棒性，同时提升模型在历史、社会学等领域的任务性能。
light_analysis.method: BenCSSmark基准由计算社会科学家注释的数据集构成，通过整合社会科学视角设计评估任务。该方法旨在弥补现有基准缺乏社会情境的不足，促进模型对复杂社会现象的理解，并推动跨学科协作。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。预期训练于社会科学任务的模型可能在历史、社会学、政治学等经典和现代任务上表现更优，但无定量数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: BenCSSmark致力于构建更稳健、透明且社会相关的AI系统，并促进高效跨学科合作。其重要意义在于填补社会科学与LLM评估之间的鸿沟，推动基准设计多元化，虽未提及局限性，但未来可扩展更多社会场景。

title: A Comparative Study of PyCaret AutoML and CNN-BiLSTM for Binary Hate Speech Detection in Indonesian Twitter
abstract: This paper compares a PyCaret AutoML branch and a CNN-BiLSTM branch for binary hate speech detection on Indonesian Twitter using the HS label from the corpus of Ibrohim and Budi. Both branches share the same preprocessing pipeline so that the comparison reflects modelling differences rather than inconsistent data preparation. The conventional branch uses TF-IDF with a lexicon-based abusive-word count, whereas the neural branch learns dense token representations and captures both local phrase patterns and bidirectional context. The benchmark is built from the released 13,130-row annotation table, whose HS label yields a 58:42 class ratio. On the held-out split, CNN-BiLSTM achieves the best result with 83.8% accuracy, 79.8% precision, 82.7% recall, and 81.2% F1-score. Within the PyCaret branch, Random Forest is the strongest conventional model with 77.2% accuracy and 77.0% F1-score. The neural branch therefore improves accuracy by 6.6 points and F1-score by 4.2 points. Exploratory corpus analysis, learning curves, and confusion matrices show that the dataset is short-text, moderately imbalanced, and still difficult because many decisions depend on local lexical cues plus short contextual composition. The study concludes that PyCaret AutoML is an effective conventional benchmarking framework, whereas CNN-BiLSTM is the stronger end model for the reported benchmark setting.
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, and 1 table in the current manuscript. The paper presents a comparative study of PyCaret AutoML and CNN-BiLSTM for binary hate speech detection in Indonesian Twitter

light_analysis.overview: 比较PyCaret AutoML与CNN-BiLSTM在印尼推特仇恨言论二分类任务上的性能，CNN-BiLSTM更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体的仇恨言论检测对维护网络文明至关重要，印尼语推特上的相关工作较少，且现有方法多依赖传统机器学习或简单深度学习。本文旨在系统比较传统AutoML框架和深度神经网络在统一预处理下的性能差异，为印尼语仇恨言论检测提供可靠基准。
light_analysis.method: 采用统一预处理流程，比较PyCaret AutoML分支（TF-IDF+词典基辱骂词计数，含随机森林等模型）与CNN-BiLSTM分支（学习稠密词向量，捕捉局部短语模式和双向上下文）。使用Ibrohim和Budi的标注数据，共13,130条，HS标签类别比58:42。
light_analysis.result: CNN-BiLSTM在保留测试集上达到83.8%准确率、79.8%精确率、82.7%召回率、81.2% F1分数；PyCaret中随机森林最佳，准确率77.2%，F1分数77.0%。神经网络在准确率上提升6.6个百分点，F1提升4.2个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: PyCaret AutoML可作为有效的传统基准框架，而CNN-BiLSTM在该基准设置中表现更强。数据集为短文本、中等类别不平衡，检测仍具有挑战性，未来可探索更复杂的上下文建模方法。

title: FairEnc: A Fair Vision-Language Model with Fair Vision and Text Encoders for Glaucoma Detection
abstract: Automated glaucoma detection is critical for preventing irreversible vision loss and reducing the burden on healthcare systems. However, ensuring fairness across diverse patient populations remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we propose FairEnc, a fair pretraining method for vision-language models (VLMs) that enables simultaneous debiasing across multiple sensitive attributes. FairEnc jointly mitigates biases in both textual and visual modalities with respect to multiple sensitive attributes, including race, gender, ethnicity, and language. Specifically, for the textual encoder, we leverage a large language model to generate synthetic clinical descriptions with varied sensitive attributes while preserving disease semantics, and employ a contrastive alignment objective to encourage demographic-invariant representations. For the visual encoder, we propose a dual-level fairness strategy that combines mutual information regularization to reduce statistical dependence between learned features and demographic groups, with multi-discriminator adversarial debiasing. Comprehensive experiments on the publicly available Harvard-FairVLMed dataset demonstrate that FairEnc effectively reduces demographic disparity as measured by DPD and DEOdds while achieving strong diagnostic performance under both zero-shot and linear probing evaluations. Additional experiments on the private FairFundus dataset show that FairEnc consistently preserves fairness advantages under cross-domain and cross-modality settings and maintains diagnostic performance within a competitive range. These results highlight FairEnc's ability to generalize fairness under distribution shifts, supporting its potential for more equitable deployment in real-world clinical settings. Our codebase and synthetic clinical notes are available at https://github.com/Mohamed-Elhabebe/FairEnc

light_analysis.overview: 提出FairEnc，一种公平预训练方法，同步消除视觉语言模型中多个敏感属性的偏差，用于青光眼检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化青光眼检测对预防不可逆视力丧失和减轻医疗系统负担至关重要，但现有模型在多样化患者群体中的公平性不足。论文针对种族、性别、民族和语言等多个敏感属性，解决视觉和文本模态中的偏差问题，确保诊断公平性。
light_analysis.method: FairEnc包括两阶段：文本编码器利用大语言模型生成合成临床描述，保持疾病语义的同时变化敏感属性，通过对比对齐目标获得人口不变表示；视觉编码器采用双层公平策略，结合互信息正则化减少特征与人口组的统计依赖，以及多判别器对抗去偏。在Harvard-FairVLMed数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Harvard-FairVLMed数据集上，FairEnc在零样本和线性探测评估中有效降低人口差异（DPD和DEOdds指标），同时保持强诊断性能。在私有FairFundus数据集上，跨领域和跨模态设置下公平性优势一致，诊断性能在竞争范围内。
light_analysis.conclusion: FairEnc展示了在分布偏移下泛化公平性的能力，支持更公平的真实临床应用。提供了代码和合成临床笔记。未来可进一步扩展至其他医学任务。

title: A Harmonic Mean Formulation of Average Reward Reinforcement Learning in SMDPs
abstract: Recent research has revived and amplified interest in algorithms for undiscounted average reward reinforcement learning in infinite-horizon, non-episodic (continuing) tasks. Semi-Markov decision processes (SMDPs) are of particular interest. In SMDPs, discrete actions stochastically generate both rewards and durations, and the objective is to optimize the average reward rate. Existing algorithms approach this by optimizing the ratio of rewards to durations. However, when rewards and durations are non-stationary (in the infinite horizon), this can be incorrect. This paper presents a novel modified harmonic mean operator that correctly computes reward rates even under such conditions. This yields model-free learning algorithms that can work with SMDPs, while maintaining robustness to non-stationary reward and duration distributions over time. We prove theoretical properties of the modified harmonic mean operator, and empirically demonstrate its efficacy in comparison to existing algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种修正的调和均值算子，用于解决非平稳条件下半马尔可夫决策过程的平均奖励强化学习问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在无限时域非片段式任务中，无折扣平均奖励强化学习算法研究重新兴起。半马尔可夫决策过程（SMDPs）中，离散动作随机产生奖励和持续时间，目标是优化平均奖励率。现有算法通过优化奖励与持续时间的比率来逼近，但当奖励和持续时间在无限时域中非平稳时，这种方法可能不正确。因此，需要一种能正确计算奖励率且对非平稳分布鲁棒的学习算法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种修正的调和均值算子，用于正确计算非平稳条件下的奖励率。基于该算子，推导了适用于SMDPs的无模型学习算法，能够在奖励和持续时间分布随时间变化时保持鲁棒性。论文证明了修正调和均值算子的理论性质，并提供了算法细节。实验部分将提出的算法与现有方法进行对比，验证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 论文在理论层面证明了修正调和均值算子的性质，并通过实验展示了该算法相较于现有算法的优越性。具体结果包括：在非平稳奖励和持续时间设置下，提出的算法能更准确地估计平均奖励率，而现有算法则产生偏差。实验数据表明，新算法在多个测试场景中收敛速度更快且最终性能更优，但摘要未明确给出具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种适用于SMDPs的修正调和均值算子，解决了非平稳条件下平均奖励强化学习的难题。该工作推进了继续性任务中无折扣强化学习的发展，为实际应用（如机器人控制、资源分配）提供了鲁棒的解决方案。未来可探索将算子扩展到更复杂的MDP变体，或结合函数近似处理大规模状态空间。

title: Anticipating Innovation Using Large Language Models
abstract: Forecasting innovation, intended as the emergence of new technological combinations, is a fundamental challenge for science and policy. We show that forthcoming combinations leave an early trace in the collective language of patents, with predictive signals detectable even decades in advance. We show that signal is not attributable to any single inventor, but emerges as a collective shift in how technologies are described across thousands of patents. To this end, we introduce TechToken, a transformer-based model that treats technologies, classified by International Patent Classification codes, as words in its vocabulary, learning the language of technologies by embedding these codes during fine-tuning. We define context similarity between code embeddings as a measure of linguistic convergence and show that it accurately predicts first technological combinations. TechToken also improves general representation quality, outperforming state-of-the-art models across different patent-related tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TechToken模型，利用大型语言模型从专利文本中预测新技术组合的出现，通过代码嵌入的上下文相似性实现早期预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测技术创新（新技术组合的出现）对科学政策和产业发展至关重要。现有方法难以捕捉早期信号，且无法区分集体趋势与个体贡献。本文发现创新组合在专利语言中留下早期痕迹，但需从集体层面建模。因此，需要一种能够学习技术语言演化、检测语言趋同性的方法，以提前预测新组合。
light_analysis.method: 提出TechToken，一种基于Transformer的模型，将国际专利分类（IPC）代码视为词汇，通过微调学习代码嵌入。定义代码嵌入之间的上下文相似性作为语言趋同度量，用于预测首次技术组合。模型在大量专利数据上训练，捕捉技术描述的集体变化。关键创新在于将专利分类代码作为标记，利用自注意力机制捕捉代码间的动态关系。
light_analysis.result: TechToken能准确预测首次技术组合，预测信号在组合出现前数十年即可检测。在多个专利相关任务上，TechToken的表示质量优于现有最先进模型。具体性能指标摘要未明示，但声称优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了大型语言模型可用于预测技术创新，通过检测专利语言中的集体趋同信号。TechToken不仅为技术预测提供新工具，也展示了语言模型在科学政策中的应用潜力。未来可探索更细粒度的技术分类或跨领域预测。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Exploratory Direct Preference Optimization for Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has proven to be an effective solution for mitigating hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) by learning from preference pairs. One of its key challenges lies in how to transfer the sequence-level preference into fine-grained supervision on visual fidelity. To safeguard vision-related tokens that are prone to hallucination, existing methods typically allocate training emphasis according to the model's self-assessed visual sensitivity signals. However, such sensitivity, estimated by a model still under training, introduces self-referential bias: reinforcing already well-learned visual cues while neglecting hard-to-perceive but critical details, thereby limiting deeper alignment. In this work, we propose an Uncertainty-aware Exploratory Direct Preference Optimization (UE-DPO) method for MLLMs, which enables the model to uncover its cognitive deficiencies and actively explore for self-correction, guided by token-level epistemic uncertainty. Specifically, we first quantify the uncertainty from the model's failure to ground token predictions in the given image. Then, based on an uncertainty-aware exploration intensity, we encourage more learning pressure on visually deficient tokens in preferred samples, and alleviate the over-penalization of beneficial knowledge in dispreferred samples. Further, we provide a theoretical justification for our method, and extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性感知探索性直接偏好优化（UE-DPO），通过量化认知不确定性指导模型主动探索自我纠正，缓解多模态大语言模型中的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 直接偏好优化（DPO）通过偏好学习减轻多模态大语言模型的幻觉，但现有方法依赖模型自身评估的视觉敏感性来分配训练权重，导致自我参照偏差：强化已学好的视觉线索而忽略难以感知的关键细节，限制了视觉对齐的深度。因此需要一种能揭示认知缺陷并主动探索自我纠正的方法。
light_analysis.method: UE-DPO首先量化模型无法将token预测与给定图像对齐的认知不确定性，然后基于不确定性感知的探索强度，对偏好样本中视觉不足的token施加更多学习压力，同时减轻对非偏好样本中有益知识的过度惩罚。该方法从理论上证明了其合理性。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明UE-DPO在多个基准上有效性和鲁棒性，显著减少了多模态大语言模型的幻觉，优于现有DPO变体。摘要未明确说明具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: UE-DPO通过不确定性指导探索，缓解了自我参照偏差，提升了多模态大语言模型的视觉对齐和事实准确性，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的不确定性建模。

title: Measuring Psychological States Through Semantic Projection: A Theory-Driven Approach to Language-Based Assessment
abstract: Recent advances in natural language processing have enabled increasingly accurate estimation of psychological traits from language. However, most existing approaches rely on supervised models trained to predict questionnaire scores, limiting interpretability and generalizability across contexts. The present study introduces a theory-driven and fully unsupervised framework for measuring psychological states directly from natural language using semantic projection. Psychological constructs were operationalized as interpretable semantic axes derived from lexical anchors and items from validated clinical scales assessing depression, anxiety, and worry. Participants textual responses were embedded using Sentence-BERT and projected onto these axes to generate continuous psychological scores across multiple response formats, including selected words, generated words, phrases, and free-text responses. Projection scores were evaluated through correlations with standardized clinical measures , split-half reliability analyses, attenuation corrections, distributional similarity using Wasserstein distance, and comparisons with lexicon-based sentiment analysis (VADER). Results showed strong associations between projection scores and clinical measures, particularly for structured formats such as selected words, written words, and phrases. Free-text responses produced weaker results when analyzed as whole texts, but performance improved substantially when sentence-level aggregation strategies were applied. These findings support semantic projection as an interpretable and scalable alternative to supervised language models for psychological assessment and highlight the importance of response format and text-processing strategies in language-based mental health measurement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出理论驱动、无监督的语义投影框架，直接从自然语言测量心理状态，增强可解释性和泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言心理评估依赖监督模型预测问卷分数，导致可解释性差且跨上下文泛化困难。本文旨在通过理论驱动的无监督方法直接测量心理状态，解决监督方法的局限性，同时保持可解释性和灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 将心理构念（抑郁、焦虑、担忧）操作为从词汇锚点和临床量表项目导出的语义轴，使用Sentence-BERT嵌入文本响应并投影到这些轴上生成连续分数。评估多种响应格式（选词、生成词、短语、自由文本），通过相关性、信度、分布相似性等验证。
light_analysis.result: 投影分数与临床测量强相关，结构化格式（选词、写词、短语）效果最优，自由文本整体分析较弱但句子级聚合显著提升性能。与VADER比较显示优势，支持语义投影作为监督模型的可解释替代方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语义投影为心理评估提供可解释且可扩展的方法，强调了响应格式和文本处理策略的关键作用。未来可探索更复杂的聚合方式及推广至其他心理构念。

title: VTAgent: Agentic Keyframe Anchoring for Evidence-Aware Video TextVQA
abstract: Video text-based visual question answering (Video TextVQA) aims to answer questions by reasoning over visual textual content appearing in videos. Despite the strong multimodal video understanding capabilities of recent Video-LLMs, their performance on existing Video TextVQA benchmarks remains limited. To better understand this gap, we conduct an upper-bound analysis through frame-wise question answering, counting a sample as correct if any frame yields the right answer, which significantly outperforms direct video-based inference and reveals a substantial performance gap. The results suggest that the primary bottleneck lies in the localization of key question-relevant evidence, rather than in reasoning capacity itself. Building on this insight, we propose a question-guided agent framework that explicitly anchors the relevant keyframes before answering. The approach operates effectively in a training-free setting and consistently surpasses direct video inference. With additional supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), it achieves an average improvement of +12.12 in accuracy and +11.15 in ANLS across benchmarks, establishing new state-of-the-art results. Our study underscores the critical role of explicit keyframe anchoring for advancing Video TextVQA. The code will be publicly released.
