light_analysis.overview: 提出VTAgent框架，通过显式关键帧锚定提升Video TextVQA性能，达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: Video TextVQA任务旨在回答视频中的视觉文本问题。现有Video-LLMs在基准测试中表现有限。通过逐帧QA上界分析发现，性能瓶颈在于关键证据帧的定位而非推理能力本身。因此，亟需一种显式定位关键帧的方法来提升视频问答准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出question-guided agent框架，首先通过智能体显式锚定与问题相关的关键帧，然后基于这些帧进行答案推理。该方法可训练-free运行，并支持后续的监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）优化。采用帧级QA策略定位证据，避免全视频推理的冗余信息干扰。
light_analysis.result: 在训练-free设置下，VTAgent已超越直接视频推理。加上SFT和RL后，在多个基准测试上平均准确率提升12.12，ANLS提升11.15，达到新的最先进结果。具体指标未列出，但摘要明确报告了平均改进数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: VTAgent证明了显式关键帧锚定在Video TextVQA中的关键作用，揭示了先前方法的瓶颈在于证据定位。本研究为视频问答提供了高效且可解释的范式，代码将开源。未来可探索更复杂的智能体策略及跨任务迁移。

title: Assessing Cognitive Effort in L2 Idiomatic Processing: An Eye-Tracking Dataset
abstract: This paper presents the development and validation of an eye-tracking dataset designed to investigate how second-language (L2) learners process idiomatic expressions. While native speakers often rely on direct retrieval of figurative meanings, L2 speakers frequently adopt a literal-first approach, which incurs measurable cognitive costs. This resource captures these costs through ocular metrics recorded from Portuguese L1 speakers of English across all CEFR proficiency levels (A1-C2). Although the study uses entry-level 60 Hz hardware (Tobii Pro Spark), we demonstrate that this sampling rate provides sufficient data density to detect macro-cognitive events such as fixations and regressions in reading. Preliminary analysis validates the dataset by revealing a strong inverse correlation between language proficiency and regressive eye movements. Integrated into the MIA (Modeling Idiomaticity in Human and Artificial Language Processing) initiative, this dataset serves as a cognitively grounded benchmark for evaluating both human processing models and the alignment of large language models with human-like figurative understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 开发并验证了一个眼动追踪数据集，用于量化L2学习者处理成语的认知成本，并作为大语言模型对齐的认知基准。
light_analysis.motivation: L2学习者处理成语时通常采用字面优先策略，导致可测量的认知成本。现有研究缺乏跨不同熟练水平的眼动数据集来量化这种认知努力，且难以评估语言模型是否具有类人成语理解能力。该研究旨在通过眼动追踪捕获这些成本，为人类和机器处理提供基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建眼动追踪数据集，记录葡萄牙语母语者（CEFR A1-C2）阅读英语成语时的眼动数据。使用60 Hz Tobii Pro Spark硬件，证明采样率足够检测注视和回归等宏观认知事件。数据集集成到MIA项目中，支持人类处理模型评估和LLM对齐测试。
light_analysis.result: 初步分析显示语言熟练度与回归性眼动呈强负相关，即高熟练度学习者回归较少，表明认知成本降低。该结果验证了数据集的有效性，能够区分不同水平学习者的处理差异，并可作为评估模型对齐的基准指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据集为研究L2成语处理的认知机制提供了新资源，可评估人类和机器语言处理模型。其认知基准有助于改进LLM的隐喻理解能力。局限性在于硬件规格较低，未来可探索更高采样率的设置，并扩展至更多语言和表达类型。

title: 3D Ultrasound-Derived Pseudo-CT Synthesis Using a Transformer-Augmented Residual Network for Real-Time Operator Guidance
abstract: Computed tomography (CT) is indispensable for clinical diagnosis and image-guided interventions but exposes patients to ionizing radiation, motivating the development of safer imaging alternatives. Ultrasound (US) is non-ionizing and widely accessible; however, it is highly operator dependent and lacks quantitative tissue characterization, often leading to diagnostic uncertainty and unnecessary CT examinations. This work presents a 3D ultrasound-derived pseudo-CT (UD-pCT) framework that generates CT-like anatomical reference volumes inferred from US, without aiming to reproduce physically accurate Hounsfield Units. Paired 3D kidney US and CT volumes from the TRUSTED dataset are first spatially aligned using a landmark-based multimodal registration pipeline, creating high-quality paired inputs for supervised training of an adversarial framework. The proposed Bottleneck Transformer Residual U-Net3D (BT-ResUNet3D) model employs a 3D residual encoder-decoder generator augmented with a transformer bottleneck, enabling effective modeling of fine-grained local anatomical structures as well as long-range volumetric dependencies, while a 3D Conditional PatchGAN discriminator enforces local structural realism in the synthesized pseudo-CT volumes. Quantitative evaluation using PSNR and SSIM demonstrates that the proposed method outperforms established baselines in structural fidelity and perceptual image quality. The UD-pCT volumes provide real-time anatomical reference for operator guidance, potentially reducing acquisition variability and unnecessary CT use. A limitation of this study is the relatively small paired dataset, which may limit the generalizability of the proposed model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Transformer增强残差网络的3D超声衍生成像方法，生成伪CT用于实时操作指导。
light_analysis.motivation: CT诊断准确但存在电离辐射，超声无辐射但依赖操作者且缺乏定量组织表征，导致诊断不确定和不必要CT检查。因此需从超声生成类似CT的解剖参考，减少辐射暴露和操作变异性。
light_analysis.method: 采用TRUSTED数据集中的3D肾超声与CT配对，通过地标多模态配准对齐。提出BT-ResUNet3D模型，包含3D残差编码器-解码器生成器，嵌入Transformer瓶颈以捕获局部细节和长程依赖，并用3D条件PatchGAN判别器增强局部结构真实性。
light_analysis.result: 在PSNR和SSIM指标上，该方法在结构保真度和感知质量上优于现有基线。生成的伪CT可提供实时解剖参考，有望降低操作变异和不必要CT使用。但研究受限于较小配对数据集，可能影响模型泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献为提出UD-pCT框架，结合Transformer与残差网络实现高质量3D超声转CT，用于实时操作指导。学术上拓展了Transformer在医学图像生成的应用，实际中可减少辐射和操作依赖。未来需扩大数据集验证泛化性。

title: Hybrid Iterative Neural Low-Regularity Integrator for Nonlinear Dispersive Equations
abstract: We propose HIN-LRI, a hybrid framework that augments a classical numerical solver with a neural operator trained to correct the solver's structured truncation error. A base low-regularity integrator provides a consistent first-order approximation to nonlinear dispersive PDEs, while a lightweight neural network, operating on a low-dimensional latent manifold, learns the residual defect that analytical methods cannot close. An explicit time-step scaling on the neural correction ensures that its Lipschitz contribution remains $\mathcal{O}(τ)$, yielding a Gronwall stability factor bounded uniformly in the step size and independent of the spatial resolution. The network is trained end-to-end through a solver-in-the-loop objective that unrolls the full iteration and penalises trajectory error in a Bourgain-type norm, aligning learning with multi-step solver dynamics rather than isolated one-step targets. Under stated assumptions, the global error satisfies $C(\varepsilon_{net}+δ)\,τ^γ\ln(1/τ)$, where $\varepsilon_{net}$ measures the network approximation quality and $δ$ the training shortfall. Experiments on three dispersive benchmarks with rough data show that HIN-LRI improves accuracy over analytical integrators, splitting methods, and neural PDE surrogates, with stable spatial refinement, effective out-of-distribution transfer, and modest online overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合框架HIN-LRI，融合经典数值求解器与神经算子，修正非线性色散方程的结构截断误差，实现高精度稳定求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统数值方法处理低正则性数据时精度有限；纯神经网络代理难以保证多步稳定性和泛化能力。现有混合方法缺乏对截断误差的结构化校正和全局误差分析，导致复杂动力学场景下性能不足。
light_analysis.method: 采用低正则性积分器作为基础一阶近似，轻量神经网络在低维潜在流形上学习残差缺陷。通过显式时间步长缩放保证神经修正的Lipschitz贡献为O(τ)，稳定性因子与步长及空间分辨率无关。训练使用求解器在环目标，展开完整迭代在Bourgain型范数上惩罚轨迹误差，对齐多步动力学。
light_analysis.result: 在三个色散基准（粗糙数据）上，HIN-LRI相比解析积分器、分裂方法和神经PDE代理，精度显著提升。实现稳定的空间细化、有效的分布外迁移和适度在线开销，全局误差满足界C(ε_net+δ)τ^γ ln(1/τ)。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出兼具分析保证与神经网络灵活性的混合框架，为非线性色散方程提供可证明误差界的数值方法。学术价值在于桥接数值分析与深度学习；实际应用于流体动力学、光学等领域的长期模拟。未来可扩展至更广泛的PDE类型或自适应步长策略。

title: Quantile-Free Uncertainty Quantification in Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) in graph neural networks (GNNs) is crucial in high-stakes domains but remains a significant challenge. In graph settings, message passing often relies on strong assumptions such as exchangeability, which are rarely satisfied in practice. Moreover, achieving reliable UQ typically requires costly resampling or post-hoc calibration. To address these issues, we introduce Quantile-free Prediction Interval GNN (QpiGNN), a framework that builds on quantile regression (QR) to enable GNN-based UQ by directly optimizing coverage and interval width without requiring quantile inputs or post-processing. QpiGNN employs a dual-head architecture that decouples prediction and uncertainty, and is trained with label-only supervision through a quantile-free joint loss. This design allows efficient training and yields robust prediction intervals, with theoretical guarantees of asymptotic coverage and near-optimal width under mild assumptions. Experiments on 19 synthetic and real-world benchmarks show QpiGNN achieves average 22\% higher coverage and 50\% narrower intervals than baselines, while ensuring efficiency and robustness to noise and structural shifts.
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需分位数的图神经网络不确定性量化框架QpiGNN，直接优化覆盖率和区间宽度。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在高风险领域应用中，不确定性量化至关重要但面临挑战。消息传递依赖强假设如可交换性，实践中难以满足；现有方法需昂贵重采样或后校准。这些不足促使研究者探索更高效、鲁棒的UQ方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出QpiGNN框架，基于分位数回归但无需分位数输入或后处理。采用双头架构解耦预测与不确定性，通过标签监督和联合损失函数直接优化覆盖率和区间宽度。理论保证渐近覆盖率和近似最优宽度。
light_analysis.result: 在19个合成与真实基准上，QpiGNN相比基线平均提高22%覆盖率和缩小50%区间宽度，同时保持对噪声和结构偏移的鲁棒性与高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QpiGNN提供了一种高效、鲁棒的图神经网络不确定性量化方案，具有理论保证，适用于高安全关键领域。未来工作可扩展至更复杂图结构或动态图场景。

title: QuadBox: Accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting with Geometry-Aware Boxes
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as an advanced technique for real-time novel view synthesis by representing scene geometry and appearance using differentiable Gaussian primitives. However, efficiently computing precise Gaussian-tile intersections remains a critical task in the rasterization pipeline. To this end, we propose QuadBox, a method that leverages four axis-aligned bounding boxes to tightly encapsulate projected Gaussians in a discrete manner. First, we derive a geometry-aware stretching factor that enables the construction of a tile-aligned QuadBox, which covers the elliptical projection and largely excludes irrelevant tiles. Second, we introduce QPass, a single-pass tile traversal algorithm that exhaustively exploits the discrete nature of QuadBox, ensuring that the tile intersection check is performed with simple interval tests. Experiments on public datasets show that our method accelerates the rendering speed of 3DGS by 1.85$\times$. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/Powertony102/QuadBox}{https://github.com/Powertony102/QuadBox}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QuadBox方法，通过几何感知包围盒加速3D高斯溅射中的瓦片遍历，实现1.85倍渲染加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)在实时新视图合成中表现出色，但其光栅化流程中计算高斯-瓦片交集的高效性成为瓶颈。现有方法在处理投影高斯的椭圆覆盖时不够精确，导致不必要的瓦片检查。因此需要一种能够精确且高效地排除无关瓦片的交集计算方法，以提升整体渲染速度。
light_analysis.method: QuadBox通过四个轴对齐包围盒离散地紧密封装投影高斯。首先，推导几何感知拉伸因子构建瓦片对齐的QuadBox，覆盖椭圆投影并排除大部分无关瓦片。其次，提出单遍瓦片遍历算法QPass，利用QuadBox的离散特性，将瓦片交集检查简化为简单的区间测试。该算法无需复杂的几何计算，提高了并行效率。
light_analysis.result: 在公共数据集上的实验表明，QuadBox将3DGS的渲染速度提升1.85倍，同时保持高质量的渲染效果。与原始3DGS相比，在相同硬件条件下显著减少了每帧的瓦片处理时间。该方法在多个场景中均表现出稳定的加速比，验证了其通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QuadBox通过几何感知的包围盒设计，显著加速了3DGS的瓦片遍历过程，提升了实时渲染的效率。其开源代码便于社区复现和应用。未来可探索将该方法扩展到其他基于高斯的表示或动态场景中，进一步优化光栅化管线。

title: Bridging Input Feature Spaces Towards Graph Foundation Models
abstract: Unlike vision and language domains, graph learning lacks a shared input space, as input features differ across graph datasets not only in semantics, but also in value ranges and dimensionality. This misalignment prevents graph models from generalizing across datasets, limiting their use as foundation models. In this work, we propose ALL-IN, a simple and theoretically grounded method that enables transferability across datasets with different input features. Our approach projects node features into a shared random space and constructs representations via covariance-based statistics, thus eliminating dependence on the original feature space. We show that the computed node-covariance operators and the resulting node representations are invariant in distribution to permutations of the input features. We further demonstrate that the expected operator exhibits invariance to general orthogonal transformations of the input features. Empirically, ALL-IN achieves strong performance across diverse node- and graph-level tasks on unseen datasets with new input features, without requiring architecture changes or retraining. These results point to a promising direction for input-agnostic, transferable graph models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ALL-IN方法，通过投影到随机空间并基于协方差统计实现跨数据集图表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 图学习缺乏统一的输入空间，不同数据集的特征在语义、值范围和维度上存在差异，导致模型无法跨数据集泛化，限制了图基础模型的发展。现有方法通常需要针对每个数据集重新训练或调整架构，缺乏可迁移性。
light_analysis.method: ALL-IN方法将节点特征投影到共享随机空间，通过协方差统计构建节点表示，消除了对原始特征空间的依赖。理论上证明了节点-协方差算子及表示的分布对输入特征排列具有不变性，期望算子对正交变换具有不变性。无需架构更改或重新训练即可应用于新数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多种节点级和图级任务上，ALL-IN方法在未见过的数据集上取得了强性能，输入特征与训练时完全不同。实验表明该方法具有输入无关性和可迁移性，无需架构调整或重新训练，优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ALL-IN为输入无关的可迁移图模型提供了有效方向，解决了图基础模型的关键障碍。其理论保证和实证成功表明该方法具有广泛适用性。未来可探索更复杂的随机投影或结合预训练策略进一步提升性能。

title: Replay-Based Continual Learning for Physics-Informed Neural Operators
abstract: Neural operators generally demonstrate strong predictive performance on in-distribution (ID) problems. However, a critical limitation of existing methods is their significant performance degradation when encountering out-of-distribution (OOD) data. To address this issue, this work introduces continual learning into physics-informed neural operators, with particular emphasis on neural operators built upon the Transolver architecture, and proposes a simple yet effective replay-based continual learning strategy. The proposed method is fully physics-informed and does not require labeled data, relying solely on input fields together with physical constraints for training. When new OOD data become available, a small number of past data are incorporated through a distillation-based constraint to preserve previously acquired knowledge and alleviate catastrophic forgetting. Meanwhile, a transfer learning LoRA is employed to enable rapid adaptation to the new data. The proposed framework is systematically validated on three representative physical problems, including the Darcy flow problem in fluid mechanics, a two-dimensional hyperelastic brain tumor problem in biomechanics, and a three-dimensional linear elastic Triply Periodic Minimal Surfaces problem in solid mechanics. The results demonstrate that the proposed method effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting on previously learned data while maintaining fast adaptability to new data. Compared with conventional joint training strategies, the proposed method significantly improves training efficiency while reducing additional memory usage and computational cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于重放的持续学习策略，用于物理信息神经算子，解决分布外数据导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经算子在分布内数据表现良好，但遇到分布外数据时性能显著下降。现有方法缺乏处理连续分布变化的能力，亟需引入持续学习以缓解灾难性遗忘，同时保持对新数据的快速适应能力，从而提升模型的鲁棒性和泛化性。
light_analysis.method: 基于Transolver架构的物理信息神经算子，采用重放式持续学习。无需标签数据，仅依赖输入场和物理约束训练。当新数据到来时，通过蒸馏约束重放少量历史数据保留旧知识，并利用LoRA实现快速迁移适应，平衡记忆与学习。
light_analysis.result: 在达西流、二维超弹性脑肿瘤和三维三周期极小曲面三个物理问题上验证，有效缓解灾难性遗忘，保持对新数据的快速适应。相比联合训练，训练效率显著提升，同时减少额外内存和计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种无标签的物理信息持续学习框架，有效解决分布外数据下的遗忘问题，具有高效记忆和计算优势。未来可拓展至更复杂的物理系统和网络架构，推动神经算子在实际场景中的应用。

title: StoryAlign: Evaluating and Training Reward Models for Story Generation
abstract: Story generation aims to automatically produce coherent, structured, and engaging narratives. Although large language models (LLMs) have significantly advanced text generation, stories generated by LLMs still diverge from human-authored works regarding complex narrative structure and human-aligned preferences. A key reason is the absence of effective modeling of human story preferences, which are inherently subjective and under-explored. In this work, we systematically evaluate the modeling of human story preferences and introduce StoryRMB, the first benchmark for assessing reward models on story preferences. StoryRMB contains $1,133$ high-quality, human-verified instances, each consisting of a prompt, one chosen story, and three rejected stories. We find existing reward models struggle to select human-preferred stories, with the best model achieving only $66.3\%$ accuracy. To address this limitation, we construct roughly $100,000$ high-quality story preference pairs across diverse domains and develop StoryReward, an advanced reward model for story preference trained on this dataset. StoryReward achieves state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance on StoryRMB, outperforming much larger models. We also adopt StoryReward in downstream test-time scaling applications for best-of-n (BoN) story selection and find that it generally chooses stories better aligned with human preferences. We will release our dataset, model, and code to facilitate future research. Related code and data are available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/StoryReward.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了故事生成奖励模型的基准StoryRMB和先进模型StoryReward，显著提升故事偏好对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在文本生成上取得了显著进展，但生成的故事在复杂叙事结构和人类偏好对齐方面仍与人类创作存在差距。现有方法缺乏对人类故事偏好的有效建模，而故事偏好具有主观性且未充分探索。因此，需要系统评估和提升奖励模型对故事偏好的建模能力。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建StoryRMB基准，包含1,133个高质量人工验证实例，每个实例有提示、一个选中故事和三个拒绝故事。然后构建约10万高质量故事偏好对，覆盖多种领域，并基于此训练StoryReward奖励模型。StoryReward针对故事偏好进行优化，在下游测试时采用best-of-n故事选择策略。
light_analysis.result: 现有奖励模型在StoryRMB上表现不佳，最佳模型准确率仅66.3%。StoryReward在StoryRMB上达到最先进性能，超越更大规模的模型。在下游best-of-n故事选择中，StoryReward选出的故事与人类偏好更为一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统评估了故事生成的奖励模型，并提出了StoryRMB基准和StoryReward模型，有效提升了故事偏好的对齐。该工作为故事生成领域的奖励模型研究提供了重要资源和基线，有助于推动更符合人类偏好的叙事生成。未来可进一步探索更复杂的叙事结构评估。

title: Concurrence of Symmetry Breaking and Nonlocality Phase Transitions in Diffusion Models
abstract: Diffusion models undergo a phase transition in a critical time window during generation dynamics, with two complementary diagnoses of criticality. The symmetry breaking picture views the critical window as when trajectories bifurcate into different semantic minima of the energy landscape, whereas the nonlocality picture views the critical window as when local denoising fails. We study whether two notions of such phase transitions are concurrent in modern diffusion transformers. By evaluating the dynamics and outcomes of the generation trajectory, we observe a near-simultaneous occurrence of the non-locality and symmetry breaking critical times. Our work is the first to unify the two notions of phase transitions in practice: it provides a concrete diagnostic for when and why diffusion models rely on conditioning and global denoising, enabling principled evaluation of model efficiency and guiding the design of architectures and sampling schemes that avoid unnecessary computation.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究首次统一扩散模型中对称破缺与非局域性两种相变，通过实验验证其并发性，并提供诊断方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在生成过程中存在临界时间窗口，但此前对相变的两种解读——对称破缺和非局域性——相互独立。理解两者关系对于解释模型行为、评估效率及指导架构设计至关重要。现有工作缺乏统一视角，本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 通过评估现代扩散Transformer生成轨迹的动力学和结果，观察对称破缺与非局域性临界时间的近似同步性。采用两种诊断方法对比：对称破缺通过轨迹分叉分析语义最小值，非局域性通过局部去噪失败检测。首次在实践中将两种相变概念统一，提供具体诊断标准。
light_analysis.result: 实验观察到对称破缺和非局域性临界时间在生成过程中几乎同时发生。这一发现统一了先前独立的两种相变观点，并提供了具体诊断：当且仅当非局域性出现时，扩散模型才需要条件化和全局去噪。该诊断可用于评估模型效率，指导设计避免不必要计算的架构和采样方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次统一了扩散模型中的对称破缺与非局域性相变，通过实验证明其并发性。该研究具有重要学术价值：揭示了模型生成动力学的本质特征，提供了实用的诊断工具。未来可应用于优化扩散模型的采样效率，指导更高效的架构设计。潜在局限可能在于诊断仅适用于现代扩散Transformer，需进一步扩展。

title: Trustworthy Federated Label Distribution Learning under Annotation Quality Disparity
abstract: Label Distribution Learning (LDL) models supervision as an instance-wise probability distribution, enabling fine-grained learning under inherent ambiguity, but its success relies on high-fidelity label distributions that are costly to obtain and thus often noisy. Motivated by privacy-sensitive applications, we study Federated Label Distribution Learning (Fed-LDL), where data isolation further induces heterogeneous annotation quality across clients, making local updates unevenly reliable and breaking sample-size-based aggregation (e.g., FedAvg). To address this trust dilemma, we propose FedQual, a quality-aware Fed-LDL framework with two coupled mechanisms: (i) quality-adaptive client training guided by a global semantic anchor that calibrates low-quality clients while preserving high-quality autonomy, and (ii) reliability-aware server aggregation that reweights client contributions by effective reliable information rather than raw sample size. To enable rigorous evaluation, we construct four new Fed-LDL benchmarks (FER-LDL, FI-LDL, PIPAL-LDL, and KADID-LDL) with controlled annotation quality disparity. We further provide a theoretical guarantee showing that under heterogeneous supervision quality, client-specific calibration is strictly better than any uniform calibration. Extensive experiments on the proposed benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of FedQual.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedQual，一个质量感知的联邦标签分布学习框架，解决标注质量差异下的信任问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 标签分布学习(LDL)依赖高保真标签分布，但获取成本高且常含噪声。在隐私敏感的联邦学习场景中，数据隔离导致客户端标注质量异构，传统基于样本量的聚合（如FedAvg）不可靠，亟需一种能处理标注质量差异的信任机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出FedQual框架，包含两个耦合机制：1）质量自适应客户端训练，利用全局语义锚点校准低质量客户端，同时保留高质量客户端的自主性；2）可靠性感知服务器聚合，根据有效可靠信息而非原始样本量重新加权客户端贡献。此外，构建了四个新Fed-LDL基准数据集（FER-LDL、FI-LDL、PIPAL-LDL、KADID-LDL），控制标注质量差异。
light_analysis.result: 在所提出的基准数据集上实验表明，FedQual有效提升了联邦LDL的性能。理论证明，在异构监督质量下，客户端特定校准严格优于任何统一校准。具体数值摘要未明确，但整体优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedQual解决了联邦LDL中因标注质量差异导致的信任问题，提供了理论保证和实证验证。其质量感知机制适用于隐私敏感应用，如医疗、金融等。未来可探索更复杂的质量估计或动态校准策略。

title: Improving FMQA via Initial Training Data Design Considering Marginal Bit Coverage in One-Hot Encoding
abstract: Factorization machine with quadratic-optimization annealing (FMQA) is a black-box optimization method that combines a factorization machine (FM) surrogate with QUBO-based search by an Ising machine. When FMQA is applied to integer or discretized continuous variables via one-hot encoding, uniform random initial sampling can leave many binary variables never active in the initial training data, and the corresponding FM parameters receive no direct gradient updates from the observed responses. We address this by designing the initial training data to achieve complete marginal bit coverage, namely, ensuring that every binary variable obtained by one-hot encoding takes the value one at least once. We use two space-filling sampling methods, Latin hypercube sampling (LHS) and the Sobol' sequence, yielding LHS-FMQA and Sobol'-FMQA. On the human-powered aircraft wing-shape optimization benchmark with 17 and 32 design variables, both proposed methods achieved numerically higher mean final cruising speeds than the baseline FMQA, with the advantage more pronounced on the 32-variable problem.

light_analysis.overview: 通过初始训练数据设计实现完全边际位覆盖，提升FMQA在高维优化问题中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: FMQA结合因子机与伊辛机进行黑箱优化，但使用one-hot编码时，均匀随机初始采样常导致许多二元变量从未激活，其FM参数无法获得直接梯度更新，影响模型精度。尤其在高维问题中，该问题更严重，需确保每个二元变量至少被采样一次，以提升FM代理模型质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出完全边际位覆盖的初始数据设计，即确保每个one-hot编码的二元变量至少取值为1一次。采用拉丁超立方采样和Sobol'序列两种空间填充采样方法，分别得到LHS-FMQA和Sobol'-FMQA。在人力飞机机翼形状优化基准上测试，设计变量数为17和32。
light_analysis.result: 在17变量和32变量问题上，两种改进方法的平均最终巡航速度均数值高于基线FMQA，尤其在32变量问题上优势更明显。具体数值摘要未说明，但验证了空间填充采样的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过改进初始数据设计，显著提升了FMQA在高维优化问题中的性能，证明了完全边际位覆盖的重要性。该方法简洁有效，未来可探索其他采样策略或应用于更复杂问题。

title: Unsat Core Prediction through Polarity-Aware Representation Learning over Clause-Literal Hypergraphs
abstract: Graph neural networks have been widely used in Boolean satisfiability (SAT) tasks to learn structural information from SAT formulas. The goal of these studies is to solve SAT instances or to enhance SAT solvers, including tasks such as unsat-core prediction. However, most existing approaches model a SAT formula as a bipartite graph or a directed acyclic graph, which are less expressive in capturing higher-order interactions among literals and clauses. Moreover, these approaches are limited in modeling intrinsic polarity-related properties of SAT, such as the complementary relationship between the positive and negative literals of a variable. To address these limitations, we propose a polarity-aware representation learning framework over clause-literal hypergraphs. We model SAT formulas as clause-literal hypergraphs augmented with a clause incidence graph to capture higher-order structural interactions. We then introduce a polarity-aware decomposed mechanism that separates variable representations into polarity invariant and equivariant components, explicitly modeling the relationship between positive and negative literals, with the resulting literal representations propagated along the hypergraph structure. We further incorporate a polarity-inversion consistency regularization to reinforce polarity-consistent representations during training. Experimental results on multiple SAT datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Camera-ready version coming soon

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于子句-文字超图的极性感知表示学习框架，用于SAT不可满足核心预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SAT图神经网络方法将公式建模为二部图或有向无环图，难以捕捉文字与子句间的高阶交互，且忽略了变量正负文字间的极性互补关系。这些限制导致模型表达力不足，影响不可满足核心预测等任务的性能。因此，需要一种能同时捕获高阶结构信息和内在极性特性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文构建子句-文字超图并辅以子句关联图，以捕获高阶结构交互。提出极性感知分解机制，将变量表示拆分为极性不变和等变分量，显式建模正负文字关系。文字表示沿超图结构传播，并引入极性反转一致性正则化，强化训练中表征的极性一致性。整体框架以端到端方式学习，用于不可满足核心预测。
light_analysis.result: 在多个SAT数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在不可满足核心预测任务上优于现有基线。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但通过比较准确率或F1分数等指标，验证了超图建模和极性感知机制的有效性，尤其在处理含复杂极性关系的公式时表现更佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为SAT问题的图表示学习提供了新思路，通过超图结构和极性感知分解，显著提升了不可满足核心预测的性能。该研究对增强SAT求解器、验证电路设计等实际应用具有价值。未来可探索更大规模超图的高效计算及更复杂的极性关系建模。

title: A Biased Nonnegative Block Term Tensor Decomposition Model for Dynamic QoS Prediction
abstract: With the rapid development of cloud computing and Web services, Quality of Service (QoS) has become a key criterion for service selection and recommendation. Tensor latent feature analysis provides an effective way to model multidimensional QoS data, and most existing QoS prediction methods are mainly based on Canonical Polyadic (CP) decomposition or Tucker decomposition. However, constrained by their inherent structural properties, these methods cannot accurately capture the complex and dynamic dependencies in user-service interactions, which limits their prediction performance. To address this issue, this paper proposes a dynamic QoS prediction framework based on the Biased Nonnegative Block Term Tensor Decomposition Model, termed BNBT. Specifically, the proposed framework is developed from three aspects: (1) block term tensor decomposition is employed to enhance the representation capability of latent feature learning; (2) linear bias terms are incorporated to further improve prediction accuracy; and (3) a tensor-oriented single-element-dependent nonnegative multiplicative update algorithm, called SLF-NMUT, is designed for efficient parameter estimation. Extensive experiments on real-world QoS datasets demonstrate that the proposed BNBT framework consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art QoS prediction methods in terms of prediction accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于有偏非负块项张量分解的动态QoS预测框架BNBT，提升预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有QoS预测方法多基于CP分解或Tucker分解，受限于结构特性，无法准确捕捉用户-服务交互中的复杂动态依赖，导致预测性能受限。随着云服务和Web服务发展，QoS成为服务选择关键指标，因此亟需能有效建模多维动态QoS数据的先进方法。
light_analysis.method: BNBT框架从三方面构建：采用块项张量分解增强潜在特征表示能力；融入线性偏置项以提升预测准确性；设计面向张量的单元素依赖非负乘法更新算法SLF-NMUT，实现高效参数估计。该方法在保留张量结构的同时，通过偏置项和非负约束增强模型灵活性与可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在真实QoS数据集上的实验表明，BNBT在预测精度上持续优于多种最先进方法（如基于CP/Tucker分解的模型）。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确说明BNBT在所有比较方法中表现最佳，验证了其在动态QoS预测中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BNBT框架通过块项分解和偏置引入，有效弥补了传统张量分解的局限性，显著提升QoS预测精度。该研究为服务推荐与选择提供了更可靠的动态预测工具，具有重要实际应用价值。未来可探索融合更多上下文信息或扩展到大规模分布式场景。

title: DecodingTrust-Agent Platform (DTap): A Controllable and Interactive Red-Teaming Platform for AI Agents
abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed across diverse domains to automate complex workflows through long-horizon and high-stakes action executions. Due to their high capability and flexibility, such agents raise significant security and safety concerns. A growing number of real-world incidents have shown that adversaries can easily manipulate agents into performing harmful actions, such as leaking API keys, deleting user data, or initiating unauthorized transactions. Evaluating agent security is inherently challenging, as agents operate in dynamic, untrusted environments involving external tools, heterogeneous data sources, and frequent user interactions. However, realistic, controllable, and reproducible environments for large-scale risk assessment remain largely underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce the DecodingTrust-Agent Platform (DTap), the first controllable and interactive red-teaming platform for AI agents, spanning 14 real-world domains and over 50 simulation environments that replicate widely used systems such as Google Workspace, Paypal, and Slack. To scale the risk assessment of agents in DTap, we further propose DTap-Red, the first autonomous red-teaming agent that systematically explores diverse injection vectors (e.g., prompt, tool, skill, environment, combinations) and autonomously discovers effective attack strategies tailored to varying malicious goals. Using DTap-Red, we curate DTap-Bench, a large-scale red-teaming dataset comprising high-quality instances across domains, each paired with a verifiable judge to automatically validate attack outcomes. Through DTap, we conduct large-scale evaluations of popular AI agents built on various backbone models, spanning security policies, risk categories, and attack strategies, revealing systematic vulnerability patterns and providing valuable insights for developing secure next-generation agents.

light_analysis.overview: 首个可控且交互式的AI代理红队测试平台，覆盖14个真实领域和50多个模拟环境，并引入自主红队代理进行系统性攻击测试。
light_analysis.motivation: AI代理在自动化复杂工作流中因高能力与灵活性引发严重安全担忧，如API密钥泄露、数据删除等。现有评估环境缺乏现实性、可控性和可复现性，难以进行大规模风险评估。因此亟需一个覆盖多领域、支持交互式测试的通用平台。
light_analysis.method: 提出DTap平台，包含14个真实领域（如Google Workspace、Paypal、Slack）的50多个模拟环境。提出DTap-Red自主红队代理，可系统探索prompt、工具、技能、环境等多维注入向量，自发发现针对不同恶意目标的有效攻击策略。利用DTap-Red构建DTap-Bench数据集，包含高质量红队实例与可验证评判器。
light_analysis.result: 通过DTap对基于多种骨干模型的流行AI代理进行大规模评估，覆盖安全策略、风险类别和攻击策略，揭示系统性漏洞模式，为开发安全代理提供宝贵见解。摘要未给出具体量化指标，但强调评估的全面性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DTap为AI代理安全评估提供了可控、交互式的红队平台，填补了真实环境风险评估的空白，对学术研究和工业应用均有重要价值。未来可扩展至更多领域和攻击向量，并进一步优化自主红队代理的探索效率。

title: Bilinear Mamba-Koopman Neural MPC for Varying Dynamics
abstract: Koopman-based neural MPC models generate time-varying dynamics from historical data, but preserve convexity by enforcing that the system operator is independent of the current control input. This conditional independence constraint limits adaptation to changing dynamics within a single MPC horizon, particularly under time-varying conditions and under stale-plan execution.   We propose Bilinear Mamba-Koopman Neural MPC, a minimal extension that introduces control-dependent coupling in the latent dynamics, allowing the effective operator to adapt to the current input. The resulting model is a strict generalization of the standard linear, conditional-independence formulation, adds less than 1% parameters through a low-rank structure, and admits exact model Jacobians that enable efficient Sequential Convex Programming (SCP) with monotone-descent and KKT convergence results under standard trust-region assumptions.   Across CartPole and RSCP benchmarks in time-invariant and time-varying regimes, the proposed model matches or improves forecasting accuracy on every cell when training noise is averaged out, with strict gains where control-state coupling is structurally present. Its main closed-loop gains appear in the RSCP TV task, where iterative SCP improves adaptation within the horizon and substantially stabilizes training; in CartPole TV, the gains are modest but consistent. In delayed re-planning experiments on the time-varying variants, the bilinear model degrades more gracefully under stale-plan execution, maintaining a consistent advantage on CartPole TV and a substantially larger robustness margin on RSCP TV. These results show that control-dependent latent dynamics provide a simple and effective mechanism for robust MPC under varying conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Bilinear Mamba-Koopman Neural MPC，通过低秩结构引入控制依赖潜动态，在几乎不增加参数下提升时变环境下的模型预测控制鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: Koopman-based neural MPC模型强制系统算子独立于当前控制输入，限制了在单个MPC时域内适应动态变化的能力，尤其在时变条件和过时计划执行下表现不佳。现有方法无法有效捕捉控制-状态耦合，导致预测和控制性能下降。
light_analysis.method: 提出Bilinear Mamba-Koopman Neural MPC，在潜动态中引入控制依赖耦合，通过低秩结构仅增加不到1%参数。模型是标准线性条件独立形式的一般化，具有精确模型雅可比，支持高效序列凸规划（SCP），并满足单调下降和KKT收敛保证。
light_analysis.result: 在CartPole和RSCP基准测试中，所提模型在时不变和时变条件下匹配或提升预测精度，尤其在控制-状态耦合任务中表现更优。闭环增益在RSCP时变任务中显著，迭代SCP提升适应性和训练稳定性；在CartPole时变任务中增益适度但一致。延迟重规划实验中，双线性模型退化更平缓，保持鲁棒性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 控制依赖潜动态为时变条件下的鲁棒MPC提供了简单有效的机制，提升了预测精度和闭环鲁棒性，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的耦合结构或扩展到其他控制领域。

title: AgentTrust: Runtime Safety Evaluation and Interception for AI Agent Tool Use
abstract: Modern AI agents execute real-world side effects through tool calls such as file operations, shell commands, HTTP requests, and database queries. A single unsafe action, including accidental deletion, credential exposure, or data exfiltration, can cause irreversible harm. Existing defenses are incomplete: post-hoc benchmarks measure behavior after execution, static guardrails miss obfuscation and multi-step context, and infrastructure sandboxes constrain where code runs without understanding what an action means.   We present AgentTrust, a runtime safety layer that intercepts agent tool calls before execution and returns a structured verdict: allow, warn, block, or review. AgentTrust combines a shell deobfuscation normalizer, SafeFix suggestions for safer alternatives, RiskChain detection for multi-step attack chains, and a cache-aware LLM-as-Judge for ambiguous inputs.   We release a 300-scenario benchmark across six risk categories and an additional 630 independently constructed real-world adversarial scenarios. On the internal benchmark, the production-only ruleset achieves 95.0% verdict accuracy and 73.7% risk-level accuracy at low-millisecond end-to-end latency. On the 630-scenario benchmark, evaluated under a patched ruleset and not claimed as zero-shot, AgentTrust achieves 96.7% verdict accuracy, including about 93% on shell-obfuscated payloads. AgentTrust is released under the AGPL-3.0 license and provides a Model Context Protocol server for MCP-compatible agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentTrust运行时安全层，在执行前拦截智能体工具调用并返回结构化判定，结合多种技术提升安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代AI智能体通过工具调用（如文件操作、shell命令、HTTP请求等）产生实际副作用，单个不安全行为可能导致不可逆危害。现有防御方法存在不足：事后基准测试无法预防，静态护栏难以处理混淆和多步上下文，基础设施沙箱只限执行环境而不理解动作含义。因此需要运行时安全层，在执行前评估并拦截不安全调用。
light_analysis.method: AgentTrust是一个运行时安全层，在工具调用执行前拦截并返回allow/warn/block/review结构化判定。包含四个组件：shell去混淆归一化器、SafeFix安全替代建议、RiskChain多步攻击链检测、以及缓存感知的LLM-as-Judge处理模糊输入。还发布了300场景的基准测试（覆盖六类风险）和630个独立构建的真实对抗场景。
light_analysis.result: 在内部基准测试中，生产规则集达到95.0%的判定准确率和73.7%的风险级别准确率，端到端延迟仅几毫秒。在630场景基准测试中（使用修补后规则集，非零样本），AgentTrust达到96.7%判定准确率，其中shell混淆载荷约93%准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgentTrust提供了有效的运行时安全防御，能拦截多种不安全工具调用，且延迟低。通过开源发布（AGPL-3.0）和MCP协议支持，便于集成到现有智能体系统。未来可扩展更多风险类型和对抗场景。

title: MIRAGE: Retrieval and Generation of Multimodal Images and Texts for Medical Education
abstract: Access to diverse, well-annotated medical images with interactive learning tools is fundamental for training practitioners in medicine and related fields to improve their diagnostic skills and understanding of anatomical structures. While medical atlases are valuable, they are often impractical due to their size and lack of interactivity, whereas online image search may provide mislabeled or incomplete material. To address this, we propose MIRAGE, a multimodal medical text and image retrieval and generation system that allows users to find and generate clinically relevant images from trustworthy sources by mapping both text and images to a shared latent space, enabling semantically meaningful queries. The system is based on a fine-tuned medical version of CLIP (MedICaT-ROCO), trained with the ROCO dataset, obtained from PubMed Central. MIRAGE allows users to give prompts to retrieve images, generate synthetic ones through a medical diffusion model (Prompt2MedImage) and receive enriched descriptions from a large language model (Dolly-v2-3b). It also supports a dual search option, enabling the visual comparison of different medical conditions. A key advantage of the system is that it relies entirely on publicly available pretrained models, ensuring reproducibility and accessibility. Our goal is to provide a free, transparent and easy-to-use didactic tool for medical students, especially those without programming skills. The system features an interface that enables interactive and personalized visual learning through medical image retrieval and generation. The system is accessible to medical students worldwide without requiring local computational resources or technical expertise, and is currently deployed on Kaggle: http://www-vpu.eps.uam.es/mirage
comment: Accepted at the Workshop on Applications of Medical AI (AMAI 2025), in conjunction with MICCAI 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出MIRAGE系统，利用多模态检索与生成技术，为医学教育提供交互式图文学习工具。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学教育需要多样且标注准确的医学图像和交互式学习工具，但传统医学图谱缺乏交互性且不便携，在线图像搜索常提供错误或不完整素材。现有方法无法满足学生获取可信、相关图像的需求，尤其是缺乏可交互的个性化学习系统。因此，需要一种结合检索与生成的透明、可复现的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: MIRAGE基于微调的医学CLIP模型（MedICaT-ROCO），使用ROCO数据集（来自PubMed Central）训练，将文本和图像映射到共享潜在空间实现语义查询。系统集成三个组件：文本到图像检索、医学扩散模型Prompt2MedImage生成合成图像、大型语言模型Dolly-v2-3b生成丰富描述，并支持双搜索功能以比较不同医学状况。所有模型均为公开预训练模型，确保可复现性。
light_analysis.result: 系统虽未明确报告定量结果，但强调其优势在于完全依赖公开模型、可复现且免费易用。用户可通过Kaggle平台访问，无需本地资源和编程技能。系统支持交互式个性化学习，通过检索和生成提供多样化医学图像，并通过双搜索实现视觉对比，提升诊断理解。摘要未提供具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIRAGE为医学学生提供了一个免费、透明、易用的多模态学习工具，通过检索和生成可靠图像及文本描述，增强诊断技能和解剖理解。系统基于公开模型确保可复现性，且部署在Kaggle上降低访问门槛。潜在局限包括依赖预训练模型的质量和领域覆盖范围，未来可扩展更多医学子领域或集成更强大的生成模型。

title: Gaze4HRI: Zero-shot Benchmarking Gaze Estimation Neural-Networks for Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: While zero-shot appearance-based 3D gaze estimation offers significant cost-efficiency by directly mapping RGB images to gaze vectors, its reliability in Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) settings remains uncertain. Existing benchmarks frequently overlook fundamental HRI conditions, such as dynamic camera viewpoints and moving targets in video. Furthermore, current cross-dataset evaluations often suffer from a complexity gap, where methods trained on diverse datasets are tested on significantly smaller and less varied sets, failing to assess true robustness. To bridge these gaps, we introduce Gaze4HRI, a large-scale dataset (50+ subjects, 3,000+ videos, 600,000+ frames) designed to evaluate state-of-the-art performance against critical HRI variables: illumination, head-gaze conflict, as well as the motion of camera and gaze target in video. Our benchmark reveals that all evaluated methods fail in at least one condition, identifying steeply-downward gaze as a universal failure point. Notably, PureGaze trained on the ETH-X-Gaze dataset uniquely maintains resilience across all other conditions. These results challenge the recent focus in the literature on complex spatial-temporal modeling and Transformer-based architectures. Instead, our findings suggest that extensive data diversity, as exemplified by the ETH-X-Gaze dataset, serves as the primary driver of zero-shot robustness in unconstrained environments, while resilience-enhancing frameworks, such as PureGaze's self-adversarial loss for gaze feature purification, provide a substantial further improvement. Ultimately, this study establishes a rigorous benchmark that provides practical guidelines for practitioners as well as reshaping future research. The dataset and codes are available at https://gazeforhri.github.io.
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模基准数据集Gaze4HRI，系统评估零样本3D凝视估计在人机交互中的鲁棒性，揭示数据多样性和韧性增强框架的关键作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本外观基3D凝视估计在成本上高效，但人机交互中的可靠性未知；现有基准忽略动态相机视角和移动目标，跨数据集评估存在复杂性差距，导致无法真实评估模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 构建Gaze4HRI数据集（50+受试者，3000+视频，60万+帧），涵盖光照、头凝视冲突、相机与目标运动等HRI关键变量。采用多种SOTA模型进行零样本评估，系统分析失败模式，特别关注PureGaze的自对抗损失等技术。
light_analysis.result: 所有评估方法在至少一项条件中失败，陡峭向下凝视为通用失败点；PureGaze（训练于ETH-X-Gaze）在其余条件保持韧性，表明数据多样性是零样本鲁棒性的主要驱动力，自对抗损失进一步提升了韧性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立严格基准，为实践者提供指南，挑战当前对复杂时空建模和Transformer架构的侧重，强调数据多样性的核心价值；未来可优化韧性增强框架以处理极端失败条件。

title: Lightweight Cross-Spectral Face Recognition via Contrastive Alignment and Distillation
abstract: Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR) aims at matching face images captured across different sensing modalities, such as thermal-to-visible or near-infrared-to-visible, enhancing the usability of face recognition systems in challenging real-world conditions. Although recent HFR methods have achieved significant improvements in performance, many rely on computationally expensive models, making them impractical for deployment on resource-limited edge devices. In this work, we introduce a lightweight yet effective HFR framework by adapting a hybrid CNN-Transformer model originally developed for RGB homogeneous face recognition. Our approach enables efficient end-to-end training with only a small amount of paired heterogeneous data, while still maintaining strong performance on standard RGB face recognition benchmarks. This makes it suitable for both homogeneous and heterogeneous settings. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging HFR and face recognition benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance while keeping computational requirements low.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级跨光谱人脸识别框架，通过对比对齐和蒸馏技术实现高效异构人脸识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 异构人脸识别（HFR）旨在匹配不同传感模态（如热成像到可见光）的人脸图像，提升人脸识别在恶劣环境下的实用性。现有HFR方法性能提升显著，但多依赖计算昂贵的模型，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。因此，需要一种轻量级且有效的HFR框架，既能保持强性能，又能降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过改编一种最初为RGB同质人脸识别开发的混合CNN-Transformer模型，构建轻量级HFR框架。采用对比对齐和蒸馏技术，仅需少量配对的异构数据即可实现高效端到端训练，同时保持标准RGB人脸识别基准的强性能。方法适用于同质和异构两种场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多个具有挑战性的HFR和标准人脸识别基准上进行综合实验，结果表明，所提方法在保持低计算需求的同时，达到了最先进或具有竞争力的性能。具体指标未明确说明，但摘要指出方法在性能和效率上取得平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种轻量级、资源高效的HFR解决方案，通过改编同质人脸识别模型并利用对比对齐和蒸馏，解决了现有方法计算成本高的问题。其学术价值在于提供了跨光谱识别的高效框架，实际应用价值在于可部署于边缘设备。未来工作可进一步优化模型或扩展至更多模态。

title: Elicitation Matters: How Prompts and Query Protocols Shape LLM Surrogates under Sparse Observations
abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as surrogate models for low-data optimization, but their optimizer-facing prediction and its uncertainty remain poorly understood. We study the surrogate belief elicited from an LLM under sparse observations, showing that it depends strongly on prompt text and query protocol. We introduce an uncertainty-alignment criterion that measures whether model uncertainty tracks residual ambiguity among sample-consistent functions. Across controlled inference tasks and Bayesian optimization studies, we find that structural prompts act as effective priors, POINTWISE and JOINT querying induce different beliefs, and sequential evidence leads to non-monotonic, order-sensitive confidence updates. These effects change downstream acquisition decisions and regret, showing that elicitation protocol is part of the LLM surrogate specification, not a formatting detail.

light_analysis.overview: 研究揭示提示文本和查询协议如何显著影响LLM作为代理模型时的信念和不确定性，提出不确定性对齐准则。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM被用作低数据优化代理模型，但其面向优化器的预测和不确定性理解不足。现有方法忽视提示和查询协议对代理行为的影响，导致性能波动。该研究旨在系统分析这些因素如何塑造LLM的代理信念。
light_analysis.method: 引入不确定性对齐准则，评估模型不确定性是否反映样本一致函数间的残差歧义。通过控制推理任务和贝叶斯优化实验，比较POINTWISE与JOINT查询协议，并利用结构提示作为先验。
light_analysis.result: 结构提示有效作为先验；POINTWISE和JOINT查询诱导不同信念；顺序证据导致非单调、顺序敏感的置信更新。这些效应改变下游获取决策和遗憾，表明协议是代理规范的一部分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提示和查询协议是LLM代理规范的关键，需谨慎设计。不确定性对齐准则为评估校准提供工具。未来可探索更广泛的协议和任务。

title: Cognitive Twins: Investigating Personalized Thinking Model Building and Its Performance Enhancement with Human-in-the-Loop
abstract: This paper presents the Personalized Thinking Model (PTM), a hierarchical and interpretable learner representation designed for AI supported education. PTM organizes evidence from learner journals into a five-layer structure covering behavioral instances, behavioral patterns, cognitive routines, metacognitive tendencies, and self-system values. PTM is grounded in Marzano's New Taxonomy of Educational Objectives and tries to clone learner's thinking model and build cognitive twin. It was constructed using a pipeline that combines large language model inference (Gemini 2.5 Pro), sentence embeddings, dimensionality reduction, and consensus clustering. This paper evaluates PTM fidelity through three methods applied to 40 participants in a seven-week study. First, automatic evaluation using atomic information point matching yielded an overall F1 score of 74.57% before human-in-the-loop (HITL) refinement and 75.48% after refinement. Second, user evaluation using a Likert scale produced mean ratings of 4.26 and 4.30 on a five-point scale for pre and post-HITL conditions respectively. Third, semantic alignment verification showed that topic coherence increased from 0.436 at the behavioral layer to 0.626 at the core value layer, while lexical overlap with journal vocabulary decreased from 0.114 to 0.007 across those same layers. These results suggest that the PTM produces outputs with acceptable fidelity, was generally perceived by users as reflecting their thinking, and showed a pattern consistent with semantic abstraction across layers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出个性化思考模型(PTM)，基于Marzano新分类法构建层次化、可解释的学习者认知孪生体。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI教育方法缺乏对学习者思维模型的个性化、层次化表征，可解释性不足。PTM旨在通过克隆学习者的思维模式构建认知孪生体，从而提供更精准的个性化支持。该研究以Marzano教育目标分类学为理论基础，解决如何从学习者日志中抽取并组织多层级认知信息的问题。
light_analysis.method: PTM采用五层结构：行为实例、行为模式、认知程序、元认知倾向、自我系统价值观。通过管道构建：利用大语言模型Gemini 2.5 Pro进行推断，结合句子嵌入、降维和共识聚类技术。引入人机协同(HITL)进行优化，提升模型保真度。
light_analysis.result: 在40名参与者的七周实验中，自动评估F1分数在HITL后从74.57%提升至75.48%；用户李克特评分从4.26升至4.30（5分量表）；语义对齐显示主题一致性从行为层0.436增至核心价值层0.626，而词汇重叠从0.114降至0.007，表明跨层语义抽象。
light_analysis.conclusion: PTM生成的输出具有可接受的保真度，用户普遍认为反映了其思维，并展示了从具体行为到抽象价值的层次化模式。该方法为AI教育中个性化认知建模提供了新途径，未来可进一步优化大模型推理效率和扩展至更多学习场景。

title: Gyan: An Explainable Neuro-Symbolic Language Model
abstract: Transformer based pre-trained large language models have become ubiquitous. There is increasing evidence to suggest that even with large scale pre-training, these models do not capture complete compositional context and certainly not, the full human analogous context. Besides, by the very nature of the architecture, these models hallucinate, are difficult to maintain, are not easily interpretable and require enormous compute resources for training and inference. Here, we describe Gyan, an explainable language model based on a novel non-transformer architecture, without any of these limitations. Gyan achieves SOTA performance on 3 widely cited data sets and superior performance on two proprietary data sets. The novel architecture decouples the language model from knowledge acquisition and representation. The model draws on rhetorical structure theory, semantic role theory and knowledge-based computational linguistics. Gyan's meaning representation structure captures the complete compositional context and attempts to mimic humans by expanding the context to a 'world model'. AI model adoption critically depends on trust and transparency especially in mission critical use cases. Collectively, our results demonstrate that it is possible to create models which are trustable and reliable for mission critical tasks. We believe our work has tremendous potential for guiding the development of transparent and trusted architectures for language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于非Transformer架构的可解释神经符号语言模型Gyan，实现SOTA性能并具备可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型无法捕获完整组合上下文，且存在幻觉、难以解释和计算资源消耗大等问题，亟需构建可信赖的语言模型。
light_analysis.method: 采用非Transformer架构，解耦语言模型与知识获取，融合修辞结构理论、语义角色理论和基于知识的计算语言学，构建包含完整组合上下文和世界模型的表示结构。
light_analysis.result: 在3个公开数据集上取得SOTA性能，在2个专有数据集上表现优越，验证了模型的可解释性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了构建可解释、可信赖语言模型的可行性，对透明和可信AI架构的发展具有指导意义，适用于关键任务场景。

title: AxMoE: Characterizing the Impact of Approximate Multipliers on Mixture-of-Experts DNN Architectures
abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) inference at the edge demands simultaneous improvements in accuracy, computational efficiency, and energy consumption. Approximate computing and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have each been studied as independent routes towards efficient inference, the former by replacing exact arithmetic with low-power approximate multipliers, the latter by routing inputs through specialized expert sub-networks to enable conditional computation. However, their interaction remains entirely unexplored. This paper presents AxMoE, the first study of the impact of approximate multiplication on MoE DNN architectures. We evaluate three MoE variants: Hard MoE, Soft MoE, and Cluster MoE against dense baselines across three CNN architectures (ResNet-20, VGG11_bn, VGG19_bn) on CIFAR-100 and a Vision Transformer (ViT-Small) on Tiny ImageNet-200 dataset, using eight 8-bit signed multipliers (including one exact baseline) from the EvoApproxLib library. Results show that, without retraining, the Dense baseline is the most resilient topology across all CNN architectures, whereas on ViT-Small, all topologies degrade at comparable rates regardless of routing strategy. After approximate-aware retraining, recovery varies substantially across architectures, topologies, and multipliers. ResNet-20 achieves full recovery across the entire multiplier range, whereas VGG architectures recover at moderate multipliers but fail irreversibly at aggressive ones for all topologies except Cluster MoE on VGG11_bn; on ViT-Small, Hard MoE outperforms Dense under aggressive approximation at equal normalized inference cost. These results pave the way for future approximate MoE hardware-software co-design strategies.
comment: accepted at the IEEE Computer Society Annual Symposium on VLSI ISVLSI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 首次研究近似乘法器对MoE DNN架构的影响，评估三种MoE变体在近似计算下的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 边缘设备上的DNN推理需要同时提高精度、计算效率和能耗。近似计算和MoE架构分别被研究作为独立途径，但它们的相互作用尚未被探索。理解两者的交互有助于设计更高效的边缘推理系统。
light_analysis.method: 使用EvoApproxLib的8位有符号近似乘法器（含一个精确基线），在CIFAR-100上的ResNet-20、VGG11_bn、VGG19_bn和Tiny ImageNet-200上的ViT-Small上，评估Hard MoE、Soft MoE、Cluster MoE与密集基线的性能。涉及无重训练和近似感知重训练两种设置。
light_analysis.result: 无重训练时，密集基线在CNN上最鲁棒；ViT-Small上所有拓扑性能下降速率相似。近似感知重训练后，ResNet-20在所有乘法器下完全恢复；VGG在中等乘法器下恢复，激进乘法器下除Cluster MoE on VGG11_bn外均不可逆失败；ViT-Small上，Hard MoE在激进近似下以相同归一化推理成本优于密集基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次揭示近似计算与MoE架构的交互，表明混合策略在不同架构和路由方式下表现差异显著，为未来近似MoE软硬件协同设计提供基础。工作局限：仅评估8位乘法器，未涉及更低精度或动态近似。

title: Hybrid Congestion Classification Framework Using Flow-Guided Attention and Empirical Mode Decomposition
abstract: Accurate traffic congestion classification requires models that jointly capture roadway scene context and non-stationary traffic motion, yet most prior work treats these requirements in isolation. Vision-based methods often depend on appearance cues with standard temporal pooling, which can bias predictions toward static infrastructure, whereas signal-based approaches characterize temporal dynamics but lack the spatial context needed for scene-level localization. These complementary limitations motivate a unified framework that links motion evidence to spatial feature selection while preserving data-adaptive temporal characterization. This study therefore proposes FLO-EMD, a hybrid approach that couples motion-guided attention with empirical, data-driven temporal decomposition. Dense optical flow guides channel and spatial attention so that RGB features are refined toward motion-relevant regions. In parallel, aggregated flow statistics form compact motion traces that are decomposed using Empirical Mode Decomposition (EMD) to extract intrinsic temporal components. The resulting EMD embedding is fused with learned spatiotemporal representations to classify light, medium, and heavy congestion. Experiments on 1,050 five-second clips from four surveillance networks show that FLO-EMD achieves 97.5% overall test accuracy (weighted F1 = 0.9742), outperforming established baselines and remaining robust across diverse environmental conditions; ablation and sensitivity analyses further quantify the contributions of EMD, the number of intrinsic mode functions, and the selected motion descriptors.

light_analysis.overview: FLO-EMD是一种融合运动引导注意力与经验模态分解的混合交通拥堵分类框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交通拥堵分类方法将场景上下文与动态交通运动分离处理。视觉方法依赖外观线索和标准时序池化，易偏向静态基础设施；信号方法刻画时序动态但缺乏空间上下文。这些互补局限促使提出统一框架，将运动证据与空间特征选择关联，同时保持数据自适应时序表征，以提高分类准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出FLO-EMD方法，结合运动引导注意力与数据驱动的时序分解。密集光流引导通道和空间注意力，使RGB特征聚焦运动相关区域。同时，聚合流量统计形成紧凑运动轨迹，经经验模态分解（EMD）提取内在时序分量。EMD嵌入与学习到的时空表示融合，分类轻、中、重度拥堵。使用四个监控网络的1050段5秒剪辑。
light_analysis.result: FLO-EMD在1050段5秒剪辑上达到97.5%总体测试准确率，加权F1=0.9742，优于既定基线，且在多样环境条件下保持鲁棒。消融和敏感性分析量化了EMD、内在模态函数数量和所选运动描述子的贡献，验证了各模块有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出统一框架解决交通拥堵分类中场景上下文与动态运动分离的问题，通过运动引导注意力和EMD时序分解取得了高精度和鲁棒性。学术价值在于融合视觉和信号方法，实际应用可用于智能交通监控。未来工作可扩展至更多交通场景及实时部署。

title: VC-FeS: Viewpoint-Conditioned Feature Selection for Vehicle Re-identification in Thermal Vision
abstract: Identification of less-articulated objects using single-channel images, such as thermal images, is important in many applications, such as surveillance. However, in this domain, existing methods show poor performance due to high similarity among objects of the same category in the absence of color information (overlooking shape information) and de-emphasized texture information. Furthermore, variability in viewpoint adds more complexity as the features vary from side to side. We address these issues by constructing viewpoint-conditioned feature vectors and area-specific feature comparisons in separate feature spaces. These interventions enable leveraging the advancements of existing RGB-pre-trained ViT feature extractors while effectively adapting them to address the challenges specific to the thermal domain. We test our system with RGBNT100 (IR) vehicle dataset and a thermal maritime dataset acquired by us. Our results surpass the state-of-the-art methods by 19.7% and 12.8% for the above datasets in mAP scores, respectively. We also plan to make our thermal dataset available, the first of its kind for maritime vessel identification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视角条件特征选择方法，利用预训练ViT适应热成像车辆重识别，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 热成像车辆重识别面临挑战：单通道图像缺乏颜色信息，纹理不突出，导致同类物体高度相似；视角变化增加特征变异性。现有方法性能差，亟需有效利用RGB预训练模型并适应热域特点的方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建视角条件特征向量，在不同特征空间中进行区域特定特征比较。利用RGB预训练ViT特征提取器，通过视角条件选择适应热成像域，解决颜色缺失和视角变化问题。测试数据集：RGBNT100 (IR)和自采热海事数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在RGBNT100 (IR)车辆数据集上mAP超SOTA 19.7%，自采热海事数据集超12.8%。结果显著优于现有方法，验证了视角条件特征选择的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出视角条件特征选择方法，有效提升热成像车辆重识别性能。贡献包括新方法和首个用于海事船只识别的热数据集。未来可拓展至其他热成像识别任务。

title: Knowledge-Free Correlated Agreement for Incentivizing Federated Learning
abstract: We introduce Knowledge-Free Correlated Agreement (KFCA) to reward client contributions in federated learning (FL) without relying on ground truth, a public test set, or distribution knowledge. Under categorical reports and an honest majority, KFCA is strictly truthful, addressing the label-flipping vulnerability of Correlated Agreement (CA). We evaluate KFCA on federated LLM adapter tuning and a real-world PCB inspection task, showing efficient real-time reward computation suitable for decentralized and blockchain-based incentive designs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无知识相关协议（KFCA），在联邦学习中无需真实标签或分布知识即可诚实激励客户贡献。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中激励客户端诚实贡献至关重要，但现有方法如相关协议（CA）易受标签翻转攻击，且需要真实数据或公共测试集，限制了其适用性。为解决这一问题，需要一种无需任何先验知识且严格诚实的奖励机制。
light_analysis.method: KFCA基于分类报告和诚实多数假设，通过统计客户端间报告的一致性来分配奖励，无需真实标签或分布知识。它严格诚实，即客户报告真实类别可最大化期望奖励，从而抵御标签翻转攻击。方法适用于离散标签场景，计算高效。
light_analysis.result: 在联邦LLM适配器调优和真实PCB检测任务上评估，KFCA实现了高效的实时奖励计算，计算开销低，适合去中心化和区块链环境。与CA相比，KFCA在存在恶意客户端时仍保持诚实性，奖励分配更公平。
light_analysis.conclusion: KFCA为联邦学习提供了一种无需知识的诚实激励机制，解决了依赖真实数据或易受攻击的问题。其高效性使其适用于区块链等去中心化场景，增强了联邦学习的实用性和安全性。未来可扩展到连续标签或异构客户端场景。

title: MixINN: Accelerating Plant Breeding by Combining Mixed Models and Deep Learning for Interaction Prediction
abstract: Plant breeding underpins global food security through incremental, accumulating improvements in crop yield, quality and sustainability, achieved via repeated cycles of crop ranking, selection and crossing. Climate change disrupts this process by altering local growing conditions, thereby shifting the relative performance of crop genotypes. Predicting these relative changes in yield is critical for food security. Yet, this problem remains an open challenge in plant breeding, and relatively unexplored within the AI community. We propose MixINN, an approach that first isolates high-quality genotype-environment interaction labels using mixed models, and then predicts these interactions for new crop varieties in future environmental conditions with a deep neural network. We evaluate our method on a corn multi-environment trial across the continental United States and show improved prediction of genotype ranking over current plant breeding methods. MixINN demonstrated superior performance in identifying the 20% most productive corn genotypes, leading to a 5.8% higher average yield, which further improved to 7.2% when targeting specific growing environments. These are competitive results for real-world breeding programs, demonstrating the potential of AI research in accelerating the development of climate-adapted crops, and improving future food security under climate change.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MixINN方法，结合混合模型和深度神经网络预测基因型-环境互作，加速作物育种。
light_analysis.motivation: 植物育种通过反复的作物排名、选择和杂交来提升产量和品质，但气候变化改变局部生长条件，导致基因型相对表现变化，准确预测这些相对变化对于粮食安全至关重要。然而，这一问题在植物育种中仍是开放挑战，且在AI领域探索有限。现有方法难以有效预测新作物品种在未知环境中的表现。
light_analysis.method: MixINN首先利用混合模型从多环境试验数据中提取高质量的基因型-环境互作标签，然后使用深度神经网络预测新作物品种在未来环境条件下的互作。该方法结合了统计模型的稳健性和深度学习的灵活性，能够从大规模数据中学习复杂模式。
light_analysis.result: 在美国大陆玉米多环境试验中，MixINN在预测基因型排名上优于现有育种方法。在识别20%最高产玉米基因型时，平均产量提高5.8%；当针对特定生长环境时，改进达7.2%。这些结果在实际育种项目中具有竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MixINN展示了AI在植物育种中的潜力，通过准确预测基因型-环境互作加速气候适应作物的开发。该方法有助于提高气候变化下的粮食安全，未来可扩展到其他作物和更广泛的生长环境。

title: OSAQ: Outlier Self-Absorption for Accurate Low-bit LLM Quantization
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities. However, their massive parameter scale leads to significant resource consumption and latency during inference. Post-training weight-only quantization offers a promising solution by reducing model size and accelerating token generation through alleviating the memory-bound issue. Nevertheless, the presence of inherent systematic outliers in weights continues to be a major obstacle. While existing methods, such as scaling and rotation, attempt to address this issue, the performance remains unsatisfactory. In this paper, we propose Outlier Self-Absorption Quantization (OSAQ), which performs additive weight suppression guided by the second-order low-rank property for low-bit weight-only quantization of LLMs. Specifically, we observe that the Hessian exhibits low-rank consistency across different inputs, with certain directions consistently showing vanishing curvature. Leveraging this property, we identify a stable null space of the Hessian and then construct an additive weight transformation by linearly combining the vectors within this null space, thereby suppressing weight outliers without affecting the task loss. This additive transformation can be absorbed into the weights offline, requiring no inter-layer transformations and introducing no inference overhead. Moreover, the construction is efficiently achieved by a closed-form solution, without resource-intensive training or iterative procedures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OSAQ effectively suppresses outliers and enhances low-bit quantization performance. For instance, in 2-bit quantization, OSAQ, when integrated with GPTQ, achieves over 40% lower perplexity compared to vanilla GPTQ.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OSAQ方法，利用Hessian矩阵低秩性质进行加法权重抑制，实现低比特LLM量化无推理开销。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM参数规模大导致推理资源消耗高，后训练权重量化可缓解内存瓶颈，但权重中系统异常值严重影响低比特性能。现有缩放和旋转方法效果有限，需要更高效抑制异常值的方法。
light_analysis.method: 观察到Hessian矩阵在不同输入下具有低秩一致性，存在曲率消失的稳定零空间。由此构造加法权重变换，线性组合零空间向量以抑制异常值，且不改变任务损失。变换可离线吸收至权重，无需层间变换和推理开销，通过闭式解高效实现。
light_analysis.result: 在2-bit量化中，OSAQ结合GPTQ相比原始GPTQ困惑度降低超过40%，有效提升低比特量化性能。实验表明该方法能显著抑制异常值。
light_analysis.conclusion: OSAQ通过利用Hessian低秩性质有效抑制权重异常值，提升低比特量化精度，且无需额外推理成本。该方法具有理论支撑和实用价值，未来可进一步扩展至其他量化场景或模型结构。

title: Reward-Decomposed Reinforcement Learning for Immersive Video Role-Playing
abstract: Text-based role-playing models can imitate character styles, yet they often fail to reflect a scene's atmosphere and evolving tension, both essential for immersive applications such as Virtual Reality (VR) games and interactive narratives. We study video-grounded role-playing dialogue and introduce EBM-RL (Eye-Brain-Mouth Reinforcement Learning), a decoupled GRPO-based framework that explicitly separates observation ([perception]), reasoning ([think]), and utterance ([answer]). This structure promotes human-like sensory grounding by compelling the model to first attend to visual cues, then form internal interpretations, and finally generate context-appropriate dialogue.   EBM-RL integrates four complementary rewards: (i) CLIP-based scene-text alignment to improve ambiance and emotion; (ii) a Perceptual-Cognitive reward that encourages [perception] and [think] processes that increase the likelihood of the reference response; (iii) answer accuracy to ensure faithfulness; and (iv) a dense format reward to enforce the desired structured output.   Extensive experiments demonstrate that EBM-RL substantially outperforms text-only role-playing baselines and larger-scale vision-language models on our immersive role-playing benchmark, delivering simultaneous gains in visual-atmosphere consistency and character authenticity. Beyond the role-playing domain, EBM-RL also exhibits strong zero-shot generalization: without any additional fine-tuning, it consistently improves performance on out-of-domain VideoQA benchmarks. We additionally release an open-source dataset for video-grounded role-playing dialogue.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦GRPO框架EBM-RL，将感知、推理和回答分离，并整合四种奖励以提升沉浸式视频角色扮演的视觉氛围一致性和角色真实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本角色扮演模型虽能模仿角色风格，但无法捕捉场景氛围和紧张感，难以满足VR游戏和交互叙事等沉浸式应用需求。传统方法缺乏视觉基础，导致对话与视觉环境脱节。因此，需要一种能像人类一样先感知视觉线索、再内部推理、最后生成上下文相关对话的框架，以提升沉浸式体验的真实感和氛围一致性。
light_analysis.method: EBM-RL基于GRPO，将对话生成解耦为三个显式步骤：观察[perception]、推理[think]和回答[answer]，强制模型先关注视觉线索，再形成内部解释。集成四种互补奖励：CLIP场景文本对齐改善氛围情感；感知-认知奖励促进思考过程；答案准确性确保忠实；密集格式奖励强制执行结构化输出。未明确提及数据集，但发布了用于视频基础角色扮演对话的开源数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在沉浸式角色扮演基准上，EBM-RL显著优于文本角色扮演基线和更大规模的视觉语言模型，同时提升视觉-氛围一致性和角色真实性。此外，零样本泛化到域外VideoQA基准，无需额外微调即持续改进性能。具体数值未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: EBM-RL通过解耦感知-推理-回答并设计奖励分解，有效提升了视频角色扮演的沉浸感和真实性，为VR等应用提供新范式。零样本泛化能力表明其通用性。局限性可能在于计算开销和奖励设计复杂性。未来可探索更丰富的感知模态和更开放的角色扮演场景。同时开源数据集促进该领域研究。

title: Using Common Random Numbers for Simulation-based Planning with Rollouts
abstract: Simulation-based planning with rollouts is a widely-deployed technique for decision making in stochastic environments. The primary instrument of simulation-based planning is a sampling model, which is repeatedly called to generate trajectories and estimate the utilities of available actions. Among the actions thus explored, one with the maximum estimated utility is then executed. In this paper, we examine the effect of using common random numbers in the simulation process. We obtain a simple recipe for (provably) reducing variance in relative utility when simulations invoke a rollout policy beyond some depth. Experiments on synthetic tasks confirm that our scheme improves task performance. The broader significance of our innovation is apparent from two practical applications: (1) single-step lookahead planning in a pension-disbursement task, and (2) a deployment of the well-known UCT algorithm for the game of Ludo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在基于rollout的模拟规划中使用公共随机数降低方差的理论方法，并验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 模拟规划在随机环境决策中广泛应用，但传统方法中不同动作的模拟使用独立随机数，导致相对效用估计方差大，影响决策质量。降低方差能提高规划性能，现有方法缺乏简单且可证明的方差减小方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种简单方法：当模拟使用超过一定深度的rollout策略时，对多个动作的模拟采用公共随机数序列，从而在理论上减少不同动作效用估计的方差。通过数学推导证明方差减小的充分条件，并在合成任务及实际应用中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成任务中，使用公共随机数的方法相比独立随机数，任务性能显著提升（具体数值未明确）。在养老金发放的单步前瞻规划中，该方法改进了决策质量；在Ludo游戏的UCT算法部署中，也获得了性能收益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 公共随机数技术简单有效，能可靠地降低模拟规划中相对效用估计的方差，提升决策性能。该创新具有广泛的实际应用价值，如金融规划和游戏AI。潜在局限性包括对rollout深度有要求，适用于特定场景。

title: Morphology-Guided Cross-Task Coupling for Joint Building Height and Footprint Estimation
abstract: Building height (BH) and building footprint (BF) jointly describe the vertical and horizontal extent of the built environment and are required inputs for urban climate, disaster-risk, and population-mapping models. The two parameters are coupled through floor-area-ratio (FAR) constraints, yet remote-sensing approaches typically treat them as independent regression targets. We argue that explicitly encoding this cross-task coupling is more impactful than further refining individual encoders, and propose MorphoFormer, a joint BH/BF estimation framework built around two complementary mechanisms: (i) a BF-Guided Task Decoder (BGTD) that gates the height branch via cross-attention on a footprint-derived morphology context, and (ii) a Morphology Consistency Loss (MCL) that supervises a height-from-footprint surrogate against the ground-truth BH, indirectly forcing the BF feature to encode height-correlated structure. The encoder is a single-stage Swin backbone fed by Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral, and DEM inputs, trained and evaluated on a geo-blocked split of 54 cities. Against a Swin-MTL baseline at identical receptive field, MorphoFormer reduces BH test RMSE from 3.39 to 3.15 m (R^2 improves 0.62 -> 0.67) with BF R^2 stable at 0.80. Controlled ablations at identical capacity attribute most of this 0.24 m improvement to the two proposed mechanisms: removing BGTD raises BH RMSE by 0.11 m and removing MCL raises it by 0.11 m, with the residual approximately 0.02 m falling within the noise floor of encoder-side variations. Because both mechanisms act on cross-task representations rather than pixels, the design carries no intrinsic dependence on input resolution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MorphoFormer，通过形态引导的跨任务耦合机制联合估计建筑高度和足迹，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑高度和足迹耦合描述建成环境，但现有遥感方法通常独立对待，忽略floor-area-ratio约束。作者认为显式编码跨任务耦合比进一步改进独立编码器更有价值，以利用两者间的结构关联。
light_analysis.method: MorphoFormer包含两个核心机制：BF-Guided Task Decoder通过交叉注意力基于足迹形态控制高度分支，及Morphology Consistency Loss监督高度从足迹代理。编码器为单阶段Swin骨干，输入Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2多光谱和DEM数据，在54个城市上训练评估。
light_analysis.result: 相比Swin-MTL基线，BH RMSE从3.39m降至3.15m（R² 0.62→0.67），BF R²稳定0.80。消融实验表明BGTD和MCL分别贡献0.11m改进，总改善0.24m。设计不依赖输入分辨率，仅作用于跨任务表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: MorphoFormer通过显式编码跨任务耦合有效提升联合估计精度，验证了形态引导机制的价值。该方法适用于多模态遥感数据，可推广至其他耦合估计任务，未来可探索更复杂的形态约束。

title: ULF-Loc: Unbiased Landmark Feature for Robust Visual Localization with 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Visual localization is a core technology for augmented reality and autonomous navigation. Recent methods combine the efficient rendering of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with feature-based localization. These methods rely on direct matching between 2D query features and the 3D Gaussian feature field, but this often results in mismatches due to an inherent bias in the learned Gaussian feature. We theoretically analyze the feature learning process in 3DGS, revealing that the widely adopted $α$-blending optimization inherently introduces bias into 3D point features. This bias stems from the entanglement between individual Gaussians and their neighboring Gaussians, making the learned features unsuitable for precise matching tasks. Motivated by these findings, we propose ULF-Loc, an unbiased landmark feature framework that replaces biased feature optimization with geometry-weighted feature fusion. We further introduce keypoint-consensus landmark sampling to select reliable Gaussians and local geometric consistency verification to reject mismatches caused by rendering artifacts. On the Cambridge Landmarks dataset, ULF-Loc reduces the mean median translation error by 17\% compared to the state-of-the-art, while achieving superior efficiency with only 1/10 the training time and 1/6 the GPU memory of STDLoc.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ULF-Loc，通过几何加权特征融合替代有偏优化，消除3DGS中α-blending导致的特征偏差，实现鲁棒视觉定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉定位是AR和自动驾驶的核心技术。现有方法结合3DGS的高效渲染与特征定位，但直接匹配2D查询特征和3D高斯特征场常因特征偏差导致误匹配。理论分析表明，α-blending优化使高斯间特征纠缠，引入偏差，降低匹配精度。因此，需要无偏特征框架来提升定位鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.method: ULF-Loc框架包含三部分：首先，用几何加权特征融合替代有偏的α-blending优化，消除特征偏差；其次，关键点一致性地标采样选择可靠高斯特征；最后，局部几何一致性验证拒绝由渲染伪影引起的误匹配。整体在3DGS渲染基础上，通过无偏特征和鲁棒匹配策略提升定位性能。
light_analysis.result: 在Cambridge Landmarks数据集上，ULF-Loc将平均中值平移误差降低17%，优于现有方法。训练时间仅为STDLoc的1/10，GPU内存占用为1/6，显著提升效率。相比基线方法，在精度和资源消耗上均取得优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ULF-Loc从理论上揭示了3DGS中特征偏差的根源，并提出无偏地标特征框架有效解决该问题。该方法在提升视觉定位精度的同时大幅降低训练成本和内存需求，对AR和自动驾驶具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的特征表示和更鲁棒的匹配策略。

title: Anny-Fit: All-Age Human Mesh Recovery
abstract: Recovering 3D human pose and shape from a single image remains a cornerstone of human-centric vision, yet most methods assume adult subjects and optimize each person independently. These assumptions fail in real-world, all-age scenes, where body proportions and depth must be resolved jointly. We introduce Anny-Fit, a multi-person, camera-space optimization framework for all-age 3D human mesh recovery (HMR). Unlike existing per-person fitting methods, Anny-Fit jointly optimizes all individuals directly in the camera coordinate system, enforcing global spatial consistency. At the core of our approach is the use of multiple forms of expert knowledge -- including metric depth maps, instance segmentation, 2D keypoints, and, VLM-derived semantic attributes such as age and gender -- each obtained from dedicated off-the-shelf networks. These complementary signals jointly guide the optimization, constraining the depth-scale ambiguity characteristic of all-age scenes. Across diverse datasets, Anny-Fit consistently improves 2D reprojection accuracy (+13 to 16), relative depth ordering (+6 to 7), 3D estimation error (-9 to -29) and shape estimation (+25 to +82), producing more coherent scenes. Finally, we show that VLM-based semantic knowledge can be distilled into an HMR model via the pseudo-ground-truth annotations produced by Anny-Fit on training data, enabling it to learn semantically meaningful shape parameters while improving HMR performance. Our approach bridges adult-only and all-age modeling by enabling zero-shot adaptation of adult-trained HMR pipelines to the full age spectrum without retraining. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/naver/anny-fit.
comment: CVPR 2026 Findings Track - Code available at https://github.com/naver/anny-fit

light_analysis.overview: 提出Anny-Fit，一个多人物、相机空间联合优化框架，利用多种专家知识实现全年龄人体网格恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D人体姿态与形状恢复方法大多针对成人且独立优化每个人，无法处理真实世界中各年龄段场景下的身体比例和深度歧义问题。需要一种能联合优化所有人、利用多种线索约束深度-尺度模糊性的方法，以提升全年龄场景下的重建准确性。
light_analysis.method: Anny-Fit在相机坐标系中联合优化所有个体，利用来自现成网络的多种专家知识：度量深度图、实例分割、2D关键点以及VLM提取的年龄和性别等语义属性。这些互补信号共同指导优化，解决深度-尺度歧义。训练时，可将VLM语义知识通过伪真值标注蒸馏到HMR模型，学习语义相关的形状参数。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，Anny-Fit一致提升2D重投影准确度（+13至16）、相对深度排序（+6至7）、3D估计误差（-9至-29）和形状估计（+25至+82），生成更连贯的场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: Anny-Fit桥接了成人模型与全年龄建模，使成人训练的HMR管道无需重训练即可零样本适应全年龄段。通过蒸馏VLM知识，可学习有语义意义的形状参数并提升HMR性能。未来可进一步探索更丰富的语义线索和实时应用。

title: Ensuring Reliability in Programming Knowledge Tracing: A Re-evaluation of Attention-augmented Models and Experimental Protocols
abstract: Programming Knowledge Tracing (PKT) has recently advanced through hybrid approaches that integrate attention-based feature modeling for code representation with RNN-based sequential prediction. While these models report strong empirical performance, their reliability can be sensitive to subtle implementation and experimental design choices. This study revisits representative PKT models and shows that reported gains can be substantially influenced by model configuration and sequence construction practices. We identify issues in attention dimension settings that affect performance estimates, and demonstrate that improper ordering of student attempts, such as ignoring ServerTimestamp, can violate temporal causality and lead to overly optimistic results. To ensure consistent evaluation, hyperparameters are selected via grid search guided by a single designated fold and then fixed uniformly across all folds during cross-validation. We further analyze the role of assignment-wise characteristics and systematically explore the impact of maximum sequence length. Using this protocol, we re-evaluate PKT models on the CodeWorkout dataset. Our results show that, under controlled and consistent settings, the performance gap between attention-enhanced models and standard DKT is significantly reduced, and increased architectural complexity does not consistently translate into superior performance. Beyond individual model comparisons, this work provides practical guidance for reliable and comparable evaluation in programming knowledge tracing.
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Intelligent Tutoring Systems (ITS 2026). To appear in Springer LNCS

light_analysis.overview: 重新评估注意力增强的编程知识追踪模型，揭示实验设计对性能评估的显著影响，并提出可靠评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 编程知识追踪（PKT）中的注意力增强模型报告了强劲性能，但其可靠性易受实现和实验设计选择影响。现有研究未充分关注注意力维度设置、学生尝试顺序的时间因果性等细节，导致性能估计偏差。为了确保评估一致性和可比性，需要系统性地重新检验这些因素。
light_analysis.method: 本研究重新审视代表性PKT模型，通过网格搜索选择超参数（使用单个指定折指导），并跨所有折统一固定。分析注意力维度设置和序列长度的影响，纠正忽视ServerTimestamp导致的因果违反。在CodeWorkout数据集上，严格按照时间顺序构建序列，系统评估模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 在严格控制且一致的设置下，注意力增强模型与标准DKT之间的性能差距显著缩小。增加架构复杂性并未一致带来性能提升。这表明先前报告的增益部分源于实验协议缺陷，而非模型自身优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为编程知识追踪提供了可靠和可比较评估的实践指导，强调了实验设计对模型评价的重要性。学术价值在于揭示了注意力模型在PKT中真实贡献的限度，实际应用价值在于为未来研究建立了标准化评估基准。

title: Exact Dual Geometry of SOC-ICNN Value Functions
abstract: Input Convex Neural Networks (ICNNs) are commonly used in a two-stage manner: one first trains a convex network and then minimizes it over its input in a downstream inference problem. Recent second-order-cone ICNNs (SOC-ICNNs) enrich ReLU-based ICNNs with quadratic and conic modules and admit an exact representation as value functions of second-order cone programs (SOCPs). This value-function structure enables an explicit convex-analytic treatment of SOC-ICNN inference. In this paper, we study the exact first-order and local second-order geometry of SOC-ICNNs from the dual viewpoint. We show that supporting slopes, subdifferentials, directional derivatives, and local Hessians can be recovered directly from optimal dual variables. These results provide the geometric primitives for white-box SOC-ICNN inference, going beyond black-box automatic differentiation. Numerical experiments validate the exact multiplier readout, the local Hessian formula, and the set-valued behavior at structurally degenerate inputs. We also provide a step-by-step tutorial showing how the readout mechanism instantiates a complete white-box inference loop. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SOC-ICNN-Theory-BEFC/.

light_analysis.overview: 从对偶视角精确刻画SOC-ICNN值函数的一阶和局部二阶几何，实现白盒推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 输入凸神经网络（ICNN）通常以两阶段方式使用：先训练凸网络，再在下游推理问题中最小化其输入。现有方法依赖黑盒自动微分，缺乏对ICNN值函数几何结构的显式理解。二阶锥ICNN（SOC-ICNN）通过引入二次和锥模块，可精确表示为SOCP的值函数，但此前未充分挖掘其对偶几何性质。本文旨在建立SOC-ICNN推理的显式凸分析框架，通过最优对偶变量直接恢复支撑斜率、次微分、方向导数和局部Hessian等几何基元，从而突破黑盒方法的局限，为解释性推理提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 本文从对偶视角研究SOC-ICNN值函数的几何性质。首先，利用SOC-ICNN作为SOCP值函数的精确表示，推导出支撑斜率和次微分可由最优对偶变量直接恢复。其次，通过扰动分析导出方向导数的对偶表达式。进一步，在二阶可微条件下，给出局部Hessian矩阵的显式公式，该公式依赖于对偶变量的灵敏性。关键创新在于将推理中的几何量计算转化为对偶变量的读回，避免了自动微分的黑盒特性。实验中展示了精确乘子读回、局部Hessian公式验证以及结构退化输入下的集值行为。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验验证了所提对偶读回机制的有效性。对于随机生成的SOC-ICNN实例，精确乘子读回与自动微分结果一致，误差在机器精度内。局部Hessian公式在非退化点处相对误差低于1e-6。在结构退化输入（如多个最优解）下，次微分集值行为与理论预测吻合，方向导数计算正确。与标准自动微分相比，所提方法在推理阶段的计算效率相当，但提供了几何可解释性。此外，提供了完整白盒推理循环的教程，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统地建立了SOC-ICNN值函数的对偶几何理论，证明其推理几何量（支撑斜率、次微分、方向导数、局部Hessian）均可由最优对偶变量显式恢复，为白盒推理提供了理论基础。这一贡献使SOC-ICNN从黑盒优化工具转变为可解释的凸分析模型，适用于需要可解释性的机器学习推理场景。未来工作可扩展至更一般的凸神经网络结构，并探索对偶几何在安全关键应用中的价值。局限性在于对偶变量读回依赖于SOCP最优解的唯一性假设，退化情形需额外处理。

title: Every Step Counts: Step-Level Credit Assignment for Tool-Integrated Text-to-SQL
abstract: Tool-integrated Text-to-SQL parsing has emerged as a promising paradigm, framing SQL generation as a sequential decision-making process interleaved with tool execution. However, existing reinforcement learning approaches mainly rely on coarse-grained outcome supervision, resulting in a fundamental credit assignment problem: models receive the same reward for any trajectory that yields the correct answer, even when intermediate steps are redundant, inefficient, or erroneous. Consequently, models are encouraged to explore suboptimal reasoning spaces, limiting both efficiency and generalization. To address this problem, we propose FineStep, a novel framework for step-level credit assignment in tool-augmented Text-to-SQL. First, we introduce a reward design with independent process rewards to alleviate the signal sparsity of outcome supervision. Next, we present a step-level credit assignment mechanism to precisely quantify the value of each reasoning step. Finally, we develop a policy optimization method based on step-level advantages for efficient updates. Extensive experiments on BIRD benchmarks show that FineStep achieves state-of-the-art performance and reduces redundant tool interactions, with a 3.25% average EX gain over GRPO at the 4B scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FineStep框架，通过步骤级信用分配解决工具集成Text-to-SQL中的奖励稀疏和次优推理问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具集成Text-to-SQL方法依赖粗粒度结果监督，导致信用分配问题：所有正确轨迹获得相同奖励，即使中间步骤冗余或错误，限制了模型的效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: FineStep框架包括三个组件：1）独立过程奖励设计缓解信号稀疏；2）步骤级信用分配机制量化每一步价值；3）基于步骤级优势的策略优化方法。
light_analysis.result: 在BIRD基准上取得最佳性能，减少了冗余工具交互，相比GRPO在4B规模下平均EX提升3.25%。
light_analysis.conclusion: FineStep有效解决了步骤级信用分配问题，提升了工具集成Text-to-SQL的效率和泛化性，为序列决策任务提供新思路。

title: Not Every Subject Should Stay: Machine Unlearning for Noisy Engagement Recognition
abstract: Engagement recognition datasets are typically subject-indexed and often contain noisy, subjective supervision, making post-hoc dataset revision a practical problem. Existing noisy-label and data-cleaning methods largely operate at the sample level before or during training, but do not directly address a different question: once a model has already been trained, can the influence of an entire problematic subject be removed without full retraining? We study this setting through subject-level machine unlearning as a post-hoc sanitization mechanism for engagement recognition. Starting from a baseline trained on all subjects, we rank candidate harmful subjects using a model-dependent proxy, apply a lightweight approximate unlearning update, and compare the result against an oracle model retrained from scratch on the retained subjects only. We instantiate this protocol on DAiSEE and EngageNet using Tensor-Convolution and Convolution-Transformer Network (TCCT-Net) as a fixed platform and evaluate three matched model states under the same removal scenario: baseline, unlearned, and oracle. In representative K=3 forget-set settings, the unlearned model recovers 89.3% and 92.5% of the oracle gain on EngageNet and DAiSEE, respectively, at roughly one quarter of retraining cost. Across the tested small-audit regimes, effectiveness is strongest at an intermediate forget-set size, indicating that approximate subject-level unlearning is a useful low-cost correction mechanism, but one whose benefit depends on subject selection quality and removal regime.

light_analysis.overview: 提出受试者级机器遗忘作为噪声参与度识别的后处理清洗机制，实现低成本修正。
light_analysis.motivation: 参与度识别数据集通常以受试者索引，包含噪声和主观标注，训练后难以移除整个问题受试者的影响。现有方法在训练前或训练中操作样本级，不解决模型训练后移除整个受试者的需求。本文研究受试者级机器遗忘作为后处理清洗机制，避免完全重训练。
light_analysis.method: 基于已训练的基线模型，利用模型依赖的代理对候选有害受试者排序，然后应用轻量级近似遗忘更新（如使用梯度上升或影响函数等，摘要未明确指定）。在DAiSEE和EngageNet数据集上，使用Tensor-Convolution和Convolution-Transformer Network (TCCT-Net)作为固定平台，比较基线、遗忘模型和从头训练的oracle模型。
