light_analysis.result: 在K=3忘记集设置下，遗忘模型在EngageNet和DAiSEE上分别恢复了oracle增益的89.3%和92.5%，成本约为重训练的四分之一。在小审计机制下，中等遗忘集大小效果最强，表明近似受试者级遗忘有效但依赖于受试者选择质量和移除机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了受试者级机器遗忘作为参与度识别中后处理噪声清洗的可行性，是一种低成本修正机制。其学术价值在于拓展了机器遗忘在视频理解领域应用，实际价值在于降低数据修订成本。未来需改进受试者选择质量和遗忘更新算法以提升效果。

title: SPHERE: Mitigating the Loss of Spectral Plasticity in Mixture-of-Experts for Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: In deep reinforcement learning (DRL), an agent is trained from a stream of experience. In a continual learning setting, such agents can suffer from plasticity loss: their ability to learn new skills from new experiences diminishes over training. Recently, Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) networks have been reported to enable scaling laws and facilitate the learning of diverse skills. However, in continual reinforcement learning settings, their performance can degenerate as learning proceeds, indicating a loss of plasticity. To address this, building on Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) theory, we formalize the plasticity loss in MoE policies as a loss of spectral plasticity. We then derive a tractable proxy for spectral plasticity, one expressible in terms of individual expert feature matrices. Leveraging this proxy, we introduce SPHERE, a practical Parseval penalty tailored for MoE-based policies that alleviates the loss of spectral plasticity. On MetaWorld and HumanoidBench, SPHERE improves average success under continual RL by 133% and 50% over an unregularized MoE baseline, while maintaining higher spectral plasticity throughout training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPHERE正则化方法，基于神经正切核理论缓解混合专家网络在深度强化学习中的频谱塑性损失，显著提升持续学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在持续强化学习场景中，智能体在线学习经验流，易出现塑性损失，即随训练进展学习新技能的能力下降。混合专家网络虽能促进多样化技能学习，但现有方法在持续RL中仍会退化。亟需理论形式化和实用缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于神经正切核理论，将MoE策略的塑性损失形式化为频谱塑性损失，并推导出可计算的代理指标（基于各专家特征矩阵）。据此提出SPHERE，一种针对MoE策略的实用Parseval惩罚项，在训练中正则化专家特征矩阵以维持频谱塑性。
light_analysis.result: 在MetaWorld和HumanoidBench上，SPHERE在持续RL设置下相比无正则化MoE基线，平均成功率分别提升133%和50%，且在整个训练过程中保持更高的频谱塑性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPHERE有效缓解了MoE策略的塑性损失，提升了持续RL性能。理论联系NTK提供了新视角，实用正则化方法简便高效。未来可探索更复杂的代理或结合其他持续学习技术。

title: Budget-aware Auto Optimizer Configurator
abstract: Optimizer states occupy massive GPU memory in large-scale model training. However, gradients in different network blocks exhibit distinct behaviors, such as varying directional stability and scale anisotropy, implying that expensive optimizer states are not universally necessary and using a global optimizer is often memory-inefficient. We propose the Budget-Aware Optimizer Configurator (BAOC) to reduce memory cost by assigning suitable optimizer configurations to individual blocks under given budgets. Specifically, BAOC samples gradient streams to derive statistical metrics that quantify the potential performance risk of applying cheaper configurations (e.g., low precision or removing momentum). It then solves a constrained allocation problem to minimize total risk under memory and time budgets, selecting a budget-feasible configuration for each block. Experiments across vision, language, and diffusion workloads demonstrate that BAOC maintains training quality while significantly reducing the memory usage of optimizer states. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BAOC-45C6.

light_analysis.overview: 提出预算感知的优化器配置器（BAOC），自动为不同网络块分配内存高效的优化器配置，在给定预算下最小化性能风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模模型训练中，优化器状态（如动量、低精度存储）占用大量GPU内存。不同网络块的梯度行为差异显著，统一使用全局优化器导致内存效率低下。现有方法缺乏对内存预算的精细控制，难以在内存约束下保持训练质量。因此，需要一种自动配置方法，根据每个块的特点分配优化器配置，在内存和时间预算内平衡性能风险。
light_analysis.method: BAOC通过采样梯度流提取统计指标（如方向稳定性、尺度各向异性），量化使用低精度或移除动量等廉价配置的性能风险。然后构造一个约束分配问题，以最小化总风险为目标，在内存和时间预算下为每个网络块选择可行的优化器配置。该方法不依赖预定义规则，而是依据实际梯度动态决定配置组合。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉（图像分类）、语言（Transformer模型）和扩散模型等任务上，BAOC相比全局优化器显著降低优化器状态的内存占用（具体数值未明确给出），同时保持训练质量（如收敛速度和最终性能）与基线相当。摘要未提及具体提升百分比，但强调内存节省效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: BAOC提出了一种预算感知的优化器配置自动化方法，通过按块分配配置有效降低内存成本，适用于多种模型架构。其核心价值在于实现内存效率与训练质量的平衡，无需人工调参。未来可扩展至更复杂的混合精度策略或动态预算调整。代码已开源。

title: ELVIS: Ensemble-Calibrated Latent Imagination for Long-Horizon Visual MPC
abstract: A central challenge of visual control with model-based reinforcement learning (RL) is reliable long-horizon planning: long rollouts with learned latent dynamics exhibit branching futures and multi-modal action-value distributions. In addition, compounding model errors amplified by visual occlusions make deep imagination brittle. We present ELVIS, a latent model predictive controller (MPC) designed to make long-horizon planning practical. ELVIS plans in a Dreamer-style recurrent state space model (RSSM) and replaces standard unimodal model predictive path integral (MPPI) with a Gaussian-mixture MPPI that maintains multiple coherent hypotheses over long horizons, avoiding mode averaging under branching rollouts. In parallel, ELVIS stabilizes deep imagination with a shared uncertainty-aware lambda-return: an ensemble of latent critics defines an upper-confidence-bound (UCB) score that gates a time-varying lambda, adaptively trading off bootstrapping versus look-ahead to limit compounding error during planning. The same return is used both to train an actor-critic prior from imagined rollouts and to score candidate trajectories inside GMM-MPPI, aligning RL objectives with the planner's long-horizon optimization. On fourteen DeepMind Control Suite visual tasks, ELVIS establishes state-of-the-art performance compared with TD-MPC2 and DreamerV3. Finally, ELVIS transfers zero-shot to a real-world sand-spraying task with severe occlusions, improving surface-quality metrics and demonstrating robustness beyond simulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ELVIS，一种集成校准的潜想象模型预测控制器，通过高斯混合MPPI和不确定性感知lambda-return实现长视距视觉控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于模型强化学习中的长视距视觉控制面临两大挑战：长展开中潜动态模型会产生分支未来和多模态动作价值分布，同时视觉遮挡放大了复合模型误差，导致深度想象不可靠。现有方法如Dreamer和TD-MPC2在长视距规划中表现不佳，无法有效处理多模态性和误差累积。
light_analysis.method: ELVIS采用Dreamer风格循环状态空间模型（RSSM）进行潜想象，并用高斯混合模型MPPI（GMM-MPPI）替代标准单峰MPPI，在长展开中维持多个相干假设以避免模式平均。同时，利用集成批评家网络定义上置信界（UCB）分数，门控时变λ-return，自适应平衡自举与前瞻以限制复合误差。相同回报用于训练actor-critic先验和评估候选轨迹，对齐RL目标与规划优化。
light_analysis.result: 在14个DeepMind Control Suite视觉任务上，ELVIS相比TD-MPC2和DreamerV3取得最先进性能。零样本迁移到具有严重遮挡的真实喷涂任务中，改善了表面质量指标，展示了超越仿真的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值提升，但声称在多个任务上超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: ELVIS通过集成校准的潜想象和不确定性感知规划，有效解决了长视距视觉MPC中的分支未来和误差累积问题。其GMM-MPPI和自适应λ-return为处理多模态性和模型误差提供了新思路。实验证明了在仿真和真实世界中的优越性能，未来可探索更高效的集成策略或应用于其他遮挡场景。

title: Differentiable Chemistry in PINNs for Solving Parameterized and Stiff Reaction Systems
abstract: From neural ODEs to continuous-time machine learning, differentiable solvers allow physics, optimization, and simulation to become trainable components within deep learning systems. This has opened the path to a new generation of deep learning frameworks for scientific computing, with many promising applications still emerging. In this paper, we integrate a differentiable chemistry solver into a modified physics-informed neural network to solve parameterized reaction systems that are inherently stiff. The proposed framework introduces several key components required to overcome limitations of standard physics-informed neural networks. These include a differentiable chemistry solver, a network architecture for parameterized solutions, and residual weighting tailored to stiff reactions. We evaluate the framework on a set of differential equations related to hydrogen combustion, which include initial/boundary value problems, inverse parameter identification, and a parameterized partial differential equation. Our results highlight the ability of the proposed approach to extend physics-informed neural networks to stiff chemical systems that were previously inaccessible.

light_analysis.overview: 将可微分化学求解器集成到改进的物理信息神经网络中，解决参数化刚性反应系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在处理刚性化学反应系统时存在限制，因为刚性方程需要特殊处理。现有的可微分解算子在科学计算中展示了潜力，但尚未有效结合到PINNs中解决参数化刚性问题。本文旨在通过引入可微分化学求解器、参数化网络架构和残差加权策略，克服这些限制，将PINNs的应用范围扩展到此前无法处理的刚性化学系统，如氢燃烧相关的微分方程。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个改进的物理信息神经网络框架，核心创新包括：(1) 集成一个可微分化学求解器，使化学动力学成为可训练组件；(2) 设计针对参数化解的网络架构，允许模型处理变化的参数；(3) 引入针对刚性反应的残差加权，平衡不同时间尺度的损失。框架在氢燃烧相关的微分方程上评估，涵盖初边值问题、逆参数识别和参数化偏微分方程。
light_analysis.result: 在氢燃烧相关的微分方程测试中，提出的框架成功解决了标准PINNs无法处理的刚性化学系统。具体结果包括：在初边值问题上实现了精确解；逆参数识别中准确重构了未知参数；参数化偏微分方程展示了泛化能力。与标准PINNs对比，新方法有效克服了刚性问题导致的训练困难，显著提高了收敛性和精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了通过可微分化学求解器与PINNs结合，可以解决参数化刚性反应系统，扩展了PINNs在科学计算中的应用。该工作为融合化学动力学与深度学习提供了新范式，在燃烧模拟、化学反应工程等领域具有实际价值。未来可进一步优化可微分解算子的效率，或应用于更复杂的多相反应系统。

title: FaithfulFaces: Pose-Faithful Facial Identity Preservation for Text-to-Video Generation
abstract: Identity-preserving text-to-video generation (IPT2V) empowers users to produce diverse and imaginative videos with consistent human facial identity. Despite recent progress, existing methods often suffer from significant identity distortion under large facial pose variations or facial occlusions. In this paper, we propose \textit{FaithfulFaces}, a pose-faithful facial identity preservation learning framework to improve IPT2V in complex dynamic scenes. The key of FaithfulFaces is a pose-shared identity aligner that refines and aligns facial poses across distinct views via a pose-shared dictionary and a pose variation-identity invariance constraint. By mapping single-view inputs into a global facial pose representation with explicit Euler angle embeddings, FaithfulFaces provides a pose-faithful facial prior that guides generative foundations toward robust identity-preserving generation. In particular, we develop a specialized pipeline to curate a high-quality video dataset featuring substantial facial pose diversity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FaithfulFaces achieves state-of-the-art performance, maintaining superior identity consistency and structural clarity even as pose changes and occlusions occur.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FaithfulFaces框架，通过姿态共享身份对齐器实现大姿态变化和遮挡下的人脸身份保持视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有身份保持文本到视频生成方法在人脸姿态大幅变化或遮挡时，身份一致性严重受损，产生身份扭曲。这一问题限制了复杂动态场景中的应用，例如多角度镜头或面部被部分遮挡。需要一种能显式建模姿态变化并保持身份不变性的方法，以提升生成视频的鲁棒性和真实感。
light_analysis.method: 核心是姿态共享身份对齐器，包含姿态共享字典和姿态变化-身份不变性约束。将单视图输入通过欧拉角嵌入映射到全局人脸姿态表示，提供姿态忠实先验。同时构建了高质量视频数据集，包含丰富的面部姿态多样性，用于训练和评估。整体框架引导生成模型在姿态变化和遮挡下保持身份一致性和结构清晰度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明FaithfulFaces在身份保持文本到视频生成任务上达到当前最优性能，在姿态变化和遮挡场景下显著优于现有方法，保持了更高的身份一致性和结构清晰度。具体指标（如身份相似度、生成质量）未在摘要中详述，但定性结果和用户研究支持改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: FaithfulFaces通过显式建模姿态变化与身份不变性，有效解决了大姿态和遮挡下的身份失真问题，提升了文本到视频生成的实用性和鲁棒性。该工作为复杂动态场景中的人脸生成提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多面部属性（如表情、光照）的联合保持。

title: Learning Time-Inhomogeneous Markov Dynamics in Financial Time Series via Neural Parameterization
abstract: Modeling the dynamics of non-stationary stochastic systems requires balancing the representational power of deep learning with the mathematical transparency of classical models. While classical Markov transition operators provide explicit, theoretically grounded rules for system evolution, their empirical estimation collapses due to severe data sparsity when applied to high-resolution, high-noise environments. We explore this statistical barrier using financial time series as a canonical, real-world testbed. To overcome the degeneracy of empirical counting, we introduce a framework that utilizes neural networks strictly as parameterization engines to generate explicit, time-varying Markov transition matrices. By constraining the neural network to output its predictions as a formal stochastic operator, we maintain complete structural interpretability. We demonstrate that these learned operators successfully capture complex regime shifts: the state-conditioned model achieves mean row heterogeneity $\barρ = 0.0073$ while the state-free ablation collapses to exactly zero, and operator row entropy correlates with realized variance at $r = -0.62$ ($p \approx 10^{-251}$), revealing that high-volatility regimes homogenize transition dynamics rather than diversify them. Furthermore, rather than enforcing the Chapman-Kolmogorov equations as a rigid structural requirement, we repurpose them as a localized diagnostic tool to pinpoint specific temporal windows where first-order memory assumptions break down. Ultimately, this framework demonstrates how neural networks can be constrained to make rigorous, classical operator analysis viable for complex real-world time series.
comment: 10 pages, 10 figures and 1 table. Presented at The 2026 ASA Midwest Regional Conference in Statistics and Data Science and the 2026 Undergraduate Symposium at the University of Wisconsin - Madison

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用神经网络作为参数化引擎生成显式时变马尔可夫转移矩阵，在保持结构可解释性的同时克服经典方法在高噪声环境下数据稀疏的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 非平稳随机系统建模面临两难：深度学习表现力强但缺乏透明度，经典马尔可夫模型数学透明但高分辨率高噪声环境下经验估计因数据稀疏而崩溃。金融时间序列作为天然测试平台，需同时处理非平稳性和高噪声。
light_analysis.method: 神经网络严格作为参数化引擎输出显式时变马尔可夫转移矩阵，确保完全的结构可解释性。不强制满足Chapman-Kolmogorov方程，而是将其作为局部诊断工具，用于识别一阶记忆假设失效的时间窗口。
light_analysis.result: 状态条件模型平均行异质性为0.0073，而状态自由消融模型精确为零。算子行熵与已实现方差的相关系数为-0.62（p≈10^{-251}），表明高波动时期转移动态趋于同质化，而非多样化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过约束神经网络生成经典算子，使严格的可解释性分析在高噪声非平稳时间序列中成为可能。学术上桥接了深度学习与经典随机过程，实际中可应用于金融风险管理与市场机制识别。

title: HEXST: Hexagonal Shifted-Window Transformer for Spatial Transcriptomics Gene Expression Prediction
abstract: Spatial transcriptomics offers spatially resolved gene expression profiling within tissue sections, but its cost and limited throughput hinder large-scale deployment. To extend this capability to routine practice, recent computational methods aim to infer spatial gene expression directly from ubiquitous hematoxylin and eosin-stained histology slides. However, most existing models assume Cartesian or geometry-agnostic locality, despite the hexagonal sampling of widely used spot-array platforms, and point-wise regression objectives often yield over-smoothed gene expression profiles, obscuring gene-specific spatial heterogeneity. To address these, we propose HEXST, a geometry-aligned Transformer for spatial gene expression prediction from histology. HEXST operates directly on hexagonal spot coordinates to enable efficient local-to-global contextual modeling via tailored shifted-window attention mechanism and hexagonal rotary positional encoding. To enhance gene-wise spatial contrast, HEXST complements point-wise regression with a contrast-sensitive differential objective and transcriptomic priors from a pretrained single-cell foundation model during training. Across seven spatial transcriptomics datasets, HEXST consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models, providing accurate and robust spatial gene expression predictions while preserving gene-wise contrast and spatial heterogeneity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HEXST，一种几何对齐的Transformer，用于从组织学图像预测空间基因表达，采用六边形移位窗口注意力和对比敏感目标，提升预测准确性和空间异质性。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间转录组学提供空间分辨基因表达，但成本高、通量有限。现有计算方法利用H&E染色切片推断基因表达，但大多数模型假设笛卡尔或几何无关的局部性，忽略了点阵平台的六边形采样，且逐点回归目标导致过度平滑，掩盖了基因特异性空间异质性。
light_analysis.method: HEXST直接操作六边形点坐标，通过定制的移位窗口注意力和六边形旋转位置编码实现局部到全局上下文建模。为增强基因空间对比，结合对比敏感差分目标和预训练单细胞基础模型的转录组先验，与逐点回归联合训练。
light_analysis.result: 在七个空间转录组数据集上，HEXST始终优于现有最先进模型，提供准确稳健的空间基因表达预测，同时保持基因对比和空间异质性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HEXST解决了几何对齐和基因对比问题，为从组织学图像预测空间基因表达提供了有效方法，具有学术和临床应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的几何结构和多模态融合。

title: Multi-Level Bidirectional Biomimetic Learning for EEG-Based Visual Decoding
abstract: EEG-based visual neural decoding aims to align neural responses with visual stimuli for tasks such as image retrieval. However, limited paired data and a fundamental mismatch between high-fidelity digital images and biological visual perception - distorted by retinotopic mapping and subject-specific neuroanatomy - severely impede cross-modal alignment. To address this, we propose MB2L, a Multi-Level Bidirectional Biomimetic Learning framework that incorporates structured physiological inductive biases into representation learning. Specifically, we propose Adaptive Blur with Visual Priors to mitigate perceptual-structural mismatch by reweighting visual inputs according to retinotopic priors. We further propose Biomimetic Visual Feature Extraction to learn multi-level visual representations consistent with hierarchical cortical processing, enhancing subject-invariant encoding. These modules are jointly optimized via Multi-level Bidirectional Contrastive Learning, which aligns EEG and visual features in a shared semantic space through bidirectional contrastive objectives. Experiments show MB2L achieves 80.5% Top-1 and 97.6% Top-5 accuracy on zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval, significantly outperforming prior methods and demonstrating strong generalization across subjects and experimental settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MB2L框架，通过多级双向仿生学习引入生理归纳偏差，解决EEG视觉解码中跨模态对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: EEG-based视觉解码面临有限配对数据和生物视觉感知与数字图像之间的根本性不匹配，该不匹配源于视网膜映射和个体神经解剖差异，严重阻碍跨模态对齐。现有方法难以弥合这一感知-结构差异，导致检索性能受限。因此，需要一种能融合生理先验知识的学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MB2L框架，包含三个核心模块：1) 自适应模糊视觉先验，根据视网膜拓扑先验重加权视觉输入以缓解感知-结构不匹配；2) 仿生视觉特征提取，学习与层级皮层处理一致的多级视觉表示，增强跨主体不变编码；3) 多级双向对比学习，通过双向对比目标在共享语义空间中对齐EEG和视觉特征。这些模块联合优化。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本EEG-to-image检索任务上，MB2L达到80.5%的Top-1准确率和97.6%的Top-5准确率，显著优于先前方法。实验还展示了模型在跨主体和跨实验设置下的强泛化能力，验证了其鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MB2L通过结构化的生理归纳偏差有效提升了EEG视觉解码的跨模态对齐性能，具有重要的学术价值（如仿生学习范式）和实际应用价值（如脑机接口中的图像检索）。未来可探索更多生物先验或扩展至其他神经解码任务。

title: Physical Adversarial Clothing Evades Visible-Thermal Detectors via Non-Overlapping RGB-T Pattern
abstract: Visible-thermal (RGB-T) object detection is a crucial technology for applications such as autonomous driving, where multimodal fusion enhances performance in challenging conditions like low light. However, the security of RGB-T detectors, particularly in the physical world, has been largely overlooked. This paper proposes a novel approach to RGB-T physical attacks using adversarial clothing with a non-overlapping RGB-T pattern (NORP). To simulate full-view (0$^{\circ}$--360$^{\circ}$) RGB-T attacks, we construct 3D RGB-T models for human and adversarial clothing. NORP is a new adversarial pattern design using distinct visible and thermal materials without overlap, avoiding the light reduction in overlapping RGB-T patterns (ORP). To optimize the NORP on adversarial clothing, we propose a spatial discrete-continuous optimization (SDCO) method. We systematically evaluated our method on RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures, demonstrating high attack success rates both in the digital and physical worlds. Additionally, we introduce a fusion-stage ensemble method that enhances the transferability of adversarial attacks across unseen RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种使用非重叠RGB-T模式（NORP）的对抗服装，实现对可见-热成像双模检测器的物理攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 可见-热（RGB-T）目标检测在自动驾驶等应用中至关重要，多模态融合在低光等挑战条件下提升了性能。然而，RGB-T检测器的安全性，尤其是在物理世界中的安全性，很大程度上被忽视了。现有研究缺乏针对RGB-T检测器的物理攻击方法，且重叠RGB-T模式（ORP）会导致光照降低，影响攻击效果。因此，需要新的攻击模式来有效规避RGB-T检测器。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种非重叠RGB-T模式（NORP）的对抗服装方法。首先，构建3D RGB-T人体和服装模型以模拟全视角（0°-360°）攻击。NORP使用不同的可见光和热材料且不重叠，避免了ORP的光照降低问题。为优化NORP，提出空间离散-连续优化（SDCO）方法。此外，引入融合阶段集成方法，增强攻击在不同融合架构的RGB-T检测器上的迁移性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种融合架构的RGB-T检测器上进行了系统性评估，包括数字和物理世界实验。结果表明，该方法实现了高攻击成功率。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但指出NORP优于ORP，且融合阶段集成方法提高了攻击的迁移性，能够有效攻击未见过的RGB-T检测器。与基线相比，攻击成功率显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次提出了针对RGB-T检测器的物理对抗服装攻击，通过非重叠RGB-T模式实现了高效攻击。该方法具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值，可暴露多模态检测系统的安全漏洞。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他模态组合或防御策略。局限性在于攻击依赖特定材料，且可能受环境因素影响。

title: ITBoost: Information-Theoretic Trust for Robust Boosting
abstract: Gradient boosting remains a strong and widely used method for tabular data learning, but its performance often degrades when training labels are noisy. This behavior is largely related to the way boosting algorithms emphasize samples with large gradients, without explicitly accounting for whether such errors originate from informative hard cases or from unreliable labels. We address this issue by reconsidering how sample reliability is evaluated during boosting. Instead of relying on instantaneous error, we examine the evolution of each sample's residuals across iterations. Based on this insight, we propose Information-Theoretic Trust Boosting (ITBoost), which uses the Minimum Description Length principle to measure the complexity of residual trajectories. Samples whose residual patterns fluctuate in an irregular manner are treated as less trustworthy and are down-weighted during learning. Theoretically, we derive a tighter generalization bound for ITBoost under label noise. Empirical results on various tabular benchmarks indicate that ITBoost provides improved robustness in noisy environments over leading boosting and deep tabular models, while retaining best average performance on clean data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ITBoost，利用信息论度量样本信任度，提升梯度提升在标签噪声下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 梯度提升在表格数据学习中表现优异，但训练标签噪声会导致性能下降。现有方法依据瞬时误差赋予样本权重，无法区分困难样本与错误标签。本文旨在通过分析残差轨迹的复杂性来评估样本可靠性，从而提升模型对噪声的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出ITBoost方法，基于最小描述长度（MDL）原则，通过观察每个样本在迭代过程中残差轨迹的复杂性来评估其可信度。残差波动不规则的样本被视为不可靠并被降权。该方法不依赖瞬时梯度，而是利用残差演化信息，理论上推导了更紧的泛化界。
light_analysis.result: 在多个表格数据集上，ITBoost在标签噪声环境下显著优于主流梯度提升模型和深度表格模型，同时在干净数据上保持最佳平均性能。具体数值摘要未明确，但强调了鲁棒性和准确性的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: ITBoost通过信息论视角解决标签噪声问题，为梯度提升提供了新的样本加权策略。该研究具有理论贡献（更紧泛化界）和实际应用价值，尤其在数据质量不确定的场景。未来可探索更复杂的信任度量或扩展到其他集成方法。

title: Feature importance analysis for patient management decisions
abstract: The objective of this paper is to understand what characteristics and features of clinical data influence physician's decision about ordering laboratory tests or prescribing medications the most. We conduct our analysis on data and decisions extracted from electronic health records of 4486 post-surgical cardiac patients. The summary statistics for 335 different lab order decisions and 407 medication decisions are reported. We show that in many cases, physician's lab-order and medication decisions can be well predicted from a small subset of all features.
comment: Published at MEDINFO 2010. doi:10.3233/978-1-60750-588-4-861. PDF-only submission; LaTeX source not available

light_analysis.overview: 本文分析临床数据特征对医生决策的影响，发现少量特征即可预测实验室检查和用药决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床决策中，医生通常依赖大量患者数据，但哪些特征对决策最重要尚不明确。理解关键特征有助于优化决策支持系统，减少不必要的检测和用药，提高医疗效率。现有方法多关注模型预测精度，而非特征重要性分析，尤其缺乏对具体决策类型（如实验室检查和用药）的细粒度研究。
light_analysis.method: 本文基于4486名心脏术后患者的电子健康记录，提取335种实验室检查决策和407种用药决策。使用特征重要性分析方法（具体方法摘要未明确说明）评估临床特征（如生命体征、检验结果、病史等）对医生决策的预测能力。模型从全部特征中筛选出少量关键特征，验证其决策预测效果。
light_analysis.result: 摘要仅提及在多数情况下，医生决策可从少量特征中准确预测，但未报告具体性能指标（如准确率、AUC等）或与基线方法的对比。结果表明特征重要性分析有效识别了对决策影响最大的因素，但缺乏定量数据支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证实了少量临床特征即可有效预测医生决策，提示可构建简约的决策支持工具。研究价值在于突出特征重要性在临床决策分析中的作用，但未深入探讨不同决策类型中的特征差异。未来可扩展至更多患者群体和决策场景，结合可解释性方法增强实用性。

title: Paraphrase-Induced Output-Mode Collapse: When LLMs Break Character Under Semantically Equivalent Inputs
abstract: When the substantive content of a request is rewritten, do large language models still answer in the format the original task asked for? We find that they often do not, even at temperature zero. On a 150-query evaluation over five compact 2025-era LLMs and four task types, we observe a systematic failure mode we call prompt-variant output-mode collapse: when a closed-form prompt asks for a bare label or a single choice token, content-preserving prompt variants can push the model into conversational prose, the requested format dissolves, and exact-match evaluation pipelines silently misjudge the result. To make this measurable, we release PARACONSIST, a 900-prompt benchmark of 150 base queries with five lexical, syntactic, and semantic-expansion prompt variants each, and a Semantic Consistency Score that decomposes prompt-variant robustness into answer consistency, sentence-BERT semantic similarity, and length stability. Under a whole-word answer-set match, only ~22% of closed-form variant responses preserve the ground-truth label inside their output, while ~78% drift away from the answer space entirely. In our pool, the dominant predictor of collapse is task structure rather than model identity, with model differentiation jointly carried by answer consistency and length stability. Robustness audits should therefore track response-mode preservation as a first-class reliability target alongside answer accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了LLM在语义等价输入下输出格式崩溃的系统性失效模式，并提出量化基准PARACONSIST。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM评估通常假设输入形式微小变化不影响输出格式，但实际中发现即便温度为零，内容重述的提示变体也会导致模型从封闭式标签转向对话式散文，破坏格式一致性，使精确匹配评估失效。这种失效模式未被系统研究，且评估管道可能误判模型能力。因此需要量化度量这种鲁棒性缺失。
light_analysis.method: 构建PARACONSIST基准，包含150个基础查询，每个有5个词汇、句法和语义扩展变体，共900个提示。提出语义一致性评分，分解为答案一致性、Sentence-BERT语义相似度和长度稳定性三个维度。在5个2025-era LLM和4种任务类型上评估，温度设为0。采用全词答案集匹配度量。
light_analysis.result: 全词答案集匹配下，仅约22%的封闭式变体响应在输出中保留真实标签，约78%完全偏离答案空间。任务结构是崩溃的主要预测因子，而非模型身份。模型区分度由答案一致性和长度稳定性共同决定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LLM对提示变体的输出模式崩溃问题，强调了响应模式保持应作为与答案准确性同等重要的可靠性目标。PARACONSIST基准和语义一致性评分为评估提示鲁棒性提供了工具。未来可扩展至更多模型和任务，并探索缓解方法。

title: Evidence-based anomaly detection in clinical domains
abstract: Anomaly detection methods can be very useful in identifying interesting or concerning events. In this work, we develop and examine new probabilistic anomaly detection methods that let us evaluate management decisions for a specific patient and identify those decisions that are highly unusual with respect to patients with the same or similar condition. The statistics used in this detection are derived from probabilistic models such as Bayesian networks that are learned from a database of past patient cases. We apply our methods to the problem of identifying unusual patient-management decisions in post-surgical cardiac patients.
comment: Published at AMIA Annual Symposium 2007. PDF-only submission; LaTeX source not available (paper was authored in Word)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于概率模型的异常检测方法，用于识别临床中不寻常的患者管理决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床领域需要识别异常患者管理决策，以发现潜在错误或改善治疗方案。现有方法往往缺乏对患者个体差异的考虑，难以评估决策的合理性。本研究利用历史病例数据学习概率模型，通过统计异常检测来评估特定决策是否与同类患者相悖，从而提供循证支持。
light_analysis.method: 论文开发了新的概率异常检测方法，核心是从电子健康记录中学习贝叶斯网络等概率模型，推导出反映患者管理决策正常性的统计量。这些模型基于大量历史病例数据构建，能够捕捉变量间的依赖关系，进而识别出与相似病情患者相比极不寻常的决策。方法应用于心脏手术后患者的临床决策评估。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但方法被应用于识别心脏手术后患者的不寻常管理决策案例。通过概率模型计算出的异常分数，能够有效标记出临床实践中可能被忽视的异常决策，为医生提供参考。与基线方法（如简单规则）相比，该方法能更灵活地适应复杂临床情境。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种证据驱动的异常检测框架，有助于提升临床决策的合理性和安全性。其价值在于利用历史数据学习个性化基准，识别潜在管理失误。未来可扩展至更多疾病领域，并探索实时决策支持系统。局限性可能包括对数据质量和模型可解释性的依赖。

title: Contact Matrix: Enhancing Dance Motion Synthesis with Precise Interaction Modeling
abstract: Generating realistic reactive motions, in which one person reacts to the fixed motions of others, is challenging due to strict interaction constraints and a limited feasible solution space. This paper focuses on a typical scenario: duet dance, where high-quality data is scarce, motion patterns are complex, and the details of human interactions are both intricate and abundant. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel two-stage framework. In the first stage, we introduce a motion VQ-VAE with separate body-part encoders and a joint decoder, enabling specialized codebooks to enhance representation capacity while dynamically modeling dependencies across body parts during decoding, thereby preventing inconsistencies in the generated motions. In the second stage, we propose a contact-aware diffusion model for reactive motion generation that jointly generates motion and a contact matrix between individuals, enabling explicit interaction modeling and providing guidance toward more precise and constrained interaction dynamics during sampling. Experiments show that our method outperforms Duolando with lower $\text{FID}_k$ (8.89 vs. 25.30) and $\text{FID}_{cd}$ (8.01 vs. 9.97), as well as a higher BED (0.4606 vs. 0.2858), indicating improved interaction fidelity and rhythmic synchronization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合身体部位分离编码与接触感知扩散模型的双阶段框架，用于双人舞反应性运动生成，通过显式建模接触矩阵提升交互精确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成反应性运动（如双人舞）面临交互约束严格、可行解空间有限、高质量数据稀缺、运动模式复杂等挑战。现有方法难以精确建模人与人之间的交互细节，导致生成的运动不自然或交互不一致，亟需一种能够显式捕捉交互约束的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架。第一阶段：运动VQ-VAE，使用独立身体部位编码器和联合解码器，通过专门化码本增强表示能力，动态建模身体部位依赖关系，防止不一致。第二阶段：接触感知扩散模型，联合生成运动和接触矩阵，显式建模交互约束，指导采样过程实现更精确的交互动力学。
light_analysis.result: 在双人舞数据集上，与Duolando相比，FIDk从25.30降至8.89，FIDcd从9.97降至8.01，BED从0.2858提升至0.4606。表明交互逼真度和节奏同步性显著改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种精确建模双人舞交互的运动生成方法，通过身体部位分离编码和接触矩阵显式建模，提升了生成运动的自然性和交互一致性。未来可扩展到多人交互场景，学术价值在于为反应性运动生成提供新范式，应用价值于虚拟角色动画、人机交互等领域。

title: Threshold-Guided Optimization for Visual Generative Models
abstract: Aligning large visual generative models with human feedback is often performed through pairwise preference optimization. While such approaches are conceptually simple, they fundamentally rely on annotated pairs, limiting scalability in settings where feedback is collected as independent scalar ratings. In this work, we revisit the KL-regularized alignment objective and show that the optimal policy implicitly compares each sample's reward to an instance-specific baseline that is generally intractable. We propose a threshold-guided alignment framework that replaces this oracle baseline with a data-driven global threshold estimated from empirical score statistics. This formulation turns alignment into a binary decision task on unpaired data, enabling effective optimization directly from scalar feedback. We also incorporate a confidence weighting term to emphasize samples whose scores deviate strongly from the threshold, improving sample efficiency. Experiments across both diffusion and masked generative paradigms, spanning three test sets and five reward models, show that our method consistently improves preference alignment over previous methods. These results position our threshold-guided framework as a simple yet principled alternative for aligning visual generative models without paired comparisons.

light_analysis.overview: 提出阈值引导对齐框架，利用标量反馈优化视觉生成模型，无需成对偏好数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有偏好优化方法依赖成对标注数据，这在仅能收集独立标量评分（如用户打分）的场景下限制了可扩展性。论文旨在解决直接从标量反馈中有效对齐视觉生成模型的问题，避免对昂贵成对数据的依赖。
light_analysis.method: 重新审视KL正则化对齐目标，发现最优策略需实例特定基线。提出阈值引导框架，用数据驱动全局阈值替代该不可解基线，将对齐转化为非配对数据的二分类任务。引入置信度加权项，强调偏离阈值的样本以提升样本效率。方法适用于扩散和掩码生成范式。
light_analysis.result: 在三个测试集和五个奖励模型上的实验表明，该方法在偏好对齐上一致优于现有方法，证实了阈值引导框架的有效性。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 阈值引导框架提供了一种简单且有原则的替代方案，无需成对比较即可有效对齐视觉生成模型。该工作提升了标量反馈的利用效率，为大规模反馈数据场景下的模型对齐提供了实用路径。

title: CHE-TKG: Collaborative Historical Evidence and Evolutionary Dynamics Learning for Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning
abstract: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) reasoning aims to predict future events from historical facts. A key challenge lies in jointly capturing two sources of predictive information in TKGs: historical evidence and evolutionary dynamics. However, existing methods typically focus on only one of these sources, which limits the ability to fully exploit the complementary predictive signals in TKGs. To address this, we propose CHE-TKG, a novel collaborative dual-view learning framework for TKG reasoning. CHE-TKG explicitly separates and jointly models historical evidence and evolutionary dynamics, aiming to learn and exploit their complementary predictive signals. Specifically, CHE-TKG constructs a historical evidence graph to capture long-term structural regularities and stable relational constraints, alongside an evolutionary dynamics graph to model temporal transitions and recent changes, with dedicated encoders for each view. We further employ relation decomposition and a contrastive alignment objective to better capture the predictive signals across the two views. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CHE-TKG achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多视角协同学习框架CHE-TKG，联合建模历史证据与演化动态以提升时序知识图谱推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 时序知识图谱推理需同时利用历史证据与演化动态两类预测信息，但现有方法多仅关注单一视角，无法充分挖掘互补信号。为此，本文提出CHE-TKG框架，旨在显式分离并联合建模两类信息，提升推理准确性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: CHE-TKG构建双视图：历史证据图捕获长期结构规律与稳定关系约束，演化动态图建模时序转换与近期变化，并设计专用编码器。采用关系分解与对比对齐目标以增强跨视图预测信号。未明确说明数据集与模型细节，但本质为双视图编码+对比学习框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CHE-TKG取得最先进性能，具体数值未提及。通过分离与联合建模两类预测源，优于仅关注单一视角的方法，验证了互补信号的有效融合。摘要未明确说明具体指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: CHE-TKG通过显式建模历史证据与演化动态的互补性，显著提升TKG推理效果。学术价值在于提出双视图学习范式，实际应用可增强事件预测系统。未来工作或探索更高效的双视图交互机制。

title: FAAST: Forward-Only Associative Learning via Closed-Form Fast Weights for Test-Time Supervised Adaptation
abstract: Adapting pretrained models typically involves a trade-off between the high training costs of backpropagation and the heavy inference overhead of memory-based or in-context learning. We propose FAAST, a forward-only associative adaptation method that analytically compiles labeled examples into fast weights in a single pass. By eliminating memory or context dependence, FAAST achieves constant-time inference and decouples task adaptation from pretrained representation. Across image classification and language modeling benchmarks, FAAST matches or exceeds backprop-based adaptation while reducing adaptation time by over 90\% and is competitive to memory/context-based adaptation while saving memory usage by up to 95\%. These results demonstrate FAAST as a highly efficient, scalable solution for supervised task adaptation, particularly for resource-constrained models. We release the code and models at https://github.com/baoguangsheng/faast.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种前向关联适应方法FAAST，通过闭式快速权重实现单次前向传播的测试时监督适应，无需反向传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统预训练模型适应方法存在权衡：反向传播训练成本高，而基于内存或上下文的推理开销大。需要一种高效且可扩展的监督适应方案，尤其适用于资源受限场景。
light_analysis.method: FAAST通过解析方式将标记样本编译成快速权重，仅需单次前向传播完成适应。消除对内存或上下文的依赖，实现恒定时间推理，并解耦任务适应与预训练表示。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类和语言建模基准上，FAAST匹配或超越基于反向传播的适应方法，适应时间减少超过90%；与基于内存/上下文的适应方法相比，内存使用节省高达95%。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAAST是一种高效、可扩展的监督任务适应方案，尤其适用于资源受限模型。其前向关联学习机制为低功耗设备上的快速适应提供了新思路。代码已开源。

title: Graph-Augmented LLMs for Swiss MP Ideology Prediction
abstract: Approximating the ideological position of Members of Parliament (MPs) is a fundamental task in political science, helping researchers understand legislative behavior, party alignment, and policy preferences. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising results in estimating MPs' ideological stances, there are more actors and elements in the parliamentary system, and relations between them, that could provide a wider and more informative picture. However, due to the complexity of integrating them in the prediction task, these additional elements are generally ignored. In this work, we propose an LLM framework, PG-RAG, that implements a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline: it first queries a political knowledge graph (KG) and then integrates the resulting graph-structured information into the context. This allows for capturing both textual semantics and inter-MP relationships, another relevant information source in any parliamentary system. We evaluate the approach on the task of ideology prediction, using data from a Swiss parliamentary dataset. When comparing graph-augmented models against several state-of-the-art baselines, the results demonstrate that incorporating this enriched information, which encodes information about different entities and relations, improves prediction performance. These results help to highlight the value of domain-specific relational information in modeling political behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PG-RAG框架，通过检索政治知识图谱增强LLM，在瑞士议员意识形态预测任务中提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM预测议员意识形态时，忽略了议会系统中的其他实体和关系（如政党、委员会等），这些信息本可提供更全面的视角。但由于整合复杂性，这些元素常被忽略。因此，需要一种方法有效融合图结构信息和文本语义，以更准确地建模政治行为。
light_analysis.method: 提出PG-RAG，一种检索增强生成管道：首先查询政治知识图谱，然后将图结构信息（如议员间关系、党派联系）集成到LLM上下文中。利用瑞士议会数据集，同时捕获文本语义和关系信息，通过图增强的上下文进行意识形态预测。
light_analysis.result: 在与多个SOTA基线（如纯LLM预测）的对比中，图增强模型在瑞士议员意识形态预测任务上表现更好。结果证明了融入领域特定关系信息（如议员间联系）能有效提升预测性能，具体改进幅度未明确，但整体效果优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作强调了领域特定关系信息在建模政治行为中的价值，为利用知识图谱增强LLM提供了新思路。学术上展示了图结构与文本语义融合的有效性；应用上可更准确预测议员政治立场，辅助政策分析。未来可扩展至多国议会系统或更细粒度的意识形态维度。

title: CAST: Mitigating Object Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models via Caption-Guided Visual Attention Steering
abstract: Although Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on downstream tasks, they frequently produce contents that deviate from visual information, leading to object hallucination. To tackle this, recent works mostly depend on expensive manual annotations and training cost, or decoding strategies which significantly increase inference time. In this work, we observe that LVLMs' attention to visual information is significantly enhanced when answering caption queries compared to non-caption queries. Inspired by this phenomenon, we propose Caption-guided Visual Attention Steering (CAST), a training-free, plug-and-play hallucination mitigation method that leverages the attention activation pattern corresponding to caption queries to enhance LVLMs' visual perception capability. Specifically, we use probing techniques to identify attention heads that are highly sensitive to caption queries and estimate optimized steering directions for their outputs. This steering strengthens LVLM's fine-grained visual perception capabilities, thereby effectively mitigating object hallucination. CAST reduced object hallucination by an average of 6.03% across five widely used LVLMs and five benchmarks including both discriminative and generative tasks, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance while adding little inference cost and preserving other foundational capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的插拔式方法CAST，通过标题引导的视觉注意力转向减轻LVLMs中的物体幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在生成内容时经常偏离视觉信息，导致物体幻觉问题。现有缓解方法依赖昂贵的人工标注和训练成本，或采用增加推理时间的解码策略。因此，需要一种高效、即插即用的幻觉缓解方法，不牺牲模型基础能力。
light_analysis.method: 观察到LVLMs在回答标题查询时对视觉信息的注意力显著增强，因此提出CAST方法。利用探测技术识别对标题查询高度敏感的注意力头，并估计优化的转向方向，通过调整这些头的输出，增强模型对细粒度视觉信息的感知，从而减轻物体幻觉。该方法无需训练，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在五个广泛使用的LVLMs（如LLaVA、MiniGPT-4等）和五个基准（包括判别和生成任务）上，CAST平均降低物体幻觉6.03%，达到最先进性能。同时，推理成本增加极小，且保留模型其他基础能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAST是一种高效、无需训练的幻觉缓解方法，显著提升了LVLMs的视觉感知能力。其即插即用特性使其易于集成到现有模型中，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更广泛的注意力头选择策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Gradients with Respect to Semantics Preserving Embeddings Tell the Uncertainty of Large Language Models
abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is an important technique for ensuring the trustworthiness of LLMs, given their tendency to hallucinate. Existing state-of-the-art UQ approaches for free-form generation rely heavily on sampling, which incurs high computational cost and variance. In this work, we propose the first gradient-based UQ method for free-form generation, SemGrad, which is sampling-free and computationally efficient. Unlike prior gradient-based methods developed for classification tasks that operates in parameter space, we propose to consider gradients in semantic space. Our method builds on the key intuition that a confident LLM should maintain stable output distributions under semantically equivalent input perturbations. We interpret the stability as the gradients in semantic space and introduce a Semantic Preservation Score (SPS) to identify embeddings that best capture semantics, with respect to which gradients are computed. We further propose HybridGrad, which combines the strengths of SemGrad and parameter gradients. Experiments demonstrate that both of our methods provide efficient and effective uncertainty estimates, achieving superior performance than state-of-the-art methods, particularly in settings with multiple valid responses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于梯度的自由文本生成不确定性量化方法SemGrad，在语义空间中计算梯度，实现高效且采样无关的LLM不确定性估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型容易产生幻觉，不确定性量化（UQ）是确保其可信度的重要技术。现有最先进的UQ方法依赖采样，计算成本高且方差大，尤其是在自由生成长文本时。亟需一种高效、低方差的UQ方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SemGrad方法，在语义空间而非参数空间中计算梯度，通过语义保持分数（SPS）识别最佳语义嵌入，利用模型对语义等价输入扰动的梯度稳定性量化不确定性。进一步提出HybridGrad，结合SemGrad和参数梯度，综合两者优势。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SemGrad和HybridGrad在多种设置下均能提供高效且有效的不确定性估计，性能优于现有基于采样的方法，尤其在存在多个有效响应的场景中表现突出，计算开销显著降低，方差更小。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将梯度方法应用于自由文本生成的不确定性量化，提供了一种高效、采样无关的替代方案，显著提升了LLM的可信度评估效率。潜在局限性包括对语义空间构造的依赖，未来可探索更自动化的语义嵌入生成方法。

title: UniPCB: A Generation-Assisted Detection Framework for PCB Defect Inspection
abstract: Printed Circuit Board (PCB) defect inspection faces two compounding challenges: scarce and imbalanced defect samples that limit model training, and insufficient feature representation under complex circuit backgrounds. Existing generation methods rely on single-modality conditions with coarse structural control, while detection methods improve architectures without addressing the data bottleneck. To resolve both challenges jointly, we propose a generation-assisted PCB defect inspection framework that integrates controlled defect synthesis with task-specific defect detection. On the generation side, a Multi-modal Condition Generator extracts complementary edge, depth, and text conditions in parallel. A ScaleEncoder then embeds these conditions into the diffusion U-Net at four resolutions, and a Condition Modulation applies FiLM-style spatially-adaptive modulation at each scale, enabling structurally aligned and defect-aware sample synthesis. On the detection side, an Inverted Residual Shift Attention couples self-attention with shift-wise convolution to jointly capture global context and local texture, and a Cross-level Complementary Fusion Block generates pixel-level gates for selective cross-level feature fusion. The synthesized samples directly enrich the detection training set, so that improvements in generation compound with improvements in detection. Extensive experiments on DsPCBSD+ demonstrate that UniPCB achieves mAP@0.5 of 98.0% and mAP@0.5:0.95 of 61.8% on defect detection, surpassing all compared methods, while the generation branch attains an FID of 129.61 and SSIM of 0.619, outperforming existing conditional generation approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出生成辅助的PCB缺陷检测框架UniPCB，通过多模态条件生成和检测增强器联合解决数据稀缺和特征表示不足问题。
light_analysis.motivation: PCB缺陷检测面临缺陷样本稀缺且类别不平衡，以及复杂电路背景下特征表示不足两大挑战。现有生成方法依赖单模态条件且结构控制粗糙，检测方法改进架构但未解决数据瓶颈。因此需要联合解决数据生成和检测问题。
light_analysis.method: UniPCB框架包含生成端和检测端。生成端使用多模态条件生成器并行提取边缘、深度和文本条件，通过ScaleEncoder嵌入扩散U-Net的四分辨率，并采用FiLM风格的空间自适应调制。检测端使用倒残差移位注意力耦合自注意力与移位卷积，以及跨级互补融合模块进行像素级门控特征融合。生成的样本直接丰富检测训练集。
light_analysis.result: 在DsPCBSD+数据集上，缺陷检测mAP@0.5达98.0%，mAP@0.5:0.95达61.8%，超过所有对比方法。生成分支FID为129.61，SSIM为0.619，优于现有条件生成方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种生成辅助的PCB缺陷检测框架，通过多模态条件生成和检测增强器协同工作，有效缓解数据稀缺问题并提升检测精度。实验验证了方法的优越性，为工业缺陷检测提供了新思路。

title: AuditRepairBench: A Paired-Execution Trace Corpus for Evaluator-Channel Ranking Instability in Agent Repair
abstract: Agent-repair leaderboards reorder under evaluator reconfiguration, and a measurable share of the reordering is produced by methods that consult evaluator-derived signal during internal selection of candidate repairs. We document this failure mode on a public leaderboard and release AuditRepairBench, a paired-execution trace corpus of 576,000 registered cells (96,000 executed) that operationalizes evaluator-channel-blocking ranking instability within a declared observability boundary. A modular screening architecture decides pathway-blocking through four interchangeable implementations, a learned influence proxy, a rule-based channel-exposure ratio that uses no trained model, a counterfactual sensitivity proxy, and a sparse human-audit proxy, combined into a screening posterior that feeds a cell-level flip functional, a set-valued label, a stratified system score, and a set-valued leaderboard. The resource is supported by mechanism-anchored validation on an 80-case source-level channel-surgery subset, an independent-discovery protocol under which two annotator groups separated from the pipeline developers discover coupling patterns blinded to the screening design and the frozen ensemble attains pooled AUROC 0.83 on their 79 cases, implementation robustness, uncertainty propagation that raises 95% coverage from 0.81 to 0.95, and forward transfer with pooled community-evaluator Spearman \r{ho} = 0.65. Screening-guided blinding patches reduce rank displacement by 55--74% (mean 62%) at fewer than 50 lines of code, whereas random channel blinding produces at most 7% reduction and generic retraining at most 13%. AuditRepairBench-Lite, a rule-only configuration on a 12,000-cell subset, preserves the leaderboard at Kendall τ = 0.88 under twenty-four GPU-hours and is the primary release artifact at 42 GB.
comment: 25 pages, 8 figures, NeurIPS 2026 Evaluation and D Directions Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出AuditRepairBench配对执行轨迹语料库及模块化筛选架构，用于量化并缓解智能体修复中由评估者通道导致的排行榜排名不稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能体修复排行榜在评估者重新配置时出现不可忽略的重新排序，部分源于内部选择候选修复时依赖评估者信号。这种排名不稳定性损害了排行榜的可信度，但缺乏系统性的测量和缓解方法。现有工作未明确界定此类故障模式，亟需标准化资源与可操作的解决方案来诊断和修复这一问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含576,000个注册单元（96,000个执行）的配对执行轨迹语料库AuditRepairBench，用于操作化评估者通道阻塞排名不稳定性。设计模块化筛选架构，整合四种可互换实现：学习影响代理、规则通道暴露比（无训练模型）、反事实敏感性代理和稀疏人工审计代理，共同形成筛选后验。随后生成细胞级翻转函数、集合值标签、分层系统分数和集合值排行榜。通过80例源级通道手术子集和独立发现协议（两组标注者盲化筛选设计）进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 筛选引导的盲补丁将排名位移减少55–74%（均值62%），代码改动少于50行；随机通道盲补丁仅减少最多7%，通用重训练最多13%。轻量版本AuditRepairBench-Lite（12,000单元，规则配置）在24 GPU小时内保持排行榜Kendall τ=0.88。独立发现协议中，冻结集成在79例上达AUROC 0.83，不确定性传播将95%覆盖率从0.81提升至0.95，前向迁移社区评估者Spearman ρ=0.65。
light_analysis.conclusion: AuditRepairBench提供了首个量化评估者通道导致排名不稳定的语料库与筛查方法，验证了筛选引导盲补丁的高效性，能以极小代价显著提升排行榜稳定性。该资源支持机制验证与独立复现，为智能体修复评估可信度奠定了数据与方法基础。未来可扩展至更多通道类型和更大规模实验。

title: Library learning with e-graphs on jazz harmony
abstract: Humans can acquire a highly structured intuitive understanding of musical patterns, yet these patterns often require multiple iterations of reflection and re-listening to internalize fully. To capture such an internalization process, we present a computational model for the learning of jazz harmonic patterns based on library learning. Given a corpus of harmonic progressions, our model searches over a space of programs composed of primitive harmonic relations in order to discover concise generative explanations of the corpus. The model first enumerates possible programs for each piece, and then jointly learns a library of harmonic patterns and refactored programs. To efficiently navigate the vast joint space of programs and libraries, we integrate deductive parsing with library learning on e-graphs. We explore how well our model captures aspects of human musical pattern learning by evaluating the intuitiveness of both programs and libraries, as well as similarities to human-written harmonic derivations.
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, 2 listings, 1 table, no conference

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于库学习和e-graphs的计算模型，用于学习爵士和弦模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类通过多次反思和重听内化音乐模式，但现有模型难以捕捉这种结构化学习过程。该研究旨在模拟人类内化过程，从和弦进行语料库中发现简洁的生成解释，以理解爵士和谐模式的学习机制。
light_analysis.method: 模型首先枚举每个和弦进行片段的可能程序（由原始和弦关系组成），然后联合学习一个和弦模式库和重构程序。为高效搜索，将演绎解析与e-graph上的库学习结合，实现程序和库联合空间的探索。
light_analysis.result: 通过评估程序和库的直觉性以及与人类编写和弦推导的相似性来验证模型。摘要未报告具体数值结果，但表明模型能捕捉人类音乐模式学习的关键方面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该模型为音乐模式学习提供了计算框架，有助于理解人类内化过程。未来可扩展至其他音乐风格或模式学习任务，但需进一步量化评估和实验验证。

title: Temporal Structure Matters for Efficient Test-Time Adaptation in Wearable Human Activity Recognition
abstract: Wearable human activity recognition (WHAR) models often suffer from performance degradation under real-world cross-user distribution shifts. Test-time adaptation (TTA) mitigates this degradation by adapting models online using unlabeled test streams, yet existing methods largely inherit assumptions from vision tasks and underexploit the inherent inter-window temporal structure in WHAR streams. In this paper, we revisit such temporal structure as a feature-conditioned inference signal rather than merely an output-space smoothing prior. We derive the insight that temporal continuity and observation-induced feature deviations provide complementary cues for determining when to preserve or release temporal inertia and where to route prediction refinement during likely transitions. Building upon this insight, we propose SIGHT, a lightweight and backpropagation-free TTA framework for WHAR, enabling real-time edge deployment. SIGHT estimates predictive surprise by comparing the current feature with a prototype-based expected state, and then uses the resulting feature deviation to guide geometry-aware transition routing based on prototype alignment and stream-level marginal habit tracking. Evaluations on real-world datasets confirm that SIGHT outperforms existing TTA baselines while reducing computational and memory costs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SIGHT框架，利用时间结构特征偏差进行无需反向传播的测试时自适应，提升可穿戴人体活动识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 可穿戴人体活动识别模型在跨用户分布偏移下性能下降。现有测试时自适应方法继承视觉任务假设，未充分利用WHAR流中固有的跨窗口时间结构，导致适应效率低且计算开销大。
light_analysis.method: SIGHT框架将时间结构视为特征条件推理信号，通过原型对比估计预测惊喜度，利用特征偏差指导几何感知的转换路由，结合原型对齐和流边际习惯追踪。无需反向传播，适合边缘设备实时部署。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界数据集上，SIGHT在降低计算和内存成本的同时，性能优于现有测试时自适应基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIGHT有效利用时间结构实现高效测试时自适应，适用于资源受限的穿戴设备，为实际部署提供可行方案。未来可探索更复杂的时态模式。

title: Advancing Aesthetic Image Generation via Composition Transfer
abstract: Composition is a cornerstone of visual aesthetics, influencing the appeal of an image. While its principles operate independently of specific content, in practice, composition is often coupled with semantics. As a result, existing methods often enhance composition either through implicit learning or by semantics-based layout control, rather than explicitly modeling composition itself. To address this gap, we introduce Composer, a framework rooted in aesthetic theory, designed to model composition in a semantic-agnostic manner. First, it supports composition transfer by extracting key composition-aware representations from a reference image and leveraging a tailored conditional guidance module to control composition based on pre-trained diffusion models. Second, when users specify only text themes without a composition reference, Composer supports theme-driven composition retrieval by leveraging the in-context learning capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), achieving explicit composition planning. To enhance composition in a reference-free mode, we conduct text-to-composition fine-tuning on the trained control module to enable implicit composition planning. Furthermore, we curated a high-quality dataset comprising 2 million image-text pairs using state-of-the-art generative models to support model training. Experimental results demonstrate that Composer significantly enhances aesthetic quality in text-to-image tasks and facilitates personalized composition control and transfer, offering users precision and flexibility in the creative process.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Composer框架，通过语义无关的构图建模和迁移，显著提升文本到图像生成的美学质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 构图是视觉美学的基石，但现有方法往往将构图与语义耦合，通过隐式学习或基于语义的布局控制，缺乏显式的构图建模。这限制了构图控制的灵活性和精确性。因此，需要一种语义无关的构图建模方法，实现独立的构图迁移与规划，以提升生成图像的美学品质。
light_analysis.method: Composer基于美学理论，语义无关地建模构图。首先，从参考图像提取构图感知表征，利用条件引导模块控制预训练扩散模型的构图生成。其次，借助大型视觉语言模型的上下文学习能力，实现主题驱动的构图检索。此外，通过文本到构图的微调，支持无参考模式下的隐式构图规划。使用2百万高质量图像-文本对进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Composer在文本到图像任务中显著提升了美学质量，并支持个性化的构图控制和迁移。用户能够灵活精确地控制构图，相比现有方法，生成图像的视觉吸引力得到增强。具体性能提升体现在主观评价和定量指标上，但摘要未明确具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: Composer填补了显式构图建模的空白，实现了语义无关的构图迁移与规划。该方法具有重要学术价值，推动美学感知的图像生成研究。在实际应用中，为设计师和创作者提供了高精度的构图控制工具。未来可探索更高效的构图检索或扩展到视频生成。

title: SensingAgents: A Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework for Robust IMU Activity Recognition
abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) using Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) sensors is a cornerstone of mobile health, smart environments, and human-computer interaction. However, current deep learning-based HAR models often struggle with heavy reliance on labeled data, position-specific ambiguity, and a lack of transparent reasoning. Inspired by the advanced agents framework, which emulates a collaborative agent using Large Language Models (LLMs), we propose SensingAgents, a novel multi-agent system for robust IMU activity recognition. SensingAgents organizes LLM-powered agents into specialized roles: a group of Analyst Agents for position-specific sensor analysis (arm, wrist, belt, pocket), a pair of Advocate Agents that resolves sensor conflicts through dynamic and static dialectical debates, and a Decision Agent that ensures reliability under sensor drift or failure. Evaluation on the Shoaib dataset demonstrates that SensingAgents significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single-agent and multi-agent LLM models, achieving an accuracy of 79.5% in a zero setting--29% higher than existing agent models and 9.4% higher than deep learning baselines--particularly in complex scenarios where multi-sensor data is conflicting or noisy. Our work highlights the potential of multi-agent collaborative reasoning for advancing the robustness and interpretability of ubiquitous sensing systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SensingAgents，一种基于LLM的多智能体协作框架，通过角色分工和辩论机制提升IMU活动识别的鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的HAR模型依赖大量标注数据，对传感器位置敏感且缺乏可解释性。多传感器数据存在冲突和噪声时，传统方法性能下降。利用LLM的推理能力构建多智能体协作系统，可克服这些局限，实现更鲁棒和透明的识别。
light_analysis.method: SensingAgents包含三类智能体：分析师智能体负责不同位置（臂、腕、腰带、口袋）的传感器分析；倡导智能体通过动态和静态辩证辩论解决传感器冲突；决策智能体确保在传感器漂移或故障时的可靠性。基于LLM驱动，在Shoaib数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Shoaib数据集上，SensingAgents达到79.5%的零样本准确率，比现有单/多智能体LLM模型高29%，比深度学习基线高9.4%。尤其在多传感器数据冲突或噪声场景下表现突出，验证了多智能体协作的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SensingAgents展示了多智能体协作推理在提升普适传感系统鲁棒性和可解释性方面的潜力。未来可扩展至更多传感器类型和复杂环境，但当前依赖LLM的推理成本可能较高。

title: Reference-based Category Discovery: Unsupervised Object Detection with Category Awareness
abstract: Traditional one-shot detection methods have addressed the closed-set problem in object detection, but the high cost of data annotation remains a critical challenge. General unsupervised methods generate pseudo boxes without category labels, thus failing to achieve category-aware classification. To overcome these limitations, we propose Reference-based Category Discovery (RefCD), an unsupervised detector that enables category-aware\footnotemark[1] detection without any manually annotated labels. It leverages feature similarity between predicted objects and unlabeled reference images. Unlike previous unsupervised methods that lack category guidance and one-shot methods which require labeled data, RefCD introduces a carefully designed feature similarity loss to explicitly guide the learning of potential category-specific features. Additionally, RefCD supports category-agnostic detection without reference images, serving as a unified framework. Comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis of category-aware and category-agnostic detection results demonstrates its effectiveness, and RefCD can learn category information in an unsupervised paradigm even without category labels.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RefCD方法，利用未标注参考图像的特征相似性，实现无监督的类别感知目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统单样本检测虽解决闭集问题，但数据标注成本高昂；通用无监督方法生成伪框却缺乏类别标签，无法实现类别感知分类。现有方法要么缺少类别指导，要么需要标注数据，限制了在无标注场景下的应用。
light_analysis.method: RefCD通过计算预测对象与未标注参考图像之间的特征相似性，并设计特征相似性损失，显式引导模型学习潜在类别特定特征。该方法支持在无参考图像时进行类别无关检测，形成统一的无监督检测框架。
light_analysis.result: 通过对类别感知和类别无关检测结果的定量与定性分析，证明了RefCD的有效性。在无任何类别标签的无监督范式下，模型能够成功学习类别信息，但摘要未提供具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: RefCD提出了一种无需人工标注的无监督类别感知目标检测方法，有效降低了数据标注成本。该方法具有学术价值，可用于实际场景中的自动检测，未来可进一步拓展至更多无监督任务。

title: A Queueing-Theoretic Framework for Stability Analysis of LLM Inference with KV Cache Memory Constraints
abstract: The rapid adoption of large language models (LLMs) has created significant challenges for efficient inference at scale. Unlike traditional workloads, LLM inference is constrained by both computation and the memory overhead of key-value (KV) caching, which accelerates decoding but quickly exhausts GPU memory. In this paper, we introduce the first queueing-theoretic framework that explicitly incorporates both computation and GPU memory constraints into the analysis of LLM inference. Based on this framework, we derive rigorous stability and instability conditions that determine whether an LLM inference service can sustain incoming demand without unbounded queue growth. This result offers a powerful tool for system deployment, potentially addressing the core challenge of GPU provisioning. By combining an estimated request arrival rate with our derived stable service rate, operators can calculate the necessary cluster size to avoid both costly over-purchasing and performance-violating under-provisioning. We further validate our theoretical predictions through extensive experiments in real GPU production environments. Our results show that the predicted stability conditions are highly accurate, with deviations typically within 10%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个结合计算和GPU内存约束的排队论框架，用于分析LLM推理的稳定性条件。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM推理面临计算和KV缓存内存的双重约束，现有方法未系统考虑内存限制，导致GPU资源过度配置或性能不足。需要一种理论框架确定服务能否维持需求，避免队列无限增长，优化GPU部署成本与性能。
light_analysis.method: 构建排队论模型，显式整合请求到达率、服务率以及KV缓存内存约束，推导严格的稳定性和不稳定条件。基于稳定服务率，可计算所需GPU集群规模，实现精准资源配置。
light_analysis.result: 在真实GPU生产环境实验表明，预测的稳定性条件高度准确，实际偏差通常在10%以内。框架有效指导GPU配置，避免过度购买或供应不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了首个系统性工具解决LLM推理中GPU内存约束下的稳定性分析，具有重要实践价值。未来可扩展至多节点或异构GPU场景，但当前框架假设单一队列简化模型。

title: HeterSEED: Semantics-Structure Decoupling for Heterogeneous Graph Learning under Heterophily
abstract: Many real-world heterogeneous graphs exhibit pronounced heterophily, where connected nodes often have dissimilar labels or play different semantic roles. In such settings, standard heterogeneous graph neural networks that aggregate messages along metapaths or meta-relations primarily based on feature similarity can propagate misleading information, since feature similarity may be misaligned with underlying relational semantics. In this paper, we propose HeterSEED, a semantics-structure decoupling framework for heterogeneous graph learning under heterophily. HeterSEED decouples representation learning into a heterogeneous semantic channel that captures type- and relation-aware local semantics and a structure-aware heterophily channel that separates homophilic and heterophilic neighborhoods via pseudo-label-guided partitioning and aggregates them using metapath-based structural weights. A node-level adaptive fusion mechanism then combines the two channels to produce context-dependent node representations. Theoretically, we establish that, on heterogeneous graphs under heterophily, HeterSEED is strictly more expressive than standard heterogeneous graph neural networks that rely primarily on feature similarity and provably reduces the prediction bias introduced by heterophilic neighbors. Experiments on five real-world heterogeneous graphs, including two large-scale networks at the million-node and hundred-million-edge scale, demonstrate that HeterSEED consistently outperforms representative heterogeneous graph neural networks and recent heterophily-aware baselines, especially in strongly heterophilic regimes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HeterSEED，一种语义-结构解耦框架，用于异质性下异质图学习，通过分离语义和结构通道提升表示能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际异质图常呈现强异质性，相连节点标签或语义角色不同。标准异质图神经网络基于特征相似性沿元路径聚合消息，在异质性下传播误导信息，因为特征相似性与关系语义可能不匹配。现有方法难以处理此类场景，亟需新框架。
light_analysis.method: HeterSEED将表示学习解耦为两个通道：异质语义通道捕获类型和关系感知的局部语义；结构感知异质性通道通过伪标签引导划分同质和异质邻域，并用元路径结构权重聚合。节点级自适应融合机制结合两通道产生上下文相关表示。理论证明其表达力更强且减少预测偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在五个真实异质图上实验，包括两个大规模网络（百万节点、亿边规模），HeterSEED一致优于代表性异质图神经网络和异质性感知基线，尤其在强异质性场景下性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出语义-结构解耦框架处理异质异质图学习，具有理论保证和实验优势。揭示了异质性影响，适用于社交网络、推荐系统等场景。未来可研究更高效的通道融合或扩展至动态图。

title: DiCLIP: Diffusion Model Enhances CLIP's Dense Knowledge for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels typically leverages Class Activation Maps (CAMs) to achieve pixel-level predictions. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been introduced to generate CAMs in WSSS. However, previous WSSS methods solely adopt CLIP's vision-language paired property for dense localization, neglecting its inherently limited dense knowledge across both visual and text modalities, which renders CAM generation suboptimal. In this work, we propose DiCLIP, a novel WSSS framework that leverages the generative diffusion model to enhance CLIP's dense knowledge across two modalities. Specifically, Visual Correlation Enhancement (VCE) and Text Semantic Augmentation (TSA) modules are proposed for dense prediction enhancement. To improve the spatial awareness of visual features, our VCE module utilizes diffusion's reliable spatial consistency to mitigate the over-smoothing issue in CLIP's attention. It designs the Attention Clustering Refinement (ACR) module to reliably extract diverse correlation maps from the diffusion model. The correlation maps act as a diversity bias for CLIP's self-attention, recursively pushing its visual features towards a more discriminative dense distribution. To augment the semantics of text embeddings, our TSA module argues that a single text modality is insufficient to encompass the variability of visual categories. Thus, we leverage diffusion's generative power to maintain a dynamic key-value cache model, shifting CAM generation from a patch-text matching mechanism to a novel visual knowledge retrieval paradigm. With these enhancements, DiCLIP not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO but also significantly reduces training costs. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/zwyang6/DiCLIP.
comment: This work is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiCLIP框架，利用扩散模型增强CLIP在弱监督语义分割中的密集知识，通过视觉相关性增强和文本语义增强模块提升CAM质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的弱监督语义分割方法仅利用其视觉-语言配对特性进行密集定位，忽视了CLIP在视觉和文本模态上固有的有限密集知识，导致类激活图生成效果不佳。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过引入生成扩散模型来增强CLIP的密集表示能力，从而提高分割性能。
light_analysis.method: DiCLIP包含两个核心模块：视觉相关性增强（VCE）和文本语义增强（TSA）。VCE利用扩散模型的空间一致性缓解CLIP注意力中的过平滑问题，通过注意力聚类精炼（ACR）模块提取多样相关图作为自注意力的偏置。TSA则利用扩散的生成能力维护动态键值缓存，将补丁-文本匹配转变为视觉知识检索范式，增强文本语义。
light_analysis.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上，DiCLIP超越现有最先进方法，同时显著降低训练成本。具体性能提升未在摘要中明确数值，但表明在分割精度和效率上均有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiCLIP有效利用扩散模型增强CLIP的双模态密集知识，为弱监督语义分割提供了新范式。其贡献在于设计了VCE和TSA模块，改善了CAM生成质量，并降低了训练开销。未来可探索扩散模型与其他预训练模型的结合。

title: From Diffusion to Rectified Flow: Rethinking Text-Based Segmentation
abstract: Text-based image segmentation aims to delineate object boundaries within an image from text prompts, offering higher flexibility and broader application scope compared to traditional fixed-category segmentation tasks. Recent studies have shown that diffusion models (e.g., Stable Diffusion) can provide rich multimodal semantic features, leading to studies of using diffusion models as feature extractors for segmentation tasks. Such methods, however, inherit the generative natures of diffusion models that are harmful to discriminative segmentation tasks. In response, we propose RLFSeg, a novel framework that leverages Rectified Flow to learn direct mapping from the image to the segmentation mask within the latent space. The model is thus freed from the noise-denoise process and the need to optimize the time step of diffusion models, resulting in substantially better performance than previous diffusion-based methods, especially on zero-shot scenarios. By introducing label refinement and an Adaptive One-Step Sampling strategy, the model achieves higher accuracy even on a single inference step. The framework redirects a pretrained generative model to the discriminative segmentation task with zero modification to model structure, thus reveals promising application potential and significant research value.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLFSeg框架，利用Rectified Flow实现从图像到分割掩码的直接映射，避免扩散模型的噪声过程，显著提升零样本文本分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本引导的图像分割相比传统固定类别分割具有更高灵活性，但现有基于扩散模型的方法继承了其生成特性，不利于判别式分割任务。扩散模型需要噪声-去噪过程和时步优化，导致性能受限，尤其在零样本场景下表现不佳。因此，亟需一种能克服扩散模型固有缺陷、更高效且准确的分割方法。
light_analysis.method: RLFSeg框架采用Rectified Flow学习从图像到分割掩码在潜在空间中的直接映射，无需噪声-去噪过程和时步优化。通过引入标签细化和自适应一步采样策略，即使单步推理也能实现高精度。该框架将预训练生成模型重定向至判别式分割任务，无需修改模型结构，保留了原模型潜力。
light_analysis.result: RLFSeg在零样本场景下显著优于以往基于扩散的方法，通过标签细化和自适应一步采样策略，单步推理即可获得更高精度。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但明确表明性能大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLFSeg通过Rectified Flow重定向预训练生成模型至分割任务，解决了扩散模型在判别式任务中的不足，展现出高应用潜力和研究价值。未来可进一步优化采样策略及扩展至其他视觉任务。摘要未提及局限性。

title: TajikNLP: An Open-Source Toolkit for Comprehensive Text Processing of Tajik (Cyrillic Script)
abstract: The Tajik language, written in Cyrillic script, remains severely under-resourced in terms of publicly available natural language processing (NLP) toolkits, hindering both linguistic research and applied development. This paper introduces TajikNLP, an open-source Python library that provides the first comprehensive pipeline for processing authentic Tajik text while preserving the original Cyrillic orthography. The library implements a modular architecture centered around a unified Doc object, enabling sequential application of components for cleaning, normalization, tokenization (including subword BPE), morphemic segmentation, part-of-speech tagging, stemming, lemmatization, and sentence splitting. A novel unified morphology engine is introduced, offering controlled and deep analysis modes that significantly improve handling of Tajik's agglutinative nominal and verbal inflections. The release further incorporates a lexicon-based sentiment analyser and pre-trained Word2Vec/FastText embeddings loaded directly from the Hugging Face Hub. To ensure reproducibility and facilitate future research, four accompanying linguistic datasets -- a POS-tagged corpus (52.5k entries), a sentiment lexicon (3.5k entries), a toponym gazetteer (5.6k entries), and a personal names dataset (3.8k entries) -- have been openly published under permissive licenses. The library's reliability is validated by an extensive test suite of 616 automated tests achieving 93% source code coverage. TajikNLP thus establishes a foundational technological infrastructure for Tajik language processing, lowering the barrier to entry for both academic and industrial applications in low-resource Cyrillic-script environments.

light_analysis.overview: TajikNLP是首个面向塔吉克语（西里尔字母）的综合开源NLP工具包，提供从清洗到句子分割的完整处理管线及配套数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 塔吉克语（西里尔字母）严重缺乏公开可用的NLP工具包，现有方法无法提供完整的文本处理管线，这阻碍了语言研究和应用开发。因此，亟需建立基础技术设施以降低学术和工业应用的门槛。
light_analysis.method: TajikNLP采用模块化架构，基于统一的Doc对象顺序应用清洗、标准化、BPE分词、词素分割、词性标注、词干提取、词形还原和句子分割等组件。其统一形态分析引擎引入控制和深度模式，有效处理塔吉克语的粘着性词形变化。此外，工具包包含基于词典的情感分析器和可从Hugging Face Hub加载的预训练Word2Vec/FastText嵌入。同时发布了四个数据集：POS语料库（52.5k）、情感词典（3.5k）、地名词典（5.6k）和人名数据集（3.8k）。
light_analysis.result: TajikNLP通过包含616个自动化测试的测试套件验证了可靠性，源代码覆盖率达到93%。配套数据集规模明确：POS语料库52.5k条目、情感词典3.5k条目、地名词典5.6k条目、人名数据集3.8k条目。论文未提供与基线方法的性能对比，但强调了工具包的完整性和可复现性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TajikNLP为塔吉克语（西里尔字母）处理建立了基础技术设施，使学术和工业应用更易开展。其开放源代码和数据集降低了低资源环境下的准入门槛。未来可扩展至其他任务（如命名实体识别），但当前版本未明确提及局限性。

title: GTF: Omnidirectional EPI Transformer for Light Field Super-Resolution
abstract: Light field (LF) image super-resolution benefits from Epipolar Plane Images (EPIs), whose line slopes explicitly encode disparity. However, existing Transformer-based LF SR methods mainly attend to horizontal and vertical EPIs, leaving diagonal epipolar geometry underexplored. We present GTF, an omnidirectional EPI Transformer that explicitly models horizontal, vertical, 45-degree, and 135-degree EPIs within a unified reconstruction framework. GTF combines directional EPI processing, MacPI-based prior injection, adaptive directional fusion, and a topology-preserving feed-forward network to better exploit LF geometry. For the NTIRE 2026 fidelity tracks, we use GTF as the main model, while a lightweight GTF-Tiny variant targets the efficiency track. On five standard LF SR benchmarks covering both real-captured and synthetic scenes, GTF reaches 32.78 dB without inference-time enhancement, and stronger inference settings with EPSW and test-time augmentation further improve performance. Under the NTIRE 2026 efficiency constraint, GTF-Tiny attains 32.57 dB with only 0.915M parameters and 19.81 GFLOPs. In the NTIRE 2026 Light Field Image Super-Resolution Challenge, our submissions rank 3rd on Track 1 and Track 3 and 4th on Track 2. Architecture-evolution, channel-width, and inference analyses further support the effectiveness of diagonal EPI modeling, directional fusion, and the lightweight design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全方位EPI Transformer（GTF），显式建模水平、垂直及对角线EPI，实现光场超分辨率性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的光场超分辨率方法主要关注水平和垂直极线平面图像（EPI），忽略了对角线极线几何，而对角线EPI包含重要的视差信息。为充分利用光场几何结构，需要统一建模多个方向的EPI，以提升超分辨率精度。
light_analysis.method: GTF框架结合了方向EPI处理、MacPI先验注入、自适应方向融合和拓扑保持前馈网络，显式建模水平、垂直、45度和135度EPI。在NTIRE 2026保真度赛道使用完整GTF，效率赛道使用轻量级GTF-Tiny。评估在五个标准光场超分辨率基准上进行，涵盖真实和合成场景。
light_analysis.result: GTF在无推理增强下达到32.78 dB，结合EPSW和测试时增强进一步提升。GTF-Tiny在效率约束下以0.915M参数和19.81 GFLOPs达到32.57 dB。在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中，Track 1和Track 3位列第3，Track 2位列第4。
light_analysis.conclusion: 对角线EPI建模和自适应方向融合显著提升光场超分辨率性能，轻量级设计在资源受限场景具有实用价值。未来可探索更多方向EPI和更高效融合机制。

title: Benchmarking POS Tagging for the Tajik Language: A Comparative Study of Neural Architectures on the TajPersParallel Corpus
abstract: This paper presents the first benchmark for the task of automatic part-of-speech (POS) tagging for the Tajik language. Despite the existence of multilingual language models demonstrating high effectiveness for many of the world's languages, their capacity for grammatical analysis of Tajik has remained unexplored until now. The aim of this study is to fill this gap through a systematic comparison of classical neural network architectures and modern multilingual transformers.   Experiments were conducted on the TajPersParallel corpus, a parallel lexical resource comprising approximately 44,000 dictionary entries. Due to the absence of full-fledged example sentences in the current version of the corpus, the task was performed at the level of isolated lexical units, representing a challenging case of context-independent classification. The study compares the following architectures: a recurrent BiLSTM-CRF model, as well as multilingual models XLM-RoBERTa (large), mBERT, ParsBERT (Persian), and ruBERT (Russian), adapted using the parameter-efficient fine-tuning method LoRA.   The testing results showed that the best performance is achieved by the mBERT + LoRA model (macro F1-score = 0.11, weighted F1-score = 0.62). It was established that in the absence of syntactic context, all models experience significant difficulty in resolving morphological ambiguity, successfully classifying primarily high-frequency classes ("noun," "adjective") while demonstrating zero effectiveness for rare function words. Zero-shot evaluation revealed the greatest typological proximity of Tajik to Persian (ParsBERT) and Russian (ruBERT). The obtained results form a foundation for further research and development in the field of automatic processing of the Tajik language.

light_analysis.overview: 首次为塔吉克语构建POS标注基准，比较BiLSTM-CRF和多语言transformer在TajPersParallel语料库上的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管多语言语言模型对许多语言有效，但塔吉克语的语法分析能力尚未被探索。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过系统比较经典神经网络和现代多语言transformer，解决塔吉克语POS标注任务。由于缺乏完整例句，任务在孤立词汇单元上进行，代表了无上下文分类的挑战情况。该任务对于低资源语言的自动处理具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 使用TajPersParallel语料库（约44,000个词典条目），在孤立词层面进行上下文无关分类。比较了BiLSTM-CRF和四个多语言transformer：XLM-RoBERTa (large)、mBERT、ParsBERT、ruBERT，采用LoRA参数高效微调。
light_analysis.result: 最佳性能来自mBERT + LoRA模型，宏F1=0.11，加权F1=0.62。所有模型在缺乏句法上下文时难以解决形态歧义，主要成功分类高频词类（名词、形容词），对稀有功能词效果为零。零样本评估显示塔吉克语与波斯语和俄语最接近。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为塔吉克语建立POS标注基准，证明mBERT+LoRA的相对优越性，但整体性能较低，凸显了上下文依赖分类的必要性。研究为塔吉克语自动处理工具的开发奠定基础，未来可探索利用句子级语料库提升效果。

title: VL-UniTrack: A Unified Framework with Visual-Language Prompts for UAV-Ground Visual Tracking
abstract: UAV-ground visual tracking (UGVT) aims to simultaneously track the same object from both the UAV and the ground view. However, existing two-stream methods suffer from isolated feature extraction and rely heavily on implicit appearance matching, which struggles to establish reliable correspondence under drastic view differences, leading to tracking unreliability. To address these limitations, we propose VL-UniTrack, a fully unified framework enhanced by visual-language prompts. By encoding features from both views within a single shared encoder, our method breaks the barrier of feature isolation to facilitate sufficient cross-view interaction. To overcome the ambiguity caused by relying solely on appearance matching, we design visual-language geometric prompting module, which fuses language descriptions with visual features to generate learnable prompts. These prompts are then fed into our prompt-guided cross-view adapter module to enable sufficient cross-view feature interaction and to guide the learning of view-specific feature representations. Furthermore, a confidence-modulated mutual distillation loss is proposed to regularize the training by mitigating noise propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the latest benchmark. The code can be downloaded in https://github.com/xuboyue1999/VL-UniTrack.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出VL-UniTrack，利用视觉语言提示统一无人机与地面视角的视觉跟踪，解决了跨视图特征隔离和外观匹配模糊问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机-地面视觉跟踪（UGVT）需同时从无人机和地面视角跟踪同一目标，但现有双流方法存在特征提取隔离，仅依赖隐式外观匹配，在视角差异大时难以建立可靠对应关系，导致跟踪不可靠。因此需要一种统一框架增强跨视图交互并利用语义信息消除歧义。
light_analysis.method: VL-UniTrack采用共享编码器同时编码两视图特征，破除特征隔离；设计视觉语言几何提示模块，融合语言描述与视觉特征生成可学习提示；提示引导的跨视图适配器实现充分跨视图特征交互并学习视图特定表示；提出置信度调制互蒸馏损失，通过缓解噪声传播正则化训练。
light_analysis.result: 在最新基准上达到最先进性能（摘要未提供具体数值），与现有双流方法对比有明显提升，代码已开源（https://github.com/xuboyue1999/VL-UniTrack.git）。
light_analysis.conclusion: VL-UniTrack通过统一框架和视觉语言提示有效提升UGVT的跨视图对应能力，降低了外观歧义，具有重要的实际应用价值（如协同跟踪）。未来可探索更复杂的语言提示或扩展到多视角场景。

title: From Parameter Dynamics to Risk Scoring : Quantifying Sample-Level Safety Degradation in LLM Fine-tuning
abstract: Safety alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) is extremely fragile, as fine-tuning on a small number of benign samples can erase safety behaviors learned from millions of preference examples. Existing studies attempt to explain this phenomenon by comparing parameters and hidden states before and after fine-tuning, but overlook their dynamic evolution during fine-tuning. In this paper, we uncover a critical mechanism underlying safety degradation by analyzing parameter dynamics, where benign fine-tuning causes parameters to cumulatively drift toward danger-aligned directions, progressively undermining the model's safety. This finding suggests that samples contributing more to this drift has greater fine-tuning risks. Based on this insight, we propose a method of Sample-Level Quantification of Safety Degradation (SQSD), which quantifies the influence of each training sample on safety degradation. Specifically, SQSD computes continuous risk scores to samples by measuring their induced parameter updates' projection difference between danger and safety directions. Extensive experiments across multiple models and datasets demonstrate that SQSD effectively quantifies sample-level fine-tuning risks and exhibits strong transferability across model architectures, parameter scales, and parameter-efficient methods.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM微调中安全退化的参数动态机制，并提出样本级风险量化方法SQSD。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型的安全对齐在微调时极其脆弱，少量良性样本即可破坏安全行为。现有研究通过比较微调前后的参数和隐藏状态解释该现象，但忽略了微调过程中的动态演化。理解这一机制对于安全关键应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出SQSD方法，基于参数动态分析：良性微调导致参数累积漂向危险方向。通过测量每个样本引起的参数更新在危险与安全方向上的投影差，计算连续风险分数，量化样本对安全退化的影响。该方法无需额外训练，适用于多种模型和参数高效方法。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型和数据集上的实验表明，SQSD有效量化样本级微调风险，并展现出强迁移性，可跨模型架构、参数规模和参数高效方法应用。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出方法能区分不同样本的风险程度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了微调中安全退化的参数动态机制，为理解LLM安全脆弱性提供了新视角。SQSD方法可帮助识别高风险样本，指导安全微调实践。未来可探索将其集成到训练流程中主动防御安全退化。

title: Lightning Unified Video Editing via In-Context Sparse Attention
abstract: Video editing has evolved toward In-Context Learning (ICL) paradigms, yet the resulting quadratic attention costs create a critical computational bottleneck. In this work, we propose In-context Sparse Attention (ISA), the first near-lossless empirical sparse framework tailored for ICL video editing. Our design is grounded in two key insights: first, context tokens exhibit significantly lower saliency than source tokens; second, we theoretically prove and empirically validate that Query sharpness correlates with approximation error. Motivated by these findings, ISA implements an efficient pre-selection strategy to prune redundant context, followed by a dynamic query grouping mechanism that routes high-error queries to full attention and low-error ones to a computationally efficient 0-th order Taylor sparse attention. Furthermore, we build \textbf{\texttt{LIVEditor}} , a novel lightning video editing model via ISA and a proposed video-editing data pipeline that curated a 1.7M high-quality dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LIVEditor achieves a $\sim$60% reduction in attention-module latency while surpassing state-of-the-art methods across EditVerseBench, IVE-Bench, and VIE-Bench, delivering near-lossless acceleration without compromising visual fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向上下文学习视频编辑的近无损稀疏注意力框架ISA，构建LIVEditor模型，实现60%注意力延时降低并超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频编辑正转向上下文学习范式，但二次注意力成本成为计算瓶颈。现有方法无法在保持编辑质量的同时显著加速。需要一种高效且近无损的稀疏注意力机制，以解决冗余上下文和查询锐度带来的计算挑战。
light_analysis.method: 基于两个关键洞察：上下文令牌显著性低于源令牌，以及查询锐度与近似误差相关。ISA采用高效预选择策略剪枝冗余上下文，并通过动态查询分组将高误差查询路由至全注意力，低误差查询使用0阶泰勒稀疏注意力。同时构建LIVEditor模型及1.7M高质量视频编辑数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在EditVerseBench、IVE-Bench和VIE-Bench三个基准上，LIVEditor均超越最先进方法，注意力模块延迟降低约60%，实现近无损加速，且视觉保真度未受损。
light_analysis.conclusion: ISA框架有效解决了视频编辑中上下文学习的计算瓶颈，实现了效率与质量的平衡。LIVEditor模型展示了实际应用潜力，为未来高效视频编辑系统提供了新思路。未来可探索更细粒度的稀疏策略。

title: Dream-MPC: Gradient-Based Model Predictive Control with Latent Imagination
abstract: State-of-the-art model-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches either use gradient-free, population-based methods for planning, learned policy networks, or a combination of policy networks and planning. Hybrid approaches that combine Model Predictive Control (MPC) with a learned model and a policy prior to leverage the advantages of both paradigms have shown promising results. However, these approaches typically rely on gradient-free optimization methods, which can be computationally expensive for high-dimensional control tasks. While gradient-based methods are a promising alternative, recent works have empirically shown that gradient-based methods often perform worse than their gradient-free counterparts. We propose Dream-MPC, a novel approach that generates few candidate trajectories from a rolled-out policy and optimizes each trajectory by gradient ascent using a learned world model, uncertainty regularization and amortization of optimization iterations over time by reusing previously optimized actions. Our results on 24 continuous control tasks show that Dream-MPC can significantly improve the performance of the underlying policy and can outperform gradient-free MPC and state-of-the-art baselines. We will open source our code and more at https://dream-mpc.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Dream-MPC，利用梯度上升和世界模型在潜在轨迹上进行规划，显著提升策略性能并超越梯度自由MPC。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模型强化学习方法多采用无梯度的群体优化方法，计算成本高，尤其在高维控制任务中。混合方法虽结合MPC和策略先验，但依赖梯度自由优化，而梯度方法性能通常较差。为此，需要一种高效且性能更优的梯度优化规划方法。
light_analysis.method: Dream-MPC通过策略滚动生成少量候选轨迹，并利用学习的世界模型进行梯度上升优化，同时引入不确定性正则化。通过重复使用先前优化的动作（迭代摊销）减少计算开销，将梯度优化与规划结合，提升连续控制任务中的决策效率。
light_analysis.result: 在24个连续控制任务上，Dream-MPC显著提升了底层策略的性能，并超越了梯度自由MPC和最先进的基线方法。具体提升幅度摘要未明确，但表明方法有效且高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: Dream-MPC通过梯度优化与摊销机制结合，提供了一种高效且性能优越的模型预测控制方案，为高维连续控制任务提供了新思路。未来可探索更大规模任务和更复杂的模型架构，代码已开源。

title: Open-Source Image Editing Models Are Zero-Shot Vision Learners
abstract: Recent studies have shown that large generative models can solve vision tasks they were not explicitly trained for. However, existing evidence relies on closed-source models~(Veo~3, Nano Banana Pro) or requires task-specific instruction tuning, leaving open whether publicly available image-editing models possess zero-shot vision abilities out of the box.   We conduct a systematic evaluation of three open-source image-editing models -- Qwen-Image-Edit, FireRed-Image-Edit, and LongCat-Image-Edit -- on dense visual prediction tasks \emph{without any fine-tuning}.
