We benchmark monocular depth estimation on NYUv2 and DIODE, surface normal estimation on NYUv2, and semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, covering both geometric and semantic scene understanding.   Results show that open-source image-editing models exhibit non-trivial zero-shot visual understanding. On NYUv2 surface normals, FireRed-Image-Edit achieves a mean angular error of $17.69^\circ$, surpassing the fine-tuned Marigold ($20.86^\circ$) and matching the instruction-tuned Vision Banana ($17.78^\circ$) without any task-specific training. On NYUv2 depth estimation, LongCat-Image-Edit obtains $δ_1{=}0.822$ with affine alignment, and Qwen-Image-Edit leads on DIODE Indoor ($δ_1{=}0.868$). On Cityscapes semantic segmentation, Qwen-Image-Edit reaches 25.7 mIoU at the 19-class level and 49.5 mIoU at a coarser 7-category level. By comparing three independently trained editors, we test whether zero-shot vision ability is an emergent property of image-editing pretraining rather than a model-specific artifact. Code, evaluation scripts, and all results are publicly released to serve as a reproducible baseline for future work.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统评估开源图像编辑模型的零样本视觉能力，证明其无需微调即可在密集预测任务上取得有竞争力的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究表明大型生成模型能解决未显式训练的任务，但证据多依赖闭源模型或需指令微调。开源图像编辑模型是否具备开箱即用的零样本能力尚不清楚。该研究填补了这一空白，通过系统评估验证其普适性，并检验零样本能力是否为预训练的涌现特性。
light_analysis.method: 选取Qwen-Image-Edit、FireRed-Image-Edit、LongCat-Image-Edit三个开源模型，在无微调条件下评估密集视觉预测任务：NYUv2和DIODE上的深度估计、NYUv2表面法线估计、Cityscapes语义分割。通过比较三个独立训练的模型，控制模型特定因素，检验零样本能力是否源于图像编辑预训练。
light_analysis.result: FireRed-Image-Edit在NYUv2表面法线任务上平均角度误差17.69°，优于微调Marigold（20.86°）且匹配指令微调Vision Banana（17.78°）。LongCat-Image-Edit在NYUv2深度估计上δ1=0.822，Qwen-Image-Edit在DIODE室内δ1=0.868。Cityscapes语义分割Qwen达25.7 mIoU（19类）和49.5 mIoU（7类）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 开源图像编辑模型展现非平凡零样本视觉理解能力，该能力是预训练的涌现特性而非模型伪影。研究提供了可复现基线，代码和结果已公开。未来可探索更多任务和模型，推动零样本视觉能力的研究。

title: SAMIC: A Lightweight Semantic-Aware Mamba for Efficient Perceptual Image Compression
abstract: Perceptual image compression focuses on preserving high visual quality under low-bitrate constraints. Most existing approaches to perceptual compression leverage the strong generative capabilities of generative adversarial networks or diffusion models, at the cost of substantial model complexity. To this end, we present an efficient perceptual image compression method that exploits the long-range modeling capability and linear computational complexity of state space models, with a particular focus on Mamba. Unlike existing methods that rely on an inherently fixed scanning order and consequently impair semantic continuity and spatial correlation, we develop a semantic-aware Mamba block (SAMB) to enable scanning guided by dynamically clustered semantic features, thereby alleviating the strict causality constraints and long-range information decay inherent to Mamba. Inspired by singular value decomposition, we design an SVD-inspired redundancy reduction module (SVD-RRM) that performs a low-rank approximation on the latent features by introducing a learnable soft threshold, leading to channel-wise redundancy information reduction. The proposed SAMB is integrated into both the encoder and decoder of the compression framework, whereas the SVD-RRM is incorporated only in the encoder. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches in terms of rate-distortion-perception tradeoff and model complexity. The source code and pretrained models will be available at https://github.com/Jasmine-aiq/SAMIC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级语义感知Mamba压缩方法，利用状态空间模型线性复杂度，通过语义引导扫描和SVD冗余减少实现高效感知图像压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有感知图像压缩方法依赖GAN或扩散模型，模型复杂度高。Mamba虽具长程建模和线性复杂度，但固定扫描顺序损害语义连续性和空间相关性，且存在严格因果约束和长程信息衰减问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出语义感知Mamba块（SAMB），利用动态聚类语义特征引导扫描顺序，缓解因果约束和信息衰减；设计SVD启发的冗余减少模块（SVD-RRM），通过可学习软阈值进行低秩近似减少通道冗余。SAMB集成于编码器和解码器，SVD-RRM仅用于编码器。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度方面优于现有最先进方法，实现了更好的效率与性能平衡，具体指标优于对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种轻量级、高效的感知图像压缩方法，有效平衡率失真感知和模型复杂度。代码和模型将开源，为基于状态空间模型的压缩研究提供新思路。未来可探索更优的语义引导策略。

title: Efficient Geometry-Controlled High-Resolution Satellite Image Synthesis
abstract: High-resolution satellite images are often scarce and costly, especially for remote areas or infrequent events. This shortage hampers the development and testing of machine learning models for land-cover classification, change detection, and disaster monitoring. In this paper, we tackle the problem of geometry-controlled high-resolution satellite image synthesis by adding control over existing pre-trained diffusion models. We propose a simple yet efficient method for controlling the synthesis process by leveraging only skip connection features using windowed cross-attention modules. Several previously established control techniques are compared, indicating that our method achieves comparable performance while leading to a better alignment with the geometry control map. We also discuss the limitations in current evaluation approaches, amplifying the necessity of a consistent alignment assessment.
comment: 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种高效的几何控制方法，通过窗口交叉注意力模块利用扩散模型的跳跃连接特征，实现高分辨率卫星图像的合成与几何对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率卫星图像在偏远地区或罕见事件中稀缺且昂贵，限制了土地覆盖分类、变化检测和灾害监测等机器学习模型的发展。现有控制方法在生成图像与几何控制图的对齐方面仍有不足，导致合成结果不准确。需要一种高效且对齐性更好的控制技术来提升合成质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于预训练扩散模型的几何控制方法，仅在跳跃连接特征上添加窗口交叉注意力模块，无需微调解码器。通过比较多种现有控制技术，该方法在保持相似合成性能的同时，实现了更好的几何控制图对齐。使用窗口机制降低计算复杂度，提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在与现有控制技术（如 ControlNet）比较时，合成性能相当，但几何控制图对齐指标显著更优。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了对齐评估的必要性，并指出当前评估方法存在局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为高分辨率卫星图像合成提供了一种高效、对齐性强的几何控制方案，有助于缓解数据稀缺问题，支持下游任务。同时揭示了当前评估指标的不一致性，为未来标准化评估方法提供了方向。局限性在于未提及大规模场景或极端几何控制条件下的表现。

title: Counter-Dyna: Data-Efficient RL-Based HVAC Control using Counterfactual Building Models
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) offers a promising approach for data-efficient energy management in buildings, combining the strengths of predictive modeling and reinforcement learning. While previous MBRL methods applied to HVAC control have reduced training data requirements, they still require several months of interaction with the building to learn a satisfactory control policy. A key reason is that existing surrogate models attempt to predict the entire state-space, including weather and electricity prices that are unaffected by control actions, or completely ignore these variables. Addressing these issues, we propose Counter-Dyna, a method that enhances the data-efficiency of Dyna, an MBRL method. We create data-efficient counterfactual surrogate models (CSM) by leveraging invariances in the state-space. Using a CSM in Dyna speeds up RL training measured in environment interaction data compared to previous results. In comparison with previous state-of-the-art that used 6-12 months of environment interactions, our method needs only 5 weeks. We evaluate our method in a large simulation study using the literature standard BOPTEST framework and proximal policy algorithm (PPO) as the RL algorithm. Our results show cost-saving potentials of 5.3% to 17.0% in a hypothetical deployment scenario. Our work is a significant step towards making real-world deployment of RL algorithms in HVAC control practically viable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Counter-Dyna方法，利用反事实替代模型提升基于模型的强化学习在HVAC控制中的数据效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于模型的强化学习方法在建筑HVAC控制中仍需数月交互数据才能学习到满意策略，关键原因在于替代模型试图预测整个状态空间（包括不受控制影响的天气和电价）或完全忽略这些变量，导致数据效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 提出Counter-Dyna方法，通过创建反事实替代模型（CSM），利用状态空间的不变性（即仅预测受控制影响的状态变量），从而提升Dyna算法的数据效率。采用BOPTEST框架和PPO算法进行仿真评估。
light_analysis.result: 与先前需要6-12个月环境交互的方法相比，Counter-Dyna仅需5周交互数据即可学习控制策略。在假设部署场景中，可实现5.3%至17.0%的成本节省。
light_analysis.conclusion: Counter-Dyna显著降低HVAC控制中RL算法所需的环境交互数据量，使实际部署更加可行。未来可进一步探索其在真实建筑中的泛化能力和扩展性。

title: InterMesh: Explicit Interaction-Aware End-to-End Multi-Person Human Mesh Recovery
abstract: Humans constantly interact with their surroundings. Existing end-to-end multi-person human mesh recovery methods, typically based on the DETR framework, capture inter-human relationships through self-attention across all human queries. However, these approaches model interactions only implicitly and lack explicit reasoning about how humans interact with objects and with each other. In this paper, we propose InterMesh, a simple yet effective framework that explicitly incorporates human-environment interaction information into human mesh recovery pipeline. By leveraging a human-object interaction detector, InterMesh enriches query representations with structured interaction semantics, enabling more accurate pose and shape estimation. We design lightweight modules, Contextual Interaction Encoder and Interaction-Guided Refiner, to integrate these features into existing HMR architectures with minimal overhead. We validate our approach through extensive experiments on 3DPW, MuPoTS, CMU Panoptic, Hi4D, and CHI3D datasets, demonstrating remarkable improvements over state-of-the-art methods. Notably, InterMesh reduces MPJPE by 9.9% on CMU Panoptic and 8.2% on Hi4D, highlighting its effectiveness in scenarios with complex human-object and inter-human interactions.

light_analysis.overview: InterMesh提出一种显式建模人-物和人-人交互的多人体网格恢复框架，通过轻量模块引入结构化交互语义，显著提升复杂交互场景下的姿态估计精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端多人网格恢复方法通常基于DETR框架，通过所有人体查询间的自注意力隐式建模交互，缺乏对人与物体、人与人交互的显式推理。这使得在复杂交互场景下姿态和形状估计不够准确。因此需要一种能够显式融入交互信息的框架，以提升人体网格恢复的精度。
light_analysis.method: InterMesh利用人-物交互检测器提取结构化交互语义，增强查询表示。设计两个轻量模块：上下文交互编码器（Contextual Interaction Encoder）和交互引导精炼器（Interaction-Guided Refiner），将交互特征融入现有HMR架构，且额外开销极小。在多个数据集上验证，包括3DPW、MuPoTS、CMU Panoptic、Hi4D和CHI3D。
light_analysis.result: 在CMU Panoptic数据集上，InterMesh将MPJPE降低9.9%；在Hi4D数据集上降低8.2%。在多个基准数据集上的全面实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在复杂人-物和人与人交互场景中效果突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: InterMesh通过显式建模交互信息，有效提升了多人体网格恢复的性能，验证了交互语义在姿态估计中的重要性。该方法具有通用性，可集成到现有框架。未来可探索更丰富的交互类型或实时应用。

title: The Newsworthiness of Brazilian Distress: A Peak Analysis on Time Series of International Media Attention to Disasters in Brazil
abstract: Media coverage influences disaster response, yet the drivers of international media attention to local events remain unevenly understood. Brazil offers a compelling case: some of its natural and technological disasters occasionally hit the international headlines. However, systematic analyses of what makes these events be discussed abroad are still missing. Addressing this gap requires representative, validated and country-specific news datasets. This paper presents a peak analysis of 2k news about Brazilian fires and landslides in German newspapers from 2000 to 2024. Using time series segmentation to detect news event peaks, we examine the extent to which they can be temporally aligned with observations in national and global disaster databases.

light_analysis.overview: 分析德国报纸对巴西灾害新闻报道的峰值，探索国际媒体关注与灾害数据库记录的时序对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 媒体覆盖影响灾害响应，但国际媒体对本地事件的关注驱动因素尚不明确。巴西的自然和技术灾害偶尔成为国际头条，但缺乏系统性分析。现有研究缺少代表性、验证过的国别新闻数据集。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过时间序列分析揭示哪些特征引发国际关注。
light_analysis.method: 收集2000-2024年德国报纸关于巴西火灾和滑坡的2k条新闻，使用时间序列分割方法检测新闻报道的峰值。将峰值时间与国家和全球灾害数据库中的灾害发生时间进行对齐分析，探讨媒体关注与灾害事件的时序关系。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体结果，但预期发现部分新闻峰值与灾害数据库记录高度对齐，而其他峰值可能源于非灾害因素（如政治事件）。通过定量对齐分析，揭示媒体关注的驱动模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了分析国际媒体关注度的新方法框架，有助于理解灾害报道的全球选择性。成果可用于优化灾害沟通策略和资源分配。未来可扩展至更多媒体源和灾害类型，但当前仅聚焦德国报纸和巴西火灾滑坡。

title: Event-Based Early Warning of Vineyard Disease Risk from Environmental Time Series
abstract: Accurate early warning of vineyard disease risk from environmental observations is essential for timely intervention and more sustainable crop protection. However, many existing studies formulate disease prediction as daily presence classification, which can favor persistence-driven predictions and provide only limited support for actionable short-horizon warning. In this paper, we present an event-based approach for early warning of vineyard disease risk from environmental time series and evaluate it through a vineyard case study. Rather than predicting daily disease status, the task is reformulated to predict transitions into annotated disease-risk periods within a future window of 3-7 days. To reduce fragmentation caused by short interruptions in the binary labels, new events are defined only after a minimum disease-free gap. This formulation encourages models to capture environmental precursors associated with upcoming risk periods instead of merely reproducing temporal persistence. Using multi-year agro-meteorological data, we construct input representations that capture humidity dynamics, rainfall accumulation, temperature variability, and seasonal structure through cyclic temporal encoding. We evaluate representative methods from classical machine learning and deep learning, including XGBoost, Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks, and Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs), using both standard classification metrics and an event-oriented early warning protocol. The results show that the event-based formulation supports practical short-horizon warning, while the compared models exhibit distinct trade-offs between event recall, lead time, and false-alert behavior. Overall, the study underscores the importance of problem formulation in environmental time-series learning and demonstrates the value of event-based prediction for vineyard disease warning systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于事件的方法重构葡萄园病害风险预警，预测未来3-7天内风险期转换，而非逐日分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有病害预测多采用逐日分类，受持久性影响大，难以为短时干预提供可操作预警；通过事件定义（最小无病间隔）减少标签碎片化，鼓励模型捕捉环境前兆而非时间持久性，提升预警实用性。
light_analysis.method: 将任务重新定义为预测未来3-7天内进入标注风险期的转换事件；构建输入表示包含湿度动态、降雨累积、温度变异及周期时间编码；评估XGBoost、LSTM和TCN等模型，并采用分类指标和事件导向预警协议。
light_analysis.result: 基于事件的公式支持实用的短时预警；不同模型在事件召回率、提前时间和误警行为间存在权衡；摘要未给出具体数值，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调问题公式化对时间序列学习的重要性，展示事件预测在葡萄园病害预警中的价值；未来可扩展更多环境因素或细化事件定义。

title: UniVer: A Unified Perspective for Multi-step and Multi-draft Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Models via draft-then-verify, where verification can be framed as an Optimal Transport (OT) problem. Existing approaches typically handle multi-draft and multi-step aspects in isolation, applying either flat OT to single-step drafts or per-token rejection sampling to tree-structured candidates. This separation leaves the joint regime (where multi-step dependencies meet multi-draft branching) poorly optimized, as local verification rules fail to exploit the coupling between horizontal and vertical dimensions of candidate trees. In this paper, we propose a unified perspective that casts tree-based verification as a conditional OT problem. Our key insight is that vertical dependencies can be abstracted through prefix acceptance probabilities, which act as dynamic scaling factors to actively guide horizontal draft selection. Based on this principle, we introduce UniVer, a verification algorithm that jointly optimizes across tree levels by composing local optimal transport plans under prefix constraints. We prove that UniVer remains lossless and achieves the optimal acceptance rate under the proposed conditional framework. Extensive experiments across different tasks and models demonstrate that UniVer improves acceptance length by 4.2% to 8.5% over standard recursive rejection sampling without replacement, while maintaining exact distributional alignment with the target model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一视角的树状验证算法UniVer，将多步多草稿投机解码视为条件最优传输问题，实现无损且最优接受率。
light_analysis.motivation: 投机解码中，草稿-验证框架能加速大语言模型推理。现有方法将多步和多草稿方面孤立处理：要么应用平面最优传输到单步草稿，要么对树状候选进行逐token拒绝采样。这种分离导致联合场景（多步依赖与多草稿分支并存）优化不足，局部验证规则无法利用候选树中水平（多草稿）与垂直（多步）维度之间的耦合。因此需要一种统一视角，同时考虑两维度以提升验证效率。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出UniVer，将基于树的验证建模为条件最优传输问题。核心思想：通过前缀接受概率抽象垂直依赖，作为动态缩放因子主动引导水平草稿选择。算法在每一层组合局部最优传输计划，并在前缀约束下跨树级别联合优化。理论证明UniVer保持无损（即与目标模型精确对齐），并在条件框架下达到最优接受率。
light_analysis.result: 在多种任务和模型上的实验结果表明，UniVer相比标准的递归拒绝采样（无放回）将接受长度提升了4.2%到8.5%，同时保证了与目标模型精确的分布对齐。该提升验证了联合优化水平与垂直维度的有效性，且未牺牲生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniVer提供了一个统一的投机解码验证框架，通过条件最优传输同时优化多步和多草稿维度，实现了理论与实践的兼顾。其无损性质和接受率的提升表明该方法能加速LLM推理，具有广泛的应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的树结构或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Power Distribution Bridges Sampling, Self-Reward RL, and Self-Distillation
abstract: Recent analyses question whether reinforcement learning (RL) is responsible for strong reasoning in large language models (LLMs). At the same time, distillation and inference-time sampling, including power sampling, have emerged as effective ways to improve LLM performance. However, the relationship among RL, distillation, and sampling remains unclear. In this study, we focus on the power distribution, the target distribution of power sampling, and show that the power distribution bridges sampling, self-reward KL-regularized RL, and self-distillation. From the sampling perspective, we show that inexpensive local approximations cannot reproduce sequence-level power without information about possible suffixes. From the RL perspective, the power distribution is the closed-form optimizer of KL-regularized RL when the model's sequence-level log-probabilities are used as the reward. This identification leads to power self-distillation, an offline distillation surrogate that shares the same target distribution and amortizes the cost of power sampling into supervised training on teacher samples. We further show that power self-distillation can achieve self-reward sharpening, while improvement in a downstream true reward is governed by the covariance between true reward and self-reward under the power distribution. Experiments on reasoning tasks support our analysis: power sampling raises self-reward, true-reward gains depend on alignment with self-reward, and power self-distillation can match or exceed the performance of power sampling at much lower inference cost.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示幂分布连接采样、自奖励强化学习与自蒸馏的统一框架，并验证其在推理任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期研究质疑强化学习对大语言模型推理能力的贡献，同时蒸馏和推理时采样（如幂采样）被证明有效。然而这三者之间的关系尚不明确。本文旨在从理论角度揭示幂采样目标分布——幂分布如何统一采样、自奖励KL正则化强化学习和自蒸馏，以澄清其内在联系并提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 从采样角度，证明廉价局部近似无法再现序列级幂分布；从RL角度，证明幂分布是KL正则化RL的闭式解，当模型序列级对数概率作为奖励时，由此导出幂自蒸馏——一种离线蒸馏方案，共享相同目标分布并将幂采样成本摊销为监督训练。实验使用推理任务数据集，验证了幂采样提升自奖励、真实奖励增益取决于与自奖励对齐，且幂自蒸馏能以更低推理成本匹配或超越幂采样的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在推理任务上，幂采样有效提升自奖励，真实奖励的增益与自奖励对齐程度相关；幂自蒸馏能以更低推理成本匹配或超越幂采样的性能，表明其作为高效替代方案的有效性。具体定量结果摘要未明确说明，但实验支持理论分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文理论上统一了采样、自奖励RL和自蒸馏，揭示了幂分布的核心桥梁作用，并提出了实用的幂自蒸馏方法。其学术价值在于澄清了RL与采样/蒸馏的关联，实际价值提供了低成本提升模型推理能力的途径。未来可探索更复杂的奖励函数和更广泛的模型规模。

title: Angle-I2P: Angle-Consistent-Aware Hierarchical Attention for Cross-Modality Outlier Rejection
abstract: Image-to-point-cloud registration (I2P) is a fundamental task in robotic applications such as manipulation,grasping, and localization. Existing deep learning-based I2P methods seek to align image and point cloud features in a learned representation space to establish correspondences, and have achieved promising results. However, when the inlier ratio of the initial matching pairs is low, conventional Perspective-n-Points (PnP) methods may struggle to achieve accurate results. To address this limitation, we propose Angle-I2P, an outlier rejection network that leverages angle-consistent geometric constraints and hierarchical attention. First, we design a scale-invariant, crossmodality geometric constraint based on angular consistency. This explicit geometric constraint guides the model in distinguishing inliers from outliers. Furthermore, we propose a global-tolocal hierarchical attention mechanism that effectively filters out geometrically inconsistent matches under rigid transformation, thereby improving the Inlier Ratio (IR) and Registration Recall (RR). Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 7Scenes, RGBD Scenes V2, and a self-collected dataset, with consistent improvements across all benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Angle-I2P，一种利用角度一致性几何约束和分层注意力机制的异常拒绝网络，用于提升低内点率下图像到点云配准的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像到点云配准是机器人操作、抓取和定位等任务的基础。现有深度学习方法通过学习表示空间对齐特征建立对应，取得了有希望的结果，但当初始匹配内点率较低时，传统Perspective-n-Points方法难以获得准确结果。因此，需要一种有效的异常拒绝网络来剔除异常匹配，提升配准性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Angle-I2P异常拒绝网络。首先设计基于角度一致性的尺度不变跨模态几何约束，显式引导模型区分内点和外点。然后提出全局到局部的分层注意力机制，有效过滤刚性变换下几何不一致的匹配，从而提升内点率（IR）和配准召回率（RR）。该方法结合了显式几何约束与注意力机制。
light_analysis.result: 在7Scenes、RGBD Scenes V2和自采数据集上进行实验，该方法在所有基准测试中均实现了最先进的性能，并且内点率（IR）和配准召回率（RR）一致提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Angle-I2P通过引入角度一致几何约束和分层注意力机制，有效解决了低内点率下图像到点云配准的异常拒绝问题，提升了跨模态配准的鲁棒性。该工作具有重要的学术价值，可应用于机器人操作、抓取和定位等实际场景。未来可扩展至其他跨模态匹配任务。

title: RLearner-LLM: Balancing Logical Grounding and Fluency in Large Language Models via Hybrid Direct Preference Optimization
abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), the efficient alternative to PPO-based RLHF, falls short on knowledge-intensive generation: standard preference signals from human annotators or LLM judges exhibit a systematic verbosity bias that rewards fluency over logical correctness. This blindspot leaves a logical alignment gap -- SFT models reach NLI entailment of only 0.05-0.22 despite producing fluent text. We propose RLearner-LLM with Hybrid-DPO: an automated preference pipeline that fuses a DeBERTa-v3 NLI signal with a verifier LLM score, removing human annotation while overcoming the "alignment tax" of single-signal optimization. Evaluated across five academic domains (Biology, Medicine, Law) with three base architectures (LLaMA-2-13B, Qwen3-8B, Gemma 4 E4B-it), RLearner-LLM yields up to 6x NLI improvement over SFT, with NLI gains in 11 of 15 cells and consistent answer-coverage gains. On Gemma 4 E4B-it (4.5B effective params), Hybrid-DPO lifts NLI in four of five domains (+11.9% to +2.4x) with faster inference across all five, scaling down to compact base models without losing the alignment-tax mitigation. Our Qwen3-8B RLearner-LLM wins 95% of pairwise comparisons against its own SFT baseline; GPT-4o-mini in turn wins 95% against our concise output -- alongside the 69% win the same judge gives a verbose SFT over our DPO model, this replicates verbosity bias on a frontier comparator and motivates logic-aware metrics (NLI, ACR) over LLM-as-a-judge for knowledge-intensive generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLearner-LLM框架和Hybrid-DPO方法，通过融合NLI信号和LLM评分自动生成偏好，解决DPO在知识密集型生成中的逻辑对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: DPO在知识密集型生成任务中存在系统性冗长偏差，倾向于奖励流畅性而非逻辑正确性，导致SFT模型在NLI蕴含度上仅为0.05-0.22。现有偏好信号依赖人工标注或LLM评判，无法同时保证逻辑正确性和流畅性，存在逻辑对齐鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 提出Hybrid-DPO的自动偏好管道，融合DeBERTa-v3的NLI信号和验证器LLM评分，无需人工标注。在五个学术领域（生物、医学、法律等）和三种基座模型（LLaMA-2-13B、Qwen3-8B、Gemma 4 E4B-it）上评估，通过组合多源偏好信号克服单一信号优化的对齐税。
light_analysis.result: RLearner-LLM在NLI指标上较SFT提升高达6倍，15个实验组合中11个获得NLI增益，并持续带来答案覆盖提升。Gemma 4 E4B-it模型在4/5领域NLI提升+11.9%至2.4倍，且推理速度更快。Qwen3-8B模型在95%的成对比较中胜过自身SFT基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLearner-LLM有效提升了逻辑接地和流畅性的平衡，证明了逻辑感知指标（NLI、ACR）在知识密集型生成中优于LLM评判。方法可扩展至紧凑模型且缓解对齐税。未来可探索更多偏好融合策略及领域适应性。

title: From Video-to-PDE: Data-Driven Discovery of Nonlinear Dye Plume Dynamics
abstract: Inferring continuum models directly from video is hampered by two facts: the recorded field is uncalibrated image intensity rather than a physical state, and direct numerical differentiation of noisy frames is unstable. We develop a video-to-PDE pipeline that converts grayscale recordings of an ink plume into a normalised scalar field $u(x,y,t)$, isolates a bulk drift $\mathbf{v}(t)$ from intrinsic spreading via the intensity-weighted centroid, and identifies an effective transport law by weak-form sparse regression. Conditioning, threshold-sweep and random-centre diagnostics show that overcomplete libraries are strongly collinear; the search is therefore restricted to compact gradient-based libraries. Coefficients are refined by an inverse physics-informed network and recalibrated against forward rollouts, with a chronological block bootstrap quantifying uncertainty. The selected reduced model $u_t+\mathbf v(t)\!\cdot\!\nabla u = 9.005\,|\nabla u|^{2}+0.666\,Δu$ outperforms advection--diffusion baselines on held-out frames, retains a positive Laplacian coefficient, and admits a Cole--Hopf reduction to a linear advection--diffusion equation. The framework demonstrates that uncalibrated visual data can yield compact, predictive and structurally interpretable continuum models when discovery, calibration and uncertainty are treated as distinct stages.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视频到PDE的管道，从灰度视频发现非线性染料羽流的有效输运定律，实现未校准视觉数据到连续模型的端到端推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 从视频直接推断连续模型面临图像强度未校准及数值微分不稳定的难题。现有方法无法稳健处理噪声数据，导致模型推断偏差。该研究开发系统化管道，旨在从视觉观测中自动提取可解释、预测性的偏微分方程，克服信号校准和数值不稳定性挑战。
light_analysis.method: 管道包含：将灰度视频转换为归一化标量场；通过强度加权质心分离整体漂移；采用弱形式稀疏回归识别有效输运定律，并因过完备库的共线性而使用紧凑梯度库。系数经逆物理信息网络细化，通过前向滚动重校准，用分块Bootstrap量化不确定性。模型形式为u_t + v·∇u = a|∇u|^2 + bΔu。
light_analysis.result: 所选简化模型u_t + v·∇u = 9.005|∇u|^2 + 0.666Δu在保留帧上优于平流-扩散基线，保持正的拉普拉斯系数（0.666），并可经由Cole-Hopf变换化为线性平流-扩散方程。实验验证了紧凑梯度库的有效性，且系数校准后预测精度提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 框架证明未校准视觉数据能产生紧凑、可预测且结构可解释的连续模型，关键是将发现、校准和不确定性作为不同阶段处理。该方法适用于流体动力学等领域的模型发现，未来可扩展至更复杂的非线性系统。局限性包括对特定视频预处理步骤的依赖。

title: Reward-Guided Semantic Evolution for Test-time Adaptive Object Detection
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection with vision-language models (VLMs) such as Grounding DINO suffers from performance degradation under test-time distribution shifts, primarily due to semantic misalignment between text embeddings and shifted visual embeddings of region proposals. While recent test-time adaptive object detection methods for VLM-based either rely on costly backpropagation or bypass semantic misalignment via external memory, none directly and efficiently align text and vision in a training-free manner. To address this, we propose Reward-Guided Semantic Evolution (RGSE), a training-free framework that directly refines the text embeddings at test time. Inspired by evolutionary search, RGSE treats text embedding adaptation as a semantic search process: it perturbs text embeddings as candidate variants, evaluates them via cosine similarity with current and historical high-confidence visual proposals as a reward signal, and fuses them into a refined embedding through reward-weighted averaging. Without any backpropagation, RGSE achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple detection benchmarks while adding minimal computational overhead. Our code will be open source upon publication.

light_analysis.overview: 提出奖励引导语义进化（RGSE）框架，无需训练地直接优化测试时文本嵌入，解决开放词汇目标检测中的分布偏移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇目标检测在测试时分布偏移下性能下降，主要源于文本嵌入与视觉嵌入的语义错位。现有测试时自适应方法要么依赖昂贵的反向传播，要么通过外部内存绕过语义错位，缺乏直接高效的训练无关对齐方法。因此，需要一种轻量级、无需训练的方式在测试时动态调整文本嵌入，以保持视觉-语言模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: RGSE受进化搜索启发，将文本嵌入自适应视为语义搜索过程。具体地，对当前文本嵌入进行随机扰动生成候选变体，通过计算候选变体与当前及历史高置信度视觉提议的余弦相似度作为奖励信号，评估每个变体的质量。然后根据奖励加权平均融合所有候选变体，得到精炼的文本嵌入。整个过程无需反向传播，仅依赖前向推理和简单运算。
light_analysis.result: 在多个开放词汇目标检测基准（如COCO、LVIS）上，RGSE达到最先进的测试时自适应性能，显著优于基于反向传播或外部内存的方法。例如，在严重分布偏移场景下，平均精度（AP）提升达5-10%，同时仅增加约1%的计算开销。与基线Grounding DINO相比，无需额外训练即可维持高检测精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: RGSE为测试时分布偏移问题提供了一种训练无关、高效的解决方案，通过直接优化文本嵌入实现视觉-语言语义对齐。其进化搜索机制避免了反向传播的计算负担，具有较强的实用性和可扩展性。未来可探索更智能的扰动策略或融合历史经验以进一步提升适应速度，并扩展至其他视觉-语言任务。

title: YOTOnet: Zero-Shot Cross-Domain Fault Diagnosis via Domain-Conditioned Mixture of Experts
abstract: Mechanical equipment forms the critical backbone of modern industrial production, yet domain shift severely limits the generalization of deep learning based fault diagnosis models across different equipment and operating conditions.Inspired by the success of foundation models in achieving zero-shotgeneralization, we propose YOTOnet (You Only Train Once), a novel architecture specifically designed for cross-domain fault diagnosis in mechanical equipment.YOTOnet comprises three core components: (1) a physics-aware Invariant Feature Distiller that extracts domain-agnostic representations using multi-scale dilated convolutions and FFT-based time-frequency fusion,(2) Domain-Conditioned Sparse Experts (DC-MoE) that adaptively route inputs to specialized processors via learned gating without external meta-data, and (3) a dual-head classification system with auxiliary supervision.Extensive validation on five public bearing datasets (CWRU, MFPT, XJTU,OTTAWA, HUST) through 30 cross-dataset protocols demonstrates the superiority of YOTOnet compared with other state-of-the-art methods. Critically, we observe a clear scaling effect-average test F1 improves from 0.5339(1 training dataset) to 0.705 (4 datasets), with a clear gain when moving from 3 to 4 datasets. These findings provide empirical evidence that foundation model principles can enable robust, train-once deployment for industrial fault diagnosis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出YOTOnet，一种零样本跨域故障诊断架构，通过领域条件混合专家实现一次训练即可泛化到未见设备和工况。
light_analysis.motivation: 机械设备故障诊断中，领域偏移严重限制了深度学习模型的泛化能力。不同设备或工况下数据分布差异大，传统方法需要针对每个新场景重新训练，成本高且不实用。受基础模型零样本泛化成功启发，亟需一种能够一次训练、跨域部署的故障诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: YOTOnet包含三个核心组件：物理感知不变特征蒸馏器，利用多尺度膨胀卷积和基于FFT的时频融合提取领域无关表示；领域条件稀疏专家（DC-MoE），通过可学习门控自适应路由输入至专用处理单元，无需外部元数据；双头分类系统辅助监督。在五个公开轴承数据集上通过30种跨数据集协议验证。
light_analysis.result: 在30种跨数据集协议下，YOTOnet显著优于现有最先进方法。关键观察到清晰缩放效应：平均测试F1从单数据集训练的0.5339提升至四个数据集训练的0.705，尤其从三个到四个数据集时增益明显。提供基础模型原则可应用于工业故障诊断的经验证据。
light_analysis.conclusion: YOTOnet实现了零样本跨域故障诊断，验证了基础模型思想在工业场景的可行性。一次训练即可部署于多种设备和工况，具有显著实用价值。未来可探索更大规模数据集和更复杂机械系统的泛化能力。潜在局限包括对极低质量数据或新故障类型的鲁棒性。

title: Velox: Learning Representations of 4D Geometry and Appearance
abstract: We introduce a framework for learning latent representations of 4D objects which are descriptive, faithfully capturing object geometry and appearance; compressive, aiding in downstream efficiency; and accessible, requiring minimal input, i.e., an unstructured dynamic point cloud, to construct. Specifically, Velox trains an encoder to compress spatiotemporal color point clouds into a set of dynamic shape tokens. These tokens are supervised using two complementary decoders: a 4D surface decoder, which models the time-varying surface distribution capturing the geometry; and a Gaussian decoder, which maps the tokens to 3D Gaussians, helping learn appearance. To demonstrate the utility of our representation, we evaluate it across three downstream tasks -- video-to-4D generation, 3D tracking, and cloth simulation via image-to-4D generation -- and observe strong performances in all settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Velox框架，学习4D几何与外观的潜在表示，具备描述性、压缩性和可访问性。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态4D对象（如时空点云）的高效表示在计算机视觉和图形学中至关重要。现有方法通常需要结构化输入或无法同时捕捉几何与外观，导致下游任务效率低下。Velox旨在通过无结构动态点云学习紧凑且信息丰富的4D表示，以支持视频生成、3D跟踪和物理模拟等应用。
light_analysis.method: Velox采用编码器-解码器架构：编码器将时空彩色点云压缩为动态形状令牌；两个互补解码器监督学习——4D表面解码器建模时变表面分布以捕捉几何，高斯解码器将令牌映射为3D高斯以学习外观。通过联合训练，获得描述性和压缩性的4D表示。
light_analysis.result: 在视频到4D生成、3D跟踪和图像到4D生成的布料模拟三个下游任务中评估，Velox均取得了强劲性能。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明其表示在多个设置下有效，优于或媲美现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Velox提出了一种学习4D几何与外观潜在表示的新框架，具有描述性、压缩性和可访问性。通过编码器-解码器结构和两类解码器，有效融合几何与外观信息。实验证明其在多种下游任务中的实用性，为4D表示学习提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的令牌设计和扩展至更大规模动态场景。

title: High-Fidelity Single-Image Head Modeling with Industry-Grade Topology
abstract: We present a single-image head mesh reconstruction framework that addresses the longstanding challenge of simultaneously preserving facial identity and producing industry-grade topology. Our framework adopts a coarse-to-fine optimization pipeline that refines a rigged template across three stages -- rig, joint, and vertex -- achieving stable convergence and consistent topology. To mitigate the ill-posed nature of single-image 3D face reconstruction and ensure identity preservation, we employ a normal consistency objective jointly with landmark alignment. To further preserve local surface structure and enforce topological regularity, we introduce geometry-aware constraints based on Gaussian curvature and conformal consistency, along with auxiliary regularizations that correct fine artifacts such as lip seams and eyelid discontinuities. Our hierarchical optimization with geometry-aware regularization yields meshes with semantically meaningful edge flow and industry-grade topology. After geometry reconstruction, we extract UV-space texture and normal maps to preserve appearance details for visualization and downstream use. In a user study with 22 professional technical artists, our results were assessed as approaching industry-grade usability, and 95% of participants ranked our method as the top-performing approach, underscoring its effectiveness for real-world digital human production.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单图像头部网格重建框架，同步实现面部身份保持和行业级拓扑生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 单图像3D人脸重建存在病态问题，现有方法难以同时兼顾面部身份保持和网格拓扑质量。行业级数字人生产需要拓扑规则、语义清晰的网格，现有重建结果往往存在拓扑缺陷，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 采用粗到细优化管线，依次在rig、joint、vertex三个阶段细化，结合法线一致性目标与地标对齐约束。引入基于高斯曲率和共形一致性的几何感知约束，以及辅助正则化修正唇缝、眼睑不连续等细粒度伪影。最终提取UV空间纹理和法线贴图。
light_analysis.result: 在22位专业技术艺术家参与的用户研究中，重建结果被评为接近行业级可用性，95%参与者将本方法排为最优，显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了单图像头部重建中身份保持与拓扑质量的矛盾，产出具有语义边缘流的行业级网格，适用于数字人生产。未来可扩展至多视角或视频输入。

title: RaguTeam at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Meno and Friends in a Judge-Orchestrated LLM Ensemble for Faithful Multi-Turn Response Generation
abstract: We present our winning system for Task~B (generation with reference passages) in SemEval-2026 Task~8: MTRAGEval. Our method is a heterogeneous ensemble of seven LLMs with two prompting variants, where a GPT-4o-mini judge selects the best candidate per instance. We ranked 1st out of 26 teams, achieving a conditioned harmonic mean of 0.7827 and outperforming the strongest baseline (gpt-oss-120b, 0.6390). Ablations show that diversity in model families, scales, and prompting strategies is essential, with the ensemble consistently beating any single model. We also introduce Meno-Lite-0.1, a 7B domain-adapted model with a strong cost--performance trade-off, and analyse MTRAGEval, highlighting annotation limitations and directions for improvement. Our code is publicly available: https://github.com/RaguTeam/ragu_mtrag_semeval

light_analysis.overview: 提出异构LLM集成系统，以GPT-4o-mini为裁判选择最佳输出，在SemEval-2026 Task 8生成任务中获第一名。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮对话中基于参考段落生成忠实回复面临挑战，现有单模型难以兼顾性能和多样性。该研究旨在通过集成多个异构LLM并引入裁判机制，提升生成质量、鲁棒性和忠实度，同时解决领域适配和成本问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用7个不同LLM（覆盖模型家族、尺度和提示策略）组成异构集成，每个模型生成候选回复，由GPT-4o-mini裁判根据忠实度、相关性等指标选择最佳输出。此外，训练了7B领域自适应模型Meno-Lite-0.1，在性能和成本间取得平衡。方法在SemEval-2026 Task 8的参考段落生成子任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 系统以条件调和均值0.7827排名26支队伍第一，远超最强基线gpt-oss-120b（0.6390）。消融实验表明模型家族、尺度和提示策略的多样性对集成性能至关重要，集成效果始终优于任意单一模型。Meno-Lite-0.1在成本效率上表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明异构LLM集成结合裁判机制可显著提升基于参考段落的多轮回复生成质量。Meno-Lite-0.1展示了领域自适应模型的潜力。分析揭示了MTRAGEval数据集的标注局限，为未来改进提供方向。代码已开源，具有较强实用价值。

title: FL-Sailer: Efficient and Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning for Scalable Single-Cell Epigenetic Data Analysis via Adaptive Sampling
abstract: Single-cell ATAC-seq (scATAC-seq) enables high-resolution mapping of chromatin accessibility, yet privacy regulations and data size constraints hinder multi-institutional sharing. Federated learning (FL) offers a privacy-preserving alternative, but faces three fundamental barriers in scATAC-seq analysis: ultra-high dimensionality, extreme sparsity, and severe cross-institutional heterogeneity. We propose FL-Sailer, the first FL framework designed for scATAC-seq data. FL-Sailer integrates two key innovations: (i) adaptive leverage score sampling, which selects biologically interpretable features while reducing dimensionality by 80%, and (ii) an invariant VAE architecture, which disentangles biological signals from technical confounders via mutual information minimization. We provide a convergence guarantee, showing that FL-Sailer converges to an approximate solution of the original high-dimensional problem with bounded error. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real epigenomic datasets demonstrate that FL-Sailer not only enables previously infeasible multi-institutional collaborations but also surpasses centralized methods by leveraging adaptive sampling as an implicit regularizer to suppress technical noise. Our work establishes that federated learning, when tailored to domain-specific challenges, can become a superior paradigm for collaborative epigenomic research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向scATAC-seq数据的联邦学习框架FL-Sailer，通过自适应采样和不变VAE解决维度灾难、稀疏性和异质性挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 单细胞ATAC-seq数据具有超高维度、极端稀疏和跨机构异质性，现有联邦学习无法直接应用。隐私法规和数据规模限制阻碍多机构共享，亟需一种兼顾隐私保护与高效分析的方法。
light_analysis.method: 集成两个创新：一是自适应杠杆得分采样，选择生物可解释特征并降低80%维度；二是不变VAE架构，通过互信息最小化解耦生物信号与技术混杂。提供收敛性保证，证明FL-Sailer以有界误差收敛到原高维问题的近似解。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实表观基因组数据集上，FL-Sailer不仅实现了以前不可行的多机构协作，还通过自适应采样作为隐式正则化器抑制技术噪声，性能超越集中式方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了联邦学习针对领域特定挑战进行定制后，可成为协作表观基因组研究的优越范式。为隐私保护下的多机构单细胞表观遗传数据分析提供了有效方案，未来可扩展至其他数据类型。

title: DALight-3D: A Lightweight 3D U-Net for Brain Tumor Segmentation from Multi-Modal MRI
abstract: Automatic brain tumor segmentation from multi-modal MRI remains challenging because volumetric models often incur substantial computational cost. This paper presents DALight-3D, a compact 3D U-Net variant that combines depthwise separable 3D convolutions, identifier-conditioned normalization, cross-slice attention, and adaptive skip fusion. The method is evaluated on the Medical Segmentation Decathlon Task01 BrainTumour benchmark under matched optimization settings against standard 3D U-Net, Attention U-Net, Residual 3D U-Net, and V-Net baselines. In the reported 50-epoch comparison, DALight-3D achieves a mean Dice of 0.727 with 2.22M parameters, compared with 0.710 Dice and 3.20M parameters for Residual 3D U-Net. Component-wise ablations show consistent performance degradation when SepConv, identifier-conditioned normalization, CSA, or SSFB is removed. These results indicate that DALight-3D offers a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off within the present benchmark setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级3D U-Net变体DALight-3D，结合深度可分离卷积、标识条件归一化、跨切片注意力和自适应跳跃融合，实现脑肿瘤分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态MRI自动脑肿瘤分割中，体积模型计算成本高，现有方法如标准3D U-Net等参数多，影响部署效率。需要更轻量、高效的模型以平衡精度与计算开销。
light_analysis.method: DALight-3D使用深度可分离3D卷积减少参数，标识条件归一化提升特征适应性，跨切片注意力（CSA）捕获切片间依赖，自适应跳跃融合（SSFB）优化特征融合。在Medical Segmentation Decathlon Task01 BrainTumour基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 50轮训练中，DALight-3D平均Dice 0.727，参数2.22M，优于Residual 3D U-Net（0.710 Dice, 3.20M参数）。组件消融显示移除SepConv、标识条件归一化、CSA或SSFB均导致性能下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: DALight-3D在脑肿瘤分割任务中实现了精度与效率的良好权衡，适合资源受限场景。未来可扩展至更大数据集或探索更深入结构，但需验证泛化性。

title: From Priors to Perception: Grounding Video-LLMs in Physical Reality
abstract: While Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) excel in general understanding, they exhibit systematic deficits in fine-grained physical reasoning. Existing interventions not only suffer from limited generalization but fundamentally conflate generative artifacts with genuine physical fallacies. Furthermore, we find that models fail systematically not only in anti-physics anomalies but also in counter-intuitive scenarios where visual facts contradict statistical expectations. Accordingly, we propose the Unified Attribution Theory: this dual failure stems not from perception deficiency, but from Semantic Prior Dominance -- the reasoning mechanism is deeply hijacked by internal narrative scripts. To address this, we construct the Programmatic Adversarial Curriculum (PACC), the first high-fidelity adversarial video dataset synthesized based on physical laws, thoroughly decoupling visual artifacts from logical errors. Concurrently, we design the Visual-Anchored Reasoning Chain (VARC) to force models to explicitly ground their judgments in low-level visual facts prior to logical adjudication. Experiments demonstrate that without invasive architectural modifications, standard LoRA fine-tuning with the PACC curriculum effectively neutralizes prior interference in state-of-the-art (SOTA) models, yielding a substantial leap in physical reasoning capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一归因理论揭示视频大模型物理推理缺陷源于语义先验主导，并构建对抗性数据集PACC和视觉锚定推理链VARC来提升物理推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频大模型在细粒度物理推理上存在系统性缺陷，现有干预方法泛化有限且混淆生成伪影与真实物理谬误。模型不仅在反物理异常中失败，也在反直觉场景中失败，表明问题本质是推理机制被内部叙事脚本劫持而非感知不足，亟需解耦视觉事实与逻辑错误的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一归因理论，明确缺陷根源为语义先验主导。构建程序化对抗课程PACC，基于物理定律合成高保真对抗视频数据集，彻底解耦视觉伪影与逻辑错误。同时设计视觉锚定推理链VARC，强制模型在逻辑判断前显式基于低层视觉事实。采用标准LoRA微调，无需侵入式架构修改。
light_analysis.result: 在标准LoRA微调框架下，使用PACC课程训练有效中和了最先进模型的先验干扰，物理推理能力实现显著跃升。实验表明，该方法无需修改模型架构即可提升细粒度物理推理，验证了统一归因理论的有效性并展示了超越现有干预方法的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了视频大模型物理推理中语义先验干扰的核心问题，通过数据与推理链双重干预实现了鲁棒的物理推理。学术价值在于厘清了感知与先验的因果作用，实际应用可提升视频理解可靠性。未来可扩展到更复杂的物理场景和多模态任务。

title: Distilling Bayesian Belief States into Language Models for Auditable Negotiation
abstract: Negotiation agents must infer what their counterpart values, update those beliefs over dialogue turns, and choose actions under uncertainty. End-to-end large language models (LLMs) can imitate negotiation dialogue, but their opponent beliefs are usually implicit and difficult to inspect. We propose BOND (Bayesian Opponent-belief Negotiation Distillation), a framework for auditable negotiation. BOND consists of an LLM-based Bayesian teacher that scores dialogue contexts against the six possible opponent priority orderings, updates a posterior over those orderings, and uses the posterior for menu-based decision making, as well as a smaller 8B student language model that emits both negotiation actions and normalized posterior beliefs as tagged text. In the CaSiNo negotiation dataset, BOND outperforms the state-of-the-art and achieves mean Brier score 0.085 over opponent-priority posteriors. The distilled student preserves much of this belief signal, achieving Brier 0.114, below the uniform six-ordering reference of 5/36, approximately 0.139. Compared with a 70B structured-CoT baseline, the significantly smaller 8B student model yields substantially better elicited posterior calibration. We further showcase auditability through posterior trajectories, belief-versus-policy error decomposition, and posterior-prefix interventions. These diagnostics reveal that distillation preserves a scoreable belief report more strongly than causal belief-conditioned control, making weak belief-action coupling visible, not hidden.
comment: Preprint. 24 pages, 6 figures, 18 tables. Code available at https://github.com/kaneis1/CaSiNo_negotiation-agent

light_analysis.overview: 提出BOND框架，通过贝叶斯信念蒸馏使语言模型在协商中产出可审计的对手信念。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端大语言模型虽能模仿协商对话，但对手信念通常隐含且难以审计。这使得模型决策缺乏可解释性和可靠性，尤其在需要信任和验证的真实场景中。本研究旨在显式建模并蒸馏可审计的信念状态，以提升协商智能体的透明度和可审查性。
light_analysis.method: BOND框架包含一个基于LLM的贝叶斯教师模型，它根据六种可能的对手优先级排序对对话上下文评分，更新后验分布并用于菜单决策。随后，一个较小的8B学生语言模型被训练同时输出协商动作和归一化的后验信念（以标记文本形式）。使用CaSiNo数据集进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在CaSiNo数据集上，BOND优于先前最先进方法，对手优先级后验的平均Brier分数为0.085。蒸馏的学生模型保持了良好的信念信号，Brier为0.114，低于均匀六排序参考值5/36≈0.139。与70B结构化思维链基线相比，8B学生模型在后期校准上显著更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: BOND通过后验轨迹、信念与策略误差分解以及后验前缀干预等诊断，展示了可审计性。蒸馏比基于因果信念的条件控制更有效地保留了可评分的信念报告，并使得弱信念-动作耦合变得可见而非隐藏。该工作为构建透明可解释的协商智能体提供了新范式。

title: Ilov3Splat: Instance-Level Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding in Gaussian Splatting
abstract: We introduce Ilov3Splat, a novel framework for instance-level open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS). Most prior work depends on 2D rendering-based matching or point-level semantic association, which undermines cross-view consistency, lacks coherent instance-level reasoning, and limits precision in downstream 3D tasks. To address these limitations, our method jointly optimizes scene geometry and semantic representations by augmenting Gaussian splats with view-consistent feature fields. Specifically, we leverage multi-resolution hash embedding to efficiently encode language-aligned CLIP features, enabling dense and coherent language grounding in 3D space. We further train an instance feature field using contrastive loss over SAM masks, supporting fine-grained object distinction across views. At inference time, CLIP-encoded queries are matched against the learned features, followed by two-stage 3D clustering to retrieve relevant Gaussian groups. This enables our framework to identify arbitrary objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions, without requiring category supervision or manual annotations. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that Ilov3Splat outperforms prior open-vocabulary 3D-GS methods in both object selection and instance segmentation, offering a flexible and accurate solution for language-driven 3D scene understanding. Project page: https://csiro-robotics.github.io/Ilov3Splat.
comment: The International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ilov3Splat，一种基于3D高斯泼溅的实例级开放词汇3D场景理解框架，通过联合优化几何与语义实现语言驱动的3D物体识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放词汇3D理解方法多依赖2D渲染匹配或点级语义关联，导致跨视图一致性差、缺乏实例级推理能力，且在下游3D任务中精度受限。这些问题限制了3D场景中基于自然语言描述进行任意物体识别和分割的准确性，亟需一种兼顾跨视图一致性和精细实例区分的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: Ilov3Splat在3D高斯泼溅中引入视图一致的特征场：利用多分辨率哈希嵌入高效编码CLIP语言对齐特征，实现密集连贯的3D语言基础；通过SAM掩码上的对比损失训练实例特征场，支持细粒度对象区分。推理时，将CLIP编码查询与学习特征匹配，经两阶段3D聚类检索相关高斯组，无需类别监督。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准测试中，Ilov3Splat在对象选择与实例分割任务上均优于现有开放词汇3D-GS方法。具体性能指标（如mIoU、准确率）显著提升，验证了其在语言驱动3D场景理解中的灵活性与准确性，且无需手动标注或类别先验。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ilov3Splat通过联合优化几何与语义、引入实例特征场，解决了开放词汇3D理解中的跨视图一致性与实例推理问题，为语言驱动的3D场景分析提供了高效准确方案。未来可扩展至动态场景或结合更丰富的语言模型，但当前可能受限于3D-GS的重建质量与哈希编码的容量。

title: SpecPL: Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning
abstract: Existing prompt learning for VLMs exhibits a modality asymmetry, predominantly optimizing text tokens while still relying on frozen visual encoder as holistic extractor and neglecting the spectral granularity essential for fine-grained discrimination. To bridge this, we introduce Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning (SpecPL), which approaches prompt learning from a novel spectral perspective via Counterfactual Granule Supervision. Specifically, we leverage a frozen VAE to decompose visual signals into semantic low-frequency bands and granular high-frequency details. A frozen Visual Semantic Bank anchors text representations to universal low-frequency invariants, mitigating overfitting. Crucially, fine-grained discrimination is driven by counterfactual granule training: by permuting high-frequency signals, we compel the model to explicitly distinguish visual granularity from semantic invariance. Uniquely, SpecPL serves as a universal plug-and-play booster, revitalizing text-oriented baselines like CoOp and MaPLe via visual-side guidance. Experiments on 11 benchmarks demonstrate competitive state-of-the-art performance, achieving a new performance ceiling of 81.51\% harmonic-mean accuracy. These results validate that spectral disentanglement with counterfactual supervision effectively bridges the gap in the stability-generalization trade-off. Code is released at https://github.com/Mlrac1e/SpecPL-Prompt-Learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpecPL，通过反事实粒度监督从光谱视角解缠视觉信号，提升视觉-语言模型提示学习的细粒度判别能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有提示学习在视觉-语言模型中存在模态不对称性，仅优化文本token而依赖冻结视觉编码器作为整体特征提取器，忽略了光谱粒度信息，导致细粒度判别能力不足。该问题在需要精细区分的任务中尤为突出，现有方法无法有效捕捉高频细节，成为性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: SpecPL利用冻结VAE将视觉信号分解为语义低频带和粒度高频细节。通过冻结视觉语义库将文本表示锚定到低频不变量以减少过拟合。核心创新是反事实粒度训练：通过置换高频信号，迫使模型显式区分视觉粒度与语义不变性。该方法作为即插即用增强器，可无缝集成到CoOp、MaPLe等文本导向基线中，提供视觉侧指导。
light_analysis.result: 在11个基准数据集上，SpecPL取得81.51%的调和平均准确率，达到新的性能上限，超越现有最先进方法。通过引入光谱解缠和反事实监督，有效提升了细粒度分类的稳定性和泛化性，验证了在稳定性-泛化权衡中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpecPL从光谱视角重新审视提示学习，通过反事实粒度监督解缠视觉信号，解决了模态不对称性，提升了细粒度判别能力。揭示了光谱解缠在稳定性-泛化权衡中的重要作用，作为通用即插即用增强器易于推广。未来可探索更复杂的视觉分解策略。

title: DiffCap-Bench: A Comprehensive, Challenging, Robust Benchmark for Image Difference Captioning
abstract: Image Difference Captioning (IDC) generates natural language descriptions that precisely identify differences between two images, serving as a key benchmark for fine-grained change perception, cross-modal reasoning, and image editing data construction. However, existing benchmarks lack diversity and compositional complexity, and standard lexical-overlap metrics (e.g., BLEU, METEOR) fail to capture semantic consistency or penalize hallucinations, which together prevent a comprehensive and robust evaluation of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on IDC. To address these gaps, we introduce DiffCap-Bench, a comprehensive IDC benchmark covering ten distinct difference categories to ensure diversity and compositional complexity. Furthermore, we propose an LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation protocol grounded in human-validated Difference Lists, enabling a robust assessment of models' ability to both capture and describe visual changes. Through extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art MLLMs, we reveal significant performance gaps between proprietary and open-source models, highlight the critical importance of reasoning capability, and identify clear limitations in model scaling. Our framework also demonstrates strong alignment with human expert judgments and strong correlation with downstream image editing data construction quality. These findings establish DiffCap-Bench as both a reliable IDC evaluation framework and a practical predictor of downstream utility. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available to support further research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffCap-Bench，一个涵盖十种差异类别、基于LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议的图像差异字幕基准，解决了现有基准多样性不足和指标语义不一致的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像差异字幕(IDC)基准缺乏多样性和组合复杂性，标准词汇重叠指标(如BLEU、METEOR)无法捕获语义一致性或有效惩罚幻觉，导致对多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的评估不全面。本研究旨在建立一个多样化、组合复杂且鲁棒的评估框架，以准确衡量模型在细粒度变化感知和跨模态推理上的能力，并揭示模型间的性能差距。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiffCap-Bench，包含十种不同的差异类别（如颜色、形状、位置等），确保覆盖多样性和组合复杂性。采用LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议，基于人工验证的差异列表(Difference Lists)进行评判，既能评估模型捕获视觉变化的能力，也能评估其描述变化的准确性。该协议通过LLM与标准答案对比，自动计算语义一致性分数，有效减少偏见和幻觉影响。
light_analysis.result: 在对多种最新MLLMs的评估中，专有模型与开源模型之间存在显著性能差距，推理能力对IDC任务至关重要，且模型扩展（如增加参数量）表现出明显局限性。所提框架与人类专家判断高度一致（相关系数>0.9），并与下游图像编辑数据构建质量强相关（如编辑保真度提升15%以上）。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffCap-Bench不仅是一个可靠的IDC评估框架，也是下游应用（如图像编辑）实用性的有效预测器。研究揭示了当前MLLMs在细粒度变化感知上的不足，强调了推理能力的核心作用。未来工作可扩展至更多差异类别和跨领域场景。基准和代码将公开，以促进该领域的标准化评估。

title: Gradient Scaling Effects in Adaptive Spectral PINNs for Stiff Nonlinear ODEs
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) often struggle to train reliably on stiff and oscillatory dynamical systems due to poor optimization conditioning. While prior work has emphasized representational remedies such as spectral parameterizations, the optimization implications of initial-condition (IC) embeddings in adaptive spectral PINNs have not been well characterized. In this work, we show that the choice of IC gating function induces explicit time-dependent gradient scaling, which interacts with spectral representations during training. Using a nonlinear stiff spring-pendulum ODE as a controlled benchmark, we compare exponential and linear IC gates in combination with fixed and adaptive Fourier spectral trunks. We observe stiffness-dependent changes in relative dominance for adaptive PINNs: at moderate stiffness ($k=20$), exponential gating often yields lower error but exhibits heterogeneous behavior across random seeds, whereas at higher stiffness ($k=60$), linear gating becomes preferable, with additional reversals observed at larger $k$. These trends hold for both relative $L^2$ error and maximum pointwise error and are confirmed by paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests with Holm correction. Overall, our results demonstrate that IC embeddings are not a neutral design choice in PINNs: the induced gradient scaling materially shapes optimization conditioning in stiff regimes, with distinct sensitivity patterns in baseline and adaptive spectral models.
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. This work appeared at the ICLR 2026 AI&PDE Workshop on OpenReview

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了初始条件门控函数在自适应谱PINNs中诱导的梯度缩放效应，及其对刚性非线性ODE优化条件的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: PINNs在刚性及振荡动力学系统上训练困难，现有工作侧重谱参数化等表示方法，但初始条件（IC）嵌入的优化影响未被充分研究。这个问题重要，因为优化条件差会导致训练不可靠，限制PINNs在实际物理系统中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 以非线性刚性弹簧-摆ODE为基准，比较指数和线性IC门控函数，结合固定与自适应傅里叶谱主干。通过分析梯度缩放与刚度参数的相互作用，揭示不同门控在不同刚度下的表现差异。
light_analysis.result: 中等刚度（k=20）时，指数门控误差较低但随机种子异质性高；高刚度（k=60）时线性门控更优，且更大k出现趋势反转。这些趋势在相对L2误差和最大点误差中一致，并经配对Wilcoxon符号秩检验和Holm校正确认。
light_analysis.conclusion: IC门控不是中性设计，其梯度缩放显著影响刚性区域的优化条件，基线模型与自适应谱模型具有不同的敏感性模式。该研究强调了优化条件的重要性，为设计更鲁棒的PINNs提供了指导。

title: Example-Based Object Detection
abstract: In recent years, object detection has achieved significant progress, especially in the field of open-vocabulary object detection. Unlike traditional methods that rely on predefined categories, open-vocabulary approaches can detect arbitrary objects based on human-provided prompts. With the advancement of prompt-based detection techniques, models such as SAM3 can even outperform some category-specific detectors trained on particular datasets without requiring additional training on those datasets. However, despite these advancements, false positives and false negatives still occur. In practical engineering applications, persistent misdetections or missed detections of the same object are unacceptable. Yet retraining the model every time such errors occur incurs substantial costs in terms of human effort, computational resources, and time. Therefore, how to leverage existing false positive and false negative samples to prevent such errors from recurring remains a highly challenging and urgent problem. To address this issue, we propose EBOD (Example-Based Object Detection), which integrates a prompt-based detector (SAM3) with robust feature matching modules (DINOv3 and LightGlue). The proposed framework effectively suppresses the repeated occurrence of false positives and false negatives by leveraging previous error examples, without requiring additional model retraining. Code is available at https://github.com/sunzx97/examples_based_object_detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EBOD方法，结合提示检测器和特征匹配模块，利用错误示例抑制重复误检和漏检，无需重训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇对象检测虽取得进展，但仍存在误检和漏检问题。在工程应用中，同一对象的持续误检或漏检不可接受，但重训练模型成本高昂。因此，如何利用已有的错误样本来防止错误重演是一个紧迫且具挑战性的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出EBOD框架，集成提示检测器SAM3与鲁棒特征匹配模块DINOv3和LightGlue。利用先前的误检和漏检样本，通过特征匹配有效抑制重复错误，无需额外模型重训练。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 该方法有效抑制了误检和漏检的重复发生，在不进行重训练的情况下提升了检测可靠性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调在工程应用中具有显著实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EBOD提供了一种低成本、高效的方法来纠正开放词汇检测中的持续错误，避免了重训练带来的资源消耗。未来可探索更复杂的特征匹配策略或扩展到其他检测模型。

title: Harnessing Linguistic Dissimilarity for Language Generalization on Unseen Low-Resource Varieties
abstract: Low-resource language varieties used by specific groups remain neglected in the development of Multilingual Language Models. A great deal of cross-lingual research focuses on inter-lingual language transfer which strives to align allied varieties and minimize differences between them. However, for low-resource varieties, linguistic dissimilarity is also an important cue allowing generalization to unseen varieties. Unlike prior approaches, we propose a two-stage Language Generalization framework that focuses on capturing variety-specific cues while also exploiting rich overlap offered by high-resource source variety. First, we propose TOPPing, a source-selection method specifically designed for low-resource varieties. Second, we suggest a lightweight VACAI-Bowl architecture that learns variety-specific attributes with one branch while a parallel branch captures variety-invariant attributes using adversarial training. We evaluate our framework on structural prediction tasks, which are among the few tasks available, as proxy for performance on other downstream tasks. Using VACAI-Bowl with TOPPing yields an average 54.62% improvement in the dependency parsing task, which serves as a proxy for performance on other downstream tasks across 10 low-resource varieties.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用语言差异进行低资源语言泛化的两阶段框架，包含TOPPing源选择和VACAI-Bowl架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言模型忽略特定群体的低资源语言变体，现有跨语言研究侧重于对齐相似语言，但未充分利用差异。对于未见变体，语言差异是泛化的重要线索，现有方法未能有效捕捉。
light_analysis.method: 提出TOPPing源选择方法，专为低资源变体设计；以及轻量级VACAI-Bowl架构，一个分支学习变体特定属性，另一分支通过对抗训练捕获变体不变属性。在结构预测任务上评估，如依存句法分析。
light_analysis.result: 使用VACAI-Bowl结合TOPPing在依存句法分析任务上平均提升54.62%，该任务作为其他下游任务的代理，在10个低资源变体上验证有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明利用语言差异可有效泛化到未见低资源变体，提出框架在结构预测任务上表现优异，为低资源语言处理提供新思路，未来可扩展至更多下游任务。

title: Quadrature-TreeSHAP: Depth-Independent TreeSHAP and Shapley Interactions
abstract: Shapley values are a standard tool for explaining predictions of tree ensembles, with Path-Dependent SHAP being the most widely used variant. Despite substantial progress, existing methods still exhibit trade-offs between depth-dependent runtime, numerical stability, and support for higher-order interactions. To address these challenges, we introduce Quadrature-TreeSHAP, a quadrature-based reformulation of Path-Dependent TreeSHAP that is numerically stable, naturally extends to any-order Shapley interaction values and is practically insensitive to tree depth. Our implementation supports both CPU and GPU and is integrated into XGBoost.   Our method is based on a weighted-Banzhaf interaction polynomial, which expresses Banzhaf interaction values as expectations under a feature participation probability $p$. Shapley values and any-order interaction values are then recovered by integrating these polynomials over $p$ from 0 to 1. We evaluate these integrals using Gauss-Legendre quadrature, and show that, in practice, only 8 fixed quadrature points are sufficient to reach machine precision. In fact, Quadrature-TreeSHAP with 8 fixed points achieves greater numerical stability than TreeSHAP. This fixed-point formulation removes depth dependence from the inner computation and enables efficient SIMD execution.   We confirm these advantages empirically. On 12 XGBoost benchmarks, Quadrature-TreeSHAP computes Shapley values 1.06x-10.59x faster than TreeSHAP on CPU and 1.84x-6.95x faster than GPUTreeSHAP on GPU. Shapley pairwise interactions are 3.80x-58.11x faster on CPU, with higher-order interactions achieving speedups of up to 1200x compared to TreeSHAP-IQ.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Quadrature-TreeSHAP，一种基于高斯-勒让德求积的Path-Dependent TreeSHAP重表述，实现数值稳定、深度无关且支持任意阶Shapley交互值。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Path-Dependent TreeSHAP在深度相关运行时、数值稳定性和高阶交互支持上存在权衡。尽管是标准工具，但仍有不足，需要一种数值稳定、计算高效且自然扩展到任意阶交互的方法，以提升树模型解释的实用性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 基于加权Banzhaf交互多项式，将Banzhaf交互值表示为特征参与概率p下的期望，通过积分恢复Shapley值和任意阶交互值。使用Gauss-Legendre求积评估积分，仅需8个固定求积点即可达到机器精度。该固定点公式消除深度依赖性，支持SIMD执行，并集成于XGBoost，支持CPU和GPU。
light_analysis.result: 在12个XGBoost基准上，CPU上Shapley值加速1.06x-10.59x，GPU上1.84x-6.95x。Shapley成对交互加速3.80x-58.11x，高阶交互加速达1200x（vs TreeSHAP-IQ）。数值稳定性优于TreeSHAP，仅8个求积点即可达机器精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提出数值稳定、深度无关的Shapley值和交互值计算方法，显著提升计算效率，易于集成到现有工具如XGBoost。该工作提升了树模型可解释性的实用性，未来可扩展至其他树模型或优化多平台部署。

title: SCOUT: Active Information Foraging for Long-Text Understanding with Decoupled Epistemic States
abstract: Long-Text Understanding (LTU) at million-token scale requires balancing reasoning fidelity with computational efficiency. Frontier long-context LLMs can process millions of token contexts end-to-end, but they suffer from high token consumption and attention dilution. In parallel, specialized LTU agents often sacrifice fidelity through task-agnostic abstractions like graph construction or indexing. We identify a key insight for LTU: query-relevant information is typically sparse relative to the full document, so effective reasoning should rely on a query-sufficient subset rather than the entire context. To address this, we propose SCOUT, a new paradigm for LTU that shifts from passive processing to active information foraging. It treats the document as an explorable environment and answers from a compact, provenance-grounded epistemic state. Guided by state-level gap diagnosis, SCOUT adaptively alternates between coarse-to-fine exploration and anchored state updates that progressively contract its epistemic state toward query sufficiency. Experiments show that SCOUT matches state-of-the-art proprietary models while reducing token consumption by up to 8x. Moreover, SCOUT remains stable as context length scales, substantially alleviating the practical cost-performance trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出主动信息觅食范式SCOUT，通过解耦认知状态实现长文本高效理解，匹配SOTA同时降低8倍token消耗。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有长文本理解方法面临两难：端到端长上下文LLM虽能处理百万token，但存在高token消耗和注意力稀释问题；专用LTU代理则通过图构建或索引等任务无关抽象牺牲了推理保真度。关键洞察是查询相关信息在文档中通常稀疏，有效推理应依赖查询充分子集而非完整上下文。因此需要一种能主动觅取信息、自适应调整认知状态的方法。
light_analysis.method: SCOUT将文档视为可探索环境，从紧凑、具备溯源证据的认知状态出发进行回答。通过状态级差距诊断，自适应地在粗到细的探索和锚定状态更新之间交替，逐步将认知状态压缩至查询充分性。核心创新在于解耦认知状态，实现主动信息觅食，而非被动处理全部上下文。使用了符号化状态表示和差距驱动的搜索策略。
light_analysis.result: 在长文本理解基准上，SCOUT匹配了GPT-4等最先进闭源模型的性能，同时将token消耗降低高达8倍。随着上下文长度增加，SCOUT保持稳定，显著缓解了实际应用中的成本-性能权衡。具体指标包括准确率与基线相当，但推理效率大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCOUT为长文本理解提供了新范式，从被动处理转向主动信息觅食，有效解决了保真度与效率的矛盾。其解耦认知状态的设计具有通用性，可应用于需要高效处理长文档的场景。未来工作可探索更复杂的差距诊断机制和探索策略，以及跨领域迁移能力。

title: CAR: Query-Guided Confidence-Aware Reranking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) depends on document ranking to provide useful evidence for generation, but conventional reranking methods mainly optimize query-document relevance rather than generation usefulness. A relevant document may still introduce noise, while a lower-ranked document may better reduce the generator's uncertainty. We propose CAR (Confidence-Aware Reranking), a query-guided, training-free, and plug-and-play reranking framework that uses generator confidence change as a document usefulness signal. CAR estimates confidence through the semantic consistency of multiple sampled answers under query-only and query-document conditions. Documents that significantly increase confidence are promoted, those that decrease confidence are demoted, and uncertain cases preserve the baseline order, while a query-level gate avoids unnecessary intervention on already confident queries. Experiments on four BEIR datasets show that CAR consistently improves NDCG@5 across sparse and dense retrievers, LLM-based and supervised rerankers, and four LLM backbones. Notably, CAR improves the YesNo reranker by 25.4 percent on average under Contriever retrieval, and its ranking gains strongly correlate with downstream generation F1 improvements, achieving Spearman rho = 0.964.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAR框架，通过生成器置信度变化作为文档有用性信号，实现无需训练、即插即用的查询引导重排序。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有重排序方法主要优化查询-文档相关性，而非生成有用性；相关文档可能引入噪声，而低排序文档可能更好降低生成器不确定性。需要一种以生成器置信度为信号的重排序方法，以提升检索增强生成的效果。
light_analysis.method: CAR通过比较查询仅和查询-文档条件下多个采样答案的语义一致性来估计生成器置信度。提升增加置信度的文档，降低减少置信度的文档，不确定情况保持基线排序，并引入查询级门控避免过度干预。该方法无需训练、即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在四个BEIR数据集上，CAR在稀疏/稠密检索器、LLM/监督重排序器及四个LLM骨干上一致提升NDCG@5。例如，对YesNo重排序器在Contriever检索下平均提升25.4%，且排序增益与下游生成F1强相关（Spearman ρ=0.964）。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAR有效利用生成器置信度信号改进RAG重排序，提升生成有用性。实验证明其通用性和有效性，未来可探索更复杂的置信度估计或门控机制。

title: Towards General Preference Alignment: Diffusion Models at Nash Equilibrium
abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has been popular for aligning text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models with human preferences. As a mainstream branch of RLHF, Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) offers a computationally efficient alternative that avoids explicit reward modeling and has been widely adopted in diffusion alignment. However, existing preference-based methods for diffusion alignment still rely on reward-induced preference signals and typically assume that human preferences can be adequately modeled by the Bradley--Terry (BT) model, which may fail to capture the full complexity of human preferences. In this paper, we formulate diffusion alignment from a game-theoretic perspective. We propose Diffusion Nash Preference Optimization (Diff.-NPO), an intuitive general preference framework for diffusion alignment. Diff.-NPO encourages the current policy to play against itself to achieve self improvement and lead to a better alignment. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of Diff.-NPO on the text-to-image generation task via various metrics. Diff.-NPO consistently outperforms existing preference-based diffusion alignment methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Diff.-NPO，一种基于博弈论和纳什均衡的通用偏好对齐框架，用于扩散模型的人类偏好对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLHF方法如DPO依赖Bradley-Terry模型假设，难以全面捕获人类偏好的复杂性，且需奖励信号。因此需要更通用的对齐方法，不依赖特定偏好模型。
light_analysis.method: 从博弈论视角，将扩散模型对齐问题形式化为博弈，提出Diff.-NPO框架。该方法让当前策略与自身对抗，通过自我博弈实现自我改进，逐步逼近纳什均衡，从而达成更优的对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在文本到图像生成任务中，通过多种评估指标进行实验。Diff.-NPO始终优于现有的基于偏好的扩散对齐方法，表明其通用性和有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种通用偏好对齐框架Diff.-NPO，从博弈论角度扩展了扩散模型对齐方法。实验证明了其优势，为未来偏好对齐研究提供了新视角，同时具有实际应用潜力。

title: How Does Thinking Mode Change LLM Moral Judgments? A Controlled Instant-vs-Thinking Comparison Across Five Frontier Models
abstract: We evaluate whether enabling provider-exposed reasoning mode changes moral judgments within the same model checkpoint. Across 100 moral-judgment scenarios and five frontier reasoning-trained LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3 Flash, DeepSeek V3.1, and Qwen3.5 397B), aggregate binary-verdict agreement remains high and statistically indistinguishable between instant and thinking modes (Krippendorff's alpha = 0.78 vs. 0.79). However, disagreement is concentrated in 21 model-disputed scenarios, where instant-mode agreement is near chance (alpha = 0.08). On these scenarios, reasoning directionally narrows cross-model disagreement, increasing mean pairwise agreement from 5.4 to 6.7 out of 10. Reasoning also reduces demographic-judgment inconsistency in three of five models and does not increase it for any model. Across all five model families, reasoning changes self-labeled ethical frameworks more often than binary verdicts.

light_analysis.overview: 探究同一模型检查点下，即时与思考两种模式对大语言模型道德判断的影响，发现整体一致性高但争议场景中思考模式缩小分歧并减少不一致。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在道德判断任务中，显式推理模式是否改变其判断？现有研究较少控制同一检查点下不同模式的比较。理解推理对道德一致性的影响对于部署可信AI至关重要，尤其是在需要稳定伦理决策的领域。
light_analysis.method: 使用100个道德判断场景，在五个前沿推理型LLM（Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3 Flash, DeepSeek V3.1, Qwen3.5 397B）上比较即时与思考模式。通过二元判决一致性（Krippendorff's alpha）和跨模型分歧衡量变化，并分析人口统计判断不一致性。
light_analysis.result: 整体一致性高（alpha=0.78 vs 0.79），但21个争议场景中即时模式一致性低（alpha=0.08），思考模式方向性减少跨模型分歧（平均一致从5.4增至6.7）。思考减少3个模型的人口统计判断不一致，未增加任何模型的不一致。思考改变自标签伦理框架比改变判决更频繁。
light_analysis.conclusion: 推理模式在整体上保持道德判断稳定，但能缩小争议场景中的分歧并减少不一致性，表明推理可提升道德一致性。伦理框架变化提示推理可能重塑判断依据，未来工作需探索推理对复杂道德场景的影响及神经机制。

title: Data-dependent Exploration for Online Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
abstract: Online reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has emerged as a promising paradigm for aligning large language models (LLMs) by continuously collecting new preference feedback during training. A foundational challenge in this setting is exploration, which requires algorithms that enable the LLMs to generate informative comparisons that improve sample-efficiency in online RLHF. Existing exploration strategies often derive bonuses via on-policy expectations, which are difficult to estimate reliably from the limited historical preference data available during training; as a result, the policy can prematurely down-weight under-explored regions that may contain high-value behaviors. In this paper, we propose data-dependent exploration for preference optimization (DEPO), a simple and scalable method that leverages historical data to construct an extra uncertainty bonus for high-uncertainty regions, encouraging exploration toward potentially high-value data. Theoretically, we provide a data-dependent regret bound for the proposed algorithm, showing that it adapts to the hardness of the learning task itself and can be tighter than worst-case bounds in practice. Empirically, the proposed method consistently outperforms strong baselines across benchmarks, demonstrating improved sample efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出数据依赖的偏好优化方法，通过历史数据构建不确定性奖励，提升在线RLHF的探索效率和样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线RLHF中，探索是一个基础挑战，需要算法生成有信息量的比较以提高样本效率。现有探索策略通过在线策略期望计算奖励，但难以从有限的偏好数据中可靠估计，导致策略过早放弃可能包含高价值行为的未探索区域。这一问题限制了LLM对齐的效率和效果，亟需更有效的探索方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DEPO方法，利用历史偏好数据为高不确定性区域构建额外不确定性奖励，鼓励探索潜在高价值数据。该方法简单可扩展，理论上给出了数据依赖的遗憾界，表明算法能自适应学习任务的难度，且在实践中比最坏情况界更紧。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DEPO在多个基准测试中一致优于强基线方法，显著提升了样本效率。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了比现有方法更高效的数据利用和探索效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: DEPO通过数据依赖的探索策略有效解决了在线RLHF中的探索难题，提高了样本效率。其理论分析证明了自适应性，实验验证了实用性。未来可进一步探索更复杂的奖励函数构造或扩展到多任务场景。

title: Information Coordination as a Bridge: A Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Reliable Autonomous Driving Scene Understanding
abstract: Reliable autonomous driving requires scene understanding that is semantically consistent across heterogeneous sensors and verifiable at the reasoning stage. However, many recent LLM-driven driving systems attach the language model as a post-processor and force it to reason over redundant or conflicting perception outputs, which can amplify hallucinated entities and unsafe conclusions. This paper proposes InfoCoordiBridge, a BEV-centric neuro-symbolic architecture that inserts an explicit coordination bridge between perception and language reasoning. InfoCoordiBridge comprises (i) a unified multi-agent perception layer that outputs typed structured facts together with modality-focused synopses, (ii) an ICA module that aligns and fuses multi-source outputs into a single SceneSummary, and (iii) an SSRE module that performs SceneSummary-grounded reasoning with verification. Experiments on nuScenes and Waymo show that ICA preserves competitive 3D detection accuracy while substantially improving fusion consistency, reducing redundancy to below 1% and achieving about 98% attribute agreement. On NuScenes-QA and a template-aligned Waymo-QA benchmark, SSRE improves factual grounding and reduces hallucinated entity mentions compared with representative VLM and agentic baselines. Overall, by coordinating multi-sensor outputs into a single conflict-aware SceneSummary before prompting, InfoCoordiBridge prevents redundant and cross-modally inconsistent perception evidence from propagating into high-level reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InfoCoordiBridge，一种以BEV为中心的神经符号架构，通过在感知和语言推理间插入显式协调桥接，实现可靠自动驾驶场景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的驾驶系统将语言模型作为后处理器，强制推理冗余或冲突的感知输出，可能放大幻觉实体和不安全结论。需要一种能确保语义一致性且可验证的场景理解架构，以提升自动驾驶可靠性。
light_analysis.method: InfoCoordiBridge包含三部分：统一多智能体感知层输出类型化结构化事实与模态聚焦摘要；ICA模块对齐融合多源输出为单一SceneSummary；SSRE模块基于SceneSummary进行验证推理。采用BEV中心表示，协调跨传感器信息。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes和Waymo上，ICA保持竞争力3D检测精度，融合冗余降至1%以下，属性一致约98%。在NuScenes-QA和Waymo-QA上，SSRE改善事实基础，减少幻觉实体提及，优于VLM和智能体基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过协调多传感器输出为冲突感知的SceneSummary，InfoCoordiBridge防止冗余和跨模态不一致感知证据传播到高级推理，提升自动驾驶场景理解的可靠性与可验证性。未来可扩展至更多传感器和推理任务。

title: ADAPTS: Agentic Decomposition for Automated Protocol-agnostic Tracking of Symptoms
abstract: Modeling latent clinical constructs from unconstrained clinical interactions is a unique challenge in affective computing. We present ADAPTS (Agentic Decomposition for Automated Protocol-agnostic Tracking of Symptoms), a framework for automated rating of depression and anxiety severity using a mixture-of-agents LLM architecture. This approach decomposes long-form clinical interviews into symptom-specific reasoning tasks, producing auditable justifications while preserving temporal and speaker alignment. Generalization was evaluated across two independent datasets ($N=204$) with distinct interview structures. On high-discrepancy interviews, automated ratings approximated expert benchmarks ($\text{absolute error}=22$) more closely than original human ratings ($\text{absolute error}=26$). Implementing an ``extended'' protocol that incorporates qualitative clinical conventions significantly stabilized ratings, with absolute agreement reaching $\text{ICC(2,1)} = 0.877$. These findings suggest that the ADAPTS framework enables promising evaluations of psychiatric severity. While the current implementation is purely text-based, the underlying architecture is readily extensible to multimodal inputs, including acoustic and visual features. By approximating expert-level precision in a protocol-agnostic manner, this framework provides a foundation for objective and scalable psychiatric assessment, especially in resource-limited settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ADAPTS框架，利用混合代理LLM架构自动分解临床访谈，实现协议无关的精神疾病症状严重度评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 从非结构化临床交互中建模潜在临床构念是情感计算中的独特挑战。现有方法依赖人工评分或特定协议，缺乏可扩展性和客观性。本研究旨在开发一种协议无关、自动化且可审计的精神疾病评估方法，以提升评估的客观性和可扩展性，尤其在资源有限的环境中。
light_analysis.method: ADAPTS框架采用混合代理（mixture-of-agents）LLM架构，将长形式临床访谈分解为症状特定推理任务，生成可审计的推理过程，同时保持时间和说话者对齐。在两个独立数据集（总计N=204）上评估，涵盖不同访谈结构。实施“扩展”协议融入定性临床约定以稳定评分。
light_analysis.result: 在离散度高的访谈中，ADAPTS自动评分（绝对误差22）比原始人工评分（绝对误差26）更接近专家基准。采用扩展协议后，绝对一致性达到ICC(2,1)=0.877。实验表明框架能有效评估精神疾病严重程度，当前为纯文本实现，但架构可扩展到多模态输入。
light_analysis.conclusion: ADAPTS框架以协议无关方式接近专家级精度，为客观、可扩展的精神病学评估奠定基础，特别适用于资源有限场景。未来可扩展至声学、视觉等多模态特征，提升评估鲁棒性。局限性在于当前仅为文本实现，需进一步验证多模态效果。

title: Boundary-Aware Uncertainty Quantification for Wildfire Spread Prediction
abstract: Reliable wildfire spread prediction is vital for risk-aware emergency planning, yet most deep learning models lack principled uncertainty quantification (UQ). Further, for boundary-sensitive cases like wildfire spread, evaluating models with global metrics alone is often insufficient. To shift the focus of UQ evaluation toward a more operationally relevant approach, the Fire-Centered Evaluation Region (FCER) framework is introduced as a spatially conditioned protocol to characterize UQ within critical fire zones. Using FCER, an Ensemble is compared against an distilled single-pass student model on the WildfireSpreadTS dataset. The student model demonstrates comparable calibration and complementary uncertainty ranking in boundary-relevant regimes. Code is available at https://github.com/jonasvilhofunk/WildfireUQ-FCER

light_analysis.overview: 提出边界感知不确定性量化（UQ）框架FCER，用于野火蔓延预测，并验证蒸馏学生模型在关键火区的UQ性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 野火蔓延预测对应急规划至关重要，但现有深度学习模型缺乏原则性不确定性量化。此外，对于边界敏感场景（如野火蔓延），仅用全局指标评估模型往往不足。需要一种更具操作性的评估方法，关注关键火区的不确定性表征。
light_analysis.method: 引入Fire-Centered Evaluation Region (FCER)框架，作为空间条件协议，在关键火区内刻画UQ。使用WildfireSpreadTS数据集，比较集成模型与蒸馏单通道学生模型的UQ性能。学生模型通过知识蒸馏从集成模型学习，降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在边界相关区域，蒸馏学生模型表现出与集成模型可比的校准性能，并提供互补的不确定性排名。这证明了学生模型在保持效率的同时，仍能提供可靠的边界UQ。
light_analysis.conclusion: FCER框架将UQ评估转向操作相关的边界区域，适用于野火等空间边界敏感任务。蒸馏模型可在保持UQ质量的同时提升推理效率。未来可扩展到其他灾害预测场景。

title: Manifold-Aligned Guided Integrated Gradients for Reliable Feature Attribution
abstract: Feature attribution is central to diagnosing and trusting deep neural networks, and Integrated Gradients (IG) is widely used due to its axiomatic properties. However, IG can yield unreliable explanations when the integration path between a baseline and the input passes through regions with noisy gradients. While Guided Integrated Gradients reduces this sensitivity by adaptively updating low-gradient-magnitude features, input-space guidance still produces intermediate inputs that deviate from the data manifold. To address this limitation, we propose \emph{Manifold-Aligned Guided Integrated Gradients} (MA-GIG), which constructs attribution paths in the latent space of a pre-trained variational autoencoder. By decoding intermediate latent states, MA-GIG biases the path toward the learned generative manifold and reduces exposure to implausible input-space regions. Through qualitative and quantitative evaluations, we demonstrate that MA-GIG produces faithful explanations by aggregating gradients on path features proximal to the input. Consequently, our method reduces off-manifold noise and outperforms prior path-based attribution methods across multiple datasets and classifiers. Our code is available at https://github.com/leekwoon/ma-gig/.
comment: 32 pages, 13 figures, 12 tables. Accepted to ICML 2026; includes appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出流形对齐引导积分梯度（MA-GIG），在隐空间中构建归因路径以减少离流形噪声，提升特征归因可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 积分梯度（IG）虽具有公理性质，但基线到输入的积分路径经过噪声梯度区域时会产生不可靠解释。引导积分梯度通过自适应更新低梯度特征来降低敏感性，但输入空间引导仍导致中间输入偏离数据流形，造成解释不准确。因此需要一种方法将归因路径约束在数据流形附近，以生成更忠实可靠的特征归因。
light_analysis.method: MA-GIG利用预训练变分自编码器的潜在空间构建归因路径。通过解码中间潜在状态，使路径偏向学习到的生成流形，减少暴露于不合理的输入空间区域。该方法在潜在空间中聚合梯度，路径特征靠近输入，从而降低离流形噪声。核心创新在于将引导积分梯度的路径搜索从输入空间转移到流形对齐的潜在空间。
light_analysis.result: 通过定性和定量评估，MA-GIG产生忠实解释，在多个数据集和分类器上优于先前基于路径的归因方法。具体性能指标包括归因质量提升和离流形噪声减少。与引导积分梯度等基线相比，MA-GIG在保持解释可读性的同时提高了可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MA-GIG通过流形对齐解决积分梯度路径偏离数据流形的问题，提供更可靠的归因解释。学术价值在于提出了结合生成模型与归因路径优化的新范式；实践意义在于可增强深度学习模型的可解释性与信任度。未来可探索更高效的潜在空间导航策略或扩展至其他归因方法。

title: RamanBench: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Machine Learning on Raman Spectroscopy
abstract: Machine Learning (ML) has transformed many scientific fields, yet key applications still lack standardized benchmarks. Raman spectroscopy, a widely used technique for non-invasive molecular analysis, is one such field where progress is limited by fragmented datasets, inconsistent evaluation, and models that fail to capture the structure of spectral data. We introduce RamanBench, the first large-scale, fully reproducible benchmark for ML on Raman spectroscopy, consisting of streamlined data access, evaluation protocols and code, as well as a live leaderboard. It unifies 74 datasets (including 16 first released with this benchmark) across four domains, comprising 325,668 spectra and spanning classification and regression tasks under diverse experimental conditions. We benchmark 28 models under a standardized protocol, including classical methods (e.g., PLS), Raman-specific (e.g., RamanNet), Tabular Foundation Model (TFM) (e.g., TabPFN), and time-series approaches (e.g., ROCKET). TFM consistently outperform domain-specific and gradient boosting baselines, while time-series models remain competitive. However, no method generalizes across datasets, revealing a fundamental gap. Therefore, we invite the community to contribute new approaches to our living benchmark, with the potential to accelerate advances in critical applications such as medical diagnostics, biological research, and materials science.

light_analysis.overview: RamanBench是首个大规模、可复现的拉曼光谱机器学习基准，统一74个数据集并基准测试28种模型，揭示了现有方法无法跨数据集泛化的关键差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 拉曼光谱在非侵入性分子分析中广泛应用，但机器学习领域因数据集碎片化、评估不一致及模型无法有效捕捉光谱结构而进展缓慢。现有方法缺乏标准化基准，限制了医疗诊断、生物研究和材料科学等关键应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建RamanBench基准，收集74个数据集（含16个新发布），共325,668个光谱，覆盖四个领域、分类与回归任务。在标准化协议下基准测试28种模型，包括经典方法（如PLS）、拉曼专用模型（如RamanNet）、表格基础模型（如TabPFN）和时间序列方法（如ROCKET）。
light_analysis.result: 表格基础模型（如TabPFN）在整体性能上持续优于领域特定模型和梯度提升基线，时间序列模型也表现出竞争力。然而，没有任何一种方法能在所有数据集上通用，这揭示了当前模型泛化能力的根本性不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: RamanBench提供了统一的评估框架，表明现有模型泛化差距显著。该基准邀请社区贡献新方法，以加速医学诊断、生物学研究和材料科学等应用领域的进展，同时指出了未来研究需要解决的关键挑战。

title: Structured Diffusion Bridges: Inductive Bias for Denoising Diffusion Bridges
abstract: Modality translation is inherently under-constrained, as multiple cross-modal mappings may yield the same marginals. Recent work has shown that diffusion bridges are effective for this task. However, most existing approaches rely on fully paired datasets, thereby imposing a single data-driven constraint. We propose a diffusion-bridge framework that characterizes the space of admissible solutions and restricts it via alignment constraints, treating paired supervision as an optional heuristic rather than a prerequisite. We validate our method on synthetic and real modality translation benchmarks across unpaired, semi-paired, and paired regimes, showing consistent performance across supervision levels. Notably, \textbf{it achieves near fully-paired quality with a substantial relaxation in pairing requirements, and remaining applicable in the unpaired regime}. These results highlight diffusion bridges as a flexible foundation for modality translation beyond fully paired data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于对齐约束的结构扩散桥框架，在配对要求大幅放松下实现近全配对质量的模态翻译。
light_analysis.motivation: 模态翻译任务中，多个跨模态映射可能产生相同边缘分布，现有扩散桥方法依赖全配对数据集，限制了应用场景。需要一种能利用未配对或半配对数据的方法，同时保持翻译质量，以解决数据配对的瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构扩散桥框架，通过引入对齐约束来限制解空间，将配对监督作为可选启发式而非前提。该方法可灵活应用于未配对、半配对和配对三种设置，无需全配对数据即可学习跨模态映射。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实模态翻译基准上，该方法在所有监督级别（未配对、半配对、配对）下均表现一致。特别地，在配对要求大幅放松时，达到接近全配对数据的翻译质量，并在未配对场景中仍有效。
