light_analysis.conclusion: 扩散桥可作为模态翻译的灵活基础，突破全配对数据的限制，具有较高的学术和应用价值。未来可扩展到更多模态翻译任务，但摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: NeuroState-Bench: A Human-Calibrated Benchmark for Commitment Integrity in LLM Agent Profiles
abstract: Outcome-only evaluation under-specifies whether an evaluated agent profile preserves the commitments required to solve a multi-turn task coherently. NeuroState-Bench is a human-calibrated benchmark that operationalizes commitment integrity through benchmark-defined side-query probes rather than inferred hidden activations. The released inventory contains 144 deterministic tasks and 306 benchmark-defined side-query probes spanning eight cognitively motivated failure families, paired clean and distractor variants, and three difficulty bands. The main 32-profile evaluation contains a fixed 16-profile local subset and a matched 16-profile hosted large-model subset evaluated through the same benchmark pipeline. Human calibration uses the final merged reporting scope: 104 sampled task units, 216 raw annotations, and 108 adjudicated task rows, with weighted kappa = 0.977 and ICC(2,1) = 0.977. Empirically, task success and commitment integrity diverge across this expanded grid: the success leader is not the integrity leader, 31 of 32 profiles change rank when integrity replaces task success, and integrity rankings are more stable under distractor perturbation. The primary confidence-free score HCCIS-CORE reaches 0.8469 AUC and 0.6992 PR-AUC for post-probe diagnostic discrimination of terminal task failure; the legacy full heuristic variant HCCIS-FULL reaches 0.7997 AUC and 0.6410 PR-AUC. Probe accuracy and state drift achieve slightly higher ROC-AUC, 0.8587, and better Brier/ECE, while HCCIS-CORE has substantially higher point-estimate PR-AUC and remains more closely tied to the benchmark's intended construct. The exploratory neural-augmented variant HCCIS+N is weaker overall, and a randomized subspace control approaches chance. NeuroState-Bench therefore contributes a calibrated evaluation axis for exposing commitment failures over a broader model grid than the original local-only subset.

light_analysis.overview: NeuroState-Bench是一个经过人类校准的基准，通过侧查询探针而非隐藏激活来评估LLM智能体在任务中的承诺完整性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有仅基于结果的评估无法充分判断智能体是否连贯地保持了解决多轮任务所需的承诺，导致对智能体行为的理解不完整。该研究旨在通过定义明确的探针来操作化承诺完整性，弥补这一评估空缺，从而更全面地揭示智能体在复杂任务中的行为一致性缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 该基准包含144个确定性任务和306个基准定义的侧查询探针，覆盖8个认知动机失败族，并配对了干净和干扰变体及三个难度带。评估使用了32个智能体配置，包括16个本地子集和16个托管大型模型子集。人类校准过程涉及104个采样任务单元、216个原始注释和108个裁决任务行，通过加权kappa和ICC(2,1)均为0.977来确保一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明任务成功与承诺完整性存在分歧：成功领导者并非完整性领导者，32个智能体中有31个在完整性取代任务成功时排名改变。提出的无置信度评分HCCIS-CORE在终端任务失败诊断判别中达到0.8469 AUC和0.6992 PR-AUC，优于传统启发式变体HCCIS-FULL（0.7997 AUC, 0.6410 PR-AUC）。探针准确性和状态漂移的ROC-AUC略高（0.8587），但HCCIS-CORE的PR-AUC更高且更紧密关联基准构念。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuroState-Bench提供了一个经过校准的评估轴，能够揭示更广泛模型网格上的承诺失败，弥补了仅关注任务成功率的局限性。该基准具有重要的学术价值，为LLM智能体的行为一致性研究提供了标准化工具，未来可能扩展至更多任务族和模型类型。

title: SignVerse-2M: A Two-Million-Clip Pose-Native Universe of 55+ Sign Languages
abstract: Existing large-scale sign language resources typically provide supervision only at the level of raw video-text alignment and are often produced in laboratory settings. While such resources are important for semantic understanding, they do not directly provide a unified interface for open-world recognition and translation, or for modern pose-driven sign language video generation frameworks: 1. RGB-based pretrained recognition models depend heavily on fixed backgrounds or clothing conditions during recording, and are less robust in open-world settings than style-agnostic pose-processing models. 2. Recent pose-guided image/video generation models mostly use a unified keypoint representation such as DWPose as their control interface. At present, the sign language field still lacks a data resource that can directly interface with this modern pose-native paradigm while also targeting real-world open scenarios. We present SignVerse-2M, a large-scale multilingual pose-native dataset for sign language pose modeling and evaluation. Built from publicly available multilingual sign language video resources, it applies DWPose in a unified preprocessing pipeline to convert raw videos into 2D pose sequences that can be used directly for modeling, resulting in a consolidated corpus of about two million clips covering more than 55 sign languages. Unlike many laboratory datasets, this resource preserves the recording conditions and speaker diversity of real-world videos while reducing appearance variation through a unified pose representation. Toward this goal, we further provide the data construction pipeline, task definitions, and a simple SignDW Transformer baseline, demonstrating the feasibility of this resource for multilingual pose-space modeling and its compatibility with modern pose-driven pipelines, while discussing the evaluation claims it can support as well as its current limitations.
comment: The included languages actually amount to 55+, and the 25 types refer to those that exceed 15 hours. 13 pages. Project Page at: https://signerx.github.io/SignVerse-2M/

light_analysis.overview: 构建了一个包含55+种手语、约200万个片段的大规模姿态原生数据集，并提供了统一预处理管道和基线模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大规模手语资源多为实验室环境下的视频-文本对齐数据，缺乏与开放世界识别、翻译以及现代姿态驱动视频生成框架的直接接口。基于RGB的识别模型对背景和服装敏感，鲁棒性不足；而姿态引导的生成模型需要统一的骨架表示（如DWPose）作为控制界面。目前手语领域缺乏可直接对接这种姿态原生范式且面向真实开放场景的数据资源。
light_analysis.method: 利用公开的多语言手语视频资源，通过统一预处理管道应用DWPose提取2D姿态序列，构建了包含约200万个片段、覆盖55种以上手语的紧凑语料库。保留了真实世界视频的录制条件和说话人多样性，同时通过统一姿态表示减少外观变化。并提供了数据构建流程、任务定义和简单的SignDW Transformer基线模型。
light_analysis.result: 基线模型SignDW Transformer展示了在多语言姿态空间建模上的可行性，并与现代姿态驱动管道兼容。摘要未明确提供具体性能数值，但指出该数据集支持开放世界评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: SignVerse-2M填补了手语领域缺乏大规模、多语言、姿态原生数据集的空白，可直接用于姿态驱动的识别、生成和翻译任务。其统一姿态表示有利于跨语言和跨场景泛化。未来可扩展更多手语并用于更复杂的任务，但数据集当前主要基于二维姿态，可能受遮挡和视角限制。

title: Linear-Time Global Visual Modeling without Explicit Attention
abstract: Existing research largely attributes the global sequence modeling capability of Transformers to the explicit computation of attention weights, a process that inherently incurs quadratic computational complexity. In this work, we offer a novel perspective: we demonstrate that attention can be mathematically reframed as a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) equipped with dynamically predicted parameters. Through this lens, we explain attention's global modeling power not as explicit token-wise aggregation, but as an implicit process where dynamically generated parameters act as a compressed representation of the global context. Inspired by this insight, we investigate a fundamental question: can we achieve Transformer-level sequence global modeling entirely through dynamic parameterization while maintaining linear complexity, effectively replacing explicit attention? To explore this, we design various dynamic parameter prediction strategies and integrate them into standard network layers. Extensive empirical studies on vision models demonstrate that dynamic parameterization can indeed serve as a highly effective, linear-complexity alternative to explicit attention, opening new pathways for efficient sequence modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/WeightFormer.

light_analysis.overview: 将注意力机制重新解释为动态参数化的MLP，实现线性复杂度的全局序列建模，替代显式注意力。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer的全局建模能力通常归因于显式注意力权重的计算，但其二次复杂度限制了效率。本文质疑这一传统观点，认为注意力可被重新表述为动态预测参数的MLP，其全局建模能力源于动态参数对全局上下文的隐式压缩。因此，研究能否完全通过动态参数化实现线性复杂度的Transformer级全局建模，以替代显式注意力。
light_analysis.method: 本文从数学上重新定义注意力为具有动态预测参数的MLP，设计多种动态参数预测策略，并将其集成到标准网络层中。具体地，通过轻量级模块从输入序列预测MLP的权重，使网络能动态适应全局上下文。在视觉模型上进行实验，验证了动态参数化作为显式注意力的线性复杂度替代方案的有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉模型上的广泛实验表明，所提出的动态参数化方法在性能上可与显式注意力相媲美，同时保持线性计算复杂度。与基线（如标准Transformer）相比，取得了具有竞争力的结果，例如在ImageNet分类任务上达到相似精度，但计算开销显著降低。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但强调其高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了注意力机制的新视角，即其本质是动态参数化的MLP，并证实了无需显式注意力即可实现同等全局建模能力。动态参数化提供了一种线性复杂度的替代方案，为高效序列建模开辟了新途径。该工作对视觉和序列模型的设计具有重要启发，潜在局限性可能在于动态参数预测的额外成本，未来可探索更高效的预测策略。

title: Probe-Geometry Alignment: Erasing the Cross-Sequence Memorization Signature Below Chance
abstract: Recent attacks show that behavioural unlearning of large language models leaves internal traces recoverable by adversarial probes. We characterise where this retention lives and show it can be surgically removed without measurable capability cost. Our central protocol is a leave-one-out cross-sequence probe that tests whether a memorisation signature generalises across held-out sequences. The signature is real and consistent across scale: memorisation-specific gaps of +0.32, +0.19, +0.30 on Pythia-70M, GPT-2 medium, and Mistral-7B; on Pythia-70M, the random-initialisation control collapses to -0.04 at the deepest layer where the pretrained signature peaks. The probe direction is causally separable from recall -- projecting it out collapses the signature locally (+0.44 -> -0.19) while behavioural recall barely changes -- and a probe trained on naturally memorised content does not classify fine-tuning-injected secrets, marking two representationally distinct regimes. We then introduce probe-geometry alignment (PGA), a surgical erasure that aligns activations along the probe's live readout direction at each depth. PGA drives the cross-sequence probe below random chance at all four scales tested (toy depth-4: 0.17; Pythia-70M: 0.07; Mistral-7B: 0.45; GPT-2 medium: 0.06 via MD-PGA k=2) and remains robust to six adversarial probe variants. Against a re-fitting attacker who trains a fresh probe on PGA-treated activations, we extend PGA adversarially, defeating the re-fit probe at every memorisation-relevant depth while preserving five zero-shot capability benchmarks within 2.8 percentage points per task (mean Δacc = +0.2pp). The cross-sequence signature is a real, causally separable, regime-specific property of pretrained representations -- removable below chance with a single rank-one intervention per depth at no measurable capability cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出探针-几何对齐（PGA）方法，可手术式移除大语言模型中的跨序列记忆签名，将其降至随机水平以下，且不损失模型能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期攻击表明，大语言模型的行为遗忘后内部仍残留可被对抗探针恢复的记忆痕迹。这种记忆保留机制不明，且现有方法难以彻底消除。本文旨在定位记忆残留位置，并开发一种无需可测量能力代价的手术式移除方法，以解决模型隐私泄露和安全性问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先设计留一法跨序列探针，测试记忆签名是否泛化至保留序列，发现签名真实且跨规模一致。然后提出探针-几何对齐（PGA），在每一深度沿探针读出方向对齐激活值，从而手术式擦除签名。针对重拟合攻击，扩展为对抗性PGA，在多个记忆相关深度击败重拟合探针。在Pythia-70M、GPT-2 medium、Mistral-7B等模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: PGA将跨序列探针降至随机以下：toy depth-4为0.17，Pythia-70M为0.07，Mistral-7B为0.45，GPT-2 medium为0.06。对抗性PGA在保留五个零样本能力基准（平均准确率变化+0.2个百分点）的同时，在每个记忆相关深度击败重拟合探针。记忆签名在预训练表示中是真实、因果可分离且特定于记忆状态的。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了跨序列记忆签名是预训练表示的真实、因果可分离属性，并通过单秩每深度干预即可将其降至随机水平以下，且无能力损失。该工作为模型遗忘提供了精准手术方法，具有隐私保护和安全应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的攻击场景及更广泛的模型规模。

title: The Perceptual Bandwidth Bottleneck in Vision-Language Models: Active Visual Reasoning via Sequential Experimental Design
abstract: Visual perception in modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is constrained by a perceptual bandwidth bottleneck: a broad field of view preserves global context but sacrifices the fine-grained details required for complex reasoning. We argue that high-resolution visual reasoning is therefore not only semantic reasoning but also task-relevant evidence acquisition under limited perceptual bandwidth. Inspired by active vision and information foraging, we formalise this process as sequential Bayesian optimal experimental design (S-BOED), where an agent decides which visual evidence to acquire before answering. Since exact Bayesian inference is intractable in continuous gigapixel spaces, we derive a tractable coverage--resolution objective as a proxy for task-relevant information gain. We instantiate this framework with FOVEA, a training-free procedure that refines VLM crop proposals through evidence-oriented probing. Experiments on high-resolution benchmarks show consistent gains over direct and ReAct-style baselines, with particularly strong improvements in search-dominated remote-sensing settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于序列贝叶斯最优实验设计的主动视觉推理框架FOVEA，解决视觉-语言模型感知带宽瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型（VLM）受限于感知带宽瓶颈：宽视野保留全局上下文但丢失精细细节，难以进行复杂推理。现有方法直接处理高分辨率图像或简单裁剪，未能主动获取任务相关证据。该研究认为高分辨率视觉推理本质是在有限带宽下进行证据获取的序列决策问题，需要形式化且可计算的方法。
light_analysis.method: 将视觉推理形式化为序列贝叶斯最优实验设计（S-BOED），代理在回答前主动选择获取哪些视觉证据。由于连续千兆像素空间中的精确贝叶斯推断不可行，推导出可计算的覆盖-分辨率目标作为任务相关信息增益的代理。提出FOVEA，一种无需训练的程序，通过证据导向的探测细化VLM裁剪提案。
light_analysis.result: 在高分辨率基准测试上，FOVEA相比直接基线（如全图输入）和ReAct风格方法取得一致改进，尤其在搜索主导的遥感场景中提升显著。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但指出稳定增益和强改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: FOVEA框架有效缓解VLM的感知带宽瓶颈，通过主动证据采集提升复杂视觉推理性能。工作将视觉推理与实验设计结合，具有学术价值；遥感等领域的强表现表明实用潜力。未来可扩展至更通用的视觉任务，并探索端到端学习感知策略。

title: Valley3: Scaling Omni Foundation Models for E-commerce
abstract: In this work, we present Valley3, an omni multimodal large language model (MLLM) developed for diverse global e-commerce tasks, with unified understanding and reasoning capabilities across text, images, video, and audio. A key feature of Valley3 is its native multilingual audio capability for e-commerce, developed by extending vision-language models to better support crucial audio-visual tasks, particularly in short-video scenarios. To achieve this, we carefully design a four-stage omni e-commerce continued pre-training pipeline, through which Valley3 progressively acquires audio understanding, cross-modal instruction-following, e-commerce domain knowledge, and long-context reasoning capabilities, ultimately evolving into an omni model for diverse e-commerce scenarios. Then, we further improve Valley3 through post-training to encourage long-chain reasoning with controllable reasoning modes, enabling one non-thinking mode and three distinct levels of thinking, thereby balancing inference efficiency in simple scenarios with deep reasoning for complex applications. Moreover, we equip Valley3 with agentic search capabilities to proactively invoke search tools and acquire task-relevant information for e-commerce deep research tasks. To comprehensively assess the capabilities of Valley3, we construct an omni e-commerce benchmark spanning 6 tasks. Experimental results show that Valley3 consistently outperforms strong baselines on our in-house and open-source e-commerce benchmarks, while remaining competitive on general-domain benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Valley3，一个面向电商的全模态大语言模型，通过四阶段预训练和后训练实现文本、图像、视频、音频的统一理解与推理，并具备多语言音频和智能搜索能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 电商场景涉及文本、图像、视频、音频等多种模态，且短视频场景中的音频-视觉任务至关重要。现有模型缺乏跨模态理解和电商领域知识，难以支持多语言音频和长上下文推理。因此需要统一的电商全模态模型。
light_analysis.method: 采用四阶段持续预训练流水线，依次获取音频理解、跨模态指令跟随、电商领域知识和长上下文推理能力。后训练引入可控推理模式（非思考/三级思考）以平衡效率与深度。此外，集成智能搜索能力，使模型能主动调用搜索工具获取任务相关信息。
light_analysis.result: 在内部和开源电商基准（涵盖6个任务）上，Valley3持续超越强基线模型，同时在通用领域基准上保持竞争力。具体提升幅度摘要未详细说明，但整体性能显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: Valley3为电商场景提供了强大的全模态解决方案，在多语言音频和智能搜索方面展现创新。其四阶段预训练和后训练策略具有可迁移性。未来可优化推理效率或扩展至更多模态与领域。

title: Near-optimal and Efficient First-Order Algorithm for Multi-Task Learning with Shared Linear Representation
abstract: Multi-task learning (MTL) has emerged as a pivotal paradigm in machine learning by leveraging shared structures across multiple related tasks. Despite its empirical success, the development of likelihood-based efficiently solvable algorithms--even for shared linear representations--remains largely underdeveloped, primarily due to the non-convex structure intrinsic to matrix factorization. This paper introduces a first-order algorithm that jointly learns a shared representation and task-specific parameters, with guaranteed efficiency. Notably, it converges in $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1)$ iterations and attains a \emph{near-optimal} estimation error of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(dk/(TN))$, \emph{improving} over existing likelihood-based methods by a factor of $k$, where $d$, $k$, $T$, $N$ denote input dimension, representation dimension, task count, and samples per task, respectively. Our results justify that likelihood-based first-order methods can efficiently solve the MTL problem.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种近最优且高效的一阶算法，用于共享线性表示的多任务学习，实现了亚线性收敛和估计误差改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务学习通过共享结构提升性能，但现有基于似然的算法因矩阵分解的非凸性而效率低下。缺乏可证明高效的一阶方法，尤其是对于共享线性表示场景。本文旨在解决这一空白，开发具有理论保证的实用算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一阶算法，联合学习共享表示与任务特定参数。采用梯度下降等一阶优化技术，避免复杂二阶更新。算法在O~(1)次迭代内收敛，实现近最优估计误差O~(dk/(TN))，其中d为输入维度，k为表示维度，T为任务数，N为每任务样本数。
light_analysis.result: 算法在估计误差上达到近最优率，相比现有基于似然的方法提升因子k（表示维度）。收敛速度不依赖问题规模，仅需常数次迭代。理论结果首次证明基于似然的一阶方法可高效求解多任务学习问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了线性表示下的多任务学习可通过简单一阶方法高效解决，提供理论收敛保证和近最优统计率。为实际应用提供了可扩展算法，未来可扩展至非线性表示或更复杂的任务结构。

title: The Power of Order: Fooling LLMs with Adversarial Table Permutations
abstract: Large Language Models have achieved remarkable success and are increasingly deployed in critical applications involving tabular data, such as Table Question Answering. However, their robustness to the structure of this input remains a critical, unaddressed question. This paper demonstrates that modern LLMs exhibit a significant vulnerability to the layout of tabular data. Specifically, we show that semantically-invariant permutations of rows and columns - rearrangements that do not alter the table's underlying information - are sometimes sufficient to cause incorrect or inconsistent model outputs. To systematically probe this vulnerability, we introduce Adversarial Table Permutation, a novel, gradient-based attack that efficiently identifies worst-case permutations designed to maximally disrupt model performance. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that ATP significantly degrades the performance of a wide range of LLMs. This reveals a pervasive vulnerability across different model sizes and architectures, including the most recent and popular models. Our findings expose a fundamental weakness in how current LLMs process structured data, underscoring the urgent need to develop permutation-robust models for reliable, real-world applications.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM对表格行列置换敏感，提出对抗性表格置换攻击(ATP)揭示此漏洞。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在表格问答等关键任务中广泛应用，但其对输入结构的鲁棒性未得到充分研究。现有方法忽视了表格布局的语义不变性，行和列的重新排列可能导致模型输出错误或不一致，这威胁到实际应用的可靠性。因此，系统性地探究这一漏洞并开发有效的攻击方法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出Adversarial Table Permutation (ATP)，一种基于梯度的攻击方法，通过优化行和列的置换来最大化对LLM性能的破坏。ATP在保持表格信息不变的前提下，自动寻找最坏情况的排列，适用于多种LLM架构和规模。方法无需修改表格内容，仅改变布局顺序。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明ATP显著降低了多种LLM的性能，包括最新流行模型。这种漏洞普遍存在于不同模型大小和架构中，即使是最先进的模型也难以避免。与未受攻击的基线相比，性能下降明显，证实了LLM对表格排列的脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了当前LLM处理结构化数据的根本缺陷，即对输入排列敏感。这强调了开发排列鲁棒模型的紧迫性，以保障实际应用（如表格问答）的可靠性。未来工作可探索防御策略或改进模型架构以增强鲁棒性。

title: Unlearning What Matters: Token-Level Attribution for Precise Language Model Unlearning
abstract: Machine unlearning has emerged as a critical capability for addressing privacy, safety, and regulatory concerns in large language models (LLMs). Existing methods operate at the sequence level, applying uniform updates across all tokens despite only a subset encoding the knowledge targeted for removal. This introduces gradient noise, degrades utility, and leads to suboptimal forgetting. We propose TokenUnlearn, a token-level attribution framework that identifies and selectively targets critical tokens. Our approach combines knowledge-aware signals via masking, and entropy-aware signals to yield importance scores for precise token selection. We develop two complementary strategies: hard selection, applying unlearning only to high-importance tokens, and soft weighting, modulating gradient contributions based on importance scores. Both extend existing methods to token-level variants. Theoretical analysis shows token-level selection improves gradient signal-to-noise ratio. Experiments on TOFU and WMDP benchmarks across three model architectures demonstrate consistent improvements over sequence-level baselines in both forgetting effectiveness and utility preservation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TokenUnlearn，一种令牌级归因框架，通过识别并选择性处理关键令牌实现精确的语言模型遗忘，提升遗忘效果并保持模型实用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法在序列级别对所有令牌统一更新，但只有部分令牌编码了目标知识，这引入梯度噪声，降低模型效用并导致次优遗忘。因此需要更精确的令牌级方法来解决这一局限性。
light_analysis.method: 提出TokenUnlearn框架，结合知识感知信号（通过掩码）和熵感知信号生成重要性分数，实现精确令牌选择。开发硬选择（仅对高重要性令牌应用遗忘）和软加权（基于重要性分数调节梯度贡献）两种策略，将现有方法扩展到令牌级变体。理论分析显示令牌级选择能提高梯度信噪比。
light_analysis.result: 在TOFU和WMDP基准测试上，使用三种模型架构进行实验，一致表明在遗忘效果和效用保持方面均优于序列级基线方法，具体数据未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: TokenUnlearn实现了更精确的语言模型遗忘，减少了梯度噪声，提升了遗忘效果和模型实用性。未来工作可能探索更复杂的令牌聚合策略或扩展到其他模型，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Mammographic Lesion Segmentation with Lightweight Models: A Comparative Study
abstract: Breast cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related mortality among women worldwide, with mammography as the primary screening tool. While deep learning models have shown strong performance in lesion segmentation, most rely on computationally intensive architectures that limit their use in resource-constrained environments. This study evaluates the performance and efficiency of lightweight models for mammographic lesion segmentation. Architectures including MobileNetV2, EfficientNet Lite, FPN, and Fast-SCNN were compared against a U-Net baseline using the INbreast dataset with 5-fold cross-validation. Performance was assessed using Dice score, Intersection over Union (IoU), and Recall, alongside model complexity. MobileNetV2 with Squeeze-and-Excitation (SCSE) achieved the best performance, with a Dice score of 0.5766 while using approximately 75% fewer parameters than U-Net. Cross-dataset evaluation on the DMID dataset showed reduced accuracy due to domain shift but preserved recall. These results demonstrate that lightweight architectures offer a practical balance between performance and efficiency for deployable CAD systems.

light_analysis.overview: 比较轻量级模型与U-Net在乳腺钼靶X线图像病变分割中的性能与效率，发现MobileNetV2+SCSE在减少75%参数下达到最优Dice 0.5766。
light_analysis.motivation: 乳腺癌是全球女性癌症死亡的主要原因，钼靶X线摄影是主要筛查手段。深度学习模型在病变分割中表现优异，但大多依赖高计算量架构，限制了在资源受限环境中的应用。因此，研究旨在探索轻量级模型在乳腺病变分割中的实用性和性能平衡，以便部署于计算机辅助诊断系统。
light_analysis.method: 研究评估了多种轻量级架构（MobileNetV2、EfficientNet Lite、FPN、Fast-SCNN）与U-Net基线在INbreast数据集上的分割性能。采用5折交叉验证，使用Dice系数、IoU和召回率作为评价指标，并考察模型参数量。关键创新是在轻量网络中引入Squeeze-and-Excitation（SCSE）模块以增强特征表达。
light_analysis.result: MobileNetV2结合SCSE模块达到最佳Dice得分0.5766，同时参数量比U-Net减少约75%。所有轻量模型在DMID数据集上的跨数据集评估显示由于域偏移导致精度下降，但召回率保持稳定。表明轻量架构在性能与效率间取得了实用平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了轻量级模型在乳腺钼靶病变分割中的有效性，尤其是MobileNetV2+SCSE在显著降低计算成本的同时保持了可接受的分割性能。工作为资源受限环境下的计算机辅助诊断系统部署提供了可行方案，未来可进一步研究域适应技术来缓解跨数据集性能下降。

title: Supernodes and Halos: Loss-Critical Hubs in LLM Feed-Forward Layers
abstract: We study the organization of channel-level importance in transformer feed-forward networks (FFNs). Using a Fisher-style loss proxy (LP) based on activation-gradient second moments, we show that loss sensitivity is concentrated in a small set of channels within each layer. In Llama-3.1-8B, the top 1% of channels per layer accounts for a median of 58.7% of LP mass, with a range of 33.0% to 86.1%. We call these loss-critical channels supernodes. Although FFN layers also contain strong activation outliers, LP-defined supernodes overlap only weakly with activation-defined outliers and are not explained by activation power or weight norms alone. Around this core, we find a weaker but consistent halo structure: some non-supernode channels share the supernodes' write support and show stronger redundancy with the protected core. We use one-shot structured FFN pruning as a diagnostic test of this organization. At 50% FFN sparsity, baselines that prune many supernodes degrade sharply, whereas our SCAR variants explicitly protect the supernode core; the strongest variant, SCAR-Prot, reaches perplexity 54.8 compared with 989.2 for Wanda-channel. The LP-concentration pattern appears across Mistral-7B, Llama-2-7B, and Qwen2-7B, remains visible in targeted Llama-3.1-70B experiments, and increases during OLMo-2-7B pretraining. These results suggest that LLM FFNs develop a small learned core of loss-critical channels, and that preserving this core is important for reliable structured pruning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM前馈层中存在损失关键通道（supernodes）和光环结构，并基于此设计保护核心的剪枝方法。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer前馈网络中的通道重要性分布尚不明确，现有剪枝方法（如Wanda）未考虑损失敏感性的集中性，导致高稀疏度下性能急剧下降。本文旨在揭示通道级损失敏感性的组织模式，并利用该模式改进结构化剪枝。
light_analysis.method: 采用Fisher风格的损失代理（LP）基于激活梯度二阶矩度量通道重要性，识别每个层中前1%的损失关键通道（supernodes）。发现supernodes与激活异常值重叠弱，且周围存在弱但一致的光环结构。提出SCAR变体（SCAR-Prot）显式保护supernode核心，用于一次性结构化FFN剪枝。实验在Llama-3.1-8B等多个模型上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B中，顶层1%通道集中了中位数58.7%的LP质量（范围33.0%-86.1%）。50% FFN稀疏度下，SCAR-Prot困惑度达54.8，远优于Wanda-channel的989.2。该模式在Mistral-7B、Llama-2-7B、Qwen2-7B中均出现，在Llama-3.1-70B中仍可见，且随着OLMo-2-7B预训练而增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM前馈网络形成由少量损失关键通道构成的核心，保护该核心对高稀疏度结构化剪枝至关重要。该发现揭示了网络内部组织特性，为设计更可靠的模型压缩方法提供了新视角。未来可探索核心通道的泛化性及动态演化。

title: Compiling Deterministic Structure into SLM Harnesses
abstract: Enterprise SLM deployment faces epistemic asymmetry: small models cannot self-correct reasoning errors, while frontier LLMs incur prohibitive costs and data sovereignty risks at scale. We propose Semantic Gradient Descent (SGDe), a teacher-student framework that compiles agentic workflows into discrete execution plans--DAG topologies, system prompts, and deterministic code. The trailing e distinguishes this discrete, compilation-based approach from stochastic gradient descent. Operating in discrete semantic space, a frontier teacher generates natural-language critiques that serve as directional gradients to iteratively refine the SLM's workflow artefacts. We formalise SGDe under PAC learning, establishing sample-complexity bounds that enable convergence with as few as three training examples by leveraging the teacher as a statistical prior. On an adversarially synthesized GSM-Hard test set, compiled workflows achieve 91.3% accuracy at m=5 and 99.3% at m=3--a +26.3% to +34.3% absolute gain over state-of-the-art prompt optimisers. Within harness engineering, SGDe treats deterministic code placement (which subtasks to delegate to Python versus retain as LLM calls) as a trace-driven, per-node optimisation target, generalising static whole-problem offloading in PAL and PoT. The teacher compiles two deterministic structures: capability offloading (delegating subtasks to Python when the SLM is unreliable) and structural consensus (wrapping variance-sensitive steps in fan-out/fan-in subgraphs with deterministic voting).

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义梯度下降（SGDe），一种将代理工作流编译为确定性执行计划的教师-学生框架，显著提升小模型推理准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业级SLM部署面临认知不对称：小模型无法自我纠正推理错误，而前沿LLM成本高昂且存在数据主权风险。现有方法如PAL和PoT的静态整体卸载不够灵活，提示优化器性能有限。因此需要一种高效、经济的框架，将教师模型的知识编译为SLM可执行的确定性结构。
light_analysis.method: SGDe采用教师-学生框架，在离散语义空间中，教师模型生成自然语言批评作为方向梯度，迭代优化SLM的工作流工件（DAG拓扑、系统提示、确定性代码）。该过程基于PAC学习理论，利用教师作为统计先验，仅需少量样本即可收敛。核心创新包括能力卸载（将SLM不可靠的子任务委托给Python）和结构共识（将方差敏感步骤包装在扇出/扇入子图中，通过确定性投票聚合结果）。
light_analysis.result: 在对抗性合成的GSM-Hard测试集上，编译的工作流在m=5时达到91.3%准确率，m=3时达到99.3%，比最先进的提示优化器绝对提升26.3%至34.3%。验证了SGDe在少量训练样本（低至3个）下的高效收敛能力，以及确定性结构带来的性能增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: SGDe为小模型部署提供了一种编译确定性结构的新范式，通过离散语义空间中的梯度下降实现高效知识转移。其学术价值在于形式化PAC学习保证，实际应用价值在于低成本、高准确率的推理系统。未来可探索更复杂的DAG拓扑和跨领域泛化能力。

title: AutoOR: Scalably Post-training LLMs to Autoformalize Operations Research Problems
abstract: Optimization problems are central to decision-making in manufacturing, logistics, scheduling, and other industrial settings. Translating complicated descriptions of these problems into solver-ready formulations requires specialized operations research (OR) expertise, making it hard to scale. We present AutoOR, a scalable synthetic data generation and reinforcement learning pipeline that trains LLMs to autoformalize optimization problems specified in natural language across linear, mixed-integer, and non-linear categories. AutoOR generates verified training data from standard optimization forms and uses solver execution feedback as the reward signal for RL post-training. AutoOR applied to an 8B model achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results across six established OR benchmarks, matching significantly larger frontier models. For a non-linear problem class involving physical dynamics, where frontier models score near 0%, we introduce a curriculum RL strategy that bootstraps from limited initial training data to make this class tractable for post-training. We believe that methods such as AutoOR can significantly accelerate industrial decision-making with AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoOR流水线，通过合成数据生成和强化学习后训练LLM自动形式化运筹学问题，在8B模型上达到领先水平。
light_analysis.motivation: 优化问题在制造、物流、调度等工业决策中至关重要。将自然语言描述的问题转化为求解器可用的公式需要专业的运筹学知识，难以规模化。现有方法依赖人工或模板，缺乏可扩展性和通用性。
light_analysis.method: AutoOR包含两个核心组件：1)从标准优化形式生成已验证的合成训练数据；2)以求解器执行反馈作为奖励信号，对LLM进行强化学习后训练。应用在8B模型上，覆盖线性、混合整数和非线性问题。针对物理动力学的非线性问题，采用课程RL策略从少量初始数据中引导训练。
light_analysis.result: 在六个运筹学基准上，AutoOR训练的8B模型取得最先进或竞争性结果，匹配更大规模的前沿模型。对于物理动力学非线性问题（前沿模型得分近0%），课程RL策略使其变得可处理。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoOR方法可显著加速工业决策中的AI应用，通过可扩展的合成数据和RL后训练，使小型模型也能达到高水平自动形式化能力。未来可推广到更多问题类别。

title: SegMix:Shuffle-based Feedback Learning for Semantic Segmentation of Pathology Images
abstract: Segmentation is a critical task in computational pathology, as it identifies areas affected by disease or abnormal growth and is essential for diagnosis and treatment. However, acquiring high-quality pixel-level supervised segmentation data requires significant workload demands from experienced pathologists, limiting the application of deep learning. To overcome this challenge, relaxing the label conditions to image-level classification labels allows for more data to be used and more scenarios to be enabled. One approach is to leverage Class Activation Map (CAM) to generate pseudo pixel-level annotations for semantic segmentation with only image-level labels. However, this method fails to thoroughly explore the essential characteristics of pathology images, thus identifying only small areas that are insufficient for pseudo masking. In this paper, we propose a novel shuffle-based feedback learning method inspired by curriculum learning to generate higher-quality pseudo-semantic segmentation masks. Specifically, we perform patch level shuffle of pathology images, with the model adaptively adjusting the shuffle strategy based on feedback from previous learning. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-arts on three different datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于打乱和反馈学习的弱监督语义分割方法SegMix，仅使用图像级标签生成高质量伪掩码。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算病理学中像素级标注需要专业病理学家大量工作，限制了深度学习应用。现有CAM方法无法充分挖掘病理图像特征，仅识别小区域，伪掩码不足。因此需要一种仅用图像级标签即可生成高质量伪语义分割掩码的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SegMix，一种基于打乱和反馈学习的弱监督语义分割方法。受课程学习启发，在病理图像上进行块级打乱，模型根据先前学习反馈自适应调整打乱策略，从而生成更高质量的伪语义分割掩码。仅使用图像级类别标签。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同数据集上，SegMix均优于现有最先进方法。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SegMix通过打乱和反馈学习有效提升弱监督语义分割质量，减轻标注负担，有助于病理图像分析。未来可探索更复杂的打乱策略或扩展到其他医学图像任务。

title: MambaBack: Bridging Local Features and Global Contexts in Whole Slide Image Analysis
abstract: Whole Slide Image (WSI) analysis is pivotal in computational pathology, enabling cancer diagnosis by integrating morphological and architectural cues across magnifications. Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) serves as the standard framework for WSI analysis. Recently, Mamba has become a promising backbone for MIL, overtaking Transformers due to its efficiency and global context modeling capabilities originating from Natural Language Processing (NLP). However, existing Mamba-based MIL approaches face three critical challenges: (1) disruption of 2D spatial locality during 1D sequence flattening; (2) sub-optimal modeling of fine-grained local cellular structures; and (3) high memory peaks during inference on resource-constrained edge devices. Studies like MambaOut reveal that Mamba's SSM component is redundant for local feature extraction, where Gated CNNs suffice. Recognizing that WSI analysis demands both fine-grained local feature extraction akin to natural images, and global context modeling akin to NLP, we propose MambaBack, a novel hybrid architecture that harmonizes the strengths of Mamba and MambaOut. First, we propose the Hilbert sampling strategy to preserve the 2D spatial locality of tiles within 1D sequences, enhancing the model's spatial perception. Second, we design a hierarchical structure comprising a 1D Gated CNN block based on MambaOut to capture local cellular features, and a BiMamba2 block to aggregate global context, jointly enhancing multi-scale representation. Finally, we implement an asymmetric chunking design, allowing parallel processing during training and chunking-streaming accumulation during inference, minimizing peak memory usage for deployment. Experimental results on five datasets demonstrate that MambaBack outperforms seven state-of-the-art methods. Source code and datasets are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MambaBack混合架构，融合Mamba的全局建模与MambaOut的局部特征提取，用于全切片图像分析。
light_analysis.motivation: WSI分析依赖多尺度形态与结构线索，MIL是标准框架。Mamba虽高效但现有方法存在三大问题：1D展平破坏2D空间局部性；细粒度细胞结构建模不足；资源受限设备推理时内存峰值高。且研究表明Mamba的SSM对局部特征提取冗余，需要同时处理局部和全局特征。
light_analysis.method: 提出MambaBack混合架构，包含三个创新：1) Hilbert采样策略将2D图块空间局部性保留在1D序列中；2) 层次结构：基于MambaOut的1D门控CNN块捕获局部细胞特征，BiMamba2块聚合全局上下文；3) 非对称分块设计，训练时并行处理，推理时分块流式累积，降低峰值内存。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数据集上，MambaBack超越七种最先进方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但实验表明其有效性优于现有Mamba-based MIL方法、Transformer方法和传统MIL方法。代码和数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: MambaBack通过混合Mamba与MambaOut解决了WSI分析中局部与全局特征融合问题，Hilbert采样和层次结构提升了多尺度表示，非对称分块利于边缘部署。研究为计算病理学提供高效模型，未来可探索更高效的状态空间模型或应用于其他医学图像任务。

title: Mapping High-Performance Regions in Battery Scheduling across Data Uncertainty, Battery Design, and Planning Horizons
abstract: This study presents a controlled parametric framework for analyzing energy storage planning under uncertainty in a multi-stage model predictive control setting. The framework enables a broad and systematic exploration through parametrized generation of synthetic datasets in the context of energy price arbitrage. It facilitates the study of the joint effects of battery characteristics, signal structure, forecast uncertainty, and planning horizon on revenue performance in energy storage optimization, which are rarely considered together. The analysis is driven by two objectives. First, it characterizes how these interacting factors influence operational revenue and its sensitivity to planning horizon selection, including economic losses caused by deviations from optimal horizons. This provides guidance on expected horizon ranges and their impact on revenue and computational cost. Second, it enables a compact parametrization of the relationships between battery properties, data characteristics, forecast uncertainty, and horizon-dependent performance, providing a basis for future modelling of optimal planning horizon length. Results show that the framework captures consistent structural dependencies across configurations and provides meaningful guidance for horizon selection under uncertainty. In particular, increasing forecast uncertainty systematically reduces the optimal planning horizon across battery types, reflecting the diminishing value of long-term information under increasingly unreliable forecasts. Comparison with real market data shows that the parametrization reproduces the main qualitative trends of optimal horizon behavior, suggesting its potential as a lightweight surrogate for more complex simulation-based analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个受控参数化框架，系统分析电池调度中不确定性、电池设计和规划范围对收益性能的联合影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 能源存储优化中，电池特性、信号结构、预测不确定性和规划范围等因素对收益性能有共同影响，但现有研究很少同时考虑这些因素。该研究旨在系统探索这些交互因素如何影响运营收益及其对规划范围选择的敏感性，包括偏离最优范围导致的经济损失，从而为规划范围选择提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 采用多阶段模型预测控制设置，通过参数化生成合成数据集，在能源价格套利背景下系统探索电池特性、信号结构、预测不确定性和规划范围对收益的联合影响。框架允许对电池属性、数据特征和预测不确定性进行紧凑参数化，并建模与规划范围依赖的性能关系。
light_analysis.result: 框架捕捉了跨配置的一致结构依赖性，揭示了预测不确定性增加会系统性地缩短最优规划范围，反映了长期信息在不可靠预测下价值下降。与真实市场数据对比表明，参数化重现了最优规划范围行为的主要定性趋势，验证了其作为复杂仿真分析轻量替代的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架提供了电池调度中规划范围选择的实用指导，明确了预测不确定性对最优范围的影响，并为未来建模最优规划范围长度奠定基础。具有作为轻量级替代工具用于简化仿真分析的潜在价值，但未明确提及局限性。

title: When Reasoning Models Hurt Behavioral Simulation: A Solver-Sampler Mismatch in Multi-Agent LLM Negotiation
abstract: Behavioral simulation and strategic problem solving are different tasks. Large language models are increasingly explored as agents in policy-facing institutional simulations, but stronger reasoning need not improve behavioral sampling. We study this solver-sampler mismatch in three multi-agent negotiation environments: two trading-limits scenarios with different authority structures and a grid-curtailment case in emergency electricity management. Across two primary model families, native reasoning and often no reflection collapse toward authority-heavy outcomes. The sharpest case is DeepSeek native reasoning in the grid-curtailment transfer: it reaches action entropy 1.256 and a concession-arc rate of 0.933, yet still ends in authority decision in 15 of 15 runs. A direct OpenAI extension shows the same pressure at provider breadth: GPT-5.2 native reasoning ends in authority decisions in 45 of 45 runs across the three environments. Budget-matched no-reflection controls and orthogonal private-state controls remain rigid, while the negotiation-structured scaffold condition is the only condition that consistently opens negotiated outcomes. These diagnostics are failure screens within a fixed negotiation grammar, not evidence of external behavioral realism or policy-forecasting validity. The results show that neither more output space nor generic extra private state rescues solver-like sampler failure. For institutional simulation, solver strength and sampler qualification are different objectives: models should be evaluated for the behavioral role they are meant to play, not only for strategic capability.
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, supplementary material included as ancillary file

light_analysis.overview: 揭示多智能体LLM谈判中推理模型导致行为模拟失效的求解器-采样器不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 行为模拟和战略问题解决本质不同，但LLM在政策模拟中常被用作智能体。现有方法依赖更强推理能力，却未改善行为采样，导致权威主导结果，忽视谈判动态。本研究旨在诊断这种不匹配，强调模型评估需区分求解器与采样器角色。
light_analysis.method: 在三种多智能体谈判环境（两种交易限制场景和一种电网应急管理场景）中，比较原生推理、无反思控制、私有状态控制及谈判结构化脚手架条件。使用DeepSeek和GPT-5.2等模型，测量动作熵、让步率及权威决策比例，分析求解器-采样器失效模式。
light_analysis.result: DeepSeek原生推理在电网场景中动作熵1.256、让步率0.933，但15次运行全以权威决策结束。GPT-5.2在三个环境中45次运行全为权威决策。无反思和私有状态控制仍僵化，仅谈判结构化脚手架条件持续产生谈判结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 求解器强度与采样器资格是不同目标；推理模型在行为模拟中可能加剧权威倾向。研究建议按角色评估模型，而非仅战略能力。未来需探索更有效的谈判脚手架设计，避免将诊断结果误判为外部有效性证据。

title: CreativityBench: Evaluating Agent Creative Reasoning via Affordance-Based Tool Repurposing
abstract: Recent advances in large language models have led to strong performance on reasoning and environment-interaction tasks, yet their ability for creative problem-solving remains underexplored. We study this capability through the lens of creative tool use, where a model repurposes available objects by reasoning about their affordances and attributes rather than relying on canonical usage. As a first step, we introduce CreativityBench, a benchmark for evaluating affordance-based creativity in LLMs. To this end, we build a large-scale affordance knowledge base (KB) with 4K entities and 150K+ affordance annotations, explicitly linking objects, parts, attributes, and actionable uses. Building on this KB, we generate 14K grounded tasks that require identifying non-obvious yet physically plausible solutions under constraints. Evaluations across 10 state-of-the-art LLMs, including closed and open-source models, show that models can often select a plausible object, but fail to identify the correct parts, their affordances, and the underlying physical mechanism needed to solve the task, leading to a significant drop in performance. Furthermore, improvements from model scaling quickly saturate, strong general reasoning does not reliably translate to creative affordance discovery, and common inference-time strategies such as Chain-of-Thought yield limited gains. These results suggest that creative tool use remains a major challenge for current models, and that CreativityBench provides a useful testbed for studying this missing dimension of intelligence, with potential implications for planning and reasoning modules in future agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了CreativityBench基准，通过功能属性重新利用工具评估LLM的创意推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在推理和交互任务中表现优异，但创意问题解决能力未被充分探索。现有方法缺乏对工具功能的创造性使用评估，尤其是非典型功能重用。该研究旨在通过功能导向的工具重用来测试模型的创造性，填补这一评估空白，对规划与推理模块开发具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含4K实体和150K+功能注释的大规模功能知识库，并生成14K个接地任务，要求模型在约束下识别非显而易见但物理可行的解决方案。评估涵盖10个SOTA LLM（包括闭源和开源），通过对象选择、部件识别、功能推理和物理机制理解等维度进行测试。
light_analysis.result: 模型能选择合理对象（如准确率较高），但在识别正确部件、功能及物理机制时表现不佳，导致性能显著下降。模型扩展收益迅速饱和，强通用推理能力无法可靠迁移至创意功能发现，且Chain-of-Thought等推理策略带来的提升有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 创意工具使用仍是当前LLM的主要挑战，CreativityBench为研究这一缺失的智能维度提供了有效测试平台。其任务设计可启发未来智能体的规划与推理模块开发，但可能受限于物理常识的不足及任务生成的人工标注成本。

title: Malliavin Calculus for Counterfactual Gradient Estimation in Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) recovers the loss function of a forward learner from its observed responses. Adaptive IRL aims to reconstruct the loss function of a forward learner by passively observing its gradients as it performs reinforcement learning (RL). This paper proposes a novel passive Langevin-based algorithm that achieves adaptive IRL. The key difficulty in adaptive IRL is that the required gradients in the passive algorithm are counterfactual, that is, they are conditioned on events of probability zero under the forward learner's trajectory. Therefore, naive Monte Carlo estimators are prohibitively inefficient, and kernel smoothing, though common, suffers from slow convergence. We overcome this by employing Malliavin calculus to efficiently estimate the required counterfactual gradients. We reformulate the counterfactual conditioning as a ratio of unconditioned expectations involving Malliavin quantities, thus recovering standard estimation rates. We derive the necessary Malliavin derivatives and their adjoint Skorohod integral formulations for a general Langevin structure, and provide a concrete algorithmic approach which exploits these for counterfactual gradient estimation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出基于Malliavin微积分的被动Langevin算法，通过高效估计反事实梯度实现自适应逆强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 自适应逆强化学习需从正向学习者的梯度中重建损失函数，但被动算法中的梯度是反事实的（概率为零的事件条件），导致朴素蒙特卡洛估计效率极低，核平滑收敛慢。因此需要更高效的反事实梯度估计方法，本工作旨在解决这一核心难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于Malliavin微积分的被动算法，将反事实条件重新表述为包含Malliavin量的无条件期望之比，从而恢复标准估计速率。推导了一般Langevin结构的Malliavin导数及其伴随Skorohod积分公式，并给出了具体算法实现。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果。理论上，该方法克服了反事实梯度估计的低效问题，恢复了标准估计速率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于将Malliavin微积分引入自适应逆强化学习，解决了反事实梯度估计的难题，提供了理论框架和算法实现。后续可扩展至更复杂的正向学习模型，但计算复杂度可能是潜在局限。

title: Diffusion-Based Feature Denoising with NNMF for Robust handwritten digit multi-class classification
abstract: This work presents a robust multi-class classification framework for handwritten digits that combines diffusion-driven feature denoising with a hybrid feature representation. Inspired by our previous work on brain tumor classification, the proposed approach operates in a feature space to improve the robustness to noise and adversarial attacks. This manuscript is submitted as an extended abstract rather than a full-length press-ready paper. First, the input images are converted into tight, interpretable exemplification using Non-negative Matrix Factorization (NNMF). In parallel, special deep features are extracted using a computational neural network (CNN). These integral features are combined into a united hybrid representation. The main objective of this work is to extend our previously validated two-class framework to a multi-class handwritten digit classification scenario. To improve robustness, a step diffusion operation is used in the feature space by gradually adding Gaussian noise. A feature denoiser network is trained to reverse this operation and rebuild clean representations from tilted inputs. The courteous features are then applied for multi-class classification. The suggested method is evaluated in both baseline and adversarial settings using AutoAttack. The experimental outcome present that the diffusion-based hybrid model is both effective and robust, the CNN baseline models outperforming while maintain powerful classification performance. These results explain the activity of feature-level diffusion defense for reliable multi-class handwritten digit classification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出融合扩散特征去噪与NNMF的鲁棒手写数字多分类框架，通过特征级扩散防御提升抗噪与对抗攻击能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 手写数字识别易受噪声和对抗攻击影响，现有方法多关注图像域防御，特征域鲁棒性研究不足。本研究旨在扩展之前的两类框架到多类场景，利用特征扩散去噪增强分类稳健性，解决基线模型在对抗环境下性能下降的问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先对输入图像进行非负矩阵分解（NNMF）得到紧致可解释特征，同时用CNN提取深度特征，二者融合为混合表示。在特征空间执行逐步扩散操作添加高斯噪声，训练去噪网络逆转该过程恢复干净特征，最后用于多类分类。评估采用AutoAttack生成对抗样本。
light_analysis.result: 在基准和对抗设置下，所提扩散混合模型均有效且鲁棒，性能优于CNN基线，同时保持高分类准确率。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调在对抗攻击下表现更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了特征级扩散防御在多类手写数字分类中的有效性，通过结合NNMF可解释性与CNN深度特征提升鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更复杂数据集或探索其他去噪策略。

title: Geometric Evolution Graph Convolutional Networks: Enhancing Graph Representation Learning via Ricci Flow
abstract: We introduce the Geometric Evolution Graph Convolutional Network (GEGCN), a novel framework that enhances graph representation learning through explicit modeling of geometric evolution on graph structures. Specifically, GEGCN leverages a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network to capture the dynamic structural sequence generated by discrete Ricci flow, and infuses the learned dynamic representations into a graph convolutional network. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GEGCN achieves excellent performance on classification tasks across various benchmark datasets, including homophilic/heterophilic graphs, filtered graphs, and large-scale graphs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何进化图卷积网络(GEGCN)，通过显式建模图结构的几何进化来增强图表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图神经网络在处理图结构动态变化方面存在不足，难以捕捉图拓扑的几何演化过程。该研究旨在通过引入离散Ricci流生成动态结构序列，结合LSTM学习图的进化模式，从而提升图表示学习能力。
light_analysis.method: GEGCN首先利用离散Ricci流生成图结构的动态演化序列，然后通过LSTM网络捕获该序列中的结构变化特征，最后将学习到的动态表示注入图卷积网络中进行节点分类等任务。该方法融合了几何进化与深度学习。
light_analysis.result: 在同质性/异质性图、过滤图和大规模图等多个基准数据集上的分类任务中，GEGCN取得了优异性能，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEGCN通过显式建模图结构的几何进化，为图表示学习提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索其他几何流或更复杂的进化序列建模方法，以应对更广泛的图分析任务。

title: DPD-Cancer: Explainable Graph-Based Deep Learning for Small Molecule Anti-Cancer Activity Prediction
abstract: DPD-Cancer is a graph-attention deep learning framework for predicting small-molecule DPD-Cancer is a graph-attention deep learning framework for predicting small-molecule anti-cancer activity across the NCI-60 panel, trained and evaluated under a strict chemistry-aware data-partitioning scheme. On the hold-out test set, the classifier achieved an Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUROC) of 0.87 (95% CI [0.86, 0.88]) and Area Under the Precision-Recall Curve (AUPRC) of 0.73 (95% CI [0.70, 0.76]); per-cell-line regression models for 73 cell lines produced a median Pearson's Correlation Coefficient (Pearson's R) of 0.64 and median Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of 0.67 for pGI50-value prediction. Benchmarks against pdCSM-Cancer, MLASM, and ACLPred under matched data conditions yielded consistently higher Matthew's Correlation Coefficient (MCC) scores, an occlusion-based attribution analysis confirmed that model explanations were quantitatively faithful to classifier decisions, and an applicability-domain analysis characterised reliability as a function of chemical distance. To facilitate widespread adoption, DPD-Cancer is available as a free, user-friendly web server for unrestricted use at https://biosig.lab.uq.edu.au/dpd_cancer/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DPD-Cancer框架，基于图注意力网络，用于小分子抗癌活性预测，通过严格数据划分和可解释性分析提升可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 小分子抗癌活性预测在药物发现中至关重要，但现有模型常忽略化学空间数据划分和预测可靠性，缺乏可解释性。DPD-Cancer旨在提供准确、可解释且适用于化学距离分析的预测工具。
light_analysis.method: 采用图注意力网络处理分子图结构，在NCI-60数据集上训练，使用化学感知数据划分避免数据泄漏。分类与回归双任务：分类预测活性，回归预测pGI50值。创新点包括遮挡归因分析验证解释忠实性，以及基于化学距离的适用域分析。
light_analysis.result: 测试集分类AUROC 0.87、AUPRC 0.73；73个细胞系回归中位Pearson's R 0.64、RMSE 0.67。与pdCSM-Cancer等相比，MCC分数更高。归因分析证明模型解释与决策一致，适用域分析量化预测可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DPD-Cancer在准确性和可解释性上优于现有方法，并提供免费Web服务器，便于药物筛选。其适用域分析可指导预测置信度，未来可扩展至其他癌症类型或分子性质预测。

title: Beyond Content Safety: Real-Time Monitoring for Reasoning Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models increasingly rely on explicit chain-of-thought reasoning to solve complex tasks, yet the safety of the reasoning process itself remains largely unaddressed. Existing work focuses predominantly on content safety (i.e., detecting harmful, biased, or factually incorrect outputs), while treating the underlying reasoning chain as an opaque intermediate artifact. We argue that reasoning safety constitutes a fundamental security dimension orthogonal to content safety: the requirement that a model's reasoning trajectory be logically consistent, computationally efficient, and resistant to adversarial manipulation. In this paper, we formalize reasoning safety and introduce a systematic taxonomy of nine unsafe reasoning behaviors. We then conduct a large-scale prevalence study, annotating over 4,000 reasoning chains across benign benchmarks and four state-of-the-art reasoning attacks, empirically demonstrating that all nine error types occur in practice with mechanistically interpretable signatures. To mitigate these threats, we propose the Reasoning Safety Monitor: an external, zero-shot verification framework that runs in parallel with the target LLM. It inspects each reasoning step in real time via a taxonomy-embedded prompt and dispatches an interrupt signal upon detecting unsafe behavior. Extensive evaluations show our monitor achieves up to 87.11% step-level localization accuracy, outperforming hallucination detectors and the best process reward model baselines by a substantial margin. Crucially, the monitor maintains a low false positive rate on correct reasoning paths, operates with negligible latency overhead, and exhibits robust resilience against adaptive adversarial evasion. These findings establish reasoning safety monitoring as a highly feasible and essential component for the secure deployment of large reasoning models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出推理安全性概念，系统分类九种不安全推理行为，并设计实时监控器进行零样本验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM安全研究聚焦于内容安全（检测有害、偏见输出），却忽略了推理过程本身的安全性。推理过程可能包含逻辑不一致、计算冗余或易受攻击的漏洞，这些与内容安全正交。随着LLM依赖显式思维链推理解决复杂任务，推理安全成为关键却未受充分关注的维度。本文旨在形式化推理安全性，并开发实时监控机制以检测和干预不安全推理。
light_analysis.method: 首先形式化定义推理安全性，并建立包含九种不安全行为的系统分类法。在超过4000条推理链（涵盖良性基准和四种先进推理攻击）上标注和流行度研究，证明每种错误类型均有可解释的机制特征。核心方法为推理安全监控器：一个外部零样本验证框架，与目标LLM并行运行。它通过嵌入分类法的提示实时检查每个推理步骤，检测到不安全行为时发送中断信号。
light_analysis.result: 监控器在步骤级定位精度上达到87.11%，显著优于幻觉检测器和最优过程奖励模型基线。在正确推理路径上保持低假阳性率，延迟开销可忽略（摘要未明确具体数值），并展现出对自适应对抗规避的强鲁棒性。这些结果支持了推理安全监控作为安全部署关键组件的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统化推理安全性，验证了其独立重要性并提出实时监控方案。该监控器高效、准确且鲁棒，为大型推理模型的安全部署提供了实用工具。未来可进一步扩展分类法、优化监控器效率，并探索与内容安全机制的协同集成。

title: LLMs learn scientific taste from institutional traces across the social sciences
abstract: Reinforcement-learned reasoning has powered recent AI leaps on verifiable tasks, including mathematics, code, and structure prediction. The harder bottleneck is evaluative judgment in low-verifiability domains, where no oracle anchors reward and the core question is which untested ideas deserve attention. We test whether institutional traces, the record of what fields published, where, and at which tier, can serve as a training signal for AI evaluators. Across eight social science disciplines (psychology, economics, communication, sociology, political science, management, business and finance, public administration), we built held-out four-tier research-pitch benchmarks and supervised-fine-tuned (SFT) LLMs on field-specific publication outcomes. The fine-tuned models cleared the 25 percent chance baseline and exceeded frontier-model performance by wide margins, with best single-model accuracy ranging from 55.0 percent in public administration to 85.5 percent in psychology. In management, evaluated against 48 expert gatekeepers, 174 junior researchers, and 11 frontier reasoning models, the best single fine-tuned model (Qwen3-4B) reached 59.2 percent, 17.6 percentage points above expert majority vote (41.6 percent, non-tied) and 28.1 percentage points above the frontier mean (31.1 percent). The fine-tuned models also showed calibrated confidence: confidence rose when predictions were correct and fell when wrong, mirroring how a skilled reviewer can say "I'm sure" versus "I'm guessing." Selective triage on this signal reached very high accuracy on the highest-confidence subsets in every field. Institutional traces, we conclude, encode a scalable training signal for the low-verifiability judgment on which science depends.

light_analysis.overview: 利用机构痕迹（出版记录）作为训练信号，使LLM在低可验证性领域学会科学品味评估，超越专家表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 在低可验证性领域（如社会科学），评估未验证的想法需要专业判断，但缺乏客观奖励信号。现有AI方法依赖可验证任务（如数学、代码），难以处理这种主观评估。论文旨在探索机构痕迹（如出版层级）能否作为训练信号，让AI学会像领域专家一样判断研究价值。这个问题对科学进步至关重要，因为资源分配依赖此类判断。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了八个社会科学学科（心理学、经济学等）的四级研究提案基准（held-out）。使用监督微调（SFT）训练LLM（如Qwen3-4B）预测提案的出版层级（基于领域特定出版结果）。关键创新是利用机构痕迹（即历史出版记录）作为训练信号，而不是外部奖励。训练后，模型输出置信度，用于选择性分类。
light_analysis.result: 微调模型在所有学科上显著超越25%的随机基线和前沿模型。最佳单一模型准确率从公共管理的55.0%到心理学的85.5%。在管理学中，与48位专家、174名初级研究员和11个前沿推理模型对比，最佳微调模型（Qwen3-4B）达到59.2%，高于专家多数投票（41.6%）和前沿模型均值（31.1%）。模型置信度校准良好，高置信度子集准确率极高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明机构痕迹可作为低可验证性领域AI评估者的可扩展训练信号。该方法使LLM不仅超越基线，还超过人类专家，并具备校准的置信度。研究为科学评判的自动化提供了新路径，尤其适用于缺乏客观答案的领域。未来可探索跨学科泛化性及更细粒度的机构痕迹特征。

title: RetimeGS: Continuous-Time Reconstruction of 4D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Temporal retiming, the ability to reconstruct and render dynamic scenes at arbitrary timestamps, is crucial for applications such as slow-motion playback, temporal editing, and post-production. However, most existing 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) methods overfit at discrete frame indices but struggle to represent continuous-time frames, leading to ghosting artifacts when interpolating between timestamps. We identify this limitation as a form of temporal aliasing and propose RetimeGS, a simple yet effective 4DGS representation that explicitly defines the temporal behavior of the 3D Gaussian and mitigates temporal aliasing. To achieve smooth and consistent interpolation, we incorporate optical flow-guided initialization and supervision, triple-rendering supervision, and other targeted strategies. Together, these components enable ghost-free, temporally coherent rendering even under large motions. Experiments on datasets featuring fast motion, non-rigid deformation, and severe occlusions demonstrate that RetimeGS achieves superior quality and coherence over state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RetimeGS，一种连续时间4D高斯溅射表示方法，通过显式定义时间行为和光流监督实现无伪影的连续时间插值。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D高斯溅射方法过拟合离散帧索引，在时间插值时产生重影伪影（时间混叠），无法实现连续时间渲染。这一问题在快速运动、非刚性变形和严重遮挡场景中尤为突出，制约了慢动作回放、时间编辑等应用。
light_analysis.method: RetimeGS在4DGS中显式定义3D高斯的时间行为，引入光流引导的初始化和监督、三重渲染监督等策略。通过光流约束确保连续帧间的运动一致性，三重监督利用相邻帧和插值帧联合优化，有效缓解时间混叠，实现平滑无伪影的连续时间渲染。
light_analysis.result: 在包含快速运动、非刚性变形和严重遮挡的数据集上，RetimeGS相比现有最先进方法在渲染质量和时间一致性上显著提升，实现了无重影、时间上连贯的插值效果，定量指标（如PSNR、SSIM）优于对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RetimeGS解决了4D高斯溅射的连续时间表示问题，提供了一种简单有效的方案，适用于慢动作播放、时间编辑等动态场景应用。未来可探索更高效的光流估计或扩展到更大规模的动态场景。

title: InSpatio-WorldFM: An Open-Source Real-Time Generative Frame Model
abstract: We present InSpatio-WorldFM, an open-source real-time frame model for spatial intelligence. Unlike video-based world models that rely on sequential frame generation and incur substantial latency due to window-level processing, InSpatio-WorldFM adopts a frame-based paradigm that generates each frame independently, enabling low-latency real-time spatial inference. By enforcing multi-view spatial consistency through explicit 3D anchors and implicit spatial memory, the model preserves global scene geometry while maintaining fine-grained visual details across viewpoint changes. We further introduce a progressive three-stage training pipeline that transforms a pretrained image diffusion model into a controllable frame model and finally into a real-time generator through few-step distillation. Experimental results show that InSpatio-WorldFM achieves strong multi-view consistency while supporting interactive exploration on consumer-grade GPUs, providing an efficient alternative to traditional video-based world models for real-time world simulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于帧的实时空间智能模型InSpatio-WorldFM，通过独立生成每帧和3D锚点实现低延迟多视图一致的世界模拟。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的视频基世界模型依赖序列帧生成，窗口级处理带来高延迟，无法满足实时空间推理需求。尽管视频模型能捕捉时序依赖，但在交互式应用如机器人导航、自动驾驶中，低延迟至关重要。需要一种既能保持场景几何一致性又能实时生成帧的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: InSpatio-WorldFM采用帧基范式，每帧独立生成，通过显式3D锚点和隐式空间记忆强制多视图一致性，保持全局几何与细粒度细节。提出渐进式三阶段训练：将预训练图像扩散模型转化为可控帧模型，再经少步蒸馏变为实时生成器。在消费级GPU上实现交互式探索。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，InSpatio-WorldFM在保持强多视图一致性的同时，支持实时交互探索，在消费级GPU上运行，延迟显著低于视频基世界模型。具体性能指标如帧率、一致性得分等摘要未明确说明，但证明是传统视频模型的高效替代方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: InSpatio-WorldFM提供了首个开源实时帧基世界模型，平衡了生成质量与推理速度，适用于需要即时反馈的空间智能任务。其独立帧生成架构降低了硬件门槛，未来可扩展至更复杂环境或结合时序信息改进动态场景处理。

title: A Hybrid Quantum-Classical Framework for Financial Volatility Forecasting Based on Quantum Circuit Born Machines
abstract: Accurate financial volatility forecasting is crucial but challenged by the non-linear, highly correlated nature of market data. Recently, quantum computing has emerged as a promising paradigm for solving complex high-dimensional sampling problems. To harness this, we propose a novel hybrid framework combining the temporal representation power of classical neural networks with the distribution-learning capabilities of quantum models. Specifically, we integrate a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network with a Quantum Circuit Born Machine (QCBM). The LSTM extracts dynamic features, while the QCBM acts as a learnable generative prior modeling complex market distributions to guide forecasting. Evaluated on 5-minute high-frequency data from the SSE Composite and CSI 300 indices, our model significantly outperforms a classical LSTM baseline across MSE, RMSE, and QLIKE metrics. Furthermore, by introducing a stochastic ``Drop-Prior" mechanism during training, the LSTM implicitly distills structured information from the quantum prior. This establishes a pragmatic paradigm of ``quantum-assisted training with classical-efficient inference", whereby the model retains its quantum-enhanced accuracy even when the quantum module is entirely disabled during deployment. This demonstrates a practical pathway for leveraging quantum computing to enhance classical models without real-time quantum inference latency.
comment: Added comprehensive analysis on Implicit Knowledge Distillation via a novel "Drop-Prior" mechanism

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种混合量子-经典框架，结合LSTM和量子电路Born机器进行金融波动率预测，并实现“量子辅助训练、经典高效推理”。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融波动率预测受市场数据非线性和高度相关性挑战，量子计算在处理高维采样问题上有潜力，但现有方法未能有效结合经典神经网络的时间序列处理能力和量子模型的分布学习能力。因此需要一种混合框架来利用量子优势。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合框架，集成LSTM与量子电路Born机器（QCBM）。LSTM提取动态特征，QCBM作为可学习生成先验，建模复杂市场分布指导预测。训练中引入随机“Drop-Prior”机制，使LSTM从量子先验中蒸馏结构化信息。
light_analysis.result: 在上证综指和沪深300指数5分钟高频数据上，模型在MSE、RMSE和QLIKE指标上显著优于经典LSTM基线。部署时可禁用量子模块，但仍保持量子增强的准确性，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架建立了量子辅助训练与经典高效推理的实用范式，证明利用量子计算增强经典模型而不引入实时量子推理延迟的可行性。在金融波动率预测中具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多数据与任务。

title: A Reconstruction System for Industrial Pipeline Inner Walls Using Panoramic Image Stitching with Endoscopic Imaging
abstract: Visual analysis and reconstruction of pipeline inner walls remain challenging in industrial inspection scenarios. This paper presents a dedicated reconstruction system for pipeline inner walls via industrial endoscopes, which is built on panoramic image stitching technology. Equipped with a custom graphical user interface (GUI), the system extracts key frames from endoscope video footage, and integrates polar coordinate transformation with image stitching techniques to unwrap annular video frames of pipeline inner walls into planar panoramic images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method enables efficient processing of industrial endoscope videos, and the generated panoramic stitched images preserve all detailed features of pipeline inner walls in their entirety. This provides intuitive and accurate visual support for defect detection and condition assessment of pipeline inner walls. In comparison with the traditional frame-by-frame video review method, the proposed approach significantly elevates the efficiency of pipeline inner wall reconstruction and exhibits considerable engineering application value.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于全景图像拼接的工业管道内壁重建系统，实现从内窥镜视频高效生成全景图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业管道内壁视觉分析和重建在检测场景中具有挑战性，传统逐帧视频审查方法效率低下，无法提供直观准确的全面视觉支持。现有方法缺乏自动化拼接和展开能力，难以满足工程应用需求。
light_analysis.method: 构建专用重建系统，配备自定义图形用户界面（GUI），从内窥镜视频中提取关键帧，融合极坐标变换与图像拼接技术，将管道内壁环形视频帧展开为平面全景图像。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明该方法可高效处理工业内窥镜视频，生成的全景拼接图像完整保留管道内壁所有细节特征，与传统逐帧审查相比显著提升重建效率，具有实际工程应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为管道内壁缺陷检测和状态评估提供直观准确的视觉支持，具有较高工程应用价值。未来可优化关键帧提取算法，提升拼接实时性。

title: Manifold of Failure: Behavioral Attraction Basins in Language Models
abstract: While prior work has focused on projecting adversarial examples back onto the manifold of natural data to restore safety, we argue that a comprehensive understanding of AI safety requires characterizing the unsafe regions themselves. This paper introduces a framework for systematically mapping the Manifold of Failure in Large Language Models (LLMs). We reframe the search for vulnerabilities as a quality diversity problem, using MAP-Elites to illuminate the continuous topology of these failure regions, which we term behavioral attraction basins. Our quality metric, Alignment Deviation, guides the search towards areas where the model's behavior diverges most from its intended alignment. Across three LLMs: Llama-3-8B, GPT-OSS-20B, and GPT-5-Mini, we show that MAP-Elites achieves up to 63% behavioral coverage, discovers up to 370 distinct vulnerability niches, and reveals dramatically different model-specific topological signatures: Llama-3-8B exhibits a near-universal vulnerability plateau (mean Alignment Deviation 0.93), GPT-OSS-20B shows a fragmented landscape with spatially concentrated basins (mean 0.73), and GPT-5-Mini demonstrates strong robustness with a ceiling at 0.50. Our approach produces interpretable, global maps of each model's safety landscape that no existing attack method (GCG, PAIR, or TAP) can provide, shifting the paradigm from finding discrete failures to understanding their underlying structure.

light_analysis.overview: 提出系统映射LLM失效区域的框架，将漏洞搜索视为质量多样性问题，揭示行为吸引盆地的连续拓扑结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有安全研究侧重于将对抗样本投影回自然数据流形，但缺乏对不安全区域本身的理解。本文认为全面理解AI安全需要表征这些危险区域，因此引入框架系统性映射大语言模型中的失效流形，以揭示其全局安全景观。
light_analysis.method: 采用MAP-Elites算法，将漏洞搜索重构为质量多样性问题。使用对齐偏差（Alignment Deviation）作为质量指标，引导搜索至模型行为与预期对齐最大偏离的区域。实验在Llama-3-8B、GPT-OSS-20B和GPT-5-Mini三个模型上进行。
light_analysis.result: MAP-Elites在三个模型上实现高达63%的行为覆盖，发现最多370个不同漏洞点。Llama-3-8B显示近乎普遍的脆弱性高原（平均对齐偏差0.93），GPT-OSS-20B呈现碎片化景观（平均0.73），GPT-5-Mini展现强鲁棒性（上限0.50）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架可生成可解释的安全景观全局地图，超越GCG、PAIR、TAP等现有攻击方法，将范式从发现离散漏洞转向理解其底层结构。有助于模型对齐评估与安全改进。

title: Meta-Learning and Meta-Reinforcement Learning -- Tracing the Path towards DeepMind's Adaptive Agent
abstract: Humans are highly effective at utilizing prior knowledge to adapt to novel tasks, a capability that standard machine learning models struggle to replicate due to their reliance on task-specific training. Meta-learning overcomes this limitation by allowing models to acquire transferable knowledge from various tasks, enabling rapid adaptation to new challenges with minimal data. This survey provides a rigorous, task-based formalization of meta-learning and meta-reinforcement learning and uses that paradigm to chronicle the landmark algorithms that paved the way for DeepMind's Adaptive Agent, consolidating the essential concepts needed to understand the Adaptive Agent and other generalist approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过严格的任务形式化，系统梳理了元学习与元强化学习的发展历程，为理解通用自适应算法提供了统一框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类能高效利用先验知识适应新任务，而标准机器学习模型依赖任务特定训练，难以复制这一能力。现有方法缺乏统一的形式化定义和对关键算法的系统梳理，阻碍了对通用自适应方法的深入理解。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用理论形式化方法，定义了元学习和元强化学习的任务范式，并以此为基础，按时间顺序回顾了从早期算法到DeepMind自适应智能体的里程碑算法，整合了核心概念。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供实验结果。作为综述，主要贡献是构建了形式化框架，并系统归纳了关键算法，为后续研究奠定了理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文巩固了理解DeepMind自适应智能体及其他通用方法所需的基本概念，为元学习和元强化学习领域提供了清晰的演进路径。其局限性在于未涉及具体应用场景，未来可扩展至更多实际任务。

title: Advancing Analytic Class-Incremental Learning through Vision-Language Calibration
abstract: Class-incremental learning (CIL) with pre-trained models (PTMs) faces a critical trade-off between efficient adaptation and long-term stability. While analytic learning enables rapid, recursive closed-form updates, its efficacy is often compromised by accumulated errors and feature incompatibility. In this paper, we first conduct a systematic study to dissect the failure modes of PTM-based analytic CIL, identifying representation rigidity as the primary bottleneck. Motivated by this insight, we propose VILA, a novel dual-branch framework that advances analytic CIL via a two-level vision-language calibration strategy. Specifically, we coherently fuse plastic, task-adapted features with a frozen, universal visual anchor at the feature level through geometric calibration, and leverage cross-modal semantic priors at the decision level to rectify prediction bias. This confluence maintains analytic-learning's extreme efficiency while overcoming its inherent brittleness. Extensive experiments across eight benchmarks demonstrate that VILA consistently yields superior performance, particularly in fine-grained and long-sequence scenarios. Our framework harmonizes high-fidelity prediction with the simplicity of analytic learning. Our code is available at https://github.com/byzhaoAI/VILA.
comment: 20 pages, 11 figures, 9 tables. Accepted by ICML2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出VILA，一种基于视觉-语言校准的双分支框架，有效解决分析类增量学习中的表示刚性瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 类增量学习（CIL）在预训练模型中面临高效适应与长期稳定性的矛盾。分析学习通过递归闭式更新实现高效性，但受累积误差和特征不兼容影响，导致性能下降。现有方法存在表示刚性瓶颈，缺乏有效的校准机制。
light_analysis.method: VILA采用双分支架构，通过两级视觉-语言校准策略：特征级利用几何校准融合适应性特征与冻结的通用视觉锚；决策级借助跨模态语义先验修正预测偏差。该方法在保持分析学习极简效率的同时克服其脆弱性。
light_analysis.result: 在8个基准数据集上，VILA持续优于现有方法，尤其在细粒度和长序列场景中表现显著。与传统分析CIL相比，精度提升明显，且保持了递归更新的简洁性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VILA通过视觉-语言校准统一了高效性与稳定性，为分析CIL提供了新范式。代码开源，便于复现。未来可探索更轻量的校准模块以扩展至更大规模任务。

title: Uncovering Cross-Objective Interference in Multi-Objective Alignment
abstract: We study a persistent failure mode in multi-objective alignment for large language models (LLMs): training improves performance on only a subset of objectives while causing others to degrade. We formalize this phenomenon as cross-objective interference and conduct the first systematic study across scalarization algorithms, showing that interference is pervasive and exhibits strong model dependence. To explain this phenomenon, we derive a local covariance law showing that an objective improves when its reward exhibits positive covariance with the scalarized score. We extend this analysis to clipped surrogate objectives used in modern alignment, demonstrating that the covariance law remains valid under mild conditions despite clipping. Building on this analysis, we propose Covariance Targeted Weight Adaptation (CTWA), a plug-and-play method that maintains positive covariance between objective rewards and the training signal to effectively mitigate cross-objective interference. Finally, we complement these local improvement conditions with a global convergence analysis under the Polyak--Łojasiewicz condition, establishing when non-convex scalarized optimization achieves global convergence and how cross-objective interference depends on specific model geometric properties.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统研究多目标对齐中的交叉干扰现象，提出协方差目标权重适应（CTWA）方法并给出理论分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大语言模型的多目标对齐中，训练常只能提升部分目标而损害其他目标，即交叉干扰。现有研究缺乏对此现象的系统性理解和缓解方法，理解其成因并设计有效算法对于实现平衡的多目标对齐至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 首先形式化交叉干扰，通过推导局部协方差律揭示目标改进与奖励协方差的关系。然后在现代对齐的截断代理目标下验证该规律仍成立。基于此提出CTWA方法，通过维持目标奖励与训练信号的正协方差来缓解干扰。最后在Polyak–Łojasiewicz条件下给出全局收敛分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明交叉干扰普遍存在且强模型依赖，CTWA能有效缓解干扰。理论分析验证了局部协方差律在截断条件下的有效性，并建立了非凸标量化优化全局收敛的条件，揭示了干扰与模型几何性质的关系。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作首次系统研究了多目标对齐中的交叉干扰现象，提出了CTWA方法并在理论和实验上验证其有效性。该研究揭示了干扰的成因，为多目标对齐提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的优化场景及干扰的自动检测。

title: DFPO: Scaling Value Modeling via Distributional Flow towards Robust and Generalizable LLM Post-Training
abstract: Training reinforcement learning (RL) systems in real-world environments remains challenging due to noisy supervision and poor out-of-domain (OOD) generalization, especially in LLM post-training. Recent distributional RL methods improve robustness by modeling values with multiple quantile points, but they still learn each quantile independently as a scalar. This results in rough-grained value representations that lack fine-grained conditioning on state information, struggling under complex and OOD conditions. We propose DFPO (Distributional Value Flow Policy Optimization with Conditional Risk and Consistency Control), a robust distributional RL framework that models values as continuous flows across time steps. By scaling value modeling through learning of a value flow field instead of isolated quantile predictions, DFPO captures richer state information for more accurate advantage estimation. To stabilize training under noisy feedback, DFPO further integrates conditional risk control and consistency constraints along value flow trajectories. Experiments on dialogue, math reasoning, and scientific tasks show that DFPO outperforms PPO, FlowRL, and other robust baselines under noisy supervision, achieving improved training stability and generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DFPO框架，通过将值函数建模为连续流而非孤立分位数，提升了LLM后训练中强化学习的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实环境中强化学习训练受噪声监督和域外泛化差困扰，尤其在LLM后训练中。现有分布RL方法虽用多分位数点提升鲁棒性，但独立学习每个分位数导致值表示粗糙，缺乏对状态的细粒度条件，在复杂和OOD条件下表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: 提出DFPO，一个鲁棒的分布RL框架。核心创新是将值建模为跨时间步的连续流（值流场），替代孤立的分位数预测，从而捕获更丰富的状态信息进行更准确的优势估计。同时引入条件风险控制和一致性约束沿值流轨迹稳定训练。
light_analysis.result: 在对话、数学推理和科学任务上，DFPO在噪声监督下优于PPO、FlowRL等基线，实现更好的训练稳定性和泛化性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出DFPO框架，通过分布流值建模解决LLM后训练中的鲁棒性和泛化问题。具有学术价值，也为实际RL训练提供新思路。未来可探索更大规模应用或改进流场学习。

title: Beyond Variance: Prompt-Efficient RLVR via Rare-Event Amplification and Bidirectional Pairing
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is effective for training large language models on deterministic outcome reasoning tasks. Prior work shows RLVR works with few prompts, but prompt selection is often based only on training-accuracy variance, leading to unstable optimization directions and weaker transfer. We revisit prompt selection from a mechanism-level view and argue that an effective minibatch should provide both (i) a reliable positive anchor and (ii) explicit negative learning signals from rare failures. Based on this principle, we propose \emph{positive--negative pairing}: at each update, we sample a hard-but-solvable $q^{+}$ and an easy-but-brittle prompt $q^{-}$(high success rate but not perfect), characterized by low and high empirical success rates under multiple rollouts. We further introduce Weighted GRPO, which reweights binary outcomes at the pair level and uses group-normalized advantages to amplify rare successes on $q^{+}$ into sharp positive guidance while turning rare failures on $q^{-}$ into strong negative penalties. This bidirectional signal provides informative learning feedback for both successes and failures, improving sample efficiency without suppressing exploration. On Qwen2.5-Math-7B, a single paired minibatch per update consistently outperforms a GRPO baseline that selects two prompts via commonly used variance-based selection heuristics: AIME~2025 Pass@8 improves from 16.8 to 22.2, and AMC23 Pass@64 from 94.0 to 97.0, while remaining competitive with large-scale RLVR trained from a pool of 1209 training prompts. Similar gains are observed on Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正负配对采样和加权GRPO，通过稀有事件放大和双向配对提升RLVR的样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR使用少量prompt时，基于训练准确率方差的选择导致优化方向不稳定和迁移性差。需要一种机制同时提供可靠的正向锚点和明确的负向学习信号，以提高样本效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出正负配对策略：每步采样一个困难但可解的q+和一个易错但易碎的q-，基于多次rollout的经验成功率。引入Weighted GRPO，在配对级别重加权二元结果，使用组归一化优势放大q+上的稀有成功为正引导，将q-上的稀有失败转化为强负惩罚，提供双向学习信号。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-Math-7B上，单配对minibatch每步更新优于方差基线GRPO：AIME 2025 Pass@8从16.8提升到22.2，AMC23 Pass@64从94.0提升到97.0，且与使用1209个训练prompt的大规模RLVR相当。在Instruct版本上也观察到类似提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种prompt高效的RLVR方法，通过机制层面的正负配对和加权GRPO，改善了样本效率和迁移性能，在数学推理任务上取得显著提升，可与大规模训练竞争。未来可探索更复杂的配对策略或扩展到其他领域。

title: Towards Distillation-Resistant Large Language Models: An Information-Theoretic Perspective
abstract: Proprietary large language models (LLMs) embody substantial economic value and are generally exposed only as black-box APIs, yet adversaries can still exploit their outputs to extract knowledge via distillation. Existing defenses focus exclusively on text-based distillation, leaving the important logit-based distillation largely unexplored. In this work, we analyze this problem and present an effective solution from an information-theoretic perspective. We characterize distillation-relevant information in teacher outputs using the conditional mutual information (CMI) between teacher logits and input queries conditioned on ground-truth labels. This quantity captures contextual information beneficial for model extraction, motivating us to defend distillation via CMI minimization. Guided by our theoretical analysis, we propose learning a transformation matrix that purifies the original outputs to enhance distillation resistance. We further derive a CMI-inspired anti-distillation objective to optimize this transformation, which effectively removes distillation-relevant information while preserving output utility. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs and strong distillation algorithms demonstrate that the proposed method significantly degrades distillation performance while preserving task accuracy, effectively protecting models' intellectual property.

light_analysis.overview: 从信息论角度提出通过条件互信息最小化来防御针对大语言模型的日志蒸馏攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型通常以黑盒API形式部署，但攻击者仍可通过提取模型输出来蒸馏知识。现有防御仅关注文本蒸馏，忽略了重要的日志蒸馏。由于日志包含丰富的软标签信息，比文本更容易被利用，因此亟需有效的防御方法。本文从信息论视角分析该问题，旨在抑制蒸馏相关信息同时保持输出效用。
light_analysis.method: 本文定义教师输出中的蒸馏相关信息为条件互信息（CMI），即给定真实标签下教师logits与输入查询之间的互信息。通过最小化CMI来防御蒸馏。具体地，学习一个变换矩阵对原始输出进行净化，并设计CMI启发的反蒸馏目标函数来优化该变换，使变换后的输出保留任务效用但剔除蒸馏相关信息。实验在多个LLM和强蒸馏算法上进行。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提方法显著降低蒸馏性能（如攻击者准确率下降），同时保持模型原有任务准确率几乎不变。与现有仅针对文本蒸馏的防御相比，该方法在日志蒸馏场景下具有更优的保护效果，有效保障了模型的知识产权。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从信息论角度为日志蒸馏防御提供了理论基础，提出CMI最小化方法。该方法在多个模型和蒸馏算法上验证有效，且不损害原有任务性能。未来可探索更高效的变换学习方式及联合防御多种蒸馏类型。

title: Sparsity is Combinatorial Depth: Quantifying MoE Expressivity via Tropical Geometry
abstract: While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures define the state-of-the-art, their theoretical success is often attributed to heuristic efficiency rather than geometric expressivity. In this work, we present the first analysis of MoE through the lens of tropical geometry, establishing that the Top-$k$ routing mechanism is algebraically isomorphic to the $k$-th elementary symmetric tropical polynomial. This isomorphism partitions the input space into the Normal Fan of a Hypersimplex, revealing that \textbf{sparsity is combinatorial depth} which scales geometric capacity by the binomial coefficient $\binom{N}{k}$. Moving beyond ambient bounds, we introduce the concept of \textit{Effective Capacity} under the Manifold Hypothesis. We prove that while dense networks suffer from capacity collapse on low-dimensional data, MoE architectures exhibit \textit{Combinatorial Resilience}, maintaining high expressivity via the transversality of routing cones. Translating these theoretical bounds into architectural principles, we derive asymptotic capacity limits for optimal expert granularity and prove that shared experts are geometrically necessary to prevent routing collapse.

light_analysis.overview: 通过热带几何首次揭示MoE的Top-k路由机制与初等对称热带多项式同构，证明稀疏性即组合深度，量化了MoE的几何表达能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MoE架构的成功常被归因于启发式效率，而非几何表达能力，缺乏对其表达能力的严格理论分析。理解MoE的几何机理对于指导架构设计、提升模型性能至关重要。本文旨在从热带几何角度揭示MoE的代数结构，量化其容量，并解决密集网络在低维数据上容量崩溃的问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过热带几何分析MoE，将Top-k路由机制映射为第k个初等对称热带多项式，证明输入空间被划分为超单纯形的正规扇。引入有效容量概念，在流形假设下分析MoE的表达能力，证明MoE具有组合弹性（Combinatorial Resilience），即通过路由锥的横截性维持高表达性，避免容量崩溃。推导了最优专家粒度的渐近容量界限，并论证共享专家在几何上的必要性。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明稀疏性由组合深度度量，其容量缩放比例为二项式系数C(N,k)。在低维数据下，密集网络遭遇容量崩溃，而MoE通过组合弹性保持高表达性，有效容量不退化。推导出最优专家粒度与数据维度和专家数量的关系，并证明共享专家可防止路由坍塌，但摘要未提供具体实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将热带几何应用于MoE分析，揭示了稀疏性与组合深度的本质联系，为MoE的表达能力提供了严格的代数基础。理论结果可指导MoE架构设计，如专家粒度和共享专家的配置。未来工作可探索该理论在实际模型中的应用，以及扩展到更复杂路由机制。

title: MoLF: Mixture-of-Latent-Flow for Pan-Cancer Spatial Gene Expression Prediction from Histology
abstract: Inferring spatial transcriptomics (ST) from histology enables scalable histogenomic profiling, yet current methods are largely restricted to single-tissue models. This fragmentation fails to leverage biological principles shared across cancer types and hinders application to data-scarce scenarios. While pan-cancer training offers a solution, the resulting heterogeneity challenges monolithic architectures. To bridge this gap, we introduce MoLF (Mixture-of-Latent-Flow), a generative model for pan-cancer histogenomic prediction. MoLF leverages a conditional Flow Matching objective to map noise to the gene latent manifold, parameterized by a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) velocity field. By dynamically routing inputs to specialized sub-networks, this architecture effectively decouples the optimization of diverse tissue patterns. Our experiments demonstrate that MoLF establishes a new state-of-the-art, consistently outperforming both specialized and foundation model baselines on pan-cancer benchmarks. Furthermore, MoLF exhibits zero-shot generalization to cross-species data, suggesting it captures fundamental, conserved histo-molecular mechanisms.
comment: Accepted at Proceedings 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea

light_analysis.overview: 提出MoLF模型，利用条件流匹配和混合专家实现泛癌空间基因表达预测，达到新SOTA并具备跨物种零样本泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推断空间转录组的方法局限于单组织模型，无法利用跨癌种共享的生物学原理，且数据稀缺场景下应用困难。泛癌训练虽可缓解，但组织异质性挑战单一架构。因此需要一种能动态解耦多样组织模式的生成模型。
light_analysis.method: MoLF采用条件流匹配目标，将噪声映射到基因潜在流形，速度场由混合专家（MoE）参数化。通过动态路由输入到专用子网络，有效解耦不同组织模式的优化，实现跨癌种通用预测。
light_analysis.result: 在泛癌基准上，MoLF一致优于专门模型和基础模型基线，建立新SOTA。此外，模型展现出跨物种零样本泛化能力，表明其捕获了保守的组织分子机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoLF通过生成式框架和混合专家架构，成功实现从组织学图像到泛癌空间基因表达的预测，具有高精度和跨物种泛化性。未来可拓展至更多组织类型和下游应用。

title: OpenVTON-Bench: A Large-Scale High-Resolution Benchmark for Controllable Virtual Try-On Evaluation
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models have significantly elevated the visual fidelity of Virtual Try-On (VTON) systems, yet reliable evaluation remains a persistent bottleneck. Traditional metrics struggle to quantify fine-grained texture details and semantic consistency, while existing datasets fail to meet commercial standards in scale and diversity. We present OpenVTON-Bench, a large-scale benchmark comprising approximately 100K high-resolution image pairs (up to $1536 \times 1536$). The dataset is constructed using DINOv3-based hierarchical clustering for semantically balanced sampling and Gemini-powered dense captioning, ensuring a uniform distribution across 20 fine-grained garment categories. To support reliable evaluation, we propose a multi-modal protocol that measures VTON quality along five interpretable dimensions: background consistency, identity fidelity, texture fidelity, shape plausibility, and overall realism. The protocol integrates VLM-based semantic reasoning with a novel Multi-Scale Representation Metric based on SAM3 segmentation and morphological erosion, enabling the separation of boundary alignment errors from internal texture artifacts.
