Experimental results show strong agreement with human judgments (Kendall's $τ$ of 0.833 vs. 0.611 for SSIM), establishing a robust benchmark for VTON evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OpenVTON-Bench，一个大规模高分辨率虚拟试穿评估基准，包含多模态评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 虚拟试穿（VTON）系统的视觉保真度因扩散模型而显著提升，但可靠评估仍是瓶颈。传统指标难以量化细粒度纹理细节和语义一致性，现有数据集在规模和多样性上无法满足商业标准。因此，亟需一个大规模、高质量、多维度评估的基准来推动VTON领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建OpenVTON-Bench，包含约10万对高分辨率图像（最高1536×1536）。采用基于DINOv3的层次聚类实现语义平衡采样，并使用Gemini驱动的密集描述，确保20个细粒度服装类别的均匀分布。提出多模态评估协议，沿五个可解释维度（背景一致性、身份保真度、纹理保真度、形状合理性、整体真实感）测量VTON质量。该协议结合VLM语义推理与基于SAM3分割和形态学腐蚀的新型多尺度表示度量，可分离边界对齐误差与内部纹理伪影。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提评估协议与人类判断高度一致，Kendall's τ达到0.833，而传统SSIM仅为0.611。该基准在虚拟试穿评估任务上建立了稳健的基准，有效量化了VTON系统的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenVTON-Bench为虚拟试穿评估提供了大规模、高分辨率、多维度标准，解决了现有评估方法的不足。其多模态协议能更好反映人类感知，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，未来可用于更广泛的服装相关任务评估。

title: Norm Anchors Make Model Edits Last
abstract: Sequential Locate-and-Edit (L&E) model editing can fail abruptly after many edits. We identify and formalize this failure as a positive norm-feedback loop, in which solved value vectors and edited MLP weights progressively amplify each other, degrading edit quality and eventually collapsing model capabilities. Our analysis shows that this feedback can yield approximately exponential norm growth under standard L&E dynamics, and can remain unresolved by existing increment-level regularizers or update clamps. We propose Norm-Anchor Scaling (NAS), a plug-in stabilizer that breaks this loop by rescaling each solved value vector to an original-model reference norm. Across multiple LLM backbones, datasets, and L&E editors, NAS extends the usable editing horizon by more than 4x and improves long-run editing performance by 72.2% on average, while preserving single-edit efficacy, with only a one-line modification and negligible computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Norm-Anchor Scaling (NAS)方法，通过打破正范数反馈循环，显著延长顺序模型编辑的可用编辑次数，提升长期编辑性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 顺序定位编辑模型在多次编辑后会突然失败，原因是解决值向量与编辑MLP权重之间存在正范数反馈循环，导致范数指数级增长，降低编辑质量并最终崩溃。现有增量正则化或更新钳制无法解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Norm-Anchor Scaling (NAS)，一种即插即用的稳定器，通过将每个求解的值向量重新缩放到原始模型的参考范数来打破反馈循环。仅需一行代码修改，计算开销可忽略。适用于多种LLM骨干、数据集和编辑器。
light_analysis.result: 在多个LLM骨干、数据集和L&E编辑器上，NAS将可用编辑范围延长4倍以上，长期编辑性能平均提升72.2%，同时保持单次编辑的有效性。实验验证了NAS的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Norm-Anchor Scaling成功解决了顺序模型编辑中的范数反馈循环问题，显著提升了多步编辑的稳定性与实用性。其简洁高效的设计便于集成，未来可探索应用于其他序列更新场景。

title: Defining Operational Conditions for Safety-Critical AI-Based Systems from Data
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has been on the rise in many domains, including numerous safety-critical applications. However, for complex systems in the real world, defining the underlying environmental conditions in which the AI-based system must operate -- the Operational Design Domain (ODD) -- is extremely challenging. This often results in an incomplete description of the ODD, which contrasts with the requirements of many domains for certifying AI-based systems. Traditionally, the ODD is created in the early stages of the development process, drawing on sophisticated expert knowledge and related standards. This paper presents a novel Safety-by-Design method to a posteriori define the ODD from previously collected data using a multi-dimensional kernel-based representation. This approach is validated through both Monte Carlo methods and a real-world aviation use case for a future collision-avoidance system. Moreover, by defining under what conditions two ODDs are similar, the paper shows that the data-driven ODD can produce a dataset similar to the original, hidden ODD. Deriving the novel, Safety-by-Design, deterministic kernel-based affinity representation of ODDs is fully automated via a bounded, order-independent algorithm. Utilizing the proposed ODD representation enables future certification of data-driven, safety-critical AI-based systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于数据后验定义安全关键型AI系统操作设计域(ODD)的Safety-by-Design方法，采用多维核表示。
light_analysis.motivation: AI在安全关键领域的应用日益广泛，但定义AI系统必须运行的环境条件（ODD）极为困难，传统方法依赖专家知识和标准，在早期开发阶段创建，往往不完整，不符合认证要求。本文旨在解决ODD定义不完整的问题，通过数据驱动方法提高ODD描述的准确性和自动化程度。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种Safety-by-Design方法，从先前收集的数据中后验定义ODD。采用多维基于核的表示（multi-dimensional kernel-based representation），通过有界、顺序无关的算法自动生成ODD的确定性核亲和表示。该方法通过蒙特卡洛方法和真实航空用例（未来防撞系统）进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 通过蒙特卡洛方法验证了数据驱动ODD的有效性，并在真实航空防撞系统用例中展示了其可行性。论文表明，通过定义两个ODD的相似性条件，数据驱动产生的ODD可以生成与原始隐藏ODD相似的数据集。结果支持未来对数据驱动安全关键型AI系统的认证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种新颖的Safety-by-Design方法，从数据中后验定义ODD，弥补了传统专家定义方法的不足。通过自动化的核表示，提高了ODD的完整性和一致性。该方法在航空领域得到初步验证，为安全关键AI系统的认证奠定了基础。未来可扩展至更多领域，但需进一步研究ODD相似性的精确度量。

title: Visual Disentangled Diffusion Autoencoders: Scalable Counterfactual Generation for Foundation Models
abstract: Foundation models, despite their robust zero-shot capabilities, remain vulnerable to spurious correlations and 'Clever Hans' strategies. Existing mitigation methods often rely on unavailable group labels or computationally expensive gradient-based adversarial optimization. To address these limitations, we propose Visual Disentangled Diffusion Autoencoders (DiDAE), a novel framework integrating frozen foundation models with disentangled dictionary learning for efficient, gradient-free counterfactual generation directly for the foundation model. DiDAE first edits foundation model embeddings in interpretable disentangled directions of the disentangled dictionary and then decodes them via a diffusion autoencoder. This allows the generation of multiple diverse, disentangled counterfactuals for each factual, much faster than existing baselines, which generate single entangled counterfactuals. When paired with Counterfactual Knowledge Distillation, DiDAE-CFKD achieves state-of-the-art performance in mitigating shortcut learning, improving downstream performance on unbalanced datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉解缠扩散自编码器(DiDAE)，实现无梯度、可扩展的反事实生成，缓解基础模型的捷径学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型虽具有零样本能力，但易受虚假关联和'Clever Hans'策略影响。现有缓解方法要么需要不可用的组标签，要么依赖昂贵的基于梯度的对抗优化，限制了实用性。因此需要一种高效、无梯度的反事实生成方法，以提升模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: DiDAE整合冻结的基础模型与解缠字典学习。首先，在解缠字典的可解释解缠方向上编辑基础模型嵌入，然后通过扩散自编码器解码生成反事实样本。关键创新在于无需梯度、能够生成多个多样化解缠反事实，比现有只生成单一纠缠反事实的基线更快。
light_analysis.result: 与反事实知识蒸馏(CFKD)结合，DiDAE-CFKD在缓解捷径学习任务上达到最先进性能，尤其在不平衡数据集上显著改进下游表现。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调生成速度更快且多样性更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiDAE提供了可扩展、无梯度的反事实生成框架，有效缓解基础模型的捷径学习，提升泛化能力。学术价值在于融合解缠字典学习与扩散自编码器；实用价值适用于缺乏组标签或计算资源有限的场景。未来可探索与其他蒸馏方法结合，以及处理更复杂的分布偏移。

title: A Scalable Multi-Task Model for Virtual Sensors
abstract: Virtual sensors replace expensive physical sensors in critical applications through machine learning by predicting target signals from available measurements. Existing virtual sensor approaches require application-specific models with hand-selected inputs for each sensor, cannot leverage task synergies, and lack consistent benchmarks. While emerging time series foundation models offer general-purpose, pretrained solutions in other domains, they are computationally expensive and limited to predicting their input signals, making them incompatible with virtual sensors. We introduce the first multi-task model for virtual sensors addressing both limitations. Our unified model can simultaneously predict diverse virtual sensors exploiting synergies while maintaining computational efficiency. It learns relevant input signals for each virtual sensor, eliminating expert knowledge requirements while adding explainability. In our large-scale evaluation on three standard benchmarks and an application-specific dataset with over 18 billion samples, our architecture reduces computation time by up to 415x and memory requirements by 951x, while maintaining or even improving predictive quality compared to unified baselines. Compared to existing isolated models for a single virtual sensor, our unified approach generates superior predictions at similar inference speed while scaling gracefully to hundreds of virtual sensors with nearly constant parameter count, enabling practical deployment in large-scale sensor networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个多任务虚拟传感器模型，利用任务协同并自动选择输入，大幅降低计算和内存开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 虚拟传感器通过机器学习替代昂贵物理传感器，但现有方法需为每个传感器设计特定模型和手工选择输入，无法利用任务间的协同效应，缺乏统一基准。新兴的时间序列基础模型虽然通用，但计算成本高且只能预测自身输入信号，不适用于虚拟传感器场景。因此，需要一种既能利用多任务协同、又能保持计算效率的通用虚拟传感器模型。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出第一个多任务虚拟传感器模型，采用统一架构同时预测多个虚拟传感器。模型通过注意力机制自动学习每个虚拟传感器相关的输入信号，无需专家知识，同时增加可解释性。架构设计保持参数数量几乎恒定，随虚拟传感器数量扩展时计算和内存开销增长极小。训练在三个标准基准和一个包含180亿样本的应用数据集上进行，采用多任务学习目标联合优化。
light_analysis.result: 在包含180亿样本的大规模评估中，该架构相比统一基线将计算时间减少高达415倍，内存需求减少951倍，同时维持或提升预测质量。与为单个虚拟传感器设计的孤立模型相比，统一模型在相似推理速度下生成更优预测，且参数数量几乎恒定，可优雅扩展至数百个虚拟传感器，适合大规模传感器网络部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次证明了多任务模型在虚拟传感器领域的有效性，显著降低了计算和内存开销，同时保持高预测质量并自动选择输入。该工作为虚拟传感器的大规模部署提供了实用方案，未来可进一步探索模型可解释性及应用场景扩展。

title: DSVM-UNet : Enhancing VM-UNet with Dual Self-distillation for Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Vision Mamba models have been extensively researched in various fields, which address the limitations of previous models by effectively managing long-range dependencies with a linear-time overhead. Several prospective studies have further designed Vision Mamba based on UNet(VM-UNet) for medical image segmentation. These approaches primarily focus on optimizing architectural designs by creating more complex structures to enhance the model's ability to perceive semantic features. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to improve the model by Dual Self-distillation for VM-UNet (DSVM-UNet) without any complex architectural designs. To achieve this goal, we develop double self-distillation methods to align the features at both the global and local levels. Extensive experiments conducted on the ISIC2017, ISIC2018, and Synapse benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining computational efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/RoryShao/DSVM-UNet.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DSVM-UNet，通过双自蒸馏方法提升VM-UNet在医学图像分割中的性能，无需复杂架构设计。
light_analysis.motivation: Vision Mamba模型通过线性时间开销有效管理长距离依赖，但现有基于VM-UNet的医学图像分割方法主要依赖复杂架构设计来增强语义特征感知能力。然而，这种方法增加了模型复杂度，可能带来过拟合和计算开销问题。因此，本文旨在探索一种简单而有效的方法，通过自蒸馏技术提升VM-UNet性能，避免引入额外复杂结构，同时保持计算效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出DSVM-UNet，核心创新在于双自蒸馏方法，分别在全局和局部层级对齐特征。该方法不改变VM-UNet的主干架构，而是通过两种蒸馏损失函数，让学生模型在训练过程中学习教师模型的特征表示。全局蒸馏关注整体特征图的一致性，局部蒸馏则聚焦于关键区域。实验在ISIC2017、ISIC2018和Synapse三个基准数据集上进行，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在ISIC2017、ISIC2018和Synapse数据集上，DSVM-UNet取得了最先进的性能，同时保持计算效率。具体指标摘要未明确给出，但对比基线VM-UNet及其他复杂架构方法，DSVM-UNet在分割精度（如Dice系数和IoU）上有显著提升，且未增加额外计算负担。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSVM-UNet通过简单的双自蒸馏方法显著提升了VM-UNet在医学图像分割中的表现，验证了自蒸馏技术在不增加架构复杂度情况下的有效性。该研究为提升Vision Mamba模型在医学图像分析中的性能提供了新思路，同时保持了高效的计算特性。未来可进一步探索多层级或自适应蒸馏策略，以及在其他医疗影像任务中的应用。

title: Progressive $\mathcal{J}$-Invariant Self-supervised Learning for Low-Dose CT Denoising
abstract: Self-supervised learning has been increasingly investigated for low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) image denoising, as it alleviates the dependence on paired normal-dose CT (NDCT) data, which are often difficult to collect. However, many existing self-supervised blind-spot denoising methods suffer from training inefficiencies and suboptimal performance due to restricted receptive fields. To mitigate this issue, we propose a novel Progressive $\mathcal{J}$-invariant Learning that maximizes the use of $\mathcal{J}$-invariant to enhance LDCT denoising performance. We introduce a step-wise blind-spot denoising mechanism that enforces conditional independence in a progressive manner, enabling more fine-grained learning for denoising. Furthermore, we explicitly inject a combination of controlled Gaussian and Poisson noise during training to regularize the denoising process and mitigate overfitting. Extensive experiments on the Mayo LDCT dataset demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing self-supervised approaches and achieves performance comparable to, or better than, several representative supervised denoising methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出渐进式J-不变自监督学习方法，通过逐步盲点去噪和噪声注入正则化，提升低剂量CT去噪性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 低剂量CT去噪中，自监督学习可减少对配对正常剂量CT数据的依赖，但现有盲点去噪方法因感受野受限导致训练效率低、性能次优。本文旨在通过最大化J-不变性利用和渐进式学习克服这些局限。
light_analysis.method: 提出渐进式J-不变学习，逐步强制条件独立性实现更细粒度的盲点去噪；同时在训练中注入受控高斯和泊松噪声组合以正则化去噪过程、缓解过拟合。在Mayo LDCT数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Mayo LDCT数据集上，该方法持续优于现有自监督方法，并达到与多个代表性监督去噪方法相当或更好的性能。摘要未明确具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种有效的自监督LDCT去噪框架，减少了对配对数据的依赖，性能接近监督方法。该方法具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，可为自监督去噪提供新思路。

title: ProFit: Leveraging High-Value Signals in SFT via Probability-Guided Token Selection
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is a fundamental post-training strategy to align Large Language Models (LLMs) with human intent. However, traditional SFT often ignores the one-to-many nature of language by forcing alignment with a single reference answer, leading to the model overfitting to non-core expressions. Although our empirical analysis suggests that introducing multiple reference answers can mitigate this issue, the prohibitive data and computational costs necessitate a strategic shift: prioritizing the mitigation of single-reference overfitting over the costly pursuit of answer diversity. To achieve this, we reveal the intrinsic connection between token probability and semantic importance: high-probability tokens carry the core logical framework, while low-probability tokens are mostly replaceable expressions. Based on this insight, we propose ProFit, which selectively masks low-probability tokens to prevent surface-level overfitting. Extensive experiments confirm that ProFit consistently outperforms traditional SFT baselines on general reasoning and mathematical benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProFit，通过概率引导的令牌选择，在SFT中优先抑制低概率令牌的过拟合，提升模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统监督微调（SFT）强制模型与单一参考答案对齐，忽略了语言的一对多特性，导致模型过度拟合非核心表达，造成泛化能力下降。虽然引入多参考答案可缓解该问题，但数据收集和计算成本过高。因此，需要一种低成本策略，在不增加参考答案多样性的前提下，重点抑制单参考过拟合现象。
light_analysis.method: ProFit基于令牌概率与语义重要性的内在关联：高概率令牌承载核心逻辑，低概率令牌多为可替换表达。在SFT过程中，通过概率引导的令牌选择，动态掩盖低概率令牌，迫使模型关注核心语义结构，避免对表面化表达的过拟合。该方法无需额外数据，仅利用模型自身输出概率进行掩码，计算开销极低。
light_analysis.result: 在通用推理和数学基准测试上，ProFit持续优于传统SFT基线。实验涵盖多个LLM和数据集，展示了显著的性能提升，尤其在高难度推理任务中表现突出，验证了概率引导令牌选择在缓解单参考过拟合方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProFit提出了一种轻量级且高效的SFT改进方案，通过概率引导令牌选择增强模型对核心语义的泛化能力，避免了追求数据多样性的高昂成本。该工作为理解SFT中令牌级语义重要性提供了新视角，未来可探索动态阈值或与其他正则化技术结合。

title: SafeRedir: Prompt Embedding Redirection for Robust Unlearning in Image Generation Models
abstract: Image generation models (IGMs), while capable of producing impressive and creative content, often memorize a wide range of undesirable concepts from their training data, leading to the reproduction of unsafe content such as NSFW imagery and copyrighted artistic styles. Such behaviors pose persistent safety and compliance risks in real-world deployments and cannot be reliably mitigated by post-hoc filtering, owing to the limited robustness of such mechanisms and a lack of fine-grained semantic control. Recent unlearning methods seek to erase harmful concepts at the model level, which exhibit the limitations of requiring costly retraining, degrading the quality of benign generations, or failing to withstand prompt paraphrasing and adversarial attacks. To address these challenges, we introduce SafeRedir, a lightweight inference-time framework for robust unlearning via prompt embedding redirection. Without modifying the underlying IGMs, SafeRedir adaptively routes unsafe prompts toward safe semantic regions through token-level interventions in the embedding space. The framework comprises two core components: a latent-aware multi-modal safety classifier for identifying unsafe generation trajectories, and a token-level delta generator for precise semantic redirection, equipped with auxiliary predictors for token masking and adaptive scaling to localize and regulate the intervention. Empirical results across multiple representative unlearning tasks demonstrate that SafeRedir achieves effective unlearning capability, high semantic and perceptual preservation, robust image quality, and enhanced resistance to adversarial attacks. Furthermore, SafeRedir generalizes effectively across a variety of diffusion backbones and existing unlearned models, validating its plug-and-play compatibility and broad applicability. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ryliu68/SafeRedir.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级推理时框架SafeRedir，通过提示嵌入重定向实现图像生成模型的鲁棒遗忘，无需修改模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像生成模型常记忆训练数据中的不安全概念（如NSFW、版权风格），后置过滤鲁棒性差且缺乏细粒度语义控制。现有遗忘方法需昂贵重训练、降低良性生成质量或无法抵御提示释义和对抗攻击。因此需要一种轻量级、推理时、鲁棒的遗忘方法，以在不牺牲生成性能的前提下有效擦除有害概念。
light_analysis.method: SafeRedir为推理时框架，通过令牌级嵌入空间干预，将不安全提示自适应路由到安全语义区域，不修改底层模型。包含两个核心组件：潜在感知多模态安全分类器识别不安全生成轨迹；令牌级delta生成器进行精确语义重定向，配备辅助预测器实现令牌掩蔽和自适应缩放以定位与调节干预。该方法即插即用，兼容多种扩散主干。
light_analysis.result: 在多个代表遗忘任务上，SafeRedir实现了有效遗忘、高语义与感知保持、稳健图像质量，并增强了对对抗攻击的抵抗力。其泛化能力良好，适用于多种扩散主干和现有遗忘模型，验证了即插即用兼容性与广泛适用性。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但整体性能显著优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SafeRedir提出了一种轻量级、推理时的鲁棒遗忘方法，通过提示嵌入重定向解决图像生成模型的不安全内容问题。无需修改模型或重新训练，即可有效擦除有害概念同时保持生成质量，并抵御对抗攻击。该框架即插即用，具备广泛适用性，为实际部署提供了安全合规的解决方案。未来可进一步优化分类器精度和重定向效率。

title: On the Non-decoupling of Supervised Fine-tuning and Reinforcement Learning in Post-training
abstract: Post-training of large language models routinely interleaves supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with reinforcement learning (RL). These two methods have different objectives: SFT minimizes the cross-entropy loss between model outputs and expert responses, while RL maximizes reward signals derived from human preferences or rule-based verifiers. Modern reasoning models have widely adopted the practice of alternating SFT and RL training. However, there is no theoretical account of whether they can be decoupled. We prove that decoupling is impossible in either order: (1) SFT-then-RL coupling: RL increases SFT loss under both distributional (KL-based) and landscape (PL-based) analyses; and (2) RL-then-SFT coupling: SFT lowers the reward achieved by RL under analogous conditions. Under the PL condition, we further derive the optimal RL duration that balances reward improvement against SFT degradation, identify the non-decoupling threshold governing when RL can improve SFT, and bound the gradient misalignment via spectral concentration. Experiments on Qwen3-0.6B confirm the predicted degradation, verifying that SFT and RL cannot be separated without loss of prior performance in the post-training pipeline.

light_analysis.overview: 证明监督微调与强化学习在后训练中不可解耦，无论顺序如何都会导致性能退化。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型后训练普遍交替使用监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL），但两者目标不同（SFT最小化交叉熵，RL最大化奖励）。现有方法默认可解耦，缺乏理论支持。研究旨在从理论上证明解耦不可能性，避免实践中性能损失。
light_analysis.method: 提出理论框架：分SFT-then-RL和RL-then-SFT两种顺序，基于KL散度和PL条件分析耦合效应。证明RL会增加SFT损失，SFT会降低RL奖励。推导最优RL时长平衡收益与退化，识别非解耦阈值，并通过谱集中界定梯度不对齐。在Qwen3-0.6B上实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-0.6B模型上，实验确认了理论预测的性能退化：SFT-then-RL和RL-then-SFT均导致先前的SFT或RL性能下降。具体指标为SFT损失上升和奖励下降，验证了非解耦命题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是理论证明了SFT与RL在后训练中不可分离，必须联合优化才能维持性能。该发现为多阶段训练设计提供了理论依据，提示实践中需谨慎权衡两者顺序和时长。局限性在于未探讨解耦策略的替代方案。

title: PRISM: Color-Stratified Point Cloud Sampling
abstract: We present PRISM, a novel color-guided stratified sampling method for RGB-LiDAR point clouds. Our approach is motivated by the observation that unique scene features often exhibit chromatic diversity while repetitive, redundant features are homogeneous in color. Conventional downsampling methods (Random Sampling, Voxel Grid, Normal Space Sampling) enforce spatial uniformity while ignoring this photometric content. In contrast, PRISM allocates sampling density proportional to chromatic diversity. By treating RGB color space as the stratification domain and imposing a maximum capacity k per color bin, the method preserves texture-rich regions with high color variation while substantially reducing visually homogeneous surfaces. This shifts the sampling space from spatial coverage to visual complexity to produce sparser point clouds that retain essential features for 3D reconstruction tasks.
comment: This work has been submitted to the 2026 International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: PRISM提出了一种基于颜色引导的分层采样方法，通过颜色多样性指导采样密度，保留纹理丰富区域。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有下采样方法如随机采样、体素网格和法线空间采样仅关注空间均匀性，忽略了点云中的颜色信息。然而，场景中独特特征通常具有颜色多样性，而冗余特征颜色均匀。因此需要一种能根据颜色复杂度分配采样密度的方法，以保留关键视觉特征。
light_analysis.method: PRISM将RGB颜色空间作为分层域，为每个颜色仓设置最大容量k，根据颜色多样性分配采样密度。颜色变化大的区域保留更多点，颜色均匀区域则大幅减少点。该方法将采样从空间覆盖转向视觉复杂度，生成更稀疏但保留重要特征的点云。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值结果，但指出PRISM能生成更稀疏的点云，同时保留3D重建任务所需的关键特征，相比传统方法在纹理丰富区域有更好的保持效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM通过颜色引导采样解决了现有方法忽略颜色信息的问题，提升了点云下采样对视觉重要特征的保留能力，适用于3D重建等任务。未来可探索更复杂的颜色分层策略或与其他采样方法结合。

title: Dynamic Hyperparameter Importance for Efficient Multi-Objective Optimization
abstract: Choosing a suitable ML model is a complex task that can depend on several objectives, e.g., accuracy, fairness, or energy consumption. In practice, this requires trading off multiple, often competing, objectives through multi-objective optimization (MOO). However, existing MOO methods typically treat all hyperparameters as equally important, disregarding that hyperparameter importance (HPI) can vary significantly across objectives. We propose a novel dynamic optimization approach that prioritizes the most influential hyperparameters based on varying objective trade-offs during the search, thereby accelerating empirical convergence. We advance prior work on HPI for MOO from post-analysis to direct, dynamic integration within the optimization, using the recent HPI method HyperSHAP. For this, we leverage the objective weightings naturally produced by the MOO algorithm ParEGO and reduce the configuration space by fixing the unimportant hyperparameters, allowing the search to focus on the important ones. Eventually, we evaluate our method on diverse tasks from PyMOO and YAHPO-Gym. For HPO, integrating HPI yields up to 24% improvement in final Pareto front quality, while on synthetic data, integrating HPI achieves 2x better final results.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态超参数重要性方法，将超参数重要性直接集成到多目标优化中，加速收敛并提升帕累托前沿质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际中选择ML模型需权衡多个目标（如准确率、公平性、能耗），现有MOO方法将所有超参数视为同等重要，忽略了超参数重要性在不同目标间的显著差异。这导致搜索效率低下，无法有效聚焦关键参数，亟需一种动态方法在优化过程中根据目标权衡优先调整重要超参数。
light_analysis.method: 基于HyperSHAP方法计算超参数重要性，利用ParEGO算法自然产生的目标权重，在优化过程中动态识别并固定不重要超参数，缩减配置空间，使搜索聚焦于当前重要的超参数。该方法将HPI从后分析直接集成到优化中，形成闭环动态调整。在PyMOO和YAHPO-Gym任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在HPO任务中，集成HPI使最终帕累托前沿质量提升达24%；在合成数据上，集成HPI最终结果提升2倍。表明该方法显著加速收敛并改善多目标优化效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将超参数重要性动态集成到多目标优化中，显著提升了优化效率和帕累托前沿质量。学术上推进了HPI与MOO的融合，实践中有助于高效选择兼顾多目标的ML模型。未来可探索在更复杂搜索空间中的应用。

title: SV-GS: Sparse View 4D Reconstruction with Skeleton-Driven Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Reconstructing a dynamic target moving over a large area is challenging. Standard approaches for dynamic object reconstruction require dense coverage in both the viewing space and the temporal dimension, typically relying on multi-view videos captured at each time step. However, such setups are only possible in constrained environments. In real-world scenarios, observations are often sparse over time and captured sparsely from diverse viewpoints (e.g., from security cameras), making dynamic reconstruction highly ill-posed. We present SV-GS, a framework that simultaneously estimates a deformation model and the object's motion over time under sparse observations. To initialize SV-GS, we leverage a rough skeleton graph and an initial static reconstruction as inputs to guide motion estimation. (Later, we show that this input requirement can be relaxed.) Our method optimizes a skeleton-driven deformation field composed of a coarse skeleton joint pose estimator and a module for fine-grained deformations. By making only the joint pose estimator time-dependent, our model enables smooth motion interpolation while preserving learned geometric details. Experiments on synthetic datasets show that our method outperforms existing approaches under sparse observations by up to 34% in PSNR, and achieves comparable performance to dense monocular video methods on real-world datasets despite using significantly fewer frames. Moreover, we demonstrate that the input initial static reconstruction can be replaced by a diffusion-based generative prior, making our method more practical for real-world scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SV-GS框架，利用骨架驱动的高斯泼溅实现稀疏视角下的4D动态目标重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态目标在大范围运动时的重建需要密集的视角和时间覆盖，通常依赖多视角视频，这在现实场景中难以实现。现有方法在观测稀疏（如监控摄像头）时重建高度病态。因此，需要一种能从稀疏视角和时间采样中同时估计变形模型和物体运动的方法。
light_analysis.method: SV-GS以粗糙骨架图和初始静态重建为输入，优化一个由粗骨架关节姿态估计器和细粒度变形模块组成的骨架驱动变形场。仅将关节姿态估计器设为时间相关，实现平滑运动插值并保持几何细节。实验中，初始静态重建可替换为扩散生成先验，提高实用性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集上，稀疏观测下PSNR优于现有方法高达34%；在真实数据集上，使用显著更少的帧数达到与密集单目视频方法相当的性能。证明其有效性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: SV-GS解决了稀疏视角动态重建的难题，通过骨架驱动变形场实现高效运动估计和几何保持。具有实际应用价值，如监控场景。未来可探索更松散的输入要求或更复杂的变形模型。

title: S1-MMAlign: A Large-Scale, Multi-Disciplinary Dataset for Scientific Figure-Text Understanding
abstract: Multimodal learning has revolutionized general domain tasks, yet its application in scientific discovery is hindered by the profound semantic gap between complex scientific imagery and sparse textual descriptions. We present S1-MMAlign, a large-scale, multi-disciplinary multimodal dataset comprising over 15.5 million high-quality image-text pairs derived from 2.5 million open-access scientific papers. Spanning disciplines from physics and biology to engineering, the dataset captures diverse visual modalities including experimental setups, heatmaps, and microscopic imagery. To address the pervasive issue of weak alignment in raw scientific captions, we introduce an AI-ready semantic enhancement pipeline that leverages advanced multimodal large language models to recaption images, by synthesizing comprehensive context from paper abstracts and the citation contexts of corresponding figures. Technical validation confirms that our enhancement pipeline markedly improves data quality via reduced SciBERT pseudo-perplexity and enhanced CLIP image-text alignment, while also significantly boosting multimodal large language models performance in zero-shot scientific captioning, multi-domain scientific reasoning, and visual instruction tuning. S1-MMAlign provides a pivotal foundational resource for cross-modal scientific understanding in the AI for Science era, supporting the development of scientific foundation models and a wide range of downstream scientific intelligence applications. The dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ScienceOne-AI/S1-MMAlign.
comment: 18 pages (main text) + 6 pages (supplementary information), 7 figures (main text). Updated version submitted to Scientific Data. Dataset available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ScienceOne-AI/S1-MMAlign

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模多学科科学图文数据集S1-MMAlign及语义增强流水线，解决科学图文弱对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态学习在通用领域成功，但科学领域因复杂图像与稀疏文本的语义鸿沟而受限。现有科学数据集规模小、对齐弱，缺乏高质量、多学科覆盖的资源，阻碍了科学基础模型和下游应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: 从250万篇开放获取论文构建1550万对图文数据，涵盖物理、生物、工程等学科及实验装置、热图、显微图像等多模态。提出AI就绪语义增强流水线，利用多模态大模型融合论文摘要和引用上下文对图像重新描述，提升图文对齐质量。
light_analysis.result: 通过降低SciBERT伪困惑度和提升CLIP图文对齐分数验证数据质量改进。增强后数据在零样本科学描述、多领域科学推理和视觉指令微调中显著提升多模态大模型性能，数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: S1-MMAlign为AI for Science提供基础资源，支持科学基础模型和下游智能应用，有助于跨模态科学理解。未来可扩展更多学科和模态，但当前依赖开放获取论文可能引入分布偏差。

title: Fragile Knowledge, Robust Instruction-Following: The Width Pruning Dichotomy in Llama-3.2
abstract: Structured width pruning of GLU-MLP layers, guided by the Maximum Absolute Weight (MAW) criterion, reveals a systematic dichotomy in how reducing the expansion ratio affects different model capabilities. While performance on tasks relying on parametric knowledge (e.g., MMLU, GSM8K) and perplexity metrics degrades predictably, instruction-following capabilities improve substantially (+46% to +75% in IFEval for Llama-3.2-1B and 3B models), and multi-step reasoning remains robust (MUSR). This pattern challenges the prevailing assumption that pruning induces uniform degradation. We evaluated seven expansion ratio configurations using comprehensive benchmarks assessing factual knowledge, mathematical reasoning, language comprehension, instruction-following, and truthfulness. Our analysis identifies the expansion ratio as a critical architectural parameter that selectively modulates cognitive capabilities, rather than merely serving as a compression metric. We provide the first systematic characterization of this selective preservation phenomenon. Notably, we document a robust inverse correlation (r = -0.864, p = 0.012 in Llama-3B) between factual knowledge capacity (MMLU) and truthfulness metrics (TruthfulQA-MC2): as knowledge degrades, the model's ability to discriminate misconceptions improves consistently. This connects two previously distinct research areas, demonstrating that MAW-guided width pruning acts as a selective filter, reducing parametric knowledge while preserving or enhancing behavioral alignment. Additionally, we quantify context-dependent efficiency trade-offs: pruned configurations achieve up to 23% reduction in energy consumption (J/token) but incur penalties in single-request latency, whereas batch processing workloads benefit uniformly.
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures, 9 tables. Code available at https://github.com/peremartra/llama-glu-expansion-pruning

light_analysis.overview: 揭示GLU-MLP层宽度剪枝（按MAW准则）对模型能力的选择性影响：指令遵循能力提升46%-75%，而参数知识下降，挑战了剪枝均匀退化的假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有剪枝研究假设性能均匀退化，但实践中不同能力可能表现各异。该论文旨在探索结构化宽度剪枝如何选择性影响模型能力，特别是参数知识与指令遵循之间的对立关系，为理解模型压缩与能力权衡提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 采用最大绝对权值（MAW）准则对Llama-3.2-1B和3B模型的GLU-MLP层进行结构化宽度剪枝，通过改变扩展比得到7种配置。在MMLU、GSM8K、IFEval、MUSR、TruthfulQA等基准上评估事实知识、数学推理、指令遵循、多步推理和真实性。
light_analysis.result: 指令遵循能力（IFEval）提升46%-75%，多步推理（MUSR）保持鲁棒，而参数知识（MMLU、GSM8K）和困惑度下降。MMLU与TruthfulQA-MC2显著负相关（r=-0.864, p=0.012）。能效提升23%（J/token），但单请求延迟增加，批处理受益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统刻画了宽度剪枝对模型能力的选择性保留现象，证明剪枝可同时减少参数知识并增强行为对齐，连接了知识容量与真实性的研究。未来可探索更广泛模型和任务中的剪枝-能力权衡。

title: DIAL: Direct Iterative Adversarial Learning for Realistic Multi-Turn Dialogue Simulation
abstract: Realistic user simulation is crucial for training and evaluating multi-turn dialogue systems, yet creating simulators that accurately replicate human behavior remains a significant challenge. An effective simulator must expose the failure modes of the systems under evaluation. This work introduces Direct Iterative Adversarial Learning (DIAL), an adversarial framework that iteratively enhances user simulator realism through a competitive dynamic between a generator (user simulator) and a discriminator. When applied to mental health support, a domain characterized by diverse failure types and a critical dependence on realistic user behavior for failure detection, DIAL restores lexical diversity diminished by supervised fine-tuning and drastically reduces discriminator accuracy. The resulting simulator exhibits a strong correlation between simulated and real failure occurrence rates while maintaining low distributional divergence of failure modes. These findings indicate that DIAL is a promising method for developing realistic user simulators in multi-turn dialogue, facilitating reliable and cost-effective system evaluation prior to deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DIAL框架，通过迭代对抗学习生成更真实的用户模拟器，用于多轮对话系统评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实用户模拟对训练和评估多轮对话系统至关重要，但现有模拟器难以准确复制人类行为，需要暴露系统失败模式。特别是在心理健康支持领域，失败类型多样且依赖真实用户行为检测失败，现有方法存在词汇多样性降低等问题。
light_analysis.method: DIAL是一种直接迭代对抗学习框架，包含生成器（用户模拟器）和判别器之间的竞争动态，通过迭代增强用户模拟器的真实性。将其应用于心理健康支持领域，恢复监督微调导致的词汇多样性下降，并显著降低判别器准确率。
light_analysis.result: DIAL恢复了监督微调降低的词汇多样性，大幅降低判别器准确率；模拟器与真实失败发生率之间高度相关，同时保持失败模式的低分布差异。表明DIAL能生成更真实的用户模拟，支持可靠、低成本的系统评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: DIAL是开发多轮对话真实用户模拟器的有前景方法，有助于在部署前对系统进行可靠且经济的评估。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Beyond Majority Voting: Towards Fine-grained and More Reliable Reward Signal for Test-Time Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Test-time reinforcement learning mitigates the reliance on annotated data by using majority voting results as pseudo-labels, emerging as a complementary direction to reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for improving reasoning ability. However, this voting strategy often induces confirmation bias and suffers from sparse rewards, limiting the overall performance. In this work, we propose subgroup-specific step-wise confidence-weighted pseudo-label estimation (SCOPE), a framework integrating model confidence and dynamic subgroup partitioning to address these issues. Specifically, SCOPE integrates the proposed step-wise confidence into pseudo label estimation, prioritizing high-quality reasoning paths over simple frequency count. Furthermore, it dynamically partitions the candidate outputs pool into independent subgroups by balancing reasoning quality against exploration diversity. By deriving local consensus via repeat sampling for each sub group, SCOPE provides diverse supervision targets to encourage broader exploration. We conduct experiments across various models and benchmarks, experimental results show that SCOPE consistently outperforms recent baselines. Notably, SCOPE achieving relative improvements of 13.1% on challenging AIME 2025 and 8.1% on AMC. The code is released at https://github.com/szu-tera/SCOPE.
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference. 15 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCOPE框架，通过模型置信度和动态子群划分提供细粒度、更可靠的奖励信号，提升测试时强化学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有测试时强化学习使用多数投票作为伪标签，导致确认偏差和奖励稀疏，限制推理性能。需要更可靠的奖励信号以缓解这些问题，提升模型整体表现。
light_analysis.method: SCOPE框架集成步进置信度到伪标签估计，优先高质量推理路径；动态划分候选输出池为独立子群，平衡推理质量与探索多样性，通过重复采样获取局部共识，提供多样监督目标。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型和基准上超越基线方法，在AIME 2025上相对提升13.1%，在AMC上提升8.1%，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCOPE通过细粒度奖励信号和动态子群划分，有效缓解确认偏差和稀疏奖励问题，提升了测试时强化学习的推理能力，代码已开源。

title: Cross-Tokenizer Likelihood Scoring Algorithms for Language Model Distillation
abstract: Computing next-token likelihood ratios between two language models (LMs) is a standard task in training paradigms such as knowledge distillation. Since this requires both models to share the same probability space, it becomes challenging when the teacher and student LMs use different tokenizers, for instance, when edge-device deployment necessitates a smaller vocabulary size to lower memory overhead. This work addresses this vocabulary misalignment problem by uncovering an implicit recursive structure in the commonly deployed Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) algorithm and utilizing it to create a probabilistic framework for cross-tokenizer likelihood scoring. Our method enables sequence likelihood evaluation for vocabularies different from the teacher model native tokenizer, addressing two specific scenarios: when the student vocabulary is a subset of the teacher vocabulary, and the general case where it is arbitrary. In the subset regime, our framework computes exact likelihoods and provides next-token probabilities for sequential sampling with only ${O}(1)$ model evaluations per token. When used for distillation, this yields up to a $12\%$ reduction in memory footprint for the Qwen2.5-1.5B model while also improving baseline performance up to $4\%$ on the evaluated tasks. For the general case, we introduce a rigorous lossless procedure that leverages BPE recursive structure, complemented by a fast approximation that keeps large-vocabulary settings practical. Applied to GSM8K mathematical reasoning distillation, our method improves accuracy by over $2\%$ the current state of the art. Code: github.com/truongbuu/cross-tokenizer-scoring

light_analysis.overview: 利用BPE的递归结构，提出跨tokenizer似然评分框架，解决了教师和学生模型词汇表不同时的知识蒸馏难题。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识蒸馏中计算教师和学生模型的似然比时，两者需共享相同概率空间。然而，边缘设备部署常要求学生模型使用更小词汇表以减少内存，导致词汇表不对齐，现有方法无法处理。这一限制阻碍了蒸馏在异构模型间的应用。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法基于BPE的隐式递归结构，构建概率框架实现跨tokenizer似然评分。针对学生词汇表是教师子集的情况，精确计算似然并逐token采样，仅需O(1)次模型评估。对于任意词汇表，提出无损精确过程及快速近似方法保持实用性。
light_analysis.result: 在子集场景中，应用于Qwen2.5-1.5B模型蒸馏使内存占用降低12%，任务性能提升4%。一般场景下，在GSM8K数学推理蒸馏中准确率超过当前最优方法2%以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究解决了词汇表不对齐下的似然评分问题，拓展了知识蒸馏的适用性。实践上可减少内存开销并提升模型性能，代码已开源。未来可探索更高效的近似算法。

title: Conflict-Aware Fusion: Mitigating Logic Inertia in Large Language Models via Structured Cognitive Priors
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve high accuracy on many reasoning benchmarks but remain brittle under structural perturbations of rule-based systems. We introduce a diagnostic framework with four stress tests -- redundant vs. essential rule deletion, contradictory-rule injection, logic-preserving rewrites, and multi-law stacking -- and use it to expose Logic Inertia: the tendency of generative LLMs (Qwen2/3, TinyLlama, GPT-4o, Gemma-3-4B-IT) and the encoder-only BERT baseline to persist along learned deductive trajectories under inconsistent premises. The collapse is sharp: untreated baselines fall from accuracy 1.00 on the base task to 0.00 on contradiction injection (instance-level exact match), and GPT-4o resolves only 56.0% of contradiction cases. We propose Conflict-Aware Fusion, a four-stage training pipeline that enforces verification-before-deduction as a learned structural prior: (i) SFT establishes the verification preamble; (ii) DPO sharpens the halt-on-contradiction decision boundary; (iii) Logical Invariance REgularisation (LIRE) penalises divergence between logically equivalent rule formulations via symmetric KL; (iv) Reinforcement Learning from Verification Feedback (RLVF) uses a symbolic forward-chaining engine as a deterministic oracle reward, jointly optimising invariance and sensitivity. The pipeline saturates all four primary stress tests for both 1.5B and 8B backbones. We further validate a Phase 2 extension that replaces the propositional oracle with a Lean 4 kernel, attaining 99.0% kernel agreement on the 105 classically-derivable (T) questions within a stratified 187-question Lean-translated sample (overall 71.7% across both polarities), providing a sound upgrade path to formally verified RL training. Code and benchmark: https://github.com/14H034160212/lemo

light_analysis.overview: 提出冲突感知融合框架，通过结构化认知先验缓解大语言模型在规则系统下的逻辑惯性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在推理基准上表现优异，但在基于规则系统的结构扰动下（如规则删除、矛盾注入等）表现脆弱。现有研究缺乏系统性诊断方法，导致模型在逻辑不一致前提下的推理崩溃未被充分揭示。本文设计四项压力测试暴露逻辑惯性：模型在矛盾前提下仍沿学到的演绎轨迹运行，准确率从1.00骤降至0.00，即使GPT-4o仅解决56%的矛盾案例。亟需一种强制验证-演绎结构先验的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出冲突感知融合，四阶段训练流水线：1) SFT建立验证序言；2) DPO强化矛盾触发停止的决策边界；3) LIRE（逻辑不变正则化）通过对称KL惩罚逻辑等价规则表述的差异；4) RLVF（基于验证反馈的强化学习）使用符号前向链接引擎作为确定性奖励，联合优化不变性与敏感性。在1.5B和8B模型上饱和全部四项压力测试。此外，阶段2扩展用Lean 4内核替换命题推理引擎，在187个问题样本上达到99.0%的内核一致性。
light_analysis.result: 基线模型在基本任务上准确率1.00，矛盾注入后降至0.00（实例级精确匹配）。GPT-4o仅解决56.0%的矛盾案例。所提方法在1.5B和8B骨干网络上全面通过所有四项主要压力测试。Lean 4扩展阶段在105个经典可推导问题上达到99.0%内核一致性，全部187个样本上达到71.7%准确率。代码和基准公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统诊断了大语言模型的逻辑惯性，并提出冲突感知融合方法，通过验证-演绎结构先验有效缓解该问题。该方法结合监督微调、直接偏好优化、逻辑不变正则化及基于验证反馈的强化学习，在多个模型上取得显著改进。阶段2扩展验证了与形式化验证（Lean 4）结合的可能性，为可靠推理提供升级路径。未来可探索更复杂的逻辑系统及更大规模模型上的泛化性。

title: Learning to Orchestrate Agents in Natural Language with the Conductor
abstract: Powerful large language models (LLMs) from different providers have been expensively trained and finetuned to specialize across varying domains. In this work, we introduce a new kind of Conductor model trained with reinforcement learning to automatically discover powerful coordination strategies among LLMs. Our Conductor learns not only to design targeted communication topologies for effective agent-to-agent collaboration, but also to prompt engineer focused instructions to the LLMs to maximally leverage their individual capabilities. We show that, by learning optimal coordination strategies over pools of powerful worker LLMs, a 7B Conductor achieves significant performance gains beyond any individual worker, attaining state-of-the-art results in challenging reasoning benchmarks, such as LiveCodeBench and GPQA. By training with randomized agent pools, our conductor effectively adapts to arbitrary sets of open- and closed-source agents, meeting any user requirements. Furthermore, allowing the Conductor to select itself as a worker gives rise to recursive topologies, elevating performance with a new form of dynamic test-time scaling through online iterative adaptation. More broadly, ours is among the early work demonstrating language model coordination can be unlocked through RL, where powerful coordination strategies emerge naturally in LLMs through pure end-to-end reward maximization.
comment: To appear at the 14th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Conductor模型，通过强化学习自动学习协调多个大语言模型（LLM）的策略，实现效果超越单个LLM，在推理基准上达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 不同来源的大语言模型（LLM）经过昂贵训练和微调，在不同领域各有专长。如何有效协调多个LLM，利用其互补能力，是一个重要问题。现有方法依赖人工设计通信拓扑和提示工程，缺乏自动化和最优性。本文旨在通过强化学习学习自动协调策略，包括设计通信拓扑和生成针对性指令，从而最大化利用每个LLM的能力，提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Conductor模型，使用强化学习（RL）训练。Conductor学习为多个工作LLM设计通信拓扑（即agent间的协作结构）并生成针对性指令，以最大化任务性能。训练时采用随机化的工作池，使Conductor适应任意封闭或开源模型。此外，Conductor可选择自身作为工作模型，形成递归拓扑，实现动态测试时缩放。整个训练过程是端到端的奖励最大化。
light_analysis.result: 在LiveCodeBench和GPQA等推理基准上，7B参数的Conductor模型通过学习最优协调策略，显著超越任何单个工作LLM，并达到最先进水平。随机化工作池训练使Conductor能有效适应任意组合的模型。递归拓扑提升了性能，展示了通过在线迭代适应实现动态测试时缩放的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明通过强化学习可以自动解锁语言模型协调策略。Conductor模型展示了端到端奖励最大化下自然涌现的协调策略，具有重要学术价值。实际应用中，Conductor能协调任意LLM组合，提升性能。未来工作可探索更复杂的递归拓扑和多任务协调。

title: DVPO: Distributional Value Modeling-based Policy Optimization for LLM Post-Training
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown strong performance in LLM post-training, but real-world deployment often involves noisy or incomplete supervision. In such settings, complex and unreliable supervision signals can destabilize training and harm generalization. While existing approaches such as worst-case optimization (e.g., RFQI, CQL) and mean-based methods (e.g., PPO, GRPO) can improve stability, they often overlook generalization and may produce overly conservative policies, leading to uneven performance across diverse real scenarios. To this end, we introduce DVPO (Distributional Value Modeling with Risk-aware Policy Optimization), a new RL framework that combines conditional risk theory with distributional value modeling to better balance robustness and generalization. DVPO learns token-level value distributions to provide fine-grained supervision, and applies an asymmetric risk regularization to shape the distribution tails: it contracts the lower tail to dampen noisy negative deviations, while expanding the upper tail to preserve exploratory diversity. Across extensive experiments and analysis in multi-turn dialogue, math reasoning, and scientific QA, DVPO consistently outperforms PPO, GRPO, and robust Bellman-based PPO under noisy supervision, showing its potential for LLM post-training in the real-world.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DVPO框架，结合分布价值建模与不对称风险正则化，平衡鲁棒性和泛化，提升LLM在噪声监督下的后训练性能。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM后训练中，实际部署常面临噪声或不完全监督信号，导致训练不稳定和泛化下降。现有最坏情况优化（如RFQI、CQL）和均值方法（如PPO、GRPO）虽能提升稳定性，但往往过于保守，导致性能不平衡。因此，需要一种能同时兼顾鲁棒性和泛化能力的方法。
light_analysis.method: DVPO框架结合条件风险理论与分布价值建模。学习token级价值分布以提供细粒度监督，并应用不对称风险正则化：收缩下尾以抑制噪声负偏差，扩展上尾以保持探索多样性。该方法通过调整分布尾部形状，在抑制噪声的同时鼓励探索。
light_analysis.result: 在多轮对话、数学推理和科学QA任务中，DVPO在噪声监督下一致优于PPO、GRPO和鲁棒Bellman-based PPO。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明其在实际LLM后训练中具有潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DVPO通过分布价值建模和不对称风险正则化，有效平衡了鲁棒性和泛化，为LLM在真实环境中后训练提供了新思路。未来工作可探索更复杂的风险度量或扩展到其他序列决策任务。

title: Row-stochastic matrices can provably outperform doubly stochastic matrices in decentralized learning
abstract: Decentralized learning often involves a weighted global loss with heterogeneous node weights $λ$. We revisit two natural strategies for incorporating these weights: (i) embedding them into the local losses to retain a uniform weight (and thus a doubly stochastic matrix), and (ii) keeping the original losses while employing a $λ$-induced row-stochastic matrix. Although prior work shows that both strategies yield the same expected descent direction for the global loss, it remains unclear whether the Euclidean-space guarantees are tight and what fundamentally differentiates their behaviors. To clarify this, we develop a weighted Hilbert-space framework $L^2(λ;\mathbb{R}^d)$ and obtain convergence rates that are strictly tighter than those from Euclidean analysis. In this geometry, the row-stochastic matrix becomes self-adjoint whereas the doubly stochastic one does not, creating additional penalty terms that amplify consensus error, thereby slowing convergence. Consequently, the difference in convergence arises not only from spectral gaps but also from these penalty terms. We then derive sufficient conditions under which the row-stochastic design converges faster even with a smaller spectral gap. Finally, by using a Rayleigh-quotient and Loewner-order eigenvalue comparison, we further obtain topology conditions that guarantee this advantage and yield practical topology-design guidelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出加权希尔伯特空间框架，证明行随机矩阵在分散式学习中优于双随机矩阵。
light_analysis.motivation: 分散式学习中节点权重λ的两种整合策略（嵌入损失或保持原损失）虽在欧几里得空间中有相同下降方向，但缺乏紧确性保证及行为差异的深层理解。现有欧几里得分析无法揭示两种策略的本质区别，导致收敛性能的准确比较困难。
light_analysis.method: 构建加权希尔伯特空间L²(λ;Rᵈ)，使行随机矩阵在该空间中自伴，而双随机矩阵非自伴，引入惩罚项放大共识误差。通过瑞利商和Loewner序特征值比较，推导行随机设计收敛更快的充分条件与拓扑条件。
light_analysis.result: 在加权希尔伯特空间中获得的收敛率严格优于欧几里得分析。行随机矩阵即使谱隙更小，在满足条件下仍能更快收敛。惩罚项是导致差异的关键，而非仅谱隙。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了行随机矩阵在分散式学习中的优势源于加权空间中的自伴性及更少惩罚。提供了拓扑设计准则，有助于实际网络优化。未来可扩展至非凸优化或时变拓扑。

title: POMA-3D: The Point Map Way to 3D Scene Understanding
abstract: In this paper, we introduce POMA-3D, the first self-supervised 3D representation model learned from point maps. Point maps encode explicit 3D coordinates on a structured 2D grid, preserving global 3D geometry while remaining compatible with the input format of 2D foundation models. To transfer rich 2D priors into POMA-3D, a view-to-scene alignment strategy is designed. Moreover, as point maps are view-dependent with respect to a canonical space, we introduce POMA-JEPA, a joint embedding-predictive architecture that enforces geometrically consistent point map features across multiple views. Additionally, we introduce ScenePoint, a point map dataset constructed from 6.5K room-level RGB-D scenes and 1M 2D image scenes to facilitate large-scale POMA-3D pretraining. Experiments show that POMA-3D serves as a strong backbone for both specialist and generalist 3D understanding. It benefits diverse tasks, including 3D question answering, embodied navigation, scene retrieval, and embodied localization, all achieved using only geometric inputs (i.e., 3D coordinates). Overall, our POMA-3D explores a point map way to 3D scene understanding, addressing the scarcity of pretrained priors and limited data in 3D representation learning. Project Page: https://matchlab-imperial.github.io/poma3d/

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出从点图中学习自监督3D表示模型POMA-3D，利用2D基础模型先验与几何一致性预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D场景理解面临预训练先验匮乏和数据稀缺的挑战，现有3D表示方法在兼容2D模型和捕捉全局几何方面存在不足。点图作为结构化2D网格编码3D坐标，既能保留全局几何又能与2D模型输入兼容，但存在视图依赖问题，亟需一种能迁移2D先验并实现多视图几何一致性的自监督学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出POMA-3D模型，以点图为输入；设计视图到场景对齐策略将2D基础模型先验迁移到3D；引入POMA-JEPA联合嵌入预测架构，强制多视图点图特征几何一致性；构建ScenePoint数据集（含6.5K房间级RGB-D场景和1M 2D图像场景）用于大规模预训练。
light_analysis.result: POMA-3D作为强主干在专有和通用3D理解任务中表现优异，包括3D问答、具身导航、场景检索和具身定位，且仅使用几何输入（3D坐标）即可实现。实验表明其有效缓解了3D表示学习中的预训练先验和数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 探索了点图方式实现3D场景理解，通过自监督预训练获取通用3D表示，缓解了数据与先验的稀缺性。该方法兼容2D模型输入格式，为3D理解提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更多3D任务及真实场景应用。

title: UI2Code^N: UI-to-Code Generation as Interactive Visual Optimization
abstract: UI-to-code aims to translate UI screenshots into executable front-end code. Despite progress with vision-language models (VLMs), most existing methods formulate UI-to-code as a single-pass generation, which mismatches real-world UI development that is inherently iterative and feedback-driven. We reformulate UI-to-code as an interactive visual optimization problem, where code generation is embedded in a closed-loop process of execution, visual inspection, and iterative refinement driven by rendered visual feedback. To address the non-differentiability of visual objectives and the noise of absolute visual evaluators, we propose Relative Visual Policy Optimization (RVPO), a preference-based reinforcement learning method that optimizes relative visual rankings among rendered candidates under execution feedback. We instantiate this paradigm in UI2Code^N, an open-source 9B model trained via continual pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on UI drafting, UI polishing, and UI editing benchmarks, even outperforming larger models, with performance consistently improving through iterative visual optimization. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/zai-org/UI2Code_N.

light_analysis.overview: 将UI-to-Code重构为交互式视觉优化问题，提出基于相对视觉偏好优化的强化学习方法RVPO，实现迭代式代码生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有UI-to-Code方法多为单次生成，与真实开发中迭代反馈的流程不符。视觉目标不可微分，且绝对视觉评估器存在噪声，导致难以直接优化。因此，需要一种能利用相对视觉反馈进行迭代改进的范式。
light_analysis.method: 提出相对视觉策略优化（RVPO），将代码生成嵌入执行、视觉检查和迭代优化的闭环。RVPO通过偏好强化学习优化渲染候选的相对视觉排名，避免绝对评估噪声。构建UI2Code^N模型（9B参数），经持续预训练、有监督微调和强化学习训练。
light_analysis.result: 在UI起草、优化和编辑基准上达到最先进性能，超越更大模型。实验表明，通过迭代视觉优化，性能持续提升，验证了交互式优化范式的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重新定义了UI-to-Code任务，提出交互式优化范式及RVPO方法，显著提升代码生成质量。开源模型和代码，促进研究。未来可探索更高效视觉反馈和更复杂编辑场景。

title: Making Knowledge Accessible: Divergent Readability-Accuracy Strategies of Mistral and QWen in Biomedical Text Simplification
abstract: The growing public demand for accessible biomedical information calls for scalable text simplification. While large language models (LLMs) offer solutions, they too struggle with balancing improved readability against preservation of meaning. This report empirically compares how two LLMs - instruction-tuned Mistral-Small 3 24B and the reasoning-augmented QWen2.5 32B- navigate this trade-off in biomedical text simplification, benchmarked against human performance. Our analysis highlights how each model applies distinct operational strategies when simplifying biomedical text. Mistral exhibits a tempered lexical simplification approach that consistently enhances readability across multiple metrics while preserving discourse fidelity (BERTScore: 0.91, statistically comparable to that of humans). In comparison, QWen also attains enhanced readability performance and a reasonable BERTScore of 0.89, but presents a disconnect in balancing between readability and accuracy. Additionally, a comprehensive correlation analysis of a suite of 21 metrics confirms strong functional redundancies in metrics and informs adaptation requirements.
comment: NLP4DH 2026 Open review page at https://openreview.net/forum?id=GutmBiDoRR . In a nutshell, to achieve better generalizability, we need to soften the language and/or expand the number of models and document classes under review. As it is right now, the analysis only speaks to biomedical text and two models (QWen 2.5 and Mistral-small). We acknowledge this as a limitation and area for future work

light_analysis.overview: 比较Mistral和QWen在生物医学文本简化中平衡可读性与准确性的不同策略，并分析度量冗余。
light_analysis.motivation: 公众对可访问生物医学信息的需求增长，需要可扩展的文本简化技术。大型语言模型（LLM）虽能提供解决方案，但在提高可读性与保持意义之间存在权衡。现有研究缺乏对LLM在生物医学领域简化策略的深入比较，尤其是不同模型如何操作性地应对这一权衡。该研究通过实证比较指令微调的Mistral-Small 3 24B与推理增强的QWen2.5 32B，揭示它们在简化过程中的独特策略，为改进生物医学文本可读性提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 该研究以人类表现为基准，比较了指令微调的Mistral-Small 3 24B和推理增强的QWen2.5 32B在生物医学文本简化中的表现。Mistral采用温和的词汇简化方法，在多个可读性指标上持续提升，同时保持话语保真度（BERTScore 0.91）。QWen虽也提升了可读性，BERTScore为0.89，但在可读性与准确性平衡上存在脱节。此外，通过21个度量的相关性分析，证实了度量间存在强功能冗余，并据此提出适应调整需求。
light_analysis.result: Mistral在多个可读性指标上表现优异，BERTScore达0.91，与人类统计上相当，表明其在简化过程中有效保留了语义信息。QWen的BERTScore为0.89，虽也提升了可读性，但平衡可读性与准确性的能力较弱。21个度量的相关性分析揭示了度量间的强功能冗余，例如类似指标高度相关，这有助于简化评估过程并指导未来的度量选择。两个模型的对比突出了各自的操作差异：Mistral更稳健，QWen在权衡中略显不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文实证比较了两种LLM在生物医学文本简化中的不同策略，Mistral展现了在提升可读性与保持准确性之间的稳健平衡，而QWen则存在脱节。通过度量冗余分析，为评估框架的优化提供了依据。该研究有助于推动生物医学信息的可访问性，为开发更有效的文本简化模型提供参考。未来工作可探索其他模型及更多样化的数据集，并进一步优化度量组合以简化评估流程。

title: ContextPilot: Fast Long-Context Inference via Context Reuse
abstract: AI applications increasingly depend on long-context inference, where LLMs consume substantial context to support stronger reasoning. Common examples include retrieval-augmented generation, agent memory layers, and multi-agent orchestration. As input contexts get longer, prefill latency becomes the main bottleneck. Yet today's prefill acceleration techniques face a trade-off: they either preserve reasoning quality but deliver little KV-cache reuse, or improve reuse at the cost of degraded reasoning quality.   We present ContextPilot, a system that accelerates prefill by introducing context reuse as a new mechanism for faster long-context inference. ContextPilot introduces a context index to identify overlapping context blocks across LLM interactions (e.g., across users and turns). It further proposes context ordering and de-duplication techniques to maximize KV-cache reuse. To preserve reasoning quality under reuse, it introduces succinct context annotations that prevent quality degradation. Finally, ContextPilot is built around a modular architecture with a clean interface that integrates with existing inference engines. Extensive evaluation shows that ContextPilot reduces LLM prefill latency by up to $3\times{}$ compared to state-of-the-art methods while preserving reasoning quality. At longer context lengths, it can even improve reasoning quality. ContextPilot is open-sourced at: https://github.com/EfficientContext/ContextPilot.

light_analysis.overview: ContextPilot通过上下文重用机制加速LLM长上下文推理的prefill阶段，降低延迟并保持推理质量。
light_analysis.motivation: AI应用（如RAG、智能体记忆层、多智能体编排）依赖长上下文推理，随着输入上下文变长，prefill延迟成为主要瓶颈。现有加速技术在推理质量和KV-cache重用之间存在权衡：要么保持质量但重用少，要么提高重用但质量下降。因此需要一种既能大幅降低prefill延迟又不牺牲推理质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: ContextPilot引入上下文索引以识别跨交互（如跨用户和轮次）的重叠上下文块；通过上下文排序和去重技术最大化KV-cache重用；提出简洁上下文注释防止重用导致的质量下降。系统采用模块化架构，提供清晰接口，可集成现有推理引擎。这些技术共同实现了高效且无损的上下文重用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，与最先进方法相比，ContextPilot将LLM prefill延迟降低高达3倍，同时保持推理质量。在更长上下文长度下，甚至能提升推理质量。具体数据未给出，但声称优于基线。开源代码在GitHub上。
light_analysis.conclusion: ContextPilot通过上下文重用机制有效解决了长上下文推理中prefill加速的质量-效率权衡问题，显著降低延迟且不牺牲质量，甚至长上下文时提升质量。其模块化设计易于集成，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可能进一步优化上下文索引或扩展至更多场景。

title: Diffusion-Inspired Masked Fine-Tuning for Knowledge Injection in Autoregressive LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are often used in environments where facts evolve, yet factual knowledge updates via fine-tuning on unstructured text often suffer from 1) reliance on compute-heavy paraphrasing augmentation and 2) the reversal curse. Recent studies show diffusion large language models (dLLMs) require fewer training samples to achieve lower loss in pre-training and are more resistant to the reversal curse, suggesting dLLMs may learn new knowledge more easily than autoregressive LLMs (arLLMs). We test this hypothesis in controlled knowledge fine-tuning experiments and find that while arLLMs rely on paraphrase augmentation to generalize knowledge text into question-answering (QA) capability, dLLMs do not require paraphrases to achieve high QA accuracy. To further investigate whether the demasking objective alone can induce such a knowledge injection advantage in dLLMs regardless of their diffusion denoising paradigm, we propose masked fine-tuning for arLLMs, which prompts an arLLM to reconstruct the original text given a masked version in context. The masked fine-tuning for arLLMs substantially improves the efficacy of knowledge injection, i.e. no paraphrase needed and resistant to the reversal curse, closing the gap between arLLMs and dLLMs. We also demonstrate broader applicability: on a large-scale knowledge-intensive dataset (1.2M samples), masked SFT achieves the best downstream accuracy on GPQA-diamond among all fine-tuning variants. The demasking objective also improves SFT on math tasks, suggesting broad utility beyond factual knowledge injection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩散启发的掩码微调方法，使自回归LLM无需释义增强即可高效注入知识，并抵抗反转诅咒。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型常应用于事实不断变化的环境，但通过非结构化文本微调进行事实知识更新存在两个问题：依赖计算量大的释义增强和反转诅咒。扩散LLM在预训练中所需训练样本更少且更抗反转诅咒，表明其可能比自回归LLM更容易学习新知识。本研究旨在探究能否将扩散LLM的知识注入优势引入自回归LLM，从而克服上述问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出掩码微调（masked fine-tuning）方法：给定掩码版本的文本，提示自回归LLM在上下文中重建原始文本。该方法模仿扩散LLM的去掩码目标，但不改变自回归模型的自回归范式。关键创新在于无需释义增强即可实现知识注入，并抵抗反转诅咒。实验使用受控知识微调设置，并在大规模知识密集型数据集（1.2M样本）和数学任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在受控知识微调实验中，自回归LLM依赖释义增强才能将文本知识泛化到问答能力，而扩散LLM无需释义即可达到高问答准确率。提出的掩码微调使自回归LLM显著提升知识注入效果：无需释义且抵抗反转诅咒，缩小了与扩散LLM的差距。在大规模数据集上，掩码SFT在GPQA-diamond上达到所有微调变体中最佳下游准确率。该目标还提升了数学任务上的SFT性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了掩码目标可有效将扩散LLM的知识注入优势转移到自回归LLM，实现更高效、鲁棒的知识更新。该方法具有广泛适用性，不仅适用于事实知识注入，还可提升数学推理等任务。未来可探索将掩码微调与其他训练范式结合，或进一步分析其与扩散模型的理论联系。

title: LTGS: Long-Term Gaussian Scene Chronology From Sparse View Updates
abstract: Recent advances in novel-view synthesis can create the photo-realistic visualization of real-world environments from conventional camera captures. However, the everyday environment experiences frequent scene changes, which require dense observations, both spatially and temporally, that an ordinary setup cannot cover. We propose long-term Gaussian scene chronology from sparse-view updates, coined LTGS, an efficient scene representation that can embrace everyday changes from highly under-constrained casual captures. Given an incomplete and unstructured 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representation obtained from an initial set of input images, we robustly model the long-term chronology of the scene despite abrupt movements and subtle environmental variations. We construct objects as template Gaussians, which serve as structural, reusable priors for shared object tracks. Then, the object templates undergo a further refinement pipeline that modulates the priors to adapt to temporally varying environments given few-shot observations. Once trained, our framework is generalizable across multiple time steps through simple transformations, significantly enhancing the scalability for a temporal evolution of 3D environments. As existing datasets do not explicitly represent the long-term real-world changes with a sparse capture setup, we collect real-world datasets to evaluate the practicality of our pipeline. Experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves superior reconstruction quality compared to other baselines while enabling fast and light-weight updates. Project page is available at: https://mkjjang3598.github.io/LTGS.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Findings. Project page: https://mkjjang3598.github.io/LTGS

light_analysis.overview: 提出LTGS，从稀疏视图更新中高效建模长期场景时间线，利用3D高斯泼溅和对象模板实现轻量级重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 日常环境频繁变化，现有新视角合成方法需要稠密的时空观测，而普通拍摄设置难以覆盖。本文旨在解决从高度欠约束的随意捕获中建模长期场景变化的问题，应对突然移动和细微环境变化，提高场景表示的实用性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: LTGS基于初始稀疏输入的3D高斯泼溅表示，构建对象模板高斯作为结构化的可重用先验。通过细化管道调制模板以适应时变环境，仅需少量观测即可完成更新。训练后，通过简单变换泛化到多个时间步，支持3D环境的时间演化。使用自采集的真实世界数据集评估。
light_analysis.result: 在自采集的真实世界数据集上，LTGS相比其他基线实现了更优的重建质量，同时支持快速和轻量级的更新。具体量化指标摘要未明确说明，但实验表明方法在稀疏捕获设置下具有优越的实用性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: LTGS为长期场景时间线提供高效表示，从稀疏视图更新中捕捉日常变化。其利用对象模板和细化管道，平衡了重建质量与计算效率。未来可进一步探索更复杂的场景动态和更广泛的部署，但当前方法已展现学术和实用价值。

title: Large Scale Diffusion Distillation via Score-Regularized Continuous-Time Consistency
abstract: Although continuous-time consistency models (e.g., sCM, MeanFlow) are theoretically principled and empirically powerful for fast academic-scale diffusion, its applicability to large-scale text-to-image and video tasks remains unclear due to infrastructure challenges in Jacobian-vector product (JVP) computation and the limitations of evaluation benchmarks like FID. This work represents the first effort to scale up continuous-time consistency to general application-level image and video diffusion models, and to make JVP-based distillation effective at large scale. We first develop a parallelism-compatible FlashAttention-2 JVP kernel, enabling sCM training on models with over 10 billion parameters and high-dimensional video tasks. Our investigation reveals fundamental quality limitations of sCM in fine-detail generation, which we attribute to error accumulation and the "mode-covering" nature of its forward-divergence objective. To remedy this, we propose the score-regularized continuous-time consistency model (rCM), which incorporates score distillation as a long-skip regularizer. This integration complements sCM with the "mode-seeking" reverse divergence, effectively improving visual quality while maintaining high generation diversity. Validated on large-scale models (Cosmos-Predict2, Wan2.1) up to 14B parameters and 5-second videos, rCM generally matches the state-of-the-art distillation method DMD2 on quality metrics while mitigating mode collapse and offering notable advantages in diversity, all without GAN tuning or extensive hyperparameter searches. The distilled models generate high-fidelity samples in only $1\sim4$ steps, accelerating diffusion sampling by $15\times\sim50\times$. These results position rCM as a practical and theoretically grounded framework for advancing large-scale diffusion distillation. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/rcm.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分数正则化连续时间一致性模型（rCM），首次实现大规模扩散模型的快速蒸馏，提升生成质量并保持多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续时间一致性模型（如sCM）在学术规模扩散任务中表现优异，但扩展到大规模文本到图像和视频任务时面临雅可比向量积（JVP）计算的基础设施挑战以及评估基准（如FID）的局限性。此外，sCM在细粒度生成中存在质量缺陷，归因于误差累积和其前向散度目标的“模式覆盖”特性。因此，需要一种既能保持高速采样又能提升视觉质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出rCM，通过引入分数蒸馏作为长跳正则化器，将sCM与“模式寻找”逆向散度结合，弥补其“模式覆盖”的不足。为支持大规模训练，开发了兼容并行的FlashAttention-2 JVP内核，使sCM训练可扩展到超过100亿参数的模型和高维视频任务。该方法无需GAN调优或大量超参数搜索，即可实现高质量生成。
light_analysis.result: 在Cosmos-Predict2、Wan2.1等大规模模型（高达14B参数和5秒视频）上验证，rCM在质量指标上基本匹配最先进的蒸馏方法DMD2，同时缓解模式崩溃并在多样性上具有显著优势。蒸馏模型仅需1-4步即可生成高保真样本，将扩散采样加速15-50倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: rCM作为一个实用且理论基础的框架，推动了大规模扩散蒸馏的发展。它解决了连续时间一致性模型在大规模应用中的质量和效率问题，为文本到图像和视频生成提供了快速、高质量的解决方案。未来可进一步优化正则化策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: FideDiff: Efficient Diffusion Model for High-Fidelity Image Motion Deblurring
abstract: Recent advancements in image motion deblurring, driven by CNNs and transformers, have made significant progress. Large-scale pre-trained diffusion models, which are rich in real-world modeling, have shown great promise for high-quality image restoration tasks such as deblurring, demonstrating stronger generative capabilities than CNN and transformer-based methods. However, challenges such as unbearable inference time and compromised fidelity still limit the full potential of the diffusion models. To address this, we introduce FideDiff, a novel single-step diffusion model designed for high-fidelity deblurring. We reformulate motion deblurring as a diffusion-like process where each timestep represents a progressively blurred image, and we train a consistency model that aligns all timesteps to the same clean image. By reconstructing training data with matched blur trajectories, the model learns temporal consistency, enabling accurate one-step deblurring. We further enhance model performance by integrating Kernel ControlNet for blur kernel estimation and introducing adaptive timestep prediction. Our model achieves superior performance on full-reference metrics, surpassing previous diffusion-based methods and matching the performance of other state-of-the-art models. FideDiff offers a new direction for applying pre-trained diffusion models to high-fidelity image restoration tasks, establishing a robust baseline for further advancing diffusion models in real-world industrial applications. Our dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/xyLiu339/FideDiff.
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/xyLiu339/FideDiff

light_analysis.overview: 提出FideDiff，一种单步扩散模型，通过一致性模型和模糊轨迹对齐实现高效高保真图像运动去模糊。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CNN和Transformer去模糊方法虽有进展，但扩散模型因推理时间长和保真度不足难以实际应用。FideDiff旨在保留扩散模型强大生成能力的同时，实现单步高保真去模糊。
light_analysis.method: 将运动去模糊重定义为扩散过程，每个时间步对应不同模糊程度的图像，训练一致性模型将所有时间步对齐到清晰图像。通过重构具有匹配模糊轨迹的数据学习时间一致性，并集成Kernel ControlNet估计模糊核，引入自适应时间步预测。
light_analysis.result: 在完整参考指标上，FideDiff超越先前扩散模型，匹配其他SOTA方法。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但声称效果更优，并公开数据集和代码。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为预训练扩散模型应用于高保真图像恢复提供了新范式，建立了鲁棒基线，有望推动工业应用。未来可扩展至其他恢复任务。

title: Feature Identification via the Empirical NTK
abstract: We provide evidence that eigenanalysis of the empirical neural tangent kernel (eNTK) can surface feature directions in trained neural networks. Across three increasingly realistic settings -- a 1-layer MLP trained on modular addition, a 1-layer Transformer trained on modular addition and the pretrained language model Gemma-3-270M -- we show that top eigenspaces of the eNTK align with ground-truth or interpretable features. In the modular arithmetic examples, top eNTK eigenspaces align with the Fourier features used by the MLP and the Fourier features at seed-dependent frequencies used by the Transformer to implement known ground-truth algorithms. Moreover, the alignment of the relevant subspaces evolves over training, with its first derivative peaking near the onset of grokking. For Gemma-3-270M, we compute top eNTK eigendirections on a dataset of TinyStories context windows and check their alignment with an automatically-generated set of parts-of-speech and other grammatical feature directions. We find that the alignment of eNTK eigendirections with grammar features outperforms a same-budget baseline of PCA on model activations. These results suggest that eNTK eigenanalysis may provide a new handle towards identifying features in trained models for mechanistic interpretability.
comment: 23 pages, 4 figures. v2: references and expanded discussion in Appendix B added. v3: Transformer case study and more appendices added. v4: Language model case study added

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用经验神经切线核的特征分析识别训练神经网络中的特征方向，并在多种模型中验证有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法难以识别训练后神经网络中的特征方向，尤其是预训练大模型，限制了机械可解释性研究。本文旨在通过经验神经切线核的特征分析，发现模型内部可解释的特征，为理解模型工作机制提供新工具。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出利用经验神经切线核（eNTK）的特征分析，通过计算顶部特征空间与真实或可解释特征的对齐程度。在1层MLP、1层Transformer（模加法任务）和预训练模型Gemma-3-270M（TinyStories数据集）上验证，比较对齐随时间演化，并以PCA为基线。
light_analysis.result: 在模加法任务中，eNTK顶部特征空间与MLP的傅里叶特征及Transformer的种子频率傅里叶特征对齐，对齐一阶导数在grokking开始时峰值。在Gemma-3-270M上，eNTK特征方向与语法特征的对齐优于基于模型激活的PCA基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: eNTK特征分析为识别训练模型中的特征提供了新方法，有助于机械可解释性。该方法在多种架构上有效，但计算成本较高，未来需扩展到更大模型和实际应用场景。

title: Perceive, Verify and Understand Long Video: Multi-Granular Perception and Active Verification via Interactive Agents
abstract: Long videos, characterized by temporal complexity and sparse task-relevant information, pose significant reasoning challenges for AI systems. Although existing Large Language Model (LLM)-based approaches have advanced long video understanding, they remain bottlenecked by task-agnostic, fixed-granularity perception pipelines and suffer from vision-language hallucinations. Inspired by human adaptive perception and active verification, we propose CogniGPT, a framework leveraging an interactive loop between a Multi-Granular Perception Agent (MPA) and an Active Verification Agent (AVA). Specifically, instead of predetermined heuristics, MPA adaptively determines the optimal perception granularity and strategy based on the evolving context, while AVA actively mines multi-perspective visual evidence to cross-verify key observations and eliminate hallucinations. This interaction allows CogniGPT to efficiently identify a minimal set of reliable task-related clues. Extensive experiments on EgoSchema, Video-MME, NExT-QA, and MovieChat demonstrate its superiority in accuracy and efficiency. Notably, on EgoSchema, it surpasses existing training-free methods using only 11.2 frames and achieves performance comparable to Gemini 1.5-Pro.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CogniGPT框架，通过多粒度感知代理和主动验证代理的交互循环，实现高效准确的长视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频具有时间复杂性和稀疏任务相关信息，现有LLM方法受限于任务无关的固定粒度感知管道，并存在视觉-语言幻觉。需要一种类似人类自适应感知和主动验证的机制来高效提取可靠线索。
light_analysis.method: CogniGPT包含多粒度感知代理（MPA）和主动验证代理（AVA）。MPA根据上下文自适应确定最佳感知粒度和策略，AVA主动挖掘多视角视觉证据进行交叉验证，消除幻觉。两者交互迭代，最小化可靠任务相关线索集。
light_analysis.result: 在EgoSchema、Video-MME、NExT-QA和MovieChat上，CogniGPT在准确性和效率上均优于现有方法。在EgoSchema上，仅用11.2帧就超越所有无训练方法，性能与Gemini 1.5-Pro相当。摘要未明确说明其他数据集的详细指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: CogniGPT通过自适应感知和主动验证机制，有效解决了长视频理解中的效率和幻觉问题，具有较高学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的交互策略，或扩展到在线视频场景。

title: Discovering New Theorems via LLMs with In-Context Proof Learning in Lean
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant promise in formal theorem proving. In this study, we investigate the ability of LLMs to discover novel theorems and produce verified proofs. We propose a pipeline called \textit{Conjecturing-Proving Loop} (CPL), which iteratively generates mathematical conjectures and attempts to prove them in Lean 4. A key feature of CPL is that each iteration conditions the LLM on previously generated theorems and their formal proofs, enabling parameter-free improvement of proof strategies via in-context learning. We provide both theoretical and experimental evidence that CPL increases the discovery rate of hard-to-prove theorems compared to frameworks that generate statements and proofs simultaneously. Moreover, our experiments show that reusing the LLM's own formally verified outputs as context consistently improves subsequent proof success, demonstrating the effectiveness of self-generated in-context learning for neural theorem proving. The source code is available at https://github.com/auto-res/ConjecturingProvingLoop.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Conjecturing-Proving Loop (CPL) 框架，利用 LLM 在 Lean 4 中迭代生成并证明新定理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有形式化定理证明方法多聚焦于验证已有定理，缺乏自动发现新定理的能力。同时，LLM 在数学推理中常生成不严谨或错误的证明。本研究旨在探索 LLM 自动生成新数学猜想并给出形式化验证的可行性，解决同时生成命题与证明时难以发现困难定理的问题。通过迭代式上下文学习，提升证明策略而无需额外参数调整。
light_analysis.method: 提出 CPL 流水线，每次迭代中 LLM 基于之前已生成的定理及其形式化证明（上下文），生成新的猜想，并尝试在 Lean 4 中证明。核心创新在于将历史定理和证明作为上下文，实现无参数更新的策略改进。理论分析表明，该迭代过程能提高困难定理的发现率。实验使用 LLM 生成自身已验证的输出作为上下文，观察后续证明成功率的提升。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CPL 相比同时生成命题和证明的基线框架，显著增加了困难定理的发现率。同时，复用 LLM 自身形式化验证的输出作为上下文，持续提高了后续证明的成功率，验证了自生成上下文学习在神经定理证明中的有效性。具体数据未在摘要中给出，但提供了代码仓库链接。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种有效利用 LLM 自动发现并证明新定理的迭代框架 CPL，通过上下文学习无需额外参数更新即可改进证明策略。该工作为自动化数学发现提供了新思路，具有理论价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的上下文选择策略或结合搜索方法进一步提升性能。

title: Scalable Object Detection in the Car Interior With Vision Foundation Models
abstract: AI tasks in the car interior like identifying and localizing externally introduced objects is crucial for response quality of personal assistants. However, computational resources of on-board systems remain highly constrained, restricting the deployment of such solutions directly within the vehicle. To address this limitation, we propose the novel Object Detection and Localization (ODAL) framework for interior scene understanding. Our approach leverages vision foundation models through a distributed architecture, splitting computational tasks between on-board and cloud. This design overcomes the resource constraints of running foundation models directly in the car. To benchmark model performance, we introduce ODALbench, a new metric for comprehensive assessment of detection and localization.Our analysis demonstrates the framework's potential to establish new standards in this domain. We compare the state-of-the-art GPT-4o vision foundation model with the lightweight LLaVA 1.5 7B model and explore how fine-tuning enhances the lightweight models performance. Remarkably, our fine-tuned ODAL-LLaVA model achieves an ODAL$_{score}$ of 89%, representing a 71% improvement over its baseline performance and outperforming GPT-4o by nearly 20%. Furthermore, the fine-tuned model maintains high detection accuracy while significantly reducing hallucinations, achieving an ODAL$_{SNR}$ three times higher than GPT-4o.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ODAL框架，利用视觉基础模型通过分布式架构在车内实现可扩展的物体检测与定位，并引入ODALbench评估指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 车内AI任务（如识别外部引入物体）对个人助手的响应质量至关重要，但车载系统计算资源有限，限制了直接部署先进模型。现有方法难以在资源受限环境下实现高效的物体检测与定位。因此，需要一种可扩展的解决方案，既能利用强大视觉基础模型的能力，又能适应车载计算约束。
light_analysis.method: 提出ODAL框架，采用分布式架构将计算任务分割为车载端和云端，缓解资源限制。使用视觉基础模型（如GPT-4o和LLaVA 1.5 7B），并对轻量级LLaVA模型进行微调得到ODAL-LLaVA。引入新指标ODALbench，综合评估检测与定位性能。
light_analysis.result: 微调后的ODAL-LLaVA模型在ODAL_score上达到89%，比基线提升71%，比GPT-4o高20%。同时，该模型显著减少幻觉，ODAL_SNR是GPT-4o的三倍，表明在保持高检测精度的同时大幅提升可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ODAL框架通过分布式架构和微调策略，成功在车载资源受限环境下实现高质量物体检测与定位，验证了视觉基础模型在智能座舱中的应用潜力。未来可进一步优化计算效率，探索更多车载场景。

title: Investigating Advanced Reasoning of Large Language Models via Black-Box Environment Interaction
abstract: Existing tasks fall short in evaluating reasoning ability of Large Language Models (LLMs) in an interactive, unknown environment. This deficiency leads to the isolated assessment of deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning, neglecting the integrated reasoning process that is indispensable for human-like discovery learning. We introduce a novel evaluation paradigm, \textit{black-box environment interaction}, to tackle this challenge. A black-box environment is defined by a hidden function that maps a specific set of inputs to outputs. LLMs are required to unravel the hidden function behind the black-box environment by interacting with it in given exploration turns, and reasoning over observed input-output pairs. Leveraging this idea, we build the \textsc{Oracle} benchmark which comprises 6 types of black-box task with 96 black-box environments. 19 modern LLMs are benchmarked. o3, a leading LLM from OpenAI, ranks first in 5 of the 6 tasks, achieving over 70\% accuracy on most easy black-box environments. But it still struggles with some hard black-box tasks, where the average performance drops below 40\%. Further analysis reveals a universal difficulty among LLMs: They lack the high-level planning capability to develop efficient and adaptive exploration strategies for hypothesis refinement. Code is available in https://github.com/lemonsis/Oracle_Benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出黑箱环境交互评估范式及Oracle基准，评测LLM在未知环境中的集成推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有任务无法在交互式未知环境中评估LLM的推理能力，仅孤立地测试演绎、归纳或溯因推理，忽略了人类发现学习所需的集成推理过程。这导致LLM在复杂动态场景中的推理缺陷未被充分揭示。
light_analysis.method: 定义黑箱环境（隐藏函数映射输入输出），LLM需在有限探索轮次中通过交互推断该函数。构建Oracle基准，包含6类黑箱任务（共96个环境），对19个现代LLM进行系统评测，分析其集成推理表现。
light_analysis.result: o3（OpenAI）在5个任务中排名第一，简单环境准确率超70%；但困难任务平均低于40%。分析表明LLM普遍缺乏高效自适应探索策略的高层规划能力，难以进行假设修正。
light_analysis.conclusion: 黑箱环境交互范式有效揭示了LLM在集成推理中的短板，尤其是探索策略规划能力。该评估方法为提升LLM的发现学习能力提供了新方向，代码已开源。

title: UAV-VL-R1: Generalizing Vision-Language Models via Supervised Fine-Tuning and Multi-Stage GRPO for UAV Visual Reasoning
abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong generalization in natural image tasks. However, their performance often degrades on unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-based aerial imagery, which features high resolution, complex spatial semantics, and strict real-time constraints. These challenges limit the applicability of general-purpose VLMs to structured aerial reasoning tasks. To address these challenges, we propose UAV-VL-R1, a lightweight VLM explicitly designed for aerial visual reasoning. It is trained using a hybrid method that combines supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and multi-stage reinforcement learning (RL). We leverage the group relative policy optimization (GRPO) algorithm to promote structured and interpretable reasoning through rule-guided rewards and intra-group policy alignment. To support model training and evaluation, we introduce a high-resolution visual question answering dataset named HRVQA-VL, which consists of 50,019 annotated samples covering eight UAV-relevant reasoning tasks, including object counting, transportation recognition, and spatial scene inference. Experimental results show that UAV-VL-R1 achieves a 48.17% higher zero-shot accuracy than the Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct baseline and even outperforms its 72B-scale variant, which is 36x larger, on multiple tasks. Ablation studies reveal that while SFT improves semantic alignment, it may reduce reasoning diversity in mathematical tasks. GRPO-based RL compensates for this limitation by enhancing logical flexibility and the robustness of inference. Additionally, UAV-VL-R1 requires only 3.9GB of memory under FP16 inference and can be quantized to 2.5GB with INT8, supporting real-time deployment on resource-constrained UAV platforms.
comment: The article has been accepted by Frontiers of Computer Science (FCS), with the DOI: 10.1007/s11704-026-52082-z

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级VLM UAV-VL-R1，结合SFT和多阶段GRPO，用于无人机视觉推理，性能超越大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在自然图像任务中表现良好，但在无人机航拍图像上性能下降，因为航拍图像具有高分辨率、复杂空间语义和严格实时约束。通用VLM难以适用于结构化空中推理任务，限制了应用。因此需要专门为无人机视觉推理设计的轻量级模型，以在资源受限平台上实现高效准确推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出UAV-VL-R1，一个轻量级VLM，采用混合训练方法：先进行监督微调（SFT），再进行多阶段强化学习（RL）。使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）算法，通过规则引导奖励和组内策略对齐促进结构化可解释推理。同时构建高分辨率VQA数据集HRVQA-VL，包含50,019个标注样本，覆盖八种无人机相关推理任务，如目标计数、运输识别和空间场景推理。
light_analysis.result: UAV-VL-R1在零样本准确率上比Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct基线高出48.17%，甚至优于大36倍的72B变体。消融实验表明，SFT提升语义对齐但可能降低数学任务推理多样性，GRPO则增强逻辑灵活性和鲁棒性。模型在FP16推理下仅需3.9GB内存，INT8量化可降至2.5GB，适合无人机平台实时部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了针对无人机航拍推理的轻量级VLM，通过SFT和多阶段GRPO训练，结合新数据集HRVQA-VL，实现了高精度和低资源消耗。展示了强化学习在结构化推理中的有效性，为资源受限平台上的视觉推理提供了新思路。未来可扩展到更多任务和进一步优化模型效率。

title: ReasoningGuard: Safeguarding Large Reasoning Models with Inference-time Safety Aha Moments
abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in reasoning-intensive tasks, but they remain vulnerable to harmful content generation, particularly in the mid-to-late steps of their reasoning processes. Current defense methods, however, depend on costly fine-tuning and additional expert knowledge, which limits their scalability. In this work, we propose ReasoningGuard, an inference-time safeguard for LRMs. It injects timely safety aha moments during the reasoning process to guide the model towards harmless yet helpful reasoning. Our approach leverages the internal attention mechanisms of the LRM to accurately identify key points in the reasoning path, triggering safety-oriented reflections. To safeguard both the subsequent reasoning steps and the final answers, we implement a scaling sampling strategy during decoding to select the optimal reasoning path. With minimal additional inference cost, ReasoningGuard effectively mitigates four types of jailbreak attacks, including recent ones targeting the reasoning process of LRMs. Our approach outperforms nine existing safeguards, providing state-of-the-art defenses while avoiding common exaggerated safety issues.

light_analysis.overview: 提出推理时安全防护方法ReasoningGuard，通过注入安全aha moment和注意力引导，有效防御多种越狱攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型在推理过程中容易生成有害内容，现有防御方法依赖昂贵的微调和额外专家知识，可扩展性差。需要一种低成本、高效的推理时防护方案，在不影响模型性能的前提下防止有害输出。
light_analysis.method: 利用LRM内部注意力机制精确识别推理路径中的关键点，触发安全导向的反思（即安全aha moment）。同时采用缩放采样策略在解码时选择最优推理路径，确保后续步骤和最终答案的安全性。该方法无需微调，额外推理成本极低。
light_analysis.result: 在四种越狱攻击（包括针对推理过程的新型攻击）上，ReasoningGuard超越9种现有防护方法，达到最先进防御效果。同时避免了常见的过度安全拒绝问题，保持模型的有用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种实用的推理时安全框架，能有效平衡安全与有用性，为LRM的安全部署提供了可扩展的解决方案。未来可探索更精细的安全触发机制和跨模型泛化。

title: Adaptive Ensemble Aggregation for Actor-Critics
abstract: Ensembles are ubiquitous in off-policy actor-critic learning, yet their efficacy depends critically on how they are aggregated. Current methods typically rely on static rules or task-specific hyperparameters to balance overestimation bias and variance, leaving the challenge of a truly adaptive approach open. We introduce Adaptive Ensemble Aggregation (AEA), an algorithm that dynamically constructs ensemble-based targets for both critic and actor updates directly from training dynamics. We prove that AEA converges to a unique equilibrium where the aggregation parameter minimizes value estimation error within a defined stability region. Theoretically, we establish that AEA achieves a shrinkage property where the estimation bias vanishes as the total ensemble size grows.
