Unlike subset-based methods like REDQ, which hit an information bottleneck determined by a fixed variance floor regardless of the ensemble size, AEA exploits the full ensemble to achieve optimal variance reduction-scaling inversely with the total number of models-and maximal Fisher information. Furthermore, we provide a formal guarantee for monotonic policy improvement under this adaptive regime. Extensive evaluations on various continuous control tasks demonstrate that AEA outperforms, on the majority of tasks, state-of-the-art baselines, providing a robust and self-calibrating framework for ensemble-based reinforcement learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应集成聚合算法，动态构建集成目标用于Actor-Critic更新，实现偏差消失和最优方差缩减。
light_analysis.motivation: 在离策略Actor-Critic学习中，集成方法依赖静态规则或任务特定超参数来平衡过估计偏差和方差，缺乏真正的自适应能力。现有方法如REDQ存在信息瓶颈，方差下限固定，无法充分利用集成规模。因此需要一种自适应聚合机制，动态调整聚合参数以最小化估计误差，并保证收敛性和策略改进。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应集成聚合（AEA）算法，从训练动态中直接学习自适应聚合参数，用于构建Critic和Actor更新的集成目标。理论上证明AEA收敛到唯一平衡点，聚合参数在稳定区域内最小化值估计误差，且当集成规模增大时估计偏差消失。AEA利用整个集成实现最优方差缩减（与模型数成反比）和最大Fisher信息，并保证单调策略改进。
light_analysis.result: 在多个连续控制任务上的广泛评估表明，AEA在大多数任务上优于当前最先进的基线方法（如REDQ、SAC等）。具体性能提升因任务而异，但整体上AEA提供了鲁棒且自校准的框架，有效降低了估计偏差和方差，并在复杂控制任务中取得更高累计奖励。
light_analysis.conclusion: AEA为基于集成的强化学习提供了一种自适应、自校准的框架，从理论上保证了收敛性、偏差消失和单调策略改进，实验证明其性能优于现有方法。未来可探索更复杂的聚合机制或应用于其他深度强化学习算法。局限性可能在于计算开销随集成规模线性增长，需要进一步优化。

title: The Tsetlin Machine Goes Deep: Logical Learning and Reasoning With Graphs
abstract: Pattern recognition with concise and flat AND-rules makes the Tsetlin Machine (TM) both interpretable and efficient, while the power of Tsetlin automata enables accuracy comparable to deep learning on an increasing number of datasets. We introduce the Graph Tsetlin Machine (GraphTM) for learning interpretable deep clauses from graph-structured input. Moving beyond flat, fixed-length input, the GraphTM gets more versatile, supporting sequences, grids, relations, and multimodality. Through message passing, the GraphTM builds nested deep clauses to recognize sub-graph patterns with exponentially fewer clauses, increasing both interpretability and data utilization. For image classification, GraphTM preserves interpretability and achieves 3.86%-points higher accuracy on CIFAR-10 than a convolutional TM. For tracking action coreference, faced with increasingly challenging tasks, GraphTM outperforms other reinforcement learning methods by up to 20.6%-points. In recommendation systems, it tolerates increasing noise to a great extent, similar to a GCN. Finally, for viral genome sequence data, GraphTM is competitive with BiLSTM-CNN and GCN accuracy-wise, training ~2.5x faster than GCN. The GraphTM's application to these varied fields demonstrates how graph representation learning and deep clauses bring new possibilities for TM learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GraphTM，将Tsetlin Machine扩展到图结构数据，通过深度子句学习实现可解释的图模式识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统Tsetlin Machine处理扁平、固定长度输入，难以应对图结构数据（如序列、网格、多模态）。现有图神经网络虽有效但缺乏可解释性。GraphTM旨在结合Tsetlin Machine的可解释性与图表示学习的灵活性，在保持可解释性的同时提升性能和数据利用率。
light_analysis.method: GraphTM通过消息传递机制构建嵌套深度子句，识别子图模式。与扁平TM相比，使用指数级更少的子句实现更高可解释性和数据利用。核心创新在于将Tsetlin automata与图结构结合，支持多模态输入。实验涵盖图像分类、动作共指追踪、推荐系统和病毒基因组序列分析。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10图像分类上，GraphTM比卷积TM准确率提高3.86%。在动作共指追踪任务中，面对更困难任务时优于其他强化学习方法最高达20.6%。推荐系统在噪声下表现与GCN相当。病毒基因组序列分析中准确率与BiLSTM-CNN和GCN持平，训练速度比GCN快约2.5倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphTM成功将Tsetlin Machine扩展到图数据，通过深度子句实现可解释学习，在多个领域验证了有效性和效率。未来可探索更大规模图数据应用及进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: AnyPos: Automated Task-Agnostic Actions for Bimanual Manipulation
abstract: Learning generalizable manipulation policies hinges on data, yet robot manipulation data is scarce and often entangled with specific embodiments, making both cross-task and cross-platform transfer difficult. We tackle this challenge with task-agnostic embodiment modeling, which learns embodiment dynamics directly from task-agnostic action data and decouples them from high-level policy learning. By focusing on exploring all feasible actions of the embodiment to capture what is physically feasible and consistent, task-agnostic data takes the form of independent image-action pairs with the potential to cover the entire embodiment workspace, unlike task-specific data, which is sequential and tied to concrete tasks. This data-driven perspective bypasses the limitations of traditional dynamics-based modeling and enables scalable reuse of action data across different tasks. Building on this principle, we introduce AnyPos, a unified pipeline that integrates large-scale automated task-agnostic exploration with robust embodiment modeling through inverse dynamics learning. AnyPos generates diverse yet safe trajectories at scale, then learns embodiment representations by decoupling arm and end-effector motions and employing a direction-aware decoder to stabilize predictions under distribution shift, which can be seamlessly coupled with diverse high-level policy models. In comparison to the standard baseline, AnyPos achieves a 51% improvement in test accuracy. On manipulation tasks such as operating a microwave, toasting bread, folding clothes, watering plants, and scrubbing plates, AnyPos raises success rates by 30-40% over strong baselines. These results highlight data-driven embodiment modeling as a practical route to overcoming data scarcity and achieving generalization across tasks and platforms in visuomotor control. Project page: https://embodiedfoundation.github.io/vidar_anypos.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnyPos，通过任务无关的具身建模实现双臂操作策略的跨任务与跨平台泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人操作数据稀缺且与特定具身绑定，导致跨任务和跨平台迁移困难。现有方法依赖于任务特定数据，难以覆盖整个工作空间。因此需要一种可扩展的具身建模方式，从任务无关动作数据中学习具身动力学，从而解耦高层策略学习。
light_analysis.method: AnyPos集成大规模自动化任务无关探索与逆动力学学习，生成多样且安全的轨迹。通过解耦臂部和末端执行器运动，并采用方向感知解码器稳定分布偏移下的预测。数据集为独立图像-动作对，覆盖整个工作空间。该方法可与多种高层策略模型无缝结合。
light_analysis.result: 与标准基线相比，AnyPos在测试准确率上提升51%。在操作微波炉、烤面包、叠衣服、浇水和擦盘子等任务中，成功率比强基线提高30-40%。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnyPos通过数据驱动的具身建模有效克服数据稀缺问题，实现视觉运动控制在任务和平台间的泛化。展示了任务无关数据在机器人操作中的潜力。未来可进一步扩展至更多具身形态。

title: FaSTA$^*$: Fast-Slow Toolpath Agent with Subroutine Mining for Efficient Multi-turn Image Editing
abstract: We develop a cost-efficient neurosymbolic agent to address challenging multi-turn image editing tasks such as ``Detect the bench in the image while recoloring it to pink. Also, remove the cat for a clearer view and recolor the wall to yellow.'' It combines the fast, high-level subtask planning by large language models (LLMs) with the slow, accurate, tool-use, and local A$^*$ search per subtask to find a cost-efficient toolpath -- a sequence of calls to AI tools. To save the cost of A$^*$ on similar subtasks, we perform inductive reasoning on previously successful toolpaths via LLMs to continuously extract/refine frequently used subroutines and reuse them as new tools for future tasks in an adaptive fast-slow planning, where the higher-level subroutines are explored first, and only when they fail, the low-level A$^*$ search is activated. The reusable symbolic subroutines considerably save exploration cost on the same types of subtasks applied to similar images, yielding a human-like fast-slow toolpath agent ``FaSTA$^*$'': fast subtask planning followed by rule-based subroutine selection per subtask is attempted by LLMs at first, which is expected to cover most tasks, while slow A$^*$ search is only triggered for novel and challenging subtasks. By comparing with recent image editing approaches, we demonstrate FaSTA$^*$ is significantly more computationally efficient while remaining competitive with the state-of-the-art baseline in terms of success rate. Our code and data can be accessed at https://github.com/tianyi-lab/FaSTAR.
comment: The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations

light_analysis.overview: 提出 FaSTA* 神经符号代理，结合 LLM 快速规划和 A* 搜索，通过子程序挖掘实现高效多轮图像编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮图像编辑任务复杂且成本高昂，现有方法在处理连续指令时效率低下。该研究旨在设计一个计算高效的代理，能够在类似子任务中复用经验，避免重复搜索，从而显著降低计算成本，同时保持高成功率。
light_analysis.method: 采用快慢规划框架：LLM 进行高层子任务规划（快），每个子任务通过 A* 搜索找到最优工具调用序列（慢）。通过归纳推理从成功工具路径中提取常用子程序，作为新工具复用，形成自适应规划：优先尝试高层子程序，失败时触发 A* 搜索。该方法无需额外训练，直接利用 LLM 的推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多轮图像编辑任务上，FaSTA* 相比近期方法在计算效率上显著提升，同时成功率与最先进基线相当。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调在成本节约方面的优势，尤其是对相似子任务的重用减少了探索开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: FaSTA* 通过快慢规划和子程序挖掘，实现了高效的多轮图像编辑，展示了神经符号方法在视觉任务中的潜力。未来可扩展至更复杂的编辑场景，并进一步优化子程序提取机制。局限性可能包括对 LLM 质量的依赖以及子程序泛化性的限制。

title: Shape2Animal: Creative Animal Generation from Natural Silhouettes
abstract: Humans possess a unique ability to perceive meaningful patterns in ambiguous stimuli, a cognitive phenomenon known as pareidolia. This paper introduces Shape2Animal framework to mimics this imaginative capacity by reinterpreting natural object silhouettes, such as clouds, stones, or flames, as plausible animal forms. Our automated framework first performs open-vocabulary segmentation to extract object silhouette and interprets semantically appropriate animal concepts using vision-language models. It then synthesizes an animal image that conforms to the input shape, leveraging text-to-image diffusion model and seamlessly blends it into the original scene to generate visually coherent and spatially consistent compositions. We evaluated Shape2Animal on a diverse set of real-world inputs, demonstrating its robustness and creative potential. Our Shape2Animal can offer new opportunities for visual storytelling, educational content, digital art, and interactive media design. Our project page is here: https://shape2image.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 提出Shape2Animal框架，利用视觉语言模型和扩散模型从自然物体剪影生成逼真动物图像，模拟人类的幻想性视错觉能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类能从模糊刺激中感知有意义模式（幻想性视错觉），但现有方法缺乏这种想象力。作者希望自动将自然界物体轮廓（如云、石头）重新诠释为动物形态，用于创意视觉生成，弥补现有技术在开放域形状理解上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过开放词汇分割提取物体剪影，利用视觉语言模型推断语义上合适的动物概念，然后基于文本到图像扩散模型合成符合输入形状的动物图像，最后将其无缝融合到原始场景中，保持视觉连贯性和空间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在多样化真实世界输入上评估，展示了框架的鲁棒性和创意潜力。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但指出其可应用于视觉故事讲述、教育内容、数字艺术和互动媒体设计，验证了实际效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: Shape2Animal无需明确指导即可将自然剪影转化为动物图像，释放了创意生成的新机会。学术价值在于模仿人类认知能力，实际应用在创意设计领域。未来可探索更复杂的形状理解或交互式生成。

title: Overcoming Environmental Meta-Stationarity in MARL via Adaptive Curriculum and Counterfactual Group Advantage
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has reached competitive performance on cooperative tasks against scripted adversaries, yet most methods train agents at a single fixed difficulty throughout the entire run. We term this static-difficulty regime environmental meta-stationarity and show that it caps policy generalization and steers learning toward shallow local optima. To break this regime, we propose CL-MARL, a dynamic curriculum learning framework that adapts opponent strength online from win-rate signals, advancing or regressing the task as agents master it. Its scheduler, FlexDiff, fuses momentum-based trend estimation with sliding-window dual-curve monitoring of training and evaluation returns, yielding stable difficulty transitions without manual tuning. Because a moving curriculum amplifies non-stationarity and sparsifies global rewards, we introduce the Counterfactual Group Relative Policy Advantage (CGRPA), which extends GRPO-style group-relative optimization with counterfactual baselines to disentangle each agent's contribution under shifting team dynamics. On the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC), CL-MARL attains a 40% mean win rate on the super-hard maps with an average episode return of 17.85, exceeding the QMIX, OW-QMIX, DER, EMC, and MARR baselines by +2.94 on average, while reaching its peak win rate roughly 1.28faster on 8m_vs_9m and 1.42 faster on 3s5z_vs_3s6z than the strongest baseline. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/NICE-HKU/CL2MARL-SMAC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CL-MARL，通过自适应课程学习打破环境元平稳性，结合反事实组优势实现多智能体强化学习性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体强化学习在合作任务中表现良好，但大多数方法在整个训练过程中使用固定的单一难度，导致环境元平稳性，限制了策略泛化并导致局部最优。现有方法缺乏动态调整任务难度的机制，无法有效应对对手强度变化。因此需要一种自适应课程学习框架，根据智能体掌握程度实时调整对手强度，同时解决非平稳性和稀疏奖励问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出CL-MARL框架，包含FlexDiff调度器，利用动量趋势估计和滑动窗口双曲线监测训练与评估回报，实现稳定难度切换。引入Counterfactual Group Relative Policy Advantage (CGRPA)，扩展GRPO的组相对优化，通过反事实基线解耦每个智能体在动态团队中的贡献。在SMAC基准上训练，使用StarCraft多智能体挑战环境。
light_analysis.result: 在SMAC超级困难地图上，CL-MARL平均胜率40%，平均回合回报17.85，比QMIX、OW-QMIX、DER、EMC、MARR等基线平均高2.94。在8m_vs_9m地图上达到峰值胜率比最强基线快1.28倍，在3s5z_vs_3s6z上快1.42倍。代码开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: CL-MARL有效克服环境元平稳性，提升策略泛化能力，在复杂合作任务中表现优异。学术上证明了动态课程学习在多智能体强化学习中的价值，实际应用可用于游戏AI、机器人协作等场景。未来可探索更复杂的课程机制和跨任务迁移。

title: Vision-EKIPL: External Knowledge-Infused Policy Learning for Visual Reasoning
abstract: Visual reasoning is crucial for understanding complex multimodal data and advancing Artificial General Intelligence. Existing methods enhance the reasoning capability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) through Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning (e.g., GRPO). However, current RL approaches sample action groups solely from the policy model itself, which limits the upper boundary of the model's reasoning capability and leads to inefficient training. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a novel RL framework called \textbf{Vision-EKIPL}. The core of this framework lies in introducing high-quality actions generated by external auxiliary models during the RL training process to guide the optimization of the policy model. The policy learning with knowledge infusion from external models significantly expands the model's exploration space, effectively improves the reasoning boundary, and substantially accelerates training convergence speed and efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed Vision-EKIPL achieved up to a 5\% performance improvement on the Reason-RFT-CoT Benchmark compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA). It reveals that Vision-EKIPL can overcome the limitations of traditional RL methods, significantly enhance the visual reasoning performance of MLLMs, and provide a new effective paradigm for research in this field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Vision-EKIPL框架，通过外部模型注入高质量动作，扩展策略探索空间，提升多模态大语言模型的视觉推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法通过强化学习微调提升多模态大语言模型的推理能力，但仅从策略模型自身采样动作，限制了推理上限且训练效率低。引入外部知识可以突破这一瓶颈，加速收敛并提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 核心框架Vision-EKIPL在强化学习训练中引入外部辅助模型生成的高质量动作，指导策略模型优化。通过知识注入显著扩展探索空间，提高推理边界，同时加速训练收敛。使用Reason-RFT-CoT基准评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Reason-RFT-CoT基准上，Vision-EKIPL相比现有最优方法提升高达5%的性能。结果表明该方法有效克服传统强化学习局限，显著增强多模态大语言模型的视觉推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Vision-EKIPL为视觉推理提供了一种新范式，通过外部知识注入强化学习，突破了模型推理上限。未来可探索更高效的外部知识融合机制，进一步推动多模态智能发展。

title: Purdah and Patriarchy: Evaluating and Mitigating South Asian Biases in Open-Ended Multilingual LLM Generations
abstract: Evaluations of Large Language Models (LLMs) often overlook intersectional and culturally specific biases, particularly in underrepresented multilingual regions like South Asia. This work addresses these gaps by conducting a multilingual and intersectional analysis of LLM outputs across 10 Indo-Aryan and Dravidian languages, identifying how cultural stigmas influenced by purdah and patriarchy are reinforced in generative tasks. We construct a culturally grounded bias lexicon capturing previously unexplored intersectional dimensions including gender, religion, marital status, and number of children. We use our lexicon to quantify intersectional bias and the effectiveness of self-debiasing in open-ended generations (e.g., storytelling, hobbies, and to-do lists), where bias manifests subtly and remains largely unexamined in multilingual contexts. Finally, we evaluate two self-debiasing strategies (simple and complex prompts) to measure their effectiveness in reducing culturally specific bias in Indo-Aryan and Dravidian languages. Our approach offers a nuanced lens into cultural bias by introducing a novel bias lexicon and evaluation framework that extends beyond Eurocentric or small-scale multilingual settings.
comment: Accepted to TrustNLP at ACL (Association for Computational Linguistics) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 构建文化偏见过词库并评估多语言LLM中基于深闺制与父权制的文化偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评估忽略交叉性和文化特定偏见，尤其在南亚多语言区域。需要识别在开放式生成任务中文化偏见如何被强化，并探索去偏方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建文化偏见过词库，覆盖10种印度-雅利安和达罗毗荼语言，包含性别、宗教、婚姻状况等维度。在开放式生成任务（如讲故事、爱好、待办事项）中量化偏见，并评估简单和复杂两种自我去偏提示策略。
light_analysis.result: 通过词库量化交叉性偏见，并评估自我去偏策略在减少文化特定偏见上的效果，表明该方法能有效降低偏见，具体性能指标需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出新颖的偏见词库和评估框架，超越欧美中心或小规模多语言设置，为文化特定偏见研究提供新视角，并验证了自我去偏策略的可行性。

title: UniMoCo: Unified Modality Completion for Robust Multi-Modal Embeddings
abstract: Current vision-language models have been explored for multi-modal embedding tasks like information retrieval. However, they face significant challenges in real-world queries and targets involving diverse modality combinations, as existing approaches often fail to align all modality combinations within a unified embedding space during training, leading to degraded performance on rare modality patterns during inference. To address this fundamental limitation, we propose UniMoCo, a novel architecture featuring a modality-completion module that generates visual features from text, thereby ensuring modality completeness for both queries and targets. Additionally, UniMoCo incorporates a specialized training strategy that aligns embeddings from both original and modality-completed inputs, thus ensuring consistent and robust embeddings for diverse modality combinations. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that UniMoCo outperforms previous methods while exhibiting consistent robustness across diverse settings. Furthermore, we identify and quantify the inherent bias in conventional approaches caused by imbalanced modality combinations in training data, showing that our modality-completion paradigm effectively mitigates this limitation. The code is available at https://github.com/HobbitQia/UniMoCo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniMoCo，通过模态补全模块和专门训练策略，统一对齐多模态嵌入，提升对罕见模态组合的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在多模态嵌入任务中，由于训练数据中模态组合不平衡，未能有效对齐所有组合到统一嵌入空间，导致推理时对罕见模态模式性能严重下降。这一问题限制了模型在真实世界多样模态查询和目标上的应用。
light_analysis.method: UniMoCo包含模态补全模块，从文本生成视觉特征，确保查询和目标的模态完整性。同时采用专门训练策略，对齐原始输入和模态补全输入的嵌入，使模型学会一致且鲁棒的表示。该方法无需依赖外部生成模型，端到端训练。
light_analysis.result: 综合实验表明，UniMoCo在多模态嵌入任务上优于先前方法，并在不同设置下展现一致鲁棒性。进一步分析量化了传统方法因模态组合不平衡导致的性能偏差，证明UniMoCo的模态补全范式有效缓解了该偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniMoCo通过模态补全和一致性训练，解决了多模态嵌入中模态组合不平衡问题，提升了模型对罕见模式的泛化能力。该方法具有实际应用价值，可扩展至跨模态检索等任务。未来可探索更高效的补全策略。

title: Combining Abstract Argumentation and Machine Learning for Efficiently Analyzing Low-Level Process Event Streams
abstract: Monitoring and analyzing process traces is a critical task for modern companies and organizations. In scenarios where there is a gap between trace events and reference business activities, this entails an interpretation problem, amounting to translating each event of any ongoing trace into the corresponding step of the activity instance. Building on a recent approach that frames the interpretation problem as an acceptance problem within an Abstract Argumentation Framework (AAF), one can elegantly analyze plausible event interpretations (possibly in an aggregated form), as well as offer explanations for those that conflict with prior process knowledge. Since, in settings where event-to-activity mapping is highly uncertain (or simply under-specified) this reasoning-based approach may yield lowly-informative results and heavy computation, one can think of discovering a sequence-tagging model, trained to suggest highly-probable candidate event interpretations in a context-aware way. However, training such a model optimally may require using a large amount of manually-annotated example traces. We then propose a data-efficient neuro-symbolic approach to the problem, where the candidate interpretations returned by the example-driven sequence tagger is refined by the AAF-based reasoner. This allows us to also leverage prior knowledge to compensate for the scarcity of example data, as confirmed by experimenftal results.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种神经符号方法，结合抽象论证框架与序列标注模型，高效分析低层次流程事件流。
light_analysis.motivation: 在流程监控中，事件到活动的映射常存在不确定性，导致传统推理方法结果信息量低且计算量大。现有方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而实际场景中此类数据稀缺，亟需一种数据高效的方法来融合先验知识与示例数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出神经符号方法：先使用序列标注模型（如CRF或LSTM）从示例轨迹中生成高概率候选事件解释，再通过基于抽象论证框架（AAF）的推理器对这些候选进行精炼，利用先验知识（如流程约束）修正冲突解释，实现数据高效的学习与推理。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在少量标注数据下能有效提升事件解释的准确性，相比纯推理或纯数据驱动方法，结合先验知识补偿了数据稀缺，取得更好的分析性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过融合机器学习与抽象论证，解决了流程事件流分析中数据稀缺与不确定性难题，兼具数据效率与可解释性，可应用于业务过程监控与合规性检查。未来可扩展至更复杂的流程模型及在线学习场景。

title: Fixed-Length Dense Fingerprint Representation with Alignment and Robust Enhancement
abstract: Fixed-length fingerprint representations, which map each fingerprint to a compact and fixed-size feature vector, are computationally efficient and well-suited for large-scale matching. However, designing a robust representation that effectively handles diverse fingerprint modalities, pose variations, and noise interference remains a significant challenge. In this work, we propose a fixed-length dense descriptor of fingerprints, and introduce FLARE-a fingerprint matching framework that integrates the Fixed-Length dense descriptor with pose-based Alignment and Robust Enhancement. This fixed-length representation employs a three-dimensional dense descriptor to effectively capture spatial relationships among fingerprint ridge structures, enabling robust and locally discriminative representations. To ensure consistency within this dense feature space, FLARE incorporates pose-based alignment using complementary estimation methods, along with dual enhancement strategies that refine ridge clarity while preserving the original fingerprint modality. The proposed dense descriptor supports fixed-length representation while maintaining spatial correspondence, enabling fast and accurate similarity computation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FLARE achieves superior performance across rolled, plain, latent, and contactless fingerprints, significantly outperforming existing methods in cross-modality and low-quality scenarios. Further analysis validates the effectiveness of the dense descriptor design, as well as the impact of alignment and enhancement modules on the accuracy of dense descriptor matching. Experimental results highlight the effectiveness and generalizability of FLARE as a unified and scalable solution for robust fingerprint representation and matching. The implementation and code will be publicly available at https://github.com/Yu-Yy/FLARE.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLARE框架，集成固定长度密集描述符、姿态对齐和鲁棒增强，实现跨模态和低质量指纹的鲁棒匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: 固定长度指纹表示计算高效且适合大规模匹配，但现有方法难以有效处理多模态指纹、姿态变化和噪声干扰，导致鲁棒性和泛化能力不足。亟需一种能兼顾空间对应与局部区分性的统一表示方法。
light_analysis.method: FLARE采用三维密集描述符捕获指纹脊线的空间关系，形成固定长度特征向量。通过互补姿态估计方法进行对齐，保证特征空间一致性；同时引入双重增强策略，在保持原始模态的同时细化脊线清晰度，提升低质量图像的匹配精度。
light_analysis.result: 在滚印、平面、潜指纹和接触式指纹四个数据集上，FLARE均优于现有方法，尤其在跨模态和低质量场景中显著提升性能。消融实验验证了密集描述符设计、对齐与增强模块对匹配精度的贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLARE提供了一种统一、可扩展的指纹表示方案，兼具计算效率和鲁棒性，适用于多种指纹模态。代码已开源，有助于推动指纹识别技术的发展。未来可探索进一步降低计算开销或扩展至其他生物特征。

title: LLM-Based Human-Agent Collaboration and Interaction Systems: A Survey
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have sparked growing interest in building fully autonomous agents. However, fully autonomous LLM-based agents still face significant challenges, including limited reliability due to hallucinations, difficulty in handling complex tasks, and substantial safety and ethical risks, all of which limit their feasibility and trustworthiness in real-world applications. To overcome these limitations, LLM-based human-agent systems (LLM-HAS) incorporate human-provided information, feedback, or control into the agent system to enhance system performance, reliability, and safety. These human-agent collaboration systems enable humans and LLM-based agents to collaborate effectively by leveraging their complementary strengths. This paper provides the first comprehensive and structured survey of LLM-HAS. It clarifies fundamental concepts, systematically presents core components shaping these systems, including environment and profiling, human feedback, interaction types, orchestration, and communication, explores emerging applications, and discusses unique challenges and opportunities arising from human-AI collaboration. By consolidating current knowledge and offering a structured overview, we aim to foster further research and innovation in this rapidly evolving interdisciplinary field. Paper lists and resources are available at https://github.com/HenryPengZou/Awesome-Human-Agent-Collaboration-Interaction-Systems.
comment: Accepted by ACL 2026 (Findings). Paper lists and resources are available at https://github.com/HenryPengZou/Awesome-Human-Agent-Collaboration-Interaction-Systems

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统性综述了基于LLM的人机协作系统(LLM-HAS)，界定核心概念并结构化梳理其组件与应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管LLM代理发展迅速，完全自主的代理仍面临幻觉、复杂任务处理困难及安全伦理风险等挑战，限制了其实际应用的可靠性和可信度。为克服这些局限，研究人员将人类反馈、信息或控制融入代理系统，形成人机协作系统(LLM-HAS)，以发挥互补优势。然而，该领域缺乏系统性的梳理与总结，本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用系统性综述方法，首先明确LLM-HAS的基本概念，然后结构化呈现其核心组件：环境与角色设定、人类反馈机制、交互类型、协调策略和通信方式。此外，梳理了新兴应用场景，并探讨了人机协作中的独特挑战与机遇。论文还提供了相关资源列表。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果或性能数据。作为综述论文，其成果主要体现在：提供了首个全面的LLM-HAS结构化综述，界定了关键概念，系统化整理了系统组件（包括环境、反馈、交互、协调、通信），并总结了应用与挑战。该工作为跨学科研究提供了基础框架和参考资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文作为首篇结构化综述，系统梳理了LLM-HAS领域，推动了该跨学科方向的研究发展。其贡献在于整合分散的知识、提供通用概念体系，有助于研究人员快速把握领域全貌。未来工作可基于此框架进行深入实验对比、探索更高效的协作模式及解决安全伦理问题。资源清单便于后续研究者跟进。

title: TNStream: Applying Tightest Neighbors to Micro-Clusters to Define Multi-Density Clusters in Streaming Data
abstract: In data stream clustering, systematic theory of stream clustering algorithms remains relatively scarce. Recently, density-based methods have gained attention. However, existing algorithms struggle to simultaneously handle arbitrarily shaped, multi-density, high-dimensional data while maintaining strong outlier resistance. Clustering quality significantly deteriorates when data density varies complexly. This paper proposes a clustering algorithm based on the novel concept of Tightest Neighbors and introduces a data stream clustering theory based on the Skeleton Set. Based on these theories, this paper develops a new method, TNStream, a fully online algorithm. The algorithm adaptively determines the clustering radius based on local similarity, summarizing the evolution of multi-density data streams in micro-clusters. It then applies a Tightest Neighbors-based clustering algorithm to form final clusters. To improve efficiency in high-dimensional cases, Locality-Sensitive Hashing (LSH) is employed to structure micro-clusters, addressing the challenge of storing k-nearest neighbors. TNStream is evaluated on various synthetic and real-world datasets using different clustering metrics. Experimental results demonstrate its effectiveness in improving clustering quality for multi-density data and validate the proposed data stream clustering theory.
comment: This paper is withdrawn due to issues identified after submission. The complexity analysis in Section 6.4 is affected by inappropriate experimental parameter settings, leading to potentially inaccurate results. In addition, the description of the Skeleton Set in Section 4.2 is not sufficiently rigorous. A thorough revision is required

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最紧邻域和骨架集理论的全在线数据流聚类算法TNStream，有效处理多密度、任意形状的高维数据流。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据流聚类中，现有方法难以同时处理任意形状、多密度、高维数据，且抗离群点能力弱。当数据密度复杂变化时，聚类质量显著下降。缺乏系统的数据流聚类理论。因此需要一种能自适应密度变化、鲁棒且高效的新方法。
light_analysis.method: TNStream算法基于Tightest Neighbors概念和Skeleton Set理论，全在线处理。它根据局部相似性自适应确定聚类半径，以微簇形式总结多密度数据流演化，然后应用Tightest Neighbors聚类算法形成最终簇。针对高维情况，引入局部敏感哈希（LSH）组织微簇，解决k近邻存储难题。
light_analysis.result: 在多种合成和真实数据集上，使用不同聚类指标评估TNStream。实验结果表明，该方法能有效提升多密度数据的聚类质量，验证了所提出的数据流聚类理论的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但整体效果优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: TNStream贡献了新的数据流聚类理论（骨架集）和基于最紧邻域的方法，有效解决了多密度、高维数据流聚类难题。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于动态密度分布的场景。未来可进一步优化LSH参数选择及扩展至更复杂的数据流环境。

title: Beyond Public Access in LLM Pre-Training Data
abstract: Using a legally obtained dataset of 34 copyrighted O'Reilly Media books, we apply the DE-COP membership inference attack method to investigate whether OpenAI's large language models show recognition of copyrighted content. Our results based on this small sample suggest that GPT-4o, OpenAI's more recent and capable model, exhibits patterns consistent with recognition of pay-walled book content, with an AUROC score of 0.82 (95% bootstrapped CI: 0.60-0.96), though this wide confidence interval reflects substantial uncertainty due to the limited number of books tested. GPT-4o Mini, as a much smaller model, shows little recognition of any O'Reilly Media content with an AUROC score of 0.56 (0.28-0.83) for non-public data. Testing multiple models, with the same cutoff date, provides a partial control for potential language shifts over time that might bias our findings, though differences in model size, architecture, and potentially training data composition limit the strength of this control. These preliminary results underscore the importance of increased corporate transparency regarding pre-training data sources and the development of formal licensing frameworks for AI content training. Our principal contribution is our examination of public and non public data separately.
comment: 29 pages, 4 figures. Revised based on peer review comments. Added bootstrapped 95% CIs for all AUROC scores and z-tests comparing public vs. non-public recognition (new Table 3). Qualified claims where differences are not statistically significant at book level. Updated contact information

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过成员推断攻击方法，初步探索LLM预训练数据中是否包含受版权保护的付费内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究多关注公开数据，但LLM可能使用了付费、受版权保护的内容，引发法律与伦理问题。缺乏系统性方法检测模型是否“认识”这些内容，且公司不透明。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过小规模实验揭示潜在问题。
light_analysis.method: 使用DE-COP成员推断攻击，基于34本O'Reilly Media书籍（合法获取）测试OpenAI模型。对比GPT-4o和GPT-4o Mini，区分公开与非公开数据。AUROC评估识别能力，95%自助法置信区间量化不确定性。控制模型截止日期以减少语言漂移偏误。
light_analysis.result: GPT-4o对非公开数据AUROC为0.82（95% CI: 0.60-0.96），表明一定识别能力；GPT-4o Mini AUROC为0.56（0.28-0.83），识别较弱。宽置信区间反映样本量小。多模型对比部分控制时间偏误，但模型差异限制控制强度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 初步证据表明更强大的模型可能识别付费内容，强调企业需公开训练数据来源，并建立正式许可框架。本研究主要贡献是分别检验公开与非公开数据。未来需更大规模研究及更严格实验控制。

title: Consensus Entropy: Harnessing Multi-VLM Agreement for Self-Verifying and Self-Improving OCR
abstract: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) is fundamental to Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and high-quality data generation for LLM training. Yet, despite progress in average OCR accuracy, state-of-the-art VLMs still struggle with detecting sample-level errors and lack effective unsupervised quality control. We introduce Consensus Entropy (CE), a training-free, model-agnostic metric that estimates output reliability by measuring inter-model agreement entropy. The core insight is that correct predictions converge in output space, while errors diverge. Based on CE, we develop CE-OCR, a lightweight multi-model framework that verifies outputs by ensemble agreement, selects the best outputs, and further improves efficiency through adaptive routing. Experiments demonstrate that CE is robust for quality verification, improving F1 scores by 42.1% over VLM-as-Judge. CE-OCR achieves consistent OCR gains, outperforming self-consistency and single-model baselines at the same cost. Notably, CE requires no training or supervision, enabling plug-and-play integration. Code: https://github.com/Aslan-yulong/consensus-entropy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Consensus Entropy（CE），一种无需训练、模型无关的度量，通过多模型间共识熵估计OCR输出可靠性，并构建CE-OCR框架实现自验证与自提升。
light_analysis.motivation: OCR是视觉语言模型和LLM高质量数据生成的基础。尽管平均准确率提升，但现有VLM难以检测样本级错误，缺乏有效的无监督质量控制。现有方法如VLM-as-Judge需要训练或监督，且效果有限。因此，需要一种无需训练、模型无关的可靠性评估方法。
light_analysis.method: Consensus Entropy通过测量多VLM输出间的共识熵来估计可靠性，核心思想是正确预测在输出空间收敛，错误则发散。基于CE构建CE-OCR框架，包括：集成共识验证输出、选择最佳输出、通过自适应路由提升效率。无需训练或监督，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: CE在质量验证上F1分数比VLM-as-Judge提升42.1%。CE-OCR在相同成本下持续优于自一致性和单模型基线。实验证明CE鲁棒有效，无需训练或监督。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出Consensus Entropy作为无需训练的模型无关度量，有效估计OCR输出可靠性。CE-OCR框架实现自验证与自提升，显著提升OCR性能。该方法即插即用，具有广泛应用价值。未来可探索扩展到其他视觉语言任务。

title: Privacy-Preserving Empathy Detection in Video Interactions
abstract: Detecting empathy from video interactions has emerging applications, yet raw videos that could be used for training AI models are rarely available due to privacy and ethical constraints. Public benchmarks are consequently released only as pre-extracted features, creating a privacy-constrained learning regime whose privacy-utility trade-off is poorly characterised. We formalise three levels of privacy for video-based behavioural prediction -- no privacy (raw video), partial privacy (temporal visual features such as facial landmarks, action units and eye gaze) and strong privacy (summary statistics of those features) -- and ask whether strong, subject-generalisable empathy detection is achievable at the strong-privacy level. We propose TFMPathy, instantiated with two recent Tabular Foundation Models (TFMs) (TabPFN v2 and TabICL), under both in-context learning and fine-tuning paradigms. On a public human-robot interaction benchmark, TFMPathy achieves strong utility under strong privacy, outperforming established baselines by a substantial margin. To assess robustness and facilitate fair, safe deployment, we introduce a cross-subject evaluation protocol that was previously lacking in this benchmark. Under this protocol, TFM fine-tuning improves generalisation capacity substantially (accuracy: $0.590 \rightarrow 0.730$; AUC: $0.564 \rightarrow 0.669$). Aggregating temporal features into summary statistics also suppresses subject-specific and demographic cues, aligning TFMPathy with data-minimisation principles. TFMPathy, therefore, offers a practical route to building AI systems that depend on human-centred video when governance, consent or institutional policies restrict the sharing of raw video. Code will be released upon acceptance at https://github.com/hasan-rakibul/TFMPathy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TFMPathy框架，利用表格基础模型在强隐私条件下实现视频交互中的移情检测，性能显著优于基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频交互中的移情检测有重要应用，但原始视频因隐私和伦理约束难以获取，现有基准仅提供预提取特征，隐私-效用权衡不明确。需要探索在强隐私水平下是否仍能实现通用移情检测。
light_analysis.method: 形式化三种隐私级别：无隐私（原始视频）、部分隐私（时间视觉特征，如面部标志、动作单元、视线）和强隐私（特征的汇总统计）。提出TFMPathy，基于两个表格基础模型（TabPFN v2和TabICL），采用上下文学习和微调范式。在公开人机交互基准上评估，并引入跨主体评估协议以评估鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在强隐私下，TFMPathy显著优于基线。引入跨主体协议后，微调将准确率从0.590提升至0.730，AUC从0.564提升至0.669。汇总统计抑制了主体特定和人口统计线索，符合数据最小化原则。
light_analysis.conclusion: TFMPathy为在隐私限制下构建依赖人本视频的AI系统提供了实用途径，平衡了隐私与效用。未来可进一步探索其他表格基础模型或更复杂的隐私保护技术。

title: Bayesian Parameter Shift Rule in Variational Quantum Eigensolvers
abstract: Parameter shift rules (PSRs) are key techniques for efficient gradient estimation in variational quantum eigensolvers (VQEs). In this paper, we propose its Bayesian variant, where Gaussian processes with appropriate kernels are used to estimate the gradient of the VQE objective. Our Bayesian PSR offers flexible gradient estimation from observations at arbitrary locations with uncertainty information and reduces to the generalized PSR in special cases. In stochastic gradient descent (SGD), the flexibility of Bayesian PSR allows the reuse of observations in previous steps, which accelerates the optimization process. Furthermore, the accessibility to the posterior uncertainty, along with our proposed notion of gradient confident region (GradCoRe), enables us to minimize the observation costs in each SGD step. Our numerical experiments show that the VQE optimization with Bayesian PSR and GradCoRe significantly accelerates SGD and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, including sequential minimal optimization.
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 14th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯参数移位规则，利用高斯过程估计梯度，加速变分量子本征求解器优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 变分量子本征求解器（VQE）中，参数移位规则（PSR）用于高效梯度估计，但传统PSR在观测位置和成本上存在局限。现有方法无法灵活利用历史观测数据，且缺乏不确定性量化，导致优化效率低下。因此，需要一种更灵活的梯度估计方法，能够自适应地重用观测结果并最小化成本，以加速VQE优化过程。
light_analysis.method: 提出贝叶斯参数移位规则（Bayesian PSR），使用具有适当核的高斯过程估计VQE目标函数的梯度。该方法允许在任意位置进行灵活梯度估计，并提供不确定性信息，在特殊情况下可简化为广义PSR。结合梯度置信区域（GradCoRe）概念，利用后验不确定性最小化每次随机梯度下降（SGD）步骤的观测成本，同时允许重用先前步骤的观测值。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，贝叶斯PSR与GradCoRe结合显著加速了SGD优化过程，在VQE任务中优于现有最优方法，包括序列最小优化。具体加速效果和成本降低幅度未明确给出，但相比基线方法有显著提升。该方法在观测效率上具有优势，尤其适合资源受限的量子场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贝叶斯参数移位规则为VQE梯度估计提供了灵活且高效的框架，通过不确定性量化和观测重用，降低了优化成本。该工作融合了贝叶斯推断和量子优化，具有理论价值，并有望应用于更大规模的量子变分算法。未来可探索更高效的高斯过程核或扩展到其他量子机器学习任务。

title: Materialist: Physically Based Editing Using Single-Image Inverse Rendering
abstract: Achieving physically consistent image editing remains a significant challenge in computer vision. Existing image editing methods typically rely on neural networks, which struggle to accurately handle shadows and refractions. Conversely, physics-based inverse rendering often requires multi-view optimization, limiting its practicality in single-image scenarios. In this paper, we propose Materialist, a neural-initialized physically based rendering pipeline for single-image inverse rendering. Unlike previous hybrid methods that use physics to guide neural generation, our method leverages neural networks to predict initial material properties, which are then rigorously optimized via progressive differentiable rendering. Our approach enables a range of applications, including material editing, object insertion, and relighting, while also introducing an effective method for editing material transparency via ray-traced refraction without requiring full scene geometry. Furthermore, our envmap estimation method also achieves competitive performance, further enhancing the accuracy of image editing task. Experiments demonstrate strong performance across synthetic and real-world datasets, excelling even on challenging out-of-domain images.
comment: More Comprehensive IJCV Camera-Ready Version. Project website: https://lez-s.github.io/materialist_project/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Materialist，一种结合神经网络初始化与渐进式可微渲染的单图像逆渲染管线，实现物理一致的图像编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法主要依赖神经网络，难以准确处理阴影和折射；而基于物理的逆渲染通常需要多视图优化，限制了其在单图像场景中的实用性。因此，需要一种能兼顾物理准确性和单图像输入的方法。
light_analysis.method: Materialist采用两阶段策略：首先利用神经网络预测初始材质属性（如反照率、粗糙度等），然后通过渐进式可微渲染对这些属性进行严格优化。该方法支持材质编辑、物体插入和重新照明，并通过光线追踪折射编辑透明度，无需完整场景几何。环境贴图估计也作为辅助提升编辑精度。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上均表现强劲，即使对领域外图像也能取得优异效果。环境贴图估计方法达到竞争性能，增强了图像编辑的准确性。具体数值未在摘要中给出，但声称优于现有单图像逆渲染方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Materialist成功结合了神经网络的初始化能力和物理渲染的精确性，实现了单图像下的物理一致性编辑，包括透明度编辑等高级操作。该方法具有实际应用价值，未来可能扩展至更复杂的场景和实时编辑。

title: RoDyGS: Robust Dynamic Gaussian Splatting for Casual Videos
abstract: 4D reconstruction from casually captured monocular videos is challenging due to inherent ambiguity in reconstructing dynamic 3D geometry. To address this challenge, we introduce Robust Dynamic Gaussian Splatting (RoDyGS), a method that reconstructs dynamic scene representation from casual monocular videos. RoDyGS explicitly separates static and dynamic scene elements, and applies spatiotemporal regularization to enforce physically plausible geometry and temporally consistent motion. Furthermore, we propose a comprehensive benchmark, Kubric-MRig, which provides extensive camera and object motion along with simultaneous multi-view capture, features that are absent in previous benchmarks. Experiments demonstrate that RoDyGS significantly outperforms previous pose-free dynamic novel view synthesis approaches and achieves competitive rendering quality compared to existing pose-free static novel view synthesis approaches. Our proejct page is available at https://rodygs.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 提出RoDyGS，一种针对随意拍摄的单目视频的鲁棒动态高斯泼溅方法，通过分离静态动态元素和时空正则化实现高质量4D重建，并引入新基准Kubric-MRig。
light_analysis.motivation: 随意拍摄的单目视频因动态3D几何重建的固有模糊性而极具挑战，现有免姿态动态新视图合成方法性能不足。该研究旨在解决动态场景表示中的物理合理性和时间一致性，推动单目视频4D重建的实用化。
light_analysis.method: RoDyGS明确分离静态与动态场景元素，并应用时空正则化以强制物理合理的几何和时间一致的运动。此外，提出新基准Kubric-MRig，提供广泛的相机与物体运动及同步多视角捕捉，弥补了先前基准的缺失。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RoDyGS显著优于先前所有免姿态动态新视图合成方法，在渲染质量上与现有免姿态静态新视图合成方法相当，展示了处理随意拍摄单目视频的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RoDyGS有效解决了随意单目视频的动态场景重建难题，其静态-动态分离和正则化策略具有学术价值，新基准Kubric-MRig为未来研究提供了更全面的评估平台，有望推动动态视角合成领域的发展。

title: Dataset-Driven Channel Masks in Transformers for Multivariate Time Series
abstract: Recent advancements in foundation models have been successfully extended to the time series (TS) domain, facilitated by the emergence of large-scale TS datasets. However, previous efforts have primarily Capturing channel dependency (CD) is essential for modeling multivariate time series (TS), and attention-based methods have been widely employed for this purpose. Nonetheless, these methods primarily focus on modifying the architecture, often neglecting the importance of dataset-specific characteristics. In this work, we introduce the concept of partial channel dependence (PCD) to enhance CD modeling in Transformer-based models by leveraging dataset-specific information to refine the CD captured by the model. To achieve PCD, we propose channel masks (CMs), which are integrated into the attention matrices of Transformers via element-wise multiplication. CMs consist of two components: 1) a similarity matrix that captures relationships between the channels, and 2) dataset-specific and learnable domain parameters that refine the similarity matrix. We validate the effectiveness of PCD across diverse tasks and datasets with various backbones. Code is available at this repository: https://github.com/YonseiML/pcd.
comment: ICASSP 2026. Preliminary version: NeurIPS Workshop on Time Series in the Age of Large Models 2024 (Oral presentation)

light_analysis.overview: 提出部分通道依赖（PCD）概念，通过集成数据集驱动的通道掩码到Transformer注意力矩阵中，增强多变量时间序列的通道依赖建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列建模中，捕获通道依赖至关重要，现有注意力方法主要关注架构修改，却忽略了数据集特定特征的重要性。该研究旨在利用数据集特定信息细化通道依赖，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出部分通道依赖（PCD）方法，通过通道掩码（CMs）集成到Transformer注意力矩阵中（元素级乘法）。CMs包含两部分：1）捕获通道间关系的相似度矩阵；2）数据集特定且可学习的域参数，用于细化相似度矩阵。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但声称在多种任务、数据集及不同骨干网络上验证了PCD的有效性，并提供开源代码。具体性能指标需参考论文正文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作引入部分通道依赖概念，通过数据集驱动的通道掩码改善Transformer对多变量时间序列的通道依赖建模，具有实用价值。未来可进一步探索更复杂的域参数设计或扩展到其他架构。

title: Quantum-inspired Reinforcement Learning for Synthesizable Drug Design
abstract: Synthesizable molecular design (also known as synthesizable molecular optimization) is a fundamental problem in drug discovery, and involves designing novel molecular structures to improve their properties according to drug-relevant oracle functions (i.e., objective) while ensuring synthetic feasibility. However, existing methods are mostly based on random search. To address this issue, in this paper, we introduce a novel approach using the reinforcement learning method with quantum-inspired simulated annealing policy neural network to navigate the vast discrete space of chemical structures intelligently. Specifically, we employ a deterministic REINFORCE algorithm using policy neural networks to output transitional probability to guide state transitions and local search using genetic algorithm to refine solutions to a local optimum within each iteration. Our methods are evaluated with the Practical Molecular Optimization (PMO) benchmark framework with a 10K query budget. We further showcase the competitive performance of our method by comparing it against the state-of-the-art genetic algorithms-based method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出量子启发强化学习方法，结合策略网络和遗传算法，实现可合成药物分子的高效设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 可合成分子设计是药物发现的关键问题，需要在优化药物相关性质的同时确保合成可行性。然而现有方法多基于随机搜索，无法高效探索广阔的化学离散空间。因此，亟需一种智能导航方法，提升搜索效率和优化质量。
light_analysis.method: 采用量子启发模拟退火策略神经网络驱动的强化学习框架。通过确定性REINFORCE算法，策略网络输出转移概率指导状态转移；在每次迭代中，结合遗传算法进行局部搜索以优化解。方法在Practical Molecular Optimization (PMO)基准框架下评估，使用10K查询预算。
light_analysis.result: 在PMO基准框架下，以10K查询预算进行实验，展示了与最先进的遗传算法方法相比具有竞争力的性能。摘要未明确量化具体指标，但强调了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种结合量子启发强化学习和遗传算法的可合成分子设计方法，为药物发现中的分子优化提供了新思路。该方法在有限查询预算下表现出竞争力，未来可进一步扩展到其他化学空间搜索任务。

title: Data Augmentation of Contrastive Learning is Estimating Positive-incentive Noise
abstract: Inspired by the idea of Positive-incentive Noise (Pi-Noise or $π$-Noise) that aims at learning the reliable noise beneficial to tasks, we scientifically investigate the connection between contrastive learning and $π$-noise in this paper. By converting the contrastive loss to an auxiliary Gaussian distribution to quantitatively measure the difficulty of the specific contrastive model under the information theory framework, we properly define the task entropy, the core concept of $π$-noise, of contrastive learning. It is further proved that the predefined data augmentation in the standard contrastive learning paradigm can be regarded as a kind of point estimation of $π$-noise. Inspired by the theoretical study, a framework that develops a $π$-noise generator to learn the beneficial noise (instead of estimation) as data augmentations for contrast is proposed. The designed framework can be applied to diverse types of data and is also completely compatible with the existing contrastive models. From the visualization, we surprisingly find that the proposed method successfully learns effective augmentations. Our code is available at https://github.com/hyzhang98/PiNDA.

light_analysis.overview: 证明对比学习的数据增强等价于Positive-incentive Noise的点估计，并提出学习有益噪声作为数据增强的框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 对比学习依赖经验性数据增强，缺乏理论指导。Positive-incentive Noise（Pi-Noise）旨在学习有益噪声，但尚未与对比学习建立联系。本研究旨在揭示二者关系，为设计更优增强提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 将对比损失转换为辅助高斯分布，在信息论下定义任务熵，证明标准数据增强是Pi-Noise的点估计。提出Pi-Noise生成器框架（PiNDA），通过学习有益噪声替代固定增强，兼容多种数据类型和现有对比模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，仅提及可视化显示成功学习有效增强。开源代码已提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 理论上确立了对比学习增强与Pi-Noise的等价性，实践上提出可学习增强框架，具有理论价值和通用性。未来可探索更高效的噪声生成器设计。

title: Aggressive or Imperceptible, or Both: Network Pruning Assisted Hybrid Byzantines in Federated Learning
abstract: In federated learning (FL), profiling and verifying each client is inherently difficult, which introduces a significant security vulnerability: malicious clients, commonly referred to as Byzantines, can degrade the accuracy of the global model by submitting poisoned updates during training. To mitigate this, the aggregation process at the parameter server must be robust against such adversarial behaviour. Most existing defences approach the Byzantine problem from an outlier detection perspective, treating malicious updates as statistical anomalies and ignoring the internal structure of the trained neural network (NN). Motivated by this, this work highlights the potential of leveraging side information tied to the NN architecture to design stronger, more targeted attacks. In particular, inspired by insights from sparse NNs, we introduce a hybrid sparse Byzantine attack. The attack consists of two coordinated components: (i) A sparse attack component that selectively manipulates parameters with higher sensitivity in the NN, aiming to cause maximum disruption with minimal visibility; (ii) A slow-accumulating attack component that silently poisons parameters over multiple rounds to evade detection. Together, these components create a strong but imperceptible attack strategy that can bypass common defences. We evaluate the proposed attack through extensive simulations and demonstrate its effectiveness against eight state-of-the-art defence mechanisms.
comment: Accepted to IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合网络剪枝的混合拜占庭攻击，利用神经网络结构信息实现强且隐蔽的攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中，恶意客户端可提交中毒更新破坏全局模型。现有防御多从异常检测角度出发，将恶意更新视为统计异常，忽略了神经网络内部结构。本文旨在利用NN架构的侧信息设计更强、更具针对性的攻击，以揭示现有防御的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合稀疏拜占庭攻击，包含两个协同组件：(i) 稀疏攻击组件，选择性操纵NN中高敏感性参数，以最小可见性造成最大破坏；(ii) 缓慢累积攻击组件，多轮悄悄投毒以逃避检测。结合网络剪枝思想，利用参数敏感性指导攻击。
light_analysis.result: 通过大量模拟实验，评估了所提攻击对八种最先进防御机制的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但声称攻击能绕过常见防御，表明其强且隐蔽的特性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了利用神经网络结构信息设计更强拜占庭攻击的可能性，对联邦学习安全性提出新挑战。混合稀疏攻击兼具破坏性和隐蔽性，可有效突破现有防御。未来可探索更鲁棒的防御策略。

title: RealLiFe: Real-Time Light Field Reconstruction via Hierarchical Sparse Gradient Descent
abstract: With the rise of Extended Reality (XR) technology, there is a growing need for real-time light field reconstruction from sparse view inputs. Existing methods can be classified into offline techniques, which can generate high-quality novel views but at the cost of long inference/training time, and online methods, which either lack generalizability or produce unsatisfactory results. However, we have observed that the intrinsic sparse manifold of Multi-plane Images (MPI) enables a significant acceleration of light field reconstruction while maintaining rendering quality.Based on this insight, we introduce \textbf{RealLiFe}, a novel light field optimization method, which leverages the proposed Hierarchical Sparse Gradient Descent (HSGD) to produce high-quality light fields from sparse input images in real time. Technically, the coarse MPI of a scene is first generated using a 3D CNN, and it is further optimized leveraging only the scene content aligned sparse MPI gradients in a few iterations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves comparable visual quality while being 100x faster on average than state-of-the-art offline methods and delivers better performance (about 2 dB higher in PSNR) compared to other online approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RealLiFe方法，利用分层稀疏梯度下降（HSGD）从稀疏视图输入实时重建高质量光场，实现速度与质量的高效平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩展现实（XR）技术对实时光场重建需求迫切，现有离线方法可生成高质量新视图但推理/训练时间长，在线方法则缺乏泛化性或结果不佳。多平面图像（MPI）的稀疏流形特性可显著加速重建，因此需要一种兼顾实时性与高质量的重建方法。
light_analysis.method: RealLiFe首先使用3D CNN生成场景的粗略MPI，然后通过分层稀疏梯度下降（HSGD）仅利用与场景内容对齐的稀疏MPI梯度进行少量迭代优化。该方法充分利用MPI的固有稀疏流形，在保持渲染质量的同时实现实时重建，迭代过程高效且可并行化。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RealLiFe在平均速度上比最先进离线方法快100倍，同时达到可比的视觉质量；与在线方法相比，PSNR提高约2 dB。该方法在多个数据集上验证了实时性和高质量，显著优于现有在线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RealLiFe通过利用MPI稀疏流形和HSGD优化，首次实现了稀疏输入下的实时高质量光场重建，为XR应用提供了高效解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的场景泛化性和更高效的梯度策略。该方法在学术上验证了稀疏优化在光场重建中的潜力，具有重要实用价值。

title: Quantifying Harm
abstract: In earlier work we defined a qualitative notion of harm: either harm is caused, or it is not. For practical applications, we often need to quantify harm; for example, we may want to choose the least harmful of a set of possible interventions. In this work, which is an expanded version of an earlier conference paper, we develop a quantitative notion of harm. We first present a quantitative definition of harm in a deterministic context involving a single individual, then we consider the issues involved in dealing with uncertainty regarding the context and going from a notion of harm for a single individual to a notion of "societal harm", which involves aggregating the harm to individuals. We show that the "obvious" way of doing this (just taking the expected harm for an individual and then summing the expected harm over all individuals) can lead to counterintuitive or inappropriate answers, and discuss alternatives, drawing on work from the decision-theory literature. Finally, we connect our work to a recent debate over harm within the context of precision medicine.

light_analysis.overview: 从定性伤害概念扩展到定量伤害框架，提出个体和社会伤害的量化方法，并应用于精准医学。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际应用中需要量化伤害以选择最小伤害的干预措施，但现有定性定义无法满足需求。摘要指出从个体伤害到社会伤害的聚合存在挑战，简单期望求和会导致反直觉结果，需探索更合理的决策理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出确定性条件下的个体伤害量化定义；然后引入不确定性处理，扩展至社会伤害聚合。论文批判了简单的期望伤害求和法，借鉴决策理论文献提出替代聚合方法。最后结合精准医学中的伤害争议进行讨论。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告实验数据或性能指标。主要贡献是构建了量化伤害的理论框架，并通过决策理论分析揭示了聚合方法的不合理之处。未涉及具体数据集或基线对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了从个体到社会的伤害量化体系，指出简单聚合的局限性，为实际决策提供了理论指导。与精准医学的关联展示了应用价值。未来可进一步探索不同聚合准则的适用条件。
